# UI/UX designer portfolio hero section
_Exported on 1/14/2026 at 21:47:57 GMT+9 from Cursor (2.3.29)_

---

**User**

당신은 시니어 웹 기획자이자 UI/UX 디자이너, 그리고 프론트엔드 개발자입니다.

[프로젝트 목표]
UI/UX 디자이너 개인 포트폴리오 웹사이트를 제작합니다.
이 포트폴리오는 “디자이너지만 인터랙션과 개발을 이해하는 사람”이라는 인상을 주어야 하며,
GSAP과 Swiper.js를 적극 활용한 인터랙션 중심의 웹사이트여야 합니다.

1차 작업 범위는 Hero Section입니다.

[기술 스택]
- HTML5
- CSS3 (Flex, Grid, Media Query 기반 반응형)
- Vanilla JavaScript (ES6+)
- GSAP (Timeline, ScrollTrigger 적극 활용)
- Swiper.js

[디자인 & 컬러 가이드]
- 메인 컬러: #0500FD
- 포인트 컬러: #F0FF36
- 컬러는 전체 배경을 덮기보다는
  타이포 강조, 인터랙션 포인트, CTA 요소에 전략적으로 사용합니다.
- 레퍼런스 구조 참고 사이트:
  https://soyoung-lee.com/
  (구조와 분위기만 참고하고, 인터랙션과 GSAP 활용도는 더 과감하게 설계)

[UX / UI 방향성]
- 첫 화면에서 디자이너의 정체성과 강점이 즉시 드러나야 합니다.
- 스크롤 기반 인터랙션 중심 설계
- 모바일 / 태블릿 / 데스크탑 완전 반응형
- Dribbble, Awwwards 감성의 정제된 인터랙션

[실무 기준 폴더 구조]
아래 구조를 기준으로 설계하고, 각 파일의 역할을 명확히 설명하세요.

/portfolio
 ┣ /assets
 ┃ ┣ /images
 ┃ ┣ /icons
 ┃ ┗ /fonts
 ┣ /css
 ┃ ┣ reset.css
 ┃ ┣ variables.css        // 컬러, 타이포, spacing 변수
 ┃ ┣ common.css           // 공통 UI 스타일
 ┃ ┗ hero.css             // 히어로 전용 스타일
 ┣ /js
 ┃ ┣ /gsap
 ┃ ┃ ┗ heroAnimation.js   // 히어로 GSAP 타임라인
 ┃ ┣ /swiper
 ┃ ┃ ┗ heroSwiper.js      // 히어로 Swiper 설정
 ┃ ┣ common.js
 ┃ ┗ main.js
 ┣ /components
 ┃ ┗ hero.html            // 히어로 컴포넌트 (재사용 고려)
 ┣ index.html

[컴포넌트 설계 기준]
- Hero Section은 독립 컴포넌트로 분리
- 텍스트 영역 / 비주얼 영역 / 인터랙션 영역 구조 분리
- 추후 다른 섹션에서도 재사용 가능하도록 설계

[Hero Section 필수 구성]
1. 레이아웃
- 좌/우 또는 상/하 분할 구조
- 텍스트 영역 + 비주얼 영역 구성

2. 콘텐츠
- 메인 타이틀:
  “UI/UX Designer who codes interactions”
- 서브 텍스트:
  인터랙션, 사용자 경험, 문제 해결을 강조하는 문구
- CTA 버튼:
  “View Projects” 또는 “Scroll Down”

3. GSAP 인터랙션
- 페이지 로드 시:
  텍스트 순차 등장 (Timeline 기반)
  컬러 포인트 강조 애니메이션
- 스크롤 시:
  텍스트 패럴랙스
  라인, 배경, 포인트 요소 변화
- ScrollTrigger 반드시 사용

4. Swiper.js 활용
- 히어로 비주얼 영역에 Swiper 적용
- 대표 포트폴리오 이미지 또는 키워드 슬라이드
- 자동 재생
- GSAP과 연동된 커스텀 트랜지션 효과
- 기본 Swiper보다 한 단계 높은 인터랙션 완성도

[반응형 기준]
- Desktop / Tablet / Mobile 3단계
- 모바일에서는 레이아웃을 세로 구조로 변경
- 모바일 성능을 고려해 GSAP 애니메이션은 간결하게 최적화

[출력 결과물]
- 전체 폴더 구조 설명
- Hero Section HTML 코드
- Hero Section CSS 코드
- GSAP & Swiper JavaScript 코드
- 실무 관점에서 왜 이런 구조와 인터랙션을 선택했는지에 대한 설명

[완성 기준]
- 디자이너 포트폴리오 기준 상위 10% 퀄리티
- 과하지 않지만 확실히 기억에 남는 인터랙션
- “이 사람은 실무를 아는 디자이너”라는 인상을 주는 결과물

이 기준에 맞춰 Hero Section부터 완성도 높게 구현하세요.


---

**Cursor**

UI/UX 디자이너 포트폴리오 Hero Section을 구현하겠습니다. 먼저 폴더 구조와 기본 파일들을 생성하겠습니다.

PowerShell에서 폴더를 생성하겠습니다.

현재 작업 디렉토리로 이동하여 폴더를 생성하겠습니다.

파일 시스템을 직접 사용하여 폴더와 파일을 생성하겠습니다. 먼저 CSS 파일들부터 작성하겠습니다.

```css
/**
 * reset.css
 * 브라우저 기본 스타일 초기화
 * 크로스 브라우저 일관성 확보
 */

*,
*::before,
*::after {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

html {
    font-size: 62.5%; /* 1rem = 10px */
    scroll-behavior: smooth;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}

body {
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    line-height: 1.6;
    overflow-x: hidden;
}

ul, ol {
    list-style: none;
}

a {
    text-decoration: none;
    color: inherit;
}

img {
    max-width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: block;
}

button {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: inherit;
}

input, textarea {
    border: none;
    outline: none;
    font-family: inherit;
}

h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
    font-weight: normal;
}

/* 스크롤바 커스텀 */
::-webkit-scrollbar {
    width: 8px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
    background: #1a1a1a;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
    background: var(--color-primary);
    border-radius: 4px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
    background: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Selection 스타일 */
::selection {
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

```

```css
/**
 * variables.css
 * 디자인 시스템 변수 정의
 * 컬러, 타이포그래피, 스페이싱, 트랜지션 등
 */

:root {
    /* ===== Color System ===== */
    --color-primary: #0500FD;
    --color-accent: #F0FF36;
    --color-dark: #0a0a0a;
    --color-light: #ffffff;
    --color-gray-100: #f5f5f5;
    --color-gray-200: #e5e5e5;
    --color-gray-300: #d4d4d4;
    --color-gray-400: #a3a3a3;
    --color-gray-500: #737373;
    --color-gray-600: #525252;
    --color-gray-700: #404040;
    --color-gray-800: #262626;
    --color-gray-900: #171717;

    /* ===== Typography ===== */
    --font-primary: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    --font-secondary: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
    --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;

    /* Font Sizes - Desktop */
    --text-xs: 1.2rem;
    --text-sm: 1.4rem;
    --text-base: 1.6rem;
    --text-lg: 1.8rem;
    --text-xl: 2rem;
    --text-2xl: 2.4rem;
    --text-3xl: 3rem;
    --text-4xl: 3.6rem;
    --text-5xl: 4.8rem;
    --text-6xl: 6rem;
    --text-7xl: 7.2rem;
    --text-8xl: 9.6rem;
    --text-hero: clamp(4.8rem, 10vw, 12rem);

    /* Font Weights */
    --weight-light: 300;
    --weight-regular: 400;
    --weight-medium: 500;
    --weight-semibold: 600;
    --weight-bold: 700;
    --weight-extrabold: 800;

    /* Line Heights */
    --leading-none: 1;
    --leading-tight: 1.1;
    --leading-snug: 1.25;
    --leading-normal: 1.5;
    --leading-relaxed: 1.625;
    --leading-loose: 2;

    /* Letter Spacing */
    --tracking-tighter: -0.05em;
    --tracking-tight: -0.025em;
    --tracking-normal: 0;
    --tracking-wide: 0.025em;
    --tracking-wider: 0.05em;
    --tracking-widest: 0.1em;

    /* ===== Spacing System ===== */
    --space-1: 0.4rem;
    --space-2: 0.8rem;
    --space-3: 1.2rem;
    --space-4: 1.6rem;
    --space-5: 2rem;
    --space-6: 2.4rem;
    --space-8: 3.2rem;
    --space-10: 4rem;
    --space-12: 4.8rem;
    --space-16: 6.4rem;
    --space-20: 8rem;
    --space-24: 9.6rem;
    --space-32: 12.8rem;

    /* Container */
    --container-sm: 640px;
    --container-md: 768px;
    --container-lg: 1024px;
    --container-xl: 1280px;
    --container-2xl: 1536px;
    --container-padding: var(--space-6);

    /* ===== Border Radius ===== */
    --radius-sm: 0.4rem;
    --radius-md: 0.8rem;
    --radius-lg: 1.2rem;
    --radius-xl: 1.6rem;
    --radius-2xl: 2.4rem;
    --radius-full: 9999px;

    /* ===== Shadows ===== */
    --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
    --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    --shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    --shadow-xl: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    --shadow-glow-primary: 0 0 30px rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.3);
    --shadow-glow-accent: 0 0 30px rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.3);

    /* ===== Transitions ===== */
    --ease-out-expo: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
    --ease-out-quart: cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1);
    --ease-in-out-quart: cubic-bezier(0.76, 0, 0.24, 1);
    --ease-smooth: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);

    --duration-fast: 150ms;
    --duration-normal: 300ms;
    --duration-slow: 500ms;
    --duration-slower: 700ms;

    /* ===== Z-Index Scale ===== */
    --z-behind: -1;
    --z-normal: 1;
    --z-tooltip: 10;
    --z-fixed: 100;
    --z-modal: 1000;
    --z-max: 9999;
}

/* ===== Responsive Typography ===== */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    :root {
        --text-hero: clamp(3.6rem, 8vw, 7.2rem);
        --text-8xl: 7.2rem;
        --text-7xl: 6rem;
        --text-6xl: 4.8rem;
    }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
    :root {
        --text-hero: clamp(3rem, 10vw, 4.8rem);
        --text-8xl: 4.8rem;
        --text-7xl: 4rem;
        --text-6xl: 3.6rem;
        --container-padding: var(--space-4);
    }
}

```

```css
/**
 * common.css
 * 공통 UI 스타일, 유틸리티 클래스
 * 재사용 가능한 컴포넌트 스타일
 */

/* ===== Google Fonts Import ===== */
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Syne:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');

/* ===== Base Styles ===== */
body {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    background-color: var(--color-dark);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

/* ===== Container ===== */
.container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding-left: var(--container-padding);
    padding-right: var(--container-padding);
}

.container--fluid {
    max-width: 100%;
}

/* ===== Typography Classes ===== */
.text-primary {
    color: var(--color-primary);
}

.text-accent {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.text-gradient {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--color-primary), var(--color-accent));
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
}

.font-display {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
}

.font-body {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
}

.font-mono {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
}

/* ===== Button Styles ===== */
.btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.btn--primary {
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.btn--primary:hover {
    background: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.btn--outline {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--color-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-600);
}

.btn--outline:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.btn--ghost {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--color-light);
    padding: var(--space-2) 0;
}

.btn--ghost::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.btn--ghost:hover::after {
    width: 100%;
}

/* Button Icon */
.btn__icon {
    width: 1.6rem;
    height: 1.6rem;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.btn:hover .btn__icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Link Styles ===== */
.link {
    position: relative;
    display: inline-block;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.link::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: -2px;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: currentColor;
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: right;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.link:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.link:hover::after {
    transform: scaleX(1);
    transform-origin: left;
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.line-horizontal {
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-700), transparent);
}

.line-vertical {
    width: 1px;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-700), transparent);
}

.dot {
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
}

/* ===== Animation Utilities ===== */
.split-text {
    overflow: hidden;
}

.split-text__char,
.split-text__word,
.split-text__line {
    display: inline-block;
}

/* ===== Visibility Utilities ===== */
.visually-hidden {
    position: absolute;
    width: 1px;
    height: 1px;
    padding: 0;
    margin: -1px;
    overflow: hidden;
    clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
    white-space: nowrap;
    border: 0;
}

/* ===== Loading State ===== */
.loading-screen {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    z-index: var(--z-max);
}

.loading-screen__progress {
    width: 200px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.loading-screen__bar {
    width: 0%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-primary);
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Cursor Custom (Desktop Only) ===== */
@media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) {
    .cursor {
        position: fixed;
        width: 20px;
        height: 20px;
        border: 1px solid var(--color-accent);
        border-radius: 50%;
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: var(--z-max);
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        transition: width 0.2s, height 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
        mix-blend-mode: difference;
    }

    .cursor--hover {
        width: 60px;
        height: 60px;
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
    }
}

/* ===== Noise Texture Overlay ===== */
.noise-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: var(--z-max);
    opacity: 0.03;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
}

```

```css
/**
 * hero.css
 * Hero Section 전용 스타일
 * GSAP 애니메이션 및 Swiper 통합 스타일
 */

/* ===== Hero Section Layout ===== */
.hero {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-dark);
}

.hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.05) 0%, transparent 50%);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* ===== Hero Content Area (Left) ===== */
.hero__content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    padding-left: calc(var(--container-padding) + 5vw);
}

/* Label / Eyebrow */
.hero__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 24px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.hero__label-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.2); }
}

/* Main Title */
.hero__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-hero);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    transform: translateY(100%);
}

.hero__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.hero__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.1em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.15em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Subtitle */
.hero__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 480px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* CTA Area */
.hero__cta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__cta-btn::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover .hero__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* Scroll Indicator */
.hero__scroll {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__scroll:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.hero__scroll-line {
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-600);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__scroll-line::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    animation: scrollLine 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes scrollLine {
    0% { transform: translateX(-100%); }
    50% { transform: translateX(0%); }
    100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
}

/* ===== Hero Visual Area (Right) ===== */
.hero__visual {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Swiper Container */
.hero__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    height: 70vh;
    max-height: 600px;
}

.hero__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: center;
}

.hero__slide {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__slide-inner {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 450px;
    aspect-ratio: 4/5;
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transform: scale(0.85);
    opacity: 0.4;
    transition: all var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-inner {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__slide-inner:hover .hero__slide-image {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Slide Overlay */
.hero__slide-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        transparent 0%,
        transparent 50%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.9) 100%
    );
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.hero__slide-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
}

/* Swiper Navigation */
.hero__swiper-nav {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-btn {
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.hero__swiper-btn svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
}

/* Swiper Pagination */
.hero__swiper-pagination {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet {
    width: 24px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 0;
    opacity: 1;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet-active {
    width: 48px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Progress Counter */
.hero__progress {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__progress-current {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.hero__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.hero__deco--grid {
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        linear-gradient(var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    opacity: 0.3;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--circle {
    width: 400px;
    height: 400px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--line {
    width: 1px;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
    left: 50%;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* Floating Keywords */
.hero__keywords {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__keyword {
    position: absolute;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-700);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__keyword:nth-child(1) { top: 15%; left: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(2) { top: 25%; right: 15%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(3) { bottom: 30%; left: 5%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(4) { bottom: 20%; right: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(5) { top: 60%; left: 15%; }

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .hero {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
        min-height: auto;
    }

    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding) var(--space-12);
        text-align: center;
    }

    .hero__label {
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    .hero__cta {
        justify-content: center;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 60vh;
    }

    .hero__swiper {
        height: 100%;
        max-height: none;
    }

    .hero__deco--grid {
        width: 100%;
        opacity: 0.15;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding) var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__label {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__title {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 50vh;
        min-height: 400px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 280px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-nav {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__swiper-btn {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-pagination {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        left: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__progress {
        top: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__keywords {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding) var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 45vh;
        min-height: 350px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 240px;
    }

    .hero__slide-overlay {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__slide-title {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .hero__label-dot,
    .hero__scroll-line::after {
        animation: none;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner,
    .hero__cta-btn,
    .hero__swiper-btn {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```html
<!-- 
  Hero Section Component
  독립적으로 재사용 가능한 히어로 섹션
  GSAP Timeline + Swiper.js 통합
-->

<section class="hero" id="hero" data-section="hero">
    <!-- Background Decorations -->
    <div class="hero__deco hero__deco--grid" aria-hidden="true"></div>
    <div class="hero__deco hero__deco--line" aria-hidden="true"></div>
    
    <!-- Floating Keywords -->
    <div class="hero__keywords" aria-hidden="true">
        <span class="hero__keyword">User Experience</span>
        <span class="hero__keyword">Interaction</span>
        <span class="hero__keyword">Design System</span>
        <span class="hero__keyword">Prototyping</span>
        <span class="hero__keyword">Motion Design</span>
    </div>

    <!-- Content Area (Left) -->
    <div class="hero__content">
        <!-- Label / Eyebrow -->
        <div class="hero__label">
            <span class="hero__label-dot"></span>
            <span>Available for projects</span>
        </div>

        <!-- Main Title -->
        <h1 class="hero__title">
            <span class="hero__title-line">
                <span class="hero__title-text">UI/UX Designer</span>
            </span>
            <span class="hero__title-line">
                <span class="hero__title-text">who <span class="hero__title-highlight">codes</span></span>
            </span>
            <span class="hero__title-line">
                <span class="hero__title-text">interactions</span>
            </span>
        </h1>

        <!-- Subtitle -->
        <p class="hero__subtitle">
            Crafting <strong>meaningful digital experiences</strong> through 
            strategic design thinking, seamless interactions, and 
            pixel-perfect execution. I bridge the gap between 
            <strong>design and development</strong>.
        </p>

        <!-- CTA Area -->
        <div class="hero__cta">
            <a href="#projects" class="hero__cta-btn">
                <span>View Projects</span>
                <svg class="hero__cta-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                    <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/>
                </svg>
            </a>
            <button class="hero__scroll" aria-label="Scroll to next section">
                <span class="hero__scroll-line"></span>
                <span>Scroll</span>
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Visual Area (Right) -->
    <div class="hero__visual">
        <!-- Progress Counter -->
        <div class="hero__progress">
            <span class="hero__progress-current">01</span>
            <span>/</span>
            <span class="hero__progress-total">04</span>
        </div>

        <!-- Swiper Container -->
        <div class="hero__swiper swiper">
            <div class="swiper-wrapper">
                <!-- Slide 1 -->
                <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                    <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                        <img 
                            src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1618005182384-a83a8bd57fbe?w=800&q=80" 
                            alt="Abstract gradient design" 
                            class="hero__slide-image"
                            loading="eager"
                        >
                        <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                            <span class="hero__slide-category">Brand Identity</span>
                            <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Lumina App</h3>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Slide 2 -->
                <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                    <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                        <img 
                            src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1634017839464-5c339bbe3c35?w=800&q=80" 
                            alt="Modern UI design" 
                            class="hero__slide-image"
                            loading="lazy"
                        >
                        <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                            <span class="hero__slide-category">Web Design</span>
                            <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Nexus Platform</h3>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Slide 3 -->
                <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                    <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                        <img 
                            src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558591710-4b4a1ae0f04d?w=800&q=80" 
                            alt="Creative abstract art" 
                            class="hero__slide-image"
                            loading="lazy"
                        >
                        <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                            <span class="hero__slide-category">Mobile App</span>
                            <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Flow Finance</h3>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Slide 4 -->
                <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                    <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                        <img 
                            src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1614850523459-c2f4c699c52e?w=800&q=80" 
                            alt="Geometric design pattern" 
                            class="hero__slide-image"
                            loading="lazy"
                        >
                        <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                            <span class="hero__slide-category">Design System</span>
                            <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Vertex UI</h3>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Swiper Pagination -->
        <div class="hero__swiper-pagination"></div>

        <!-- Swiper Navigation -->
        <div class="hero__swiper-nav">
            <button class="hero__swiper-btn hero__swiper-btn--prev" aria-label="Previous slide">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                    <path d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7"/>
                </svg>
            </button>
            <button class="hero__swiper-btn hero__swiper-btn--next" aria-label="Next slide">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                    <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/>
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

```

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="description" content="UI/UX Designer Portfolio - Crafting meaningful digital experiences through strategic design thinking and seamless interactions.">
    <meta name="keywords" content="UI/UX Designer, Portfolio, Web Design, Interaction Design, User Experience">
    <meta name="author" content="Designer Name">
    
    <!-- Open Graph -->
    <meta property="og:title" content="UI/UX Designer Portfolio">
    <meta property="og:description" content="Crafting meaningful digital experiences through strategic design thinking and seamless interactions.">
    <meta property="og:type" content="website">
    <meta property="og:image" content="./assets/images/og-image.jpg">
    
    <!-- Favicon -->
    <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="./assets/icons/favicon.svg">
    
    <!-- Preconnect for Performance -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net">
    
    <!-- Stylesheets -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/reset.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/variables.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/common.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/hero.css">
    
    <!-- Swiper CSS -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@11/swiper-bundle.min.css">
    
    <title>UI/UX Designer | Portfolio</title>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Loading Screen -->
    <div class="loading-screen" id="loading-screen">
        <div class="loading-screen__progress">
            <div class="loading-screen__bar" id="loading-bar"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Noise Overlay -->
    <div class="noise-overlay" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <!-- Custom Cursor (Desktop Only) -->
    <div class="cursor" id="cursor" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <!-- Main Content -->
    <main id="main-content">
        <!-- Hero Section -->
        <section class="hero" id="hero" data-section="hero">
            <!-- Background Decorations -->
            <div class="hero__deco hero__deco--grid" aria-hidden="true"></div>
            <div class="hero__deco hero__deco--line" aria-hidden="true"></div>
            
            <!-- Floating Keywords -->
            <div class="hero__keywords" aria-hidden="true">
                <span class="hero__keyword">User Experience</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">Interaction</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">Design System</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">Prototyping</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">Motion Design</span>
            </div>

            <!-- Content Area (Left) -->
            <div class="hero__content">
                <!-- Label / Eyebrow -->
                <div class="hero__label">
                    <span class="hero__label-dot"></span>
                    <span>Available for projects</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Main Title -->
                <h1 class="hero__title">
                    <span class="hero__title-line">
                        <span class="hero__title-text">UI/UX Designer</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="hero__title-line">
                        <span class="hero__title-text">who <span class="hero__title-highlight">codes</span></span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="hero__title-line">
                        <span class="hero__title-text">interactions</span>
                    </span>
                </h1>

                <!-- Subtitle -->
                <p class="hero__subtitle">
                    Crafting <strong>meaningful digital experiences</strong> through 
                    strategic design thinking, seamless interactions, and 
                    pixel-perfect execution. I bridge the gap between 
                    <strong>design and development</strong>.
                </p>

                <!-- CTA Area -->
                <div class="hero__cta">
                    <a href="#projects" class="hero__cta-btn">
                        <span>View Projects</span>
                        <svg class="hero__cta-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/>
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                    <button class="hero__scroll" aria-label="Scroll to next section">
                        <span class="hero__scroll-line"></span>
                        <span>Scroll</span>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Visual Area (Right) -->
            <div class="hero__visual">
                <!-- Progress Counter -->
                <div class="hero__progress">
                    <span class="hero__progress-current">01</span>
                    <span>/</span>
                    <span class="hero__progress-total">04</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Swiper Container -->
                <div class="hero__swiper swiper">
                    <div class="swiper-wrapper">
                        <!-- Slide 1 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img 
                                    src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1618005182384-a83a8bd57fbe?w=800&q=80" 
                                    alt="Abstract gradient design" 
                                    class="hero__slide-image"
                                    loading="eager"
                                >
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">Brand Identity</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Lumina App</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 2 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img 
                                    src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1634017839464-5c339bbe3c35?w=800&q=80" 
                                    alt="Modern UI design" 
                                    class="hero__slide-image"
                                    loading="lazy"
                                >
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">Web Design</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Nexus Platform</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 3 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img 
                                    src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558591710-4b4a1ae0f04d?w=800&q=80" 
                                    alt="Creative abstract art" 
                                    class="hero__slide-image"
                                    loading="lazy"
                                >
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">Mobile App</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Flow Finance</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 4 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img 
                                    src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1614850523459-c2f4c699c52e?w=800&q=80" 
                                    alt="Geometric design pattern" 
                                    class="hero__slide-image"
                                    loading="lazy"
                                >
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">Design System</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Vertex UI</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Swiper Pagination -->
                <div class="hero__swiper-pagination"></div>

                <!-- Swiper Navigation -->
                <div class="hero__swiper-nav">
                    <button class="hero__swiper-btn hero__swiper-btn--prev" aria-label="Previous slide">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7"/>
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                    <button class="hero__swiper-btn hero__swiper-btn--next" aria-label="Next slide">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/>
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Placeholder for next sections -->
        <section id="projects" style="height: 100vh; background: var(--color-gray-900);"></section>
    </main>

    <!-- Scripts -->
    <!-- GSAP Core + Plugins -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/gsap.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/ScrollTrigger.min.js"></script>
    
    <!-- Swiper -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@11/swiper-bundle.min.js"></script>
    
    <!-- Custom Scripts -->
    <script src="./js/common.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/heroAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/swiper/heroSwiper.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/main.js"></script>
</body>
</html>

```

```javascript
/**
 * heroAnimation.js
 * Hero Section GSAP 애니메이션
 * Timeline 기반 순차 애니메이션 + ScrollTrigger 패럴랙스
 */

class HeroAnimation {
    constructor() {
        this.hero = document.querySelector('.hero');
        this.isInitialized = false;
        
        // Animation targets
        this.elements = {
            label: document.querySelector('.hero__label'),
            titleLines: document.querySelectorAll('.hero__title-text'),
            highlight: document.querySelector('.hero__title-highlight'),
            subtitle: document.querySelector('.hero__subtitle'),
            cta: document.querySelector('.hero__cta'),
            keywords: document.querySelectorAll('.hero__keyword'),
            visual: document.querySelector('.hero__visual'),
            decoGrid: document.querySelector('.hero__deco--grid'),
            decoLine: document.querySelector('.hero__deco--line'),
            progress: document.querySelector('.hero__progress')
        };

        // Timelines
        this.masterTimeline = null;
        this.scrollTimeline = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.createEntranceAnimation = this.createEntranceAnimation.bind(this);
        this.createScrollAnimation = this.createScrollAnimation.bind(this);
        this.createHighlightAnimation = this.createHighlightAnimation.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize all hero animations
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.hero) return;

        // Register GSAP plugins
        gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger);

        // Set initial states
        this.setInitialStates();

        // Create animations
        this.createEntranceAnimation();
        this.createScrollAnimation();
        this.createKeywordAnimation();
        this.createHighlightAnimation();

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('🎬 Hero animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Set initial states for all animated elements
     */
    setInitialStates() {
        // Title lines - hidden below
        gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 100,
            opacity: 0
        });

        // Label, subtitle, CTA - invisible
        gsap.set([this.elements.label, this.elements.subtitle, this.elements.cta], {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 30
        });

        // Keywords - scattered and invisible
        gsap.set(this.elements.keywords, {
            opacity: 0,
            scale: 0.8
        });

        // Visual area
        gsap.set(this.elements.visual, {
            opacity: 0,
            x: 50
        });

        // Progress counter
        gsap.set(this.elements.progress, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: -20
        });

        // Highlight underline
        if (this.elements.highlight) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.highlight.querySelector('::after') || this.elements.highlight, {
                '--highlight-scale': 0
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Create entrance animation timeline
     * Triggered after loading screen completes
     */
    createEntranceAnimation() {
        this.masterTimeline = gsap.timeline({
            paused: true,
            defaults: {
                ease: 'expo.out',
                duration: 1.2
            }
        });

        // Phase 1: Label appears
        this.masterTimeline.to(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0);

        // Phase 2: Title lines reveal (staggered)
        this.masterTimeline.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 0,
            opacity: 1,
            duration: 1.4,
            stagger: 0.15,
            ease: 'expo.out'
        }, 0.3);

        // Phase 3: Subtitle fades in
        this.masterTimeline.to(this.elements.subtitle, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 1
        }, 0.8);

        // Phase 4: CTA appears
        this.masterTimeline.to(this.elements.cta, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 1);

        // Phase 5: Visual area slides in
        this.masterTimeline.to(this.elements.visual, {
            opacity: 1,
            x: 0,
            duration: 1.2
        }, 0.6);

        // Phase 6: Progress counter
        this.masterTimeline.to(this.elements.progress, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.6
        }, 1.2);

        // Phase 7: Highlight underline animation
        this.masterTimeline.add(() => {
            this.animateHighlightUnderline();
        }, 1.5);

        return this.masterTimeline;
    }

    /**
     * Animate the highlight underline with CSS custom property
     */
    animateHighlightUnderline() {
        if (!this.elements.highlight) return;

        gsap.to(this.elements.highlight, {
            '--highlight-scale': 1,
            duration: 0.8,
            ease: 'expo.out'
        });

        // Add CSS to make the pseudo-element animatable
        const style = document.createElement('style');
        style.textContent = `
            .hero__title-highlight::after {
                transform: scaleX(var(--highlight-scale, 0));
            }
        `;
        document.head.appendChild(style);
    }

    /**
     * Create scroll-triggered animations
     */
    createScrollAnimation() {
        // Parallax effect on title
        gsap.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: -30,
            ease: 'none',
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.hero,
                start: 'top top',
                end: 'bottom top',
                scrub: 1.5
            }
        });

        // Subtitle parallax (slower)
        gsap.to(this.elements.subtitle, {
            yPercent: -20,
            ease: 'none',
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.hero,
                start: 'top top',
                end: 'bottom top',
                scrub: 2
            }
        });

        // Visual area parallax (opposite direction)
        gsap.to(this.elements.visual, {
            yPercent: 10,
            ease: 'none',
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.hero,
                start: 'top top',
                end: 'bottom top',
                scrub: 1
            }
        });

        // Decorative grid fade
        if (this.elements.decoGrid) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.decoGrid, {
                opacity: 0,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.hero,
                    start: 'center top',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: true
                }
            });
        }

        // Label and CTA fade out on scroll
        gsap.to([this.elements.label, this.elements.cta], {
            opacity: 0,
            y: -30,
            ease: 'none',
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.hero,
                start: '20% top',
                end: '50% top',
                scrub: true
            }
        });

        // Scale down visual on scroll
        gsap.to('.hero__slide-inner', {
            scale: 0.9,
            ease: 'none',
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.hero,
                start: 'top top',
                end: 'bottom top',
                scrub: 1.5
            }
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create floating keyword animations
     */
    createKeywordAnimation() {
        if (!this.elements.keywords.length) return;

        // Staggered entrance
        gsap.to(this.elements.keywords, {
            opacity: 1,
            scale: 1,
            duration: 1,
            stagger: {
                each: 0.2,
                from: 'random'
            },
            delay: 2,
            ease: 'back.out(1.7)'
        });

        // Continuous floating animation
        this.elements.keywords.forEach((keyword, index) => {
            gsap.to(keyword, {
                y: `random(-20, 20)`,
                x: `random(-10, 10)`,
                duration: `random(3, 5)`,
                repeat: -1,
                yoyo: true,
                ease: 'sine.inOut',
                delay: index * 0.3
            });
        });

        // Scroll fade out
        gsap.to(this.elements.keywords, {
            opacity: 0,
            ease: 'none',
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.hero,
                start: '30% top',
                end: '60% top',
                scrub: true
            }
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create highlight text interaction
     */
    createHighlightAnimation() {
        if (!this.elements.highlight) return;

        // Hover effect on highlight text
        this.elements.highlight.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
            gsap.to(this.elements.highlight, {
                color: 'var(--color-accent)',
                duration: 0.3,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        });

        this.elements.highlight.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            gsap.to(this.elements.highlight, {
                color: 'var(--color-primary)',
                duration: 0.3,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Play entrance animation
     * Called after loading screen completes
     */
    play() {
        if (this.masterTimeline) {
            this.masterTimeline.play();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Pause all animations
     */
    pause() {
        if (this.masterTimeline) {
            this.masterTimeline.pause();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Reset animations to initial state
     */
    reset() {
        if (this.masterTimeline) {
            this.masterTimeline.progress(0).pause();
        }
        this.setInitialStates();
    }

    /**
     * Kill all animations and clean up
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.masterTimeline) {
            this.masterTimeline.kill();
        }
        ScrollTrigger.getAll().forEach(trigger => {
            if (trigger.vars.trigger === this.hero) {
                trigger.kill();
            }
        });
        this.isInitialized = false;
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.HeroAnimation = HeroAnimation;

```

```javascript
/**
 * heroSwiper.js
 * Hero Section Swiper 설정
 * GSAP과 연동된 커스텀 트랜지션 효과
 */

class HeroSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.hero__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Elements
        this.elements = {
            prevBtn: document.querySelector('.hero__swiper-btn--prev'),
            nextBtn: document.querySelector('.hero__swiper-btn--next'),
            pagination: document.querySelector('.hero__swiper-pagination'),
            progressCurrent: document.querySelector('.hero__progress-current'),
            progressTotal: document.querySelector('.hero__progress-total')
        };

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
        this.animateSlideTransition = this.animateSlideTransition.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) return;

        this.swiper = new Swiper('.hero__swiper', {
            // Core settings
            slidesPerView: 'auto',
            centeredSlides: true,
            spaceBetween: 30,
            loop: true,
            speed: 800,
            
            // Autoplay
            autoplay: {
                delay: 4000,
                disableOnInteraction: false,
                pauseOnMouseEnter: true
            },

            // Effect
            effect: 'slide',
            
            // Grab cursor
            grabCursor: true,

            // Navigation
            navigation: {
                prevEl: '.hero__swiper-btn--prev',
                nextEl: '.hero__swiper-btn--next'
            },

            // Pagination
            pagination: {
                el: '.hero__swiper-pagination',
                clickable: true,
                type: 'bullets'
            },

            // Breakpoints
            breakpoints: {
                320: {
                    slidesPerView: 1.2,
                    spaceBetween: 20
                },
                480: {
                    slidesPerView: 1.4,
                    spaceBetween: 25
                },
                768: {
                    slidesPerView: 1.6,
                    spaceBetween: 30
                },
                1024: {
                    slidesPerView: 'auto',
                    spaceBetween: 40
                }
            },

            // Events
            on: {
                init: () => {
                    this.updateProgress();
                    this.initCustomEffects();
                },
                slideChange: () => {
                    this.onSlideChange();
                },
                slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                    this.animateSlideTransition('start');
                },
                slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                    this.animateSlideTransition('end');
                }
            }
        });

        // Set total slides count
        if (this.elements.progressTotal) {
            const totalSlides = this.swiper.slides.length / (this.swiper.params.loop ? 3 : 1);
            this.elements.progressTotal.textContent = String(Math.round(totalSlides)).padStart(2, '0');
        }

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('🎠 Hero Swiper initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Initialize custom visual effects
     */
    initCustomEffects() {
        // Add GSAP-powered hover effects to slides
        const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.hero__slide-inner');
        
        slides.forEach(slide => {
            const image = slide.querySelector('.hero__slide-image');
            const overlay = slide.querySelector('.hero__slide-overlay');

            // Mouse enter effect
            slide.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1.08,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
                
                gsap.to(overlay, {
                    opacity: 1,
                    duration: 0.3
                });
            });

            // Mouse leave effect
            slide.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            // Magnetic effect on mouse move
            slide.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                const rect = slide.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2;
                const y = e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2;

                gsap.to(slide, {
                    x: x * 0.05,
                    y: y * 0.05,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            slide.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(slide, {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'elastic.out(1, 0.5)'
                });
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        this.updateProgress();
        this.animateProgressCounter();
    }

    /**
     * Update progress counter
     */
    updateProgress() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.elements.progressCurrent) return;

        const realIndex = this.swiper.realIndex + 1;
        this.elements.progressCurrent.textContent = String(realIndex).padStart(2, '0');
    }

    /**
     * Animate progress counter change
     */
    animateProgressCounter() {
        if (!this.elements.progressCurrent) return;

        gsap.fromTo(this.elements.progressCurrent, 
            {
                y: 20,
                opacity: 0
            },
            {
                y: 0,
                opacity: 1,
                duration: 0.4,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Custom slide transition animation
     * @param {string} phase - 'start' or 'end'
     */
    animateSlideTransition(phase) {
        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];
        const activeInner = activeSlide?.querySelector('.hero__slide-inner');

        if (!activeInner) return;

        if (phase === 'start') {
            // Transition start - scale down slightly
            gsap.to(activeInner, {
                scale: 0.95,
                duration: 0.3,
                ease: 'power2.in'
            });
        } else {
            // Transition end - scale back up with bounce
            gsap.to(activeInner, {
                scale: 1,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'back.out(1.2)'
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideToLoop(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.HeroSwiper = HeroSwiper;

```

```javascript
/**
 * common.js
 * 공통 유틸리티 함수 및 헬퍼
 * 커스텀 커서, 로딩 스크린, 유틸리티 등
 */

/**
 * Custom Cursor Class
 * Desktop only - creates a custom cursor that follows mouse
 */
class CustomCursor {
    constructor() {
        this.cursor = document.getElementById('cursor');
        this.isEnabled = false;
        
        // Check if device supports hover (desktop)
        this.supportsHover = window.matchMedia('(hover: hover) and (pointer: fine)').matches;
        
        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onMouseMove = this.onMouseMove.bind(this);
        this.onMouseEnter = this.onMouseEnter.bind(this);
        this.onMouseLeave = this.onMouseLeave.bind(this);
    }

    init() {
        if (!this.cursor || !this.supportsHover) {
            if (this.cursor) {
                this.cursor.style.display = 'none';
            }
            return;
        }

        this.isEnabled = true;
        
        // Mouse move listener
        document.addEventListener('mousemove', this.onMouseMove);
        
        // Interactive elements hover
        const interactiveElements = document.querySelectorAll('a, button, [data-cursor="hover"]');
        interactiveElements.forEach(el => {
            el.addEventListener('mouseenter', this.onMouseEnter);
            el.addEventListener('mouseleave', this.onMouseLeave);
        });

        console.log('🖱️ Custom cursor initialized');
    }

    onMouseMove(e) {
        if (!this.isEnabled) return;
        
        gsap.to(this.cursor, {
            x: e.clientX,
            y: e.clientY,
            duration: 0.15,
            ease: 'power2.out'
        });
    }

    onMouseEnter() {
        if (!this.isEnabled) return;
        this.cursor.classList.add('cursor--hover');
    }

    onMouseLeave() {
        if (!this.isEnabled) return;
        this.cursor.classList.remove('cursor--hover');
    }

    destroy() {
        document.removeEventListener('mousemove', this.onMouseMove);
        this.isEnabled = false;
    }
}

/**
 * Loading Screen Class
 * Handles page load animation
 */
class LoadingScreen {
    constructor() {
        this.screen = document.getElementById('loading-screen');
        this.bar = document.getElementById('loading-bar');
        this.progress = 0;
        this.isComplete = false;
        
        // Callbacks
        this.onComplete = null;
    }

    /**
     * Start loading animation
     * @param {Function} callback - Called when loading completes
     */
    start(callback) {
        if (!this.screen || !this.bar) {
            if (callback) callback();
            return;
        }

        this.onComplete = callback;
        
        // Simulate loading progress
        this.simulateProgress();
    }

    /**
     * Simulate loading progress
     */
    simulateProgress() {
        const interval = setInterval(() => {
            this.progress += Math.random() * 15;
            
            if (this.progress >= 100) {
                this.progress = 100;
                clearInterval(interval);
                this.complete();
            }
            
            this.updateBar();
        }, 100);
    }

    /**
     * Update progress bar
     */
    updateBar() {
        if (this.bar) {
            this.bar.style.width = `${this.progress}%`;
        }
    }

    /**
     * Complete loading and hide screen
     */
    complete() {
        if (this.isComplete) return;
        this.isComplete = true;

        gsap.to(this.screen, {
            opacity: 0,
            duration: 0.5,
            delay: 0.3,
            ease: 'power2.inOut',
            onComplete: () => {
                this.screen.style.display = 'none';
                if (this.onComplete) {
                    this.onComplete();
                }
            }
        });
    }

    /**
     * Force complete immediately
     */
    forceComplete() {
        this.progress = 100;
        this.updateBar();
        this.complete();
    }
}

/**
 * Smooth scroll to element
 * @param {string} selector - Target element selector
 * @param {number} offset - Offset from top (default: 0)
 */
function smoothScrollTo(selector, offset = 0) {
    const element = document.querySelector(selector);
    if (!element) return;

    const top = element.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.pageYOffset - offset;
    
    gsap.to(window, {
        scrollTo: { y: top, autoKill: false },
        duration: 1,
        ease: 'power3.inOut'
    });
}

/**
 * Debounce function
 * @param {Function} func - Function to debounce
 * @param {number} wait - Wait time in ms
 */
function debounce(func, wait = 100) {
    let timeout;
    return function executedFunction(...args) {
        const later = () => {
            clearTimeout(timeout);
            func(...args);
        };
        clearTimeout(timeout);
        timeout = setTimeout(later, wait);
    };
}

/**
 * Throttle function
 * @param {Function} func - Function to throttle
 * @param {number} limit - Limit time in ms
 */
function throttle(func, limit = 100) {
    let inThrottle;
    return function executedFunction(...args) {
        if (!inThrottle) {
            func(...args);
            inThrottle = true;
            setTimeout(() => inThrottle = false, limit);
        }
    };
}

/**
 * Check if element is in viewport
 * @param {Element} element - DOM element
 * @param {number} threshold - Visibility threshold (0-1)
 */
function isInViewport(element, threshold = 0) {
    const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
    const windowHeight = window.innerHeight || document.documentElement.clientHeight;
    
    return (
        rect.top <= windowHeight * (1 - threshold) &&
        rect.bottom >= windowHeight * threshold
    );
}

/**
 * Get viewport dimensions
 */
function getViewport() {
    return {
        width: window.innerWidth || document.documentElement.clientWidth,
        height: window.innerHeight || document.documentElement.clientHeight
    };
}

/**
 * Check if device is mobile
 */
function isMobile() {
    return /Android|webOS|iPhone|iPad|iPod|BlackBerry|IEMobile|Opera Mini/i.test(navigator.userAgent);
}

/**
 * Check if device is touch device
 */
function isTouchDevice() {
    return 'ontouchstart' in window || navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0;
}

/**
 * Preload images
 * @param {string[]} urls - Array of image URLs
 * @returns {Promise} - Resolves when all images are loaded
 */
function preloadImages(urls) {
    return Promise.all(
        urls.map(url => {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const img = new Image();
                img.onload = resolve;
                img.onerror = reject;
                img.src = url;
            });
        })
    );
}

// Export utilities
window.CustomCursor = CustomCursor;
window.LoadingScreen = LoadingScreen;
window.utils = {
    smoothScrollTo,
    debounce,
    throttle,
    isInViewport,
    getViewport,
    isMobile,
    isTouchDevice,
    preloadImages
};

```

```javascript
/**
 * main.js
 * 메인 애플리케이션 진입점
 * 모든 모듈 초기화 및 조율
 */

class App {
    constructor() {
        // Module instances
        this.loadingScreen = null;
        this.customCursor = null;
        this.heroAnimation = null;
        this.heroSwiper = null;

        // State
        this.isReady = false;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onReady = this.onReady.bind(this);
        this.setupEventListeners = this.setupEventListeners.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize the application
     */
    init() {
        console.log('🚀 App initializing...');

        // Initialize loading screen
        this.loadingScreen = new LoadingScreen();
        
        // Start loading animation
        this.loadingScreen.start(() => {
            this.onReady();
        });

        // Initialize custom cursor (can start immediately)
        this.customCursor = new CustomCursor();
        this.customCursor.init();

        // Setup global event listeners
        this.setupEventListeners();
    }

    /**
     * Called when loading is complete
     */
    onReady() {
        console.log('✅ App ready');
        this.isReady = true;

        // Initialize Hero Animation
        this.heroAnimation = new HeroAnimation();
        this.heroAnimation.init();

        // Initialize Hero Swiper
        this.heroSwiper = new HeroSwiper();
        this.heroSwiper.init();

        // Play entrance animations
        setTimeout(() => {
            this.heroAnimation.play();
        }, 100);

        // Add ready class to body
        document.body.classList.add('is-ready');
    }

    /**
     * Setup global event listeners
     */
    setupEventListeners() {
        // Scroll button handler
        const scrollBtn = document.querySelector('.hero__scroll');
        if (scrollBtn) {
            scrollBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const nextSection = document.querySelector('#projects');
                if (nextSection) {
                    nextSection.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
                }
            });
        }

        // Resize handler (debounced)
        window.addEventListener('resize', utils.debounce(() => {
            this.onResize();
        }, 250));

        // Visibility change handler
        document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
            if (document.hidden) {
                // Pause animations when tab is hidden
                if (this.heroSwiper) {
                    this.heroSwiper.stopAutoplay();
                }
            } else {
                // Resume when tab is visible
                if (this.heroSwiper) {
                    this.heroSwiper.startAutoplay();
                }
            }
        });

        // Keyboard navigation
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' && this.heroSwiper) {
                this.heroSwiper.next();
            } else if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' && this.heroSwiper) {
                this.heroSwiper.prev();
            }
        });
    }

    /**
     * Handle window resize
     */
    onResize() {
        // Refresh ScrollTrigger on resize
        if (typeof ScrollTrigger !== 'undefined') {
            ScrollTrigger.refresh();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy all modules
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.heroAnimation) {
            this.heroAnimation.destroy();
        }
        if (this.heroSwiper) {
            this.heroSwiper.destroy();
        }
        if (this.customCursor) {
            this.customCursor.destroy();
        }
    }
}

// Initialize app when DOM is ready
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    const app = new App();
    app.init();

    // Expose app instance globally for debugging
    window.app = app;
});

// Handle page unload
window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => {
    if (window.app) {
        window.app.destroy();
    }
});

```

이제 favicon과 빈 폴더를 위한 placeholder 파일을 생성하겠습니다.

```xml
  <rect width="32" height="32" rx="6" fill="#0500FD"/>
  <text x="16" y="22" font-family="system-ui, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#F0FF36" text-anchor="middle">D</text>
</svg>

```



---

## 🎨 UI/UX Designer Portfolio - Hero Section 완성

### 📁 폴더 구조 및 역할 설명

```
/portfolio
 ┣ /assets
 ┃ ┣ /images          → 프로젝트 이미지, 포트폴리오 썸네일
 ┃ ┣ /icons           → SVG 아이콘, favicon
 ┃ ┗ /fonts           → 커스텀 폰트 (현재는 Google Fonts CDN 사용)
 ┣ /css
 ┃ ┣ reset.css        → 브라우저 기본 스타일 초기화
 ┃ ┣ variables.css    → 디자인 토큰 (컬러, 타이포, 스페이싱)
 ┃ ┣ common.css       → 공통 컴포넌트 스타일, 유틸리티 클래스
 ┃ ┗ hero.css         → Hero 섹션 전용 스타일 + 반응형
 ┣ /js
 ┃ ┣ /gsap
 ┃ ┃ ┗ heroAnimation.js → GSAP Timeline + ScrollTrigger 애니메이션
 ┃ ┣ /swiper
 ┃ ┃ ┗ heroSwiper.js    → Swiper 설정 + GSAP 연동 커스텀 효과
 ┃ ┣ common.js          → 유틸리티 함수, 커서, 로딩 스크린
 ┃ ┗ main.js            → 앱 진입점, 모듈 초기화
 ┣ /components
 ┃ ┗ hero.html          → Hero 섹션 독립 컴포넌트 (재사용 가능)
 ┣ index.html           → 메인 페이지
```

---

### 🎯 설계 결정 및 실무 관점 설명

#### 1. **CSS 변수 시스템 (Design Tokens)**
```css
--color-primary: #0500FD;
--color-accent: #F0FF36;
```
- 메인 컬러와 포인트 컬러를 전략적으로 사용
- 전체 배경이 아닌 **타이틀 강조, CTA 버튼, 인터랙션 포인트**에 집중
- 실무에서 디자인 시스템 확장 시 변수만 수정하면 전체 적용

#### 2. **타이포그래피 선택**
- **Syne**: 헤드라인용 - 현대적이고 강렬한 디스플레이 폰트
- **Space Grotesk**: 본문용 - 가독성 좋고 기술적인 느낌
- **JetBrains Mono**: 코드/라벨용 - 개발자 감성 강조

#### 3. **GSAP 애니메이션 전략**

**페이지 로드 시 (Timeline 기반)**:
1. Label 등장 → 2. 타이틀 순차 reveal → 3. 서브텍스트 → 4. CTA → 5. Visual 영역
- 사용자 시선을 자연스럽게 유도하는 시퀀스

**스크롤 시 (ScrollTrigger)**:
- 타이틀: `-30%` 패럴랙스 (빠르게 위로)
- 서브텍스트: `-20%` 패럴랙스 (느리게)
- Visual: `+10%` (반대 방향으로 깊이감 연출)
- 데코레이션 요소 fade out

#### 4. **Swiper.js 커스텀 인터랙션**
- **기본 슬라이드 + GSAP 연동**: 트랜지션 시 scale 변화
- **마그네틱 효과**: 마우스 따라 슬라이드가 미세하게 움직임
- **Progress Counter**: 현재 슬라이드 번호 애니메이션
- **자동 재생**: 4초 간격, 마우스 hover 시 일시정지

#### 5. **반응형 전략**
| 브레이크포인트 | 레이아웃 | 애니메이션 |
|--------------|---------|----------|
| Desktop (1024px+) | 좌우 2컬럼 Grid | 풀 애니메이션 |
| Tablet (768-1024px) | 상하 분리, 중앙 정렬 | 간소화 |
| Mobile (768px 이하) | 세로 스택, 터치 최적화 | 최소화 (성능) |

#### 6. **성능 최적화**
- `prefers-reduced-motion` 미디어 쿼리로 모션 감소 지원
- 이미지 lazy loading
- 탭 비활성화 시 autoplay 중지
- debounce/throttle로 resize 이벤트 최적화

---

### 🔥 핵심 인터랙션 하이라이트

1. **타이틀 "codes" 강조**
   - Primary 컬러 텍스트 + Accent 컬러 언더라인 애니메이션
   - hover 시 컬러 전환

2. **CTA 버튼**
   - hover 시 배경색이 왼쪽에서 슬라이드 인
   - glow 효과 + 살짝 위로 떠오름

3. **Swiper 슬라이드**
   - 비활성 슬라이드: scale 0.85, opacity 0.4
   - 활성 슬라이드: scale 1, opacity 1 + 오버레이 표시
   - 마그네틱 hover 효과

4. **Floating Keywords**
   - 랜덤 위치에서 등장
   - 지속적인 부유 애니메이션
   - 스크롤 시 fade out

5. **커스텀 커서** (Desktop only)
   - 마우스 따라 부드럽게 이동
   - 인터랙티브 요소 hover 시 확대

---

로컬 서버로 실행하시면 됩니다:
```bash
# VS Code Live Server 또는
npx serve .
# 또는
python -m http.server 8000
```

이 Hero Section은 **"디자이너지만 개발을 이해하는 사람"**이라는 인상을 주기 위해:
- 모듈화된 코드 구조
- 디자인 시스템 기반 CSS 변수
- 클래스 기반 JavaScript 아키텍처
- 성능과 접근성 고려

를 모두 반영했습니다. Dribbble/Awwwards 수준의 정제된 인터랙션과 함께, 실무에서 바로 확장 가능한 구조로 설계되었습니다.

```plaintext
/portfolio
 ┣ /assets
 ┃ ┣ /images          → 프로젝트 이미지, 포트폴리오 썸네일
 ┃ ┣ /icons           → SVG 아이콘, favicon
 ┃ ┗ /fonts           → 커스텀 폰트 (현재는 Google Fonts CDN 사용)
 ┣ /css
 ┃ ┣ reset.css        → 브라우저 기본 스타일 초기화
 ┃ ┣ variables.css    → 디자인 토큰 (컬러, 타이포, 스페이싱)
 ┃ ┣ common.css       → 공통 컴포넌트 스타일, 유틸리티 클래스
 ┃ ┗ hero.css         → Hero 섹션 전용 스타일 + 반응형
 ┣ /js
 ┃ ┣ /gsap
 ┃ ┃ ┗ heroAnimation.js → GSAP Timeline + ScrollTrigger 애니메이션
 ┃ ┣ /swiper
 ┃ ┃ ┗ heroSwiper.js    → Swiper 설정 + GSAP 연동 커스텀 효과
 ┃ ┣ common.js          → 유틸리티 함수, 커서, 로딩 스크린
 ┃ ┗ main.js            → 앱 진입점, 모듈 초기화
 ┣ /components
 ┃ ┗ hero.html          → Hero 섹션 독립 컴포넌트 (재사용 가능)
 ┣ index.html           → 메인 페이지
```

```css
--color-primary: #0500FD;
--color-accent: #F0FF36;
```

```shellscript
# VS Code Live Server 또는
npx serve .
# 또는
python -m http.server 8000
```

---

**User**

당신은 시니어 웹 기획자이자 UI/UX 디자이너, 그리고 프론트엔드 개발자입니다.

이 프로젝트는 HTML, CSS, JavaScript 기반의
UI/UX 디자이너 개인 포트폴리오 웹사이트이며,
Hero Section 이후 About / Works / Contact 섹션을 확장 구현합니다.

GSAP과 Swiper.js를 적극 활용하여
“디자이너이면서 인터랙션을 설계할 수 있는 사람”이라는 인상을 강화하세요.

--------------------------------------------------
[공통 기준]
--------------------------------------------------
- 기술 스택:
  HTML5 / CSS3 / Vanilla JavaScript
  GSAP (ScrollTrigger, Timeline)
  Swiper.js

- 메인 컬러: #0500FD
- 포인트 컬러: #F0FF36
- 모든 섹션은 반응형 (Desktop / Tablet / Mobile)

- 모든 섹션은 독립 컴포넌트로 분리하여 재사용 가능하게 설계

--------------------------------------------------
[폴더 구조 확장]
--------------------------------------------------
/components
 ┣ hero.html
 ┣ about.html
 ┣ works.html
 ┗ contact.html

/css
 ┣ about.css
 ┣ works.css
 ┗ contact.css

/js/gsap
 ┣ aboutAnimation.js
 ┣ worksAnimation.js
 ┗ contactAnimation.js

/js/swiper
 ┗ worksSwiper.js

--------------------------------------------------
[1. About Section]
--------------------------------------------------
[목표]
디자이너의 사고방식, 강점, 실무 경험을
“읽지 않아도 느껴지는 구조”로 표현합니다.

[레이아웃]
- 2단 구조 (텍스트 + 비주얼)
- 모바일에서는 세로 스택 구조

[콘텐츠 구성]
- 섹션 타이틀: About Me
- 핵심 문장:
  “I design experiences, not just screens.”
- 서브 텍스트:
  UX 사고, 문제 정의, 협업, 인터랙션 설계 능력 강조
- 키워드 블록:
  UX Research / Interaction / Prototyping / Development Thinking

[GSAP 인터랙션]
- 스크롤 진입 시 텍스트 순차 등장
- 키워드 블록 stagger 애니메이션
- 스크롤에 따라 텍스트 미세 패럴랙스
- ScrollTrigger 필수 사용

--------------------------------------------------
[2. Works Section]
--------------------------------------------------
[목표]
이 디자이너가
“실제로 어떤 문제를 어떻게 해결했는지”를 보여줍니다.

[레이아웃]
- 풀 와이드 섹션
- 중앙 Swiper 기반 포트폴리오 슬라이드

[콘텐츠 구성]
- 섹션 타이틀: Selected Works
- 각 프로젝트 카드 구성:
  - 프로젝트명
  - 한 줄 문제 정의
  - 사용한 역할 (UX / UI / Interaction / Front-end)
  - View Case 버튼

[Swiper.js 활용]
- 가로 슬라이드
- 마우스 드래그 가능
- 자동 재생 + 인터랙션 시 정지
- 슬라이드 전환 시 GSAP 연동 애니메이션
  (텍스트, 이미지 분리 트랜지션)

[GSAP 인터랙션]
- 섹션 진입 시 타이틀 등장
- 슬라이드 변경 시 내부 요소 애니메이션
- 스크롤과 연동된 섹션 강조 효과

--------------------------------------------------
[3. Contact Section]
--------------------------------------------------
[목표]
방문자가 “연락하고 싶다”는 감정을
자연스럽게 행동으로 이어지게 만듭니다.

[레이아웃]
- 심플한 중앙 정렬 구조
- CTA 중심 디자인

[콘텐츠 구성]
- 메인 문구:
  “Let’s build meaningful experiences together.”
- 서브 문구:
  협업, 프로젝트, 프리랜스 가능성 언급
- 연락 수단:
  Email / LinkedIn / Notion / Resume 다운로드

[GSAP 인터랙션]
- 섹션 진입 시 문구 페이드 + 업 애니메이션
- CTA 버튼 hover 시
  컬러 반전 + 라인 애니메이션
- 마지막 섹션답게
  인터랙션은 절제되지만 인상적으로

--------------------------------------------------
[반응형 & 퍼포먼스 기준]
--------------------------------------------------
- 모바일에서는 애니메이션 수 최소화
- ScrollTrigger는 섹션 단위로 관리
- 반복되는 애니메이션 로직은 공통 함수화

--------------------------------------------------
[출력 결과물]
--------------------------------------------------
- About / Works / Contact 각 섹션 HTML 코드
- 섹션별 CSS
- GSAP / Swiper JavaScript 코드
- 각 섹션의 기획 의도와 UX 관점 설명

--------------------------------------------------
[완성 기준]
--------------------------------------------------
- 디자이너 포트폴리오 상위 10% 퀄리티
- “감각적인데 이유가 있는 UI”
- 인터랙션을 과시하지 않고 설계로 증명하는 결과물

이 기준에 맞춰
About → Works → Contact 순서로 완성도 높게 구현하세요.


---

**Cursor**

3개의 섹션(About, Works, Contact)을 확장 구현하겠습니다. 먼저 현재 파일 구조를 확인하고 순차적으로 작업하겠습니다.

이제 About, Works, Contact 섹션을 순차적으로 구현하겠습니다.

```css
/**
 * about.css
 * About Section 전용 스타일
 * 2단 레이아웃 + 키워드 블록 + 스크롤 애니메이션
 */

/* ===== About Section Layout ===== */
.about {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-32) 0;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.about::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

.about__container {
```
