```css
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: var(--space-16);
    align-items: center;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.about__header {
    margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
}

.about__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.about__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.about__number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-8xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-16);
    right: var(--space-8);
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
}

/* ===== Content Area (Left) ===== */
.about__content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.about__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-6xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
}

.about__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.about__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
}

/* Main Statement */
.about__statement {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    line-height: var(--leading-snug);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    position: relative;
}

.about__statement-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.about__statement-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 3px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
}

/* Description */
.about__description {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 520px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
}

.about__description strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* ===== Keywords Grid ===== */
.about__keywords {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.about__keyword {
    position: relative;
    padding: var(--space-5) var(--space-6);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.about__keyword::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 3px;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-primary);
    transform: scaleY(0);
    transform-origin: bottom;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.about__keyword:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

.about__keyword:hover::before {
    transform: scaleY(1);
}

.about__keyword-icon {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-3);
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.about__keyword-title {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
}

.about__keyword-desc {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    margin-top: var(--space-1);
}

/* ===== Visual Area (Right) ===== */
.about__visual {
    position: relative;
    height: 100%;
    min-height: 500px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* Profile Image Container */
.about__image-wrapper {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 450px;
    aspect-ratio: 3/4;
}

.about__image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    filter: grayscale(20%);
    transition: filter var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.about__image-wrapper:hover .about__image {
    filter: grayscale(0%);
}

/* Image Frame Decoration */
.about__image-frame {
    position: absolute;
    inset: -20px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-2xl);
    pointer-events: none;
}

.about__image-frame::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    width: 60%;
    height: 60%;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-primary);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    opacity: 0.3;
}

/* Floating Stats */
.about__stats {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: -30px;
    left: -30px;
    display: flex;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    z-index: 2;
}

.about__stat {
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-6);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    text-align: center;
}

.about__stat-number {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    line-height: 1;
}

.about__stat-label {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-top: var(--space-1);
}

/* Decorative Elements */
.about__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.about__deco--dots {
    top: 10%;
    right: 10%;
    width: 100px;
    height: 100px;
    background-image: radial-gradient(var(--color-gray-800) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 10px 10px;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

.about__deco--circle {
    bottom: 20%;
    right: -50px;
    width: 200px;
    height: 200px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .about {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .about__container {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-12);
    }

    .about__content {
        order: 2;
        text-align: center;
    }

    .about__visual {
        order: 1;
        min-height: auto;
    }

    .about__image-wrapper {
        max-width: 350px;
        margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .about__keywords {
        max-width: 500px;
        margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .about__description {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    .about__stats {
        left: 50%;
        transform: translateX(-50%);
        bottom: -20px;
    }

    .about__number {
        font-size: var(--text-6xl);
        top: var(--space-8);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .about {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .about__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .about__statement {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .about__description {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .about__keywords {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-3);
    }

    .about__keyword {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .about__image-wrapper {
        max-width: 280px;
    }

    .about__stats {
        flex-direction: row;
        gap: var(--space-2);
    }

    .about__stat {
        padding: var(--space-3) var(--space-4);
    }

    .about__stat-number {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .about__image-frame {
        display: none;
    }

    .about__deco--dots,
    .about__deco--circle {
        display: none;
    }

    .about__number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .about {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .about__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .about__statement {
        font-size: var(--text-xl);
    }

    .about__image-wrapper {
        max-width: 240px;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .about__keyword,
    .about__image {
        transition: none;
    }

    .about__keyword::before {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```html
<!-- 
  About Section Component
  디자이너의 사고방식과 강점을 시각적으로 전달
  2단 레이아웃 + 키워드 블록 + 스크롤 애니메이션
-->

<section class="about" id="about" data-section="about">
    <!-- Section Number (Decorative) -->
    <span class="about__number" aria-hidden="true">01</span>

    <div class="about__container">
        <!-- Content Area (Left) -->
        <div class="about__content">
            <!-- Section Header -->
            <div class="about__header">
                <div class="about__label">
                    <span>About Me</span>
                </div>
                <h2 class="about__title">
                    <span class="about__title-line">
                        <span class="about__title-text">Designer &</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="about__title-line">
                        <span class="about__title-text">Problem Solver</span>
                    </span>
                </h2>
            </div>

            <!-- Main Statement -->
            <p class="about__statement">
                I design <span class="about__statement-highlight">experiences</span>,<br>
                not just screens.
            </p>

            <!-- Description -->
            <p class="about__description">
                With a foundation in <strong>user-centered design</strong> and a passion for 
                <strong>interactive experiences</strong>, I approach every project as an opportunity 
                to solve real problems. I believe great design emerges from understanding 
                user needs, defining clear objectives, and iterating relentlessly.
            </p>

            <!-- Keywords Grid -->
            <div class="about__keywords">
                <!-- Keyword 1 -->
                <div class="about__keyword">
                    <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
                        <path d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z"/>
                    </svg>
                    <h3 class="about__keyword-title">UX Research</h3>
                    <p class="about__keyword-desc">Data-driven design decisions</p>
                </div>

                <!-- Keyword 2 -->
                <div class="about__keyword">
                    <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
                        <path d="M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z"/>
                    </svg>
                    <h3 class="about__keyword-title">Interaction</h3>
                    <p class="about__keyword-desc">Motion that tells stories</p>
                </div>

                <!-- Keyword 3 -->
                <div class="about__keyword">
                    <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
                        <path d="M4 5a1 1 0 011-1h14a1 1 0 011 1v2a1 1 0 01-1 1H5a1 1 0 01-1-1V5zM4 13a1 1 0 011-1h6a1 1 0 011 1v6a1 1 0 01-1 1H5a1 1 0 01-1-1v-6zM16 13a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v6a1 1 0 01-1 1h-2a1 1 0 01-1-1v-6z"/>
                    </svg>
                    <h3 class="about__keyword-title">Prototyping</h3>
                    <p class="about__keyword-desc">From concept to reality</p>
                </div>

                <!-- Keyword 4 -->
                <div class="about__keyword">
                    <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
                        <path d="M10 20l4-16m4 4l4 4-4 4M6 16l-4-4 4-4"/>
                    </svg>
                    <h3 class="about__keyword-title">Dev Thinking</h3>
                    <p class="about__keyword-desc">Design with feasibility</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Visual Area (Right) -->
        <div class="about__visual">
            <!-- Decorative Elements -->
            <div class="about__deco about__deco--dots" aria-hidden="true"></div>
            <div class="about__deco about__deco--circle" aria-hidden="true"></div>

            <!-- Profile Image -->
            <div class="about__image-wrapper">
                <div class="about__image-frame" aria-hidden="true"></div>
                <img 
                    src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=600&q=80" 
                    alt="Designer portrait" 
                    class="about__image"
                    loading="lazy"
                >
                
                <!-- Floating Stats -->
                <div class="about__stats">
                    <div class="about__stat">
                        <span class="about__stat-number">5+</span>
                        <span class="about__stat-label">Years Exp</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="about__stat">
                        <span class="about__stat-number">40+</span>
                        <span class="about__stat-label">Projects</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

```

```javascript
/**
 * aboutAnimation.js
 * About Section GSAP 애니메이션
 * ScrollTrigger 기반 순차 등장 + 패럴랙스 효과
 */

class AboutAnimation {
    constructor() {
        this.section = document.querySelector('.about');
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation targets
        this.elements = {
            label: document.querySelector('.about__label'),
            titleLines: document.querySelectorAll('.about__title-text'),
            statement: document.querySelector('.about__statement'),
            statementHighlight: document.querySelector('.about__statement-highlight'),
            description: document.querySelector('.about__description'),
            keywords: document.querySelectorAll('.about__keyword'),
            imageWrapper: document.querySelector('.about__image-wrapper'),
            image: document.querySelector('.about__image'),
            stats: document.querySelectorAll('.about__stat'),
            number: document.querySelector('.about__number'),
            decos: document.querySelectorAll('.about__deco')
        };

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize about section animations
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.section) return;

        // Set initial states
        this.setInitialStates();

        // Create scroll-triggered animations
        this.createEntranceAnimation();
        this.createParallaxEffects();
        this.createKeywordAnimations();
        this.createImageAnimations();

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('📝 About animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Set initial states for all animated elements
     */
    setInitialStates() {
        // Label
        gsap.set(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 0,
            x: -30
        });

        // Title lines
        gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 100,
            opacity: 0
        });

        // Statement
        gsap.set(this.elements.statement, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 40
        });

        // Description
        gsap.set(this.elements.description, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 30
        });

        // Keywords
        gsap.set(this.elements.keywords, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 40,
            scale: 0.95
        });

        // Image wrapper
        gsap.set(this.elements.imageWrapper, {
            opacity: 0,
            scale: 0.9,
            y: 60
        });

        // Stats
        gsap.set(this.elements.stats, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 30
        });

        // Section number
        if (this.elements.number) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.number, {
                opacity: 0,
                x: 50
            });
        }

        // Decorative elements
        gsap.set(this.elements.decos, {
            opacity: 0,
            scale: 0.8
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create main entrance animation with ScrollTrigger
     */
    createEntranceAnimation() {
        const tl = gsap.timeline({
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top 70%',
                end: 'top 20%',
                toggleActions: 'play none none reverse'
            },
            defaults: {
                ease: 'expo.out',
                duration: 1
            }
        });

        // Phase 1: Label slides in
        tl.to(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 1,
            x: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0);

        // Phase 2: Title lines reveal
        tl.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 0,
            opacity: 1,
            duration: 1.2,
            stagger: 0.12
        }, 0.2);

        // Phase 3: Section number
        if (this.elements.number) {
            tl.to(this.elements.number, {
                opacity: 1,
                x: 0,
                duration: 1
            }, 0.3);
        }

        // Phase 4: Statement appears
        tl.to(this.elements.statement, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 1
        }, 0.5);

        // Phase 5: Highlight underline
        tl.to(this.elements.statementHighlight, {
            '--highlight-scale': 1,
            duration: 0.8,
            ease: 'power2.out'
        }, 0.9);

        // Phase 6: Description
        tl.to(this.elements.description, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0.7);

        // Phase 7: Keywords stagger
        tl.to(this.elements.keywords, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            scale: 1,
            duration: 0.8,
            stagger: 0.1
        }, 0.9);

        // Phase 8: Image area
        tl.to(this.elements.imageWrapper, {
            opacity: 1,
            scale: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 1.2
        }, 0.4);

        // Phase 9: Stats
        tl.to(this.elements.stats, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.6,
            stagger: 0.1
        }, 1);

        // Phase 10: Decorations
        tl.to(this.elements.decos, {
            opacity: 0.5,
            scale: 1,
            duration: 1,
            stagger: 0.2
        }, 0.8);

        // Add CSS for highlight animation
        this.addHighlightStyles();
    }

    /**
     * Add CSS styles for highlight animation
     */
    addHighlightStyles() {
        if (document.querySelector('#about-highlight-styles')) return;

        const style = document.createElement('style');
        style.id = 'about-highlight-styles';
        style.textContent = `
            .about__statement-highlight {
                --highlight-scale: 0;
            }
            .about__statement-highlight::after {
                transform: scaleX(var(--highlight-scale));
            }
        `;
        document.head.appendChild(style);
    }

    /**
     * Create parallax effects on scroll
     */
    createParallaxEffects() {
        // Title parallax - moves up slower
        gsap.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: -15,
            ease: 'none',
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top bottom',
                end: 'bottom top',
                scrub: 1.5
            }
        });

        // Image parallax - moves up faster
        gsap.to(this.elements.image, {
            yPercent: -10,
            ease: 'none',
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top bottom',
                end: 'bottom top',
                scrub: 2
            }
        });

        // Section number parallax
        if (this.elements.number) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.number, {
                yPercent: 30,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 1
                }
            });
        }

        // Decorations parallax
        this.elements.decos.forEach((deco, index) => {
            gsap.to(deco, {
                y: index % 2 === 0 ? -50 : 50,
                rotation: index % 2 === 0 ? 10 : -10,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2
                }
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create keyword hover animations
     */
    createKeywordAnimations() {
        this.elements.keywords.forEach(keyword => {
            const icon = keyword.querySelector('.about__keyword-icon');

            keyword.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                gsap.to(icon, {
                    scale: 1.2,
                    rotation: 5,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'back.out(1.7)'
                });
            });

            keyword.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(icon, {
                    scale: 1,
                    rotation: 0,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create image hover animations
     */
    createImageAnimations() {
        if (!this.elements.imageWrapper) return;

        const frame = this.elements.imageWrapper.querySelector('.about__image-frame');

        this.elements.imageWrapper.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
            if (frame) {
                gsap.to(frame, {
                    scale: 1.02,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        });

        this.elements.imageWrapper.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            if (frame) {
                gsap.to(frame, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        });

        // Mouse move effect
        this.elements.imageWrapper.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
            const rect = this.elements.imageWrapper.getBoundingClientRect();
            const x = (e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2) / rect.width;
            const y = (e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2) / rect.height;

            gsap.to(this.elements.image, {
                x: x * 10,
                y: y * 10,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        });

        this.elements.imageWrapper.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            gsap.to(this.elements.image, {
                x: 0,
                y: 0,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Destroy animations and clean up
     */
    destroy() {
        ScrollTrigger.getAll().forEach(trigger => {
            if (trigger.vars.trigger === this.section) {
                trigger.kill();
            }
        });
        this.isInitialized = false;
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.AboutAnimation = AboutAnimation;

```

```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-32) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto var(--space-16);
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-6xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-4);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    padding-left: calc((100vw - var(--container-xl)) / 2 + var(--container-padding));
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 600px;
    height: auto;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    transform: translateY(-8px);
    box-shadow: 0 30px 60px -20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/10;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        transparent 0%,
        transparent 60%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.8) 100%
    );
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-4);
    left: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    flex: 1;
}

/* Card Category */
.works__card-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-3);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-3);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    flex: 1;
}

/* Card Tags */
.works__card-tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-tag {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

    .works__swiper-container {
        padding-left: var(--container-padding);
    }
}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 450px;
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 320px;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 280px;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```html
<!-- 
  Works Section Component
  포트폴리오 프로젝트 쇼케이스
  Swiper 기반 가로 슬라이드 + GSAP 연동 트랜지션
-->

<section class="works" id="works" data-section="works">
    <!-- Decorative Number -->
    <span class="works__deco works__deco--number" aria-hidden="true">02</span>

    <!-- Section Header -->
    <header class="works__header">
        <div class="works__header-content">
            <div class="works__label">
                <span>Selected Works</span>
            </div>
            <h2 class="works__title">
                <span class="works__title-line">
                    <span class="works__title-text">Featured</span>
                </span>
                <span class="works__title-line">
                    <span class="works__title-text">Projects</span>
                </span>
            </h2>
            <p class="works__subtitle">
                A collection of problems I've solved through strategic design thinking and user-centered approaches.
            </p>
        </div>

        <!-- Navigation & Progress -->
        <div class="works__nav">
            <div class="works__progress">
                <span class="works__progress-current">01</span>
                <div class="works__progress-bar">
                    <div class="works__progress-fill"></div>
                </div>
                <span class="works__progress-total">04</span>
            </div>
            <button class="works__nav-btn works__nav-btn--prev" aria-label="Previous project">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                    <path d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7"/>
                </svg>
            </button>
            <button class="works__nav-btn works__nav-btn--next" aria-label="Next project">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                    <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/>
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </header>

    <!-- Swiper Container -->
    <div class="works__swiper-container">
        <div class="works__swiper swiper">
            <div class="swiper-wrapper">
                <!-- Project 1 -->
                <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                    <article class="works__card">
                        <div class="works__card-image">
                            <span class="works__card-number">01</span>
                            <img 
                                src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551650975-87deedd944c3?w=800&q=80" 
                                alt="Lumina App project" 
                                class="works__card-img"
                                loading="lazy"
                            >
                            <div class="works__card-overlay"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="works__card-content">
                            <span class="works__card-category">Mobile App</span>
                            <h3 class="works__card-title">Lumina Health</h3>
                            <p class="works__card-problem">
                                How might we help users track their mental wellness without adding cognitive burden to their daily routine?
                            </p>
                            <div class="works__card-tags">
                                <span class="works__card-tag">UX Research</span>
                                <span class="works__card-tag">UI Design</span>
                                <span class="works__card-tag">Prototyping</span>
                            </div>
                            <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                <span>View Case Study</span>
                                <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                    <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/>
                                </svg>
                            </a>
                        </div>
                    </article>
                </div>

                <!-- Project 2 -->
                <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                    <article class="works__card">
                        <div class="works__card-image">
                            <span class="works__card-number">02</span>
                            <img 
                                src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1460925895917-afdab827c52f?w=800&q=80" 
                                alt="Nexus Platform project" 
                                class="works__card-img"
                                loading="lazy"
                            >
                            <div class="works__card-overlay"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="works__card-content">
                            <span class="works__card-category">Web Platform</span>
                            <h3 class="works__card-title">Nexus Analytics</h3>
                            <p class="works__card-problem">
                                How might we simplify complex data visualization for non-technical stakeholders while maintaining analytical depth?
                            </p>
                            <div class="works__card-tags">
                                <span class="works__card-tag">Dashboard</span>
                                <span class="works__card-tag">Data Viz</span>
                                <span class="works__card-tag">Front-end</span>
                            </div>
                            <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                <span>View Case Study</span>
                                <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                    <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/>
                                </svg>
                            </a>
                        </div>
                    </article>
                </div>

                <!-- Project 3 -->
                <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                    <article class="works__card">
                        <div class="works__card-image">
                            <span class="works__card-number">03</span>
                            <img 
                                src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1563013544-824ae1b704d3?w=800&q=80" 
                                alt="Flow Finance project" 
                                class="works__card-img"
                                loading="lazy"
                            >
                            <div class="works__card-overlay"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="works__card-content">
                            <span class="works__card-category">Fintech</span>
                            <h3 class="works__card-title">Flow Finance</h3>
                            <p class="works__card-problem">
                                How might we make personal finance management feel less intimidating for first-time investors?
                            </p>
                            <div class="works__card-tags">
                                <span class="works__card-tag">UX Strategy</span>
                                <span class="works__card-tag">UI Design</span>
                                <span class="works__card-tag">Interaction</span>
                            </div>
                            <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                <span>View Case Study</span>
                                <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                    <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/>
                                </svg>
                            </a>
                        </div>
                    </article>
                </div>

                <!-- Project 4 -->
                <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                    <article class="works__card">
                        <div class="works__card-image">
                            <span class="works__card-number">04</span>
                            <img 
                                src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558655146-9f40138edfeb?w=800&q=80" 
                                alt="Vertex UI project" 
                                class="works__card-img"
                                loading="lazy"
                            >
                            <div class="works__card-overlay"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="works__card-content">
                            <span class="works__card-category">Design System</span>
                            <h3 class="works__card-title">Vertex UI Kit</h3>
                            <p class="works__card-problem">
                                How might we create a scalable design system that accelerates product development while ensuring consistency?
                            </p>
                            <div class="works__card-tags">
                                <span class="works__card-tag">Design System</span>
                                <span class="works__card-tag">Components</span>
                                <span class="works__card-tag">Documentation</span>
                            </div>
                            <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                <span>View Case Study</span>
                                <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                    <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/>
                                </svg>
                            </a>
                        </div>
                    </article>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

```

```javascript
/**
 * worksAnimation.js
 * Works Section GSAP 애니메이션
 * ScrollTrigger 기반 섹션 등장 + Swiper 연동 트랜지션
 */

class WorksAnimation {
    constructor() {
        this.section = document.querySelector('.works');
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation targets
        this.elements = {
            label: document.querySelector('.works__label'),
            titleLines: document.querySelectorAll('.works__title-text'),
            subtitle: document.querySelector('.works__subtitle'),
            nav: document.querySelector('.works__nav'),
            cards: document.querySelectorAll('.works__card'),
            decoNumber: document.querySelector('.works__deco--number')
        };

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.animateCardContent = this.animateCardContent.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize works section animations
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.section) return;

        // Set initial states
        this.setInitialStates();

        // Create scroll-triggered animations
        this.createEntranceAnimation();
        this.createParallaxEffects();
        this.createCardAnimations();

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('💼 Works animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Set initial states for all animated elements
     */
    setInitialStates() {
        // Label
        gsap.set(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 0,
            x: -30
        });

        // Title lines
        gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 100,
            opacity: 0
        });

        // Subtitle
        gsap.set(this.elements.subtitle, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 20
        });

        // Navigation
        gsap.set(this.elements.nav, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 20
        });

        // Cards - initial state for entrance
        gsap.set(this.elements.cards, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 60
        });

        // Decorative number
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                opacity: 0,
                x: 100
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Create main entrance animation with ScrollTrigger
     */
    createEntranceAnimation() {
        const tl = gsap.timeline({
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top 70%',
                end: 'top 20%',
                toggleActions: 'play none none reverse'
            },
            defaults: {
                ease: 'expo.out',
                duration: 1
            }
        });

        // Phase 1: Label slides in
        tl.to(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 1,
            x: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0);

        // Phase 2: Title lines reveal
        tl.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 0,
            opacity: 1,
            duration: 1.2,
            stagger: 0.12
        }, 0.2);

        // Phase 3: Subtitle
        tl.to(this.elements.subtitle, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0.5);

        // Phase 4: Navigation
        tl.to(this.elements.nav, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.6
        }, 0.6);

        // Phase 5: Cards stagger
        tl.to(this.elements.cards, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 1,
            stagger: 0.15
        }, 0.7);

        // Phase 6: Decorative number
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            tl.to(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                opacity: 0.5,
                x: 0,
                duration: 1.2
            }, 0.4);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Create parallax effects on scroll
     */
    createParallaxEffects() {
        // Title parallax
        gsap.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: -20,
            ease: 'none',
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top bottom',
                end: 'bottom top',
                scrub: 1.5
            }
        });

        // Decorative number parallax
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                yPercent: 20,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2
                }
            });
        }

        // Cards subtle parallax (different speeds)
        this.elements.cards.forEach((card, index) => {
            gsap.to(card, {
                y: (index % 2 === 0 ? -20 : 20),
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2 + index * 0.3
                }
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create card hover and interaction animations
     */
    createCardAnimations() {
        this.elements.cards.forEach(card => {
            const image = card.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            const content = card.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const title = card.querySelector('.works__card-title');
            const cta = card.querySelector('.works__card-cta');

            // Mouse enter
            card.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1.08,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });

                gsap.to(content, {
                    y: -5,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            // Mouse leave
            card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });

                gsap.to(content, {
                    y: 0,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            // Magnetic effect on card
            card.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = (e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2) / rect.width;
                const y = (e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2) / rect.height;

                gsap.to(card, {
                    rotateY: x * 5,
                    rotateX: -y * 5,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out',
                    transformPerspective: 1000
                });
            });

            card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(card, {
                    rotateY: 0,
                    rotateX: 0,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Animate card content on slide change (called from Swiper)
     * @param {number} index - Active slide index
     */
    animateCardContent(index) {
        const activeCard = this.elements.cards[index];
        if (!activeCard) return;

        const elements = {
            category: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-category'),
            title: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-title'),
            problem: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-problem'),
            tags: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-tags'),
            cta: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-cta')
        };

        // Reset and animate content
        const tl = gsap.timeline();

        tl.fromTo([elements.category, elements.title, elements.problem, elements.tags, elements.cta],
            {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 20
            },
            {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                duration: 0.5,
                stagger: 0.08,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Destroy animations and clean up
     */
    destroy() {
        ScrollTrigger.getAll().forEach(trigger => {
            if (trigger.vars.trigger === this.section) {
                trigger.kill();
            }
        });
        this.isInitialized = false;
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksAnimation = WorksAnimation;

```

```javascript
/**
 * worksSwiper.js
 * Works Section Swiper 설정
 * GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션 + 프로그레스 인디케이터
 */

class WorksSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.works__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Elements
        this.elements = {
            prevBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--prev'),
            nextBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--next'),
            progressCurrent: document.querySelector('.works__progress-current'),
            progressTotal: document.querySelector('.works__progress-total'),
            progressFill: document.querySelector('.works__progress-fill')
        };

        // Animation reference
        this.worksAnimation = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     * @param {WorksAnimation} worksAnimation - Reference to works animation instance
     */
    init(worksAnimation = null) {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) return;

        this.worksAnimation = worksAnimation;

        this.swiper = new Swiper('.works__swiper', {
            // Core settings
            slidesPerView: 'auto',
            spaceBetween: 30,
            speed: 800,
            
            // Autoplay
            autoplay: {
                delay: 5000,
                disableOnInteraction: false,
                pauseOnMouseEnter: true
            },

            // Grab cursor
            grabCursor: true,

            // Navigation
            navigation: {
                prevEl: '.works__nav-btn--prev',
                nextEl: '.works__nav-btn--next'
            },

            // Breakpoints
            breakpoints: {
                320: {
                    spaceBetween: 16
                },
                768: {
                    spaceBetween: 24
                },
                1024: {
                    spaceBetween: 30
                }
            },

            // Events
            on: {
                init: () => {
                    this.updateProgress();
                    this.setTotalSlides();
                },
                slideChange: () => {
                    this.onSlideChange();
                },
                slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                    this.animateTransitionStart();
                },
                slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                    this.animateTransitionEnd();
                }
            }
        });

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('🎠 Works Swiper initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Set total slides count
     */
    setTotalSlides() {
        if (this.elements.progressTotal) {
            const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
            this.elements.progressTotal.textContent = String(total).padStart(2, '0');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        this.updateProgress();
        this.animateProgressCounter();

        // Trigger card content animation if available
        if (this.worksAnimation) {
            this.worksAnimation.animateCardContent(this.swiper.activeIndex);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update progress indicator
     */
    updateProgress() {
        if (!this.swiper) return;

        const current = this.swiper.activeIndex + 1;
        const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
        const progress = (current / total) * 100;

        // Update current number
        if (this.elements.progressCurrent) {
            this.elements.progressCurrent.textContent = String(current).padStart(2, '0');
        }

        // Update progress bar
        if (this.elements.progressFill) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.progressFill, {
                width: `${progress}%`,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate progress counter change
     */
    animateProgressCounter() {
        if (!this.elements.progressCurrent) return;

        gsap.fromTo(this.elements.progressCurrent,
            {
                y: 20,
                opacity: 0
            },
            {
                y: 0,
                opacity: 1,
                duration: 0.4,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition start
     */
    animateTransitionStart() {
        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];
        const prevSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.previousIndex];

        // Animate out previous slide content
        if (prevSlide) {
            const prevContent = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            if (prevContent) {
                gsap.to(prevContent, {
                    opacity: 0.5,
                    y: 10,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'power2.in'
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition end
     */
    animateTransitionEnd() {
        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];

        if (activeSlide) {
            const content = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            if (content) {
                gsap.to(content, {
                    opacity: 1,
                    y: 0,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        }

        // Reset all non-active slides
        this.swiper.slides.forEach((slide, index) => {
            if (index !== this.swiper.activeIndex) {
                const content = slide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
                if (content) {
                    gsap.set(content, { opacity: 1, y: 0 });
                }
            }
        });
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideTo(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksSwiper = WorksSwiper;

```

```css
/**
 * contact.css
 * Contact Section 전용 스타일
 * 심플한 중앙 정렬 + CTA 중심 디자인
 */

/* ===== Contact Section Layout ===== */
.contact {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-32) var(--container-padding);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.contact__bg {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 100%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.1) 0%, transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.03) 0%, transparent 40%);
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Contact Container ===== */
.contact__container {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    max-width: 900px;
    text-align: center;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.contact__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
}

.contact__label::before,
.contact__label::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
}

/* ===== Main Title ===== */
.contact__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-6xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.contact__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
}

.contact__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.contact__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.05em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.12em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.7;
}

/* ===== Subtitle ===== */
.contact__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto var(--space-12);
}

.contact__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* ===== CTA Buttons ===== */
.contact__cta {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-16);
}

.contact__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-5) var(--space-10);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary {
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--color-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
}

.contact__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__cta-btn:hover .contact__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Contact Links ===== */
.contact__links {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-8);
}

.contact__link {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-6);
    min-width: 120px;
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    text-decoration: none;
}

.contact__link:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    border-color: var(--color-gray-800);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
}

.contact__link-icon {
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-icon {
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.contact__link-label {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-label {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.contact__link-hint {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.contact__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.contact__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -10%;
    left: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

.contact__deco--circle {
    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 10%;
    right: -100px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

.contact__deco--circle-sm {
    width: 150px;
    height: 150px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    bottom: 20%;
    left: -50px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

/* ===== Footer Note ===== */
.contact__footer {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    text-align: center;
}

.contact__footer-text {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
}

.contact__footer-text a {
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__footer-text a:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .contact__deco--number {
        font-size: 14rem;
    }

    .contact__deco--circle {
        width: 200px;
        height: 200px;
        right: -80px;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding);
        min-height: auto;
        padding-bottom: var(--space-24);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .contact__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-3);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .contact__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 300px;
    }

    .contact__links {
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link {
        min-width: 100px;
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__deco--number,
    .contact__deco--circle,
    .contact__deco--circle-sm {
        display: none;
    }

    .contact__footer {
        position: relative;
        bottom: auto;
        left: auto;
        transform: none;
        margin-top: var(--space-12);
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .contact__links {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-2);
    }

    .contact__link {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 200px;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link-icon {
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .contact__cta-btn,
    .contact__link,
    .contact__link-icon {
        transition: none;
    }

    .contact__cta-btn::before {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```html
<!-- 
  Contact Section Component
  CTA 중심의 심플한 연락 섹션
  절제된 인터랙션으로 인상적인 마무리
-->

<section class="contact" id="contact" data-section="contact">
    <!-- Background -->
    <div class="contact__bg" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <!-- Decorative Elements -->
    <span class="contact__deco contact__deco--number" aria-hidden="true">03</span>
    <div class="contact__deco contact__deco--circle" aria-hidden="true"></div>
    <div class="contact__deco contact__deco--circle-sm" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <!-- Main Content -->
    <div class="contact__container">
        <!-- Section Label -->
        <div class="contact__label">
            <span>Get in Touch</span>
        </div>

        <!-- Main Title -->
        <h2 class="contact__title">
            <span class="contact__title-line">
                <span class="contact__title-text">Let's build</span>
            </span>
            <span class="contact__title-line">
                <span class="contact__title-text"><span class="contact__title-highlight">meaningful</span> experiences</span>
            </span>
            <span class="contact__title-line">
                <span class="contact__title-text">together.</span>
            </span>
        </h2>

        <!-- Subtitle -->
        <p class="contact__subtitle">
            I'm always open to discussing <strong>new projects</strong>, 
            creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision. 
            Whether it's a full-time role, freelance project, or just a chat about design.
        </p>

        <!-- CTA Buttons -->
        <div class="contact__cta">
            <a href="mailto:hello@designer.com" class="contact__cta-btn contact__cta-btn--primary">
                <span>Say Hello</span>
                <svg class="contact__cta-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                    <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/>
                </svg>
            </a>
            <a href="#" class="contact__cta-btn contact__cta-btn--secondary" download>
                <span>Download CV</span>
                <svg class="contact__cta-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                    <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2v-4M7 10l5 5 5-5M12 15V3"/>
                </svg>
            </a>
        </div>

        <!-- Contact Links -->
        <div class="contact__links">
            <!-- Email -->
            <a href="mailto:hello@designer.com" class="contact__link">
                <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
                    <path d="M3 8l7.89 5.26a2 2 0 002.22 0L21 8M5 19h14a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2z"/>
                </svg>
                <span class="contact__link-label">Email</span>
                <span class="contact__link-hint">hello@designer.com</span>
            </a>

            <!-- LinkedIn -->
            <a href="https://linkedin.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="contact__link">
                <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
                    <path d="M16 8a6 6 0 016 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 00-2-2 2 2 0 00-2 2v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 016-6zM2 9h4v12H2zM4 6a2 2 0 100-4 2 2 0 000 4z"/>
                </svg>
                <span class="contact__link-label">LinkedIn</span>
                <span class="contact__link-hint">Connect</span>
            </a>

            <!-- Notion -->
            <a href="https://notion.so" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="contact__link">
                <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
                    <path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/>
                    <path d="M8 2v4M16 2v4M2 10h20"/>
                </svg>
                <span class="contact__link-label">Notion</span>
                <span class="contact__link-hint">Portfolio</span>
            </a>

            <!-- Dribbble -->
            <a href="https://dribbble.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="contact__link">
                <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
                    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/>
                    <path d="M8.56 2.75c4.37 6.03 6.02 9.42 8.03 17.72m2.54-15.38c-3.72 4.35-8.94 5.66-16.88 5.85m19.5 1.9c-3.5-.93-6.63-.82-8.94 0-2.58.92-5.01 2.86-7.44 6.32"/>
                </svg>
                <span class="contact__link-label">Dribbble</span>
                <span class="contact__link-hint">Shots</span>
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Footer Note -->
    <footer class="contact__footer">
        <p class="contact__footer-text">
            Designed & Developed with 💛 · © 2026
        </p>
    </footer>
</section>

```

```javascript
/**
 * contactAnimation.js
 * Contact Section GSAP 애니메이션
 * 절제되지만 인상적인 마지막 섹션 애니메이션
 */

class ContactAnimation {
    constructor() {
        this.section = document.querySelector('.contact');
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation targets
        this.elements = {
            label: document.querySelector('.contact__label'),
            titleLines: document.querySelectorAll('.contact__title-text'),
            titleHighlight: document.querySelector('.contact__title-highlight'),
            subtitle: document.querySelector('.contact__subtitle'),
            cta: document.querySelector('.contact__cta'),
            ctaBtns: document.querySelectorAll('.contact__cta-btn'),
            links: document.querySelectorAll('.contact__link'),
            footer: document.querySelector('.contact__footer'),
            decoNumber: document.querySelector('.contact__deco--number'),
            decoCircles: document.querySelectorAll('.contact__deco--circle, .contact__deco--circle-sm')
        };

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize contact section animations
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.section) return;

        // Set initial states
        this.setInitialStates();

        // Create scroll-triggered animations
        this.createEntranceAnimation();
        this.createParallaxEffects();
        this.createButtonAnimations();
        this.createLinkAnimations();

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('📬 Contact animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Set initial states for all animated elements
     */
    setInitialStates() {
        // Label
        gsap.set(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 20
        });

        // Title lines
        gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 100,
            opacity: 0
        });

        // Subtitle
        gsap.set(this.elements.subtitle, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 30
        });

        // CTA buttons
        gsap.set(this.elements.ctaBtns, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 30
        });

        // Links
        gsap.set(this.elements.links, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 40
        });

        // Footer
        if (this.elements.footer) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.footer, {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 20
            });
        }

        // Decorative number
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                opacity: 0,
                x: -100
            });
        }

        // Decorative circles
        gsap.set(this.elements.decoCircles, {
            opacity: 0,
            scale: 0.8
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create main entrance animation with ScrollTrigger
     */
    createEntranceAnimation() {
        const tl = gsap.timeline({
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top 70%',
                end: 'top 20%',
                toggleActions: 'play none none reverse'
            },
            defaults: {
                ease: 'expo.out',
                duration: 1
            }
        });

        // Phase 1: Label
        tl.to(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0);

        // Phase 2: Title lines reveal
        tl.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 0,
            opacity: 1,
            duration: 1.2,
            stagger: 0.12
        }, 0.2);

        // Phase 3: Highlight underline
        tl.add(() => {
            this.animateHighlightUnderline();
        }, 0.8);

        // Phase 4: Subtitle
        tl.to(this.elements.subtitle, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 1
        }, 0.6);

        // Phase 5: CTA buttons
        tl.to(this.elements.ctaBtns, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.8,
            stagger: 0.1
        }, 0.9);

        // Phase 6: Links stagger
        tl.to(this.elements.links, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.8,
            stagger: 0.08
        }, 1.1);

        // Phase 7: Footer
        if (this.elements.footer) {
            tl.to(this.elements.footer, {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                duration: 0.6
            }, 1.4);
        }

        // Phase 8: Decorative elements
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            tl.to(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                opacity: 0.5,
                x: 0,
                duration: 1.2
            }, 0.4);
        }

        tl.to(this.elements.decoCircles, {
            opacity: 0.3,
            scale: 1,
            duration: 1,
            stagger: 0.2
        }, 0.6);
    }

    /**
     * Animate highlight underline
     */
    animateHighlightUnderline() {
        if (!this.elements.titleHighlight) return;

        // Add CSS for highlight animation
        if (!document.querySelector('#contact-highlight-styles')) {
            const style = document.createElement('style');
            style.id = 'contact-highlight-styles';
            style.textContent = `
                .contact__title-highlight {
                    --highlight-scale: 0;
                }
                .contact__title-highlight::after {
                    transform: scaleX(var(--highlight-scale));
                }
            `;
            document.head.appendChild(style);
        }

        gsap.to(this.elements.titleHighlight, {
            '--highlight-scale': 1,
            duration: 0.8,
            ease: 'power2.out'
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create parallax effects on scroll
     */
    createParallaxEffects() {
        // Title parallax
        gsap.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: -10,
            ease: 'none',
            scrollTrigger: {
```
