```javascript
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top bottom',
                end: 'bottom top',
                scrub: 1.5
            }
        });

        // Decorative number parallax
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                yPercent: 15,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2
                }
            });
        }

        // Circles parallax
        this.elements.decoCircles.forEach((circle, index) => {
            gsap.to(circle, {
                y: index % 2 === 0 ? -30 : 30,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2 + index * 0.5
                }
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create CTA button hover animations
     */
    createButtonAnimations() {
        this.elements.ctaBtns.forEach(btn => {
            const icon = btn.querySelector('.contact__cta-btn-icon');

            // Magnetic effect
            btn.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                const rect = btn.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = (e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2) * 0.15;
                const y = (e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2) * 0.15;

                gsap.to(btn, {
                    x: x,
                    y: y,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            btn.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(btn, {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'elastic.out(1, 0.5)'
                });
            });

            // Icon animation on hover
            btn.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                if (icon) {
                    gsap.to(icon, {
                        x: 4,
                        duration: 0.3,
                        ease: 'power2.out'
                    });
                }
            });

            btn.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                if (icon) {
                    gsap.to(icon, {
                        x: 0,
                        duration: 0.3,
                        ease: 'power2.out'
                    });
                }
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create link hover animations
     */
    createLinkAnimations() {
        this.elements.links.forEach(link => {
            const icon = link.querySelector('.contact__link-icon');

            link.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                gsap.to(icon, {
                    scale: 1.15,
                    rotation: 5,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'back.out(1.7)'
                });
            });

            link.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(icon, {
                    scale: 1,
                    rotation: 0,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            // Subtle bounce on click
            link.addEventListener('click', () => {
                gsap.to(link, {
                    scale: 0.95,
                    duration: 0.1,
                    yoyo: true,
                    repeat: 1,
                    ease: 'power2.inOut'
                });
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Destroy animations and clean up
     */
    destroy() {
        ScrollTrigger.getAll().forEach(trigger => {
            if (trigger.vars.trigger === this.section) {
                trigger.kill();
            }
        });
        this.isInitialized = false;
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.ContactAnimation = ContactAnimation;

```

이제 index.html을 업데이트하여 모든 섹션을 통합하고, main.js를 수정하겠습니다.

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="description"
        content="UI/UX Designer Portfolio - Crafting meaningful digital experiences through strategic design thinking and seamless interactions.">
    <meta name="keywords" content="UI/UX Designer, Portfolio, Web Design, Interaction Design, User Experience">
    <meta name="author" content="Designer Name">

    <!-- Open Graph -->
    <meta property="og:title" content="UI/UX Designer Portfolio">
    <meta property="og:description"
        content="Crafting meaningful digital experiences through strategic design thinking and seamless interactions.">
    <meta property="og:type" content="website">
    <meta property="og:image" content="./assets/images/og-image.jpg">

    <!-- Favicon -->
    <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="./assets/icons/favicon.svg">

    <!-- Preconnect for Performance -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net">

    <!-- Stylesheets -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/reset.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/variables.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/common.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/hero.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/about.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/works.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/contact.css">

    <!-- Swiper CSS -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@11/swiper-bundle.min.css">

    <title>UI/UX Designer | Portfolio</title>
</head>

<body>
    <!-- Loading Screen -->
    <div class="loading-screen" id="loading-screen">
        <div class="loading-screen__progress">
            <div class="loading-screen__bar" id="loading-bar"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Noise Overlay -->
    <div class="noise-overlay" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <!-- Custom Cursor (Desktop Only) -->
    <div class="cursor" id="cursor" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <!-- Main Content -->
    <main id="main-content">
        
        <!-- ========== HERO SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="hero" id="hero" data-section="hero">
            <!-- Background Decorations -->
            <div class="hero__deco hero__deco--grid" aria-hidden="true"></div>
            <div class="hero__deco hero__deco--line" aria-hidden="true"></div>

            <!-- Floating Keywords -->
            <div class="hero__keywords" aria-hidden="true">
                <span class="hero__keyword">User Experience</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">Interaction</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">Design System</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">Prototyping</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">Motion Design</span>
            </div>

            <!-- Content Area (Left) -->
            <div class="hero__content">
                <!-- Label / Eyebrow -->
                <div class="hero__label">
                    <span class="hero__label-dot"></span>
                    <span>Available for projects</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Main Title -->
                <h1 class="hero__title">
                    <span class="hero__title-line">
                        <span class="hero__title-text">UI/UX Designer</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="hero__title-line">
                        <span class="hero__title-text">who <span class="hero__title-highlight">codes</span></span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="hero__title-line">
                        <span class="hero__title-text">interactions</span>
                    </span>
                </h1>

                <!-- Subtitle -->
                <p class="hero__subtitle">
                    Crafting <strong>meaningful digital experiences</strong> through
                    strategic design thinking, seamless interactions, and
                    pixel-perfect execution. I bridge the gap between
                    <strong>design and development</strong>.
                </p>

                <!-- CTA Area -->
                <div class="hero__cta">
                    <a href="#works" class="hero__cta-btn">
                        <span>View Projects</span>
                        <svg class="hero__cta-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                    <button class="hero__scroll" aria-label="Scroll to next section">
                        <span class="hero__scroll-line"></span>
                        <span>Scroll</span>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Visual Area (Right) -->
            <div class="hero__visual">
                <!-- Progress Counter -->
                <div class="hero__progress">
                    <span class="hero__progress-current">01</span>
                    <span>/</span>
                    <span class="hero__progress-total">04</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Swiper Container -->
                <div class="hero__swiper swiper">
                    <div class="swiper-wrapper">
                        <!-- Slide 1 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1618005182384-a83a8bd57fbe?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="Abstract gradient design" class="hero__slide-image" loading="eager">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">Brand Identity</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Lumina App</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 2 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1634017839464-5c339bbe3c35?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="Modern UI design" class="hero__slide-image" loading="lazy">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">Web Design</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Nexus Platform</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 3 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558591710-4b4a1ae0f04d?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="Creative abstract art" class="hero__slide-image" loading="lazy">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">Mobile App</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Flow Finance</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 4 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1614850523459-c2f4c699c52e?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="Geometric design pattern" class="hero__slide-image" loading="lazy">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">Design System</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Vertex UI</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Swiper Pagination -->
                <div class="hero__swiper-pagination"></div>

                <!-- Swiper Navigation -->
                <div class="hero__swiper-nav">
                    <button class="hero__swiper-btn hero__swiper-btn--prev" aria-label="Previous slide">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                    <button class="hero__swiper-btn hero__swiper-btn--next" aria-label="Next slide">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- ========== ABOUT SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="about" id="about" data-section="about">
            <!-- Section Number (Decorative) -->
            <span class="about__number" aria-hidden="true">01</span>

            <div class="about__container">
                <!-- Content Area (Left) -->
                <div class="about__content">
                    <!-- Section Header -->
                    <div class="about__header">
                        <div class="about__label">
                            <span>About Me</span>
                        </div>
                        <h2 class="about__title">
                            <span class="about__title-line">
                                <span class="about__title-text">Designer &</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="about__title-line">
                                <span class="about__title-text">Problem Solver</span>
                            </span>
                        </h2>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Main Statement -->
                    <p class="about__statement">
                        I design <span class="about__statement-highlight">experiences</span>,<br>
                        not just screens.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Description -->
                    <p class="about__description">
                        With a foundation in <strong>user-centered design</strong> and a passion for
                        <strong>interactive experiences</strong>, I approach every project as an opportunity
                        to solve real problems. I believe great design emerges from understanding
                        user needs, defining clear objectives, and iterating relentlessly.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Keywords Grid -->
                    <div class="about__keywords">
                        <!-- Keyword 1 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">UX Research</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">Data-driven design decisions</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Keyword 2 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path d="M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">Interaction</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">Motion that tells stories</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Keyword 3 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path
                                    d="M4 5a1 1 0 011-1h14a1 1 0 011 1v2a1 1 0 01-1 1H5a1 1 0 01-1-1V5zM4 13a1 1 0 011-1h6a1 1 0 011 1v6a1 1 0 01-1 1H5a1 1 0 01-1-1v-6zM16 13a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v6a1 1 0 01-1 1h-2a1 1 0 01-1-1v-6z" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">Prototyping</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">From concept to reality</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Keyword 4 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path d="M10 20l4-16m4 4l4 4-4 4M6 16l-4-4 4-4" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">Dev Thinking</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">Design with feasibility</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Visual Area (Right) -->
                <div class="about__visual">
                    <!-- Decorative Elements -->
                    <div class="about__deco about__deco--dots" aria-hidden="true"></div>
                    <div class="about__deco about__deco--circle" aria-hidden="true"></div>

                    <!-- Profile Image -->
                    <div class="about__image-wrapper">
                        <div class="about__image-frame" aria-hidden="true"></div>
                        <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=600&q=80"
                            alt="Designer portrait" class="about__image" loading="lazy">

                        <!-- Floating Stats -->
                        <div class="about__stats">
                            <div class="about__stat">
                                <span class="about__stat-number">5+</span>
                                <span class="about__stat-label">Years Exp</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="about__stat">
                                <span class="about__stat-number">40+</span>
                                <span class="about__stat-label">Projects</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- ========== WORKS SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="works" id="works" data-section="works">
            <!-- Decorative Number -->
            <span class="works__deco works__deco--number" aria-hidden="true">02</span>

            <!-- Section Header -->
            <header class="works__header">
                <div class="works__header-content">
                    <div class="works__label">
                        <span>Selected Works</span>
                    </div>
                    <h2 class="works__title">
                        <span class="works__title-line">
                            <span class="works__title-text">Featured</span>
                        </span>
                        <span class="works__title-line">
                            <span class="works__title-text">Projects</span>
                        </span>
                    </h2>
                    <p class="works__subtitle">
                        A collection of problems I've solved through strategic design thinking and user-centered
                        approaches.
                    </p>
                </div>

                <!-- Navigation & Progress -->
                <div class="works__nav">
                    <div class="works__progress">
                        <span class="works__progress-current">01</span>
                        <div class="works__progress-bar">
                            <div class="works__progress-fill"></div>
                        </div>
                        <span class="works__progress-total">04</span>
                    </div>
                    <button class="works__nav-btn works__nav-btn--prev" aria-label="Previous project">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                    <button class="works__nav-btn works__nav-btn--next" aria-label="Next project">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </header>

            <!-- Swiper Container -->
            <div class="works__swiper-container">
                <div class="works__swiper swiper">
                    <div class="swiper-wrapper">
                        <!-- Project 1 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                            <article class="works__card">
                                <div class="works__card-image">
                                    <span class="works__card-number">01</span>
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551650975-87deedd944c3?w=800&q=80"
                                        alt="Lumina App project" class="works__card-img" loading="lazy">
                                    <div class="works__card-overlay"></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="works__card-content">
                                    <span class="works__card-category">Mobile App</span>
                                    <h3 class="works__card-title">Lumina Health</h3>
                                    <p class="works__card-problem">
                                        How might we help users track their mental wellness without adding cognitive
                                        burden to their daily routine?
                                    </p>
                                    <div class="works__card-tags">
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">UX Research</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">UI Design</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">Prototyping</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                        <span>View Case Study</span>
                                        <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                                            stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                        </svg>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </article>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Project 2 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                            <article class="works__card">
                                <div class="works__card-image">
                                    <span class="works__card-number">02</span>
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1460925895917-afdab827c52f?w=800&q=80"
                                        alt="Nexus Platform project" class="works__card-img" loading="lazy">
                                    <div class="works__card-overlay"></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="works__card-content">
                                    <span class="works__card-category">Web Platform</span>
                                    <h3 class="works__card-title">Nexus Analytics</h3>
                                    <p class="works__card-problem">
                                        How might we simplify complex data visualization for non-technical stakeholders
                                        while maintaining analytical depth?
                                    </p>
                                    <div class="works__card-tags">
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">Dashboard</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">Data Viz</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">Front-end</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                        <span>View Case Study</span>
                                        <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                                            stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                        </svg>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </article>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Project 3 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                            <article class="works__card">
                                <div class="works__card-image">
                                    <span class="works__card-number">03</span>
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1563013544-824ae1b704d3?w=800&q=80"
                                        alt="Flow Finance project" class="works__card-img" loading="lazy">
                                    <div class="works__card-overlay"></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="works__card-content">
                                    <span class="works__card-category">Fintech</span>
                                    <h3 class="works__card-title">Flow Finance</h3>
                                    <p class="works__card-problem">
                                        How might we make personal finance management feel less intimidating for
                                        first-time investors?
                                    </p>
                                    <div class="works__card-tags">
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">UX Strategy</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">UI Design</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">Interaction</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                        <span>View Case Study</span>
                                        <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                                            stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                        </svg>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </article>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Project 4 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                            <article class="works__card">
                                <div class="works__card-image">
                                    <span class="works__card-number">04</span>
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558655146-9f40138edfeb?w=800&q=80"
                                        alt="Vertex UI project" class="works__card-img" loading="lazy">
                                    <div class="works__card-overlay"></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="works__card-content">
                                    <span class="works__card-category">Design System</span>
                                    <h3 class="works__card-title">Vertex UI Kit</h3>
                                    <p class="works__card-problem">
                                        How might we create a scalable design system that accelerates product
                                        development while ensuring consistency?
                                    </p>
                                    <div class="works__card-tags">
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">Design System</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">Components</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">Documentation</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                        <span>View Case Study</span>
                                        <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                                            stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                        </svg>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </article>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- ========== CONTACT SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="contact" id="contact" data-section="contact">
            <!-- Background -->
            <div class="contact__bg" aria-hidden="true"></div>

            <!-- Decorative Elements -->
            <span class="contact__deco contact__deco--number" aria-hidden="true">03</span>
            <div class="contact__deco contact__deco--circle" aria-hidden="true"></div>
            <div class="contact__deco contact__deco--circle-sm" aria-hidden="true"></div>

            <!-- Main Content -->
            <div class="contact__container">
                <!-- Section Label -->
                <div class="contact__label">
                    <span>Get in Touch</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Main Title -->
                <h2 class="contact__title">
                    <span class="contact__title-line">
                        <span class="contact__title-text">Let's build</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="contact__title-line">
                        <span class="contact__title-text"><span class="contact__title-highlight">meaningful</span>
                            experiences</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="contact__title-line">
                        <span class="contact__title-text">together.</span>
                    </span>
                </h2>

                <!-- Subtitle -->
                <p class="contact__subtitle">
                    I'm always open to discussing <strong>new projects</strong>,
                    creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision.
                    Whether it's a full-time role, freelance project, or just a chat about design.
                </p>

                <!-- CTA Buttons -->
                <div class="contact__cta">
                    <a href="mailto:hello@designer.com" class="contact__cta-btn contact__cta-btn--primary">
                        <span>Say Hello</span>
                        <svg class="contact__cta-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                    <a href="#" class="contact__cta-btn contact__cta-btn--secondary" download>
                        <span>Download CV</span>
                        <svg class="contact__cta-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2v-4M7 10l5 5 5-5M12 15V3" />
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                </div>

                <!-- Contact Links -->
                <div class="contact__links">
                    <!-- Email -->
                    <a href="mailto:hello@designer.com" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <path
                                d="M3 8l7.89 5.26a2 2 0 002.22 0L21 8M5 19h14a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2z" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">Email</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">hello@designer.com</span>
                    </a>

                    <!-- LinkedIn -->
                    <a href="https://linkedin.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <path
                                d="M16 8a6 6 0 016 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 00-2-2 2 2 0 00-2 2v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 016-6zM2 9h4v12H2zM4 6a2 2 0 100-4 2 2 0 000 4z" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">LinkedIn</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">Connect</span>
                    </a>

                    <!-- Notion -->
                    <a href="https://notion.so" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <path
                                d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z" />
                            <path d="M8 2v4M16 2v4M2 10h20" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">Notion</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">Portfolio</span>
                    </a>

                    <!-- Dribbble -->
                    <a href="https://dribbble.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" />
                            <path
                                d="M8.56 2.75c4.37 6.03 6.02 9.42 8.03 17.72m2.54-15.38c-3.72 4.35-8.94 5.66-16.88 5.85m19.5 1.9c-3.5-.93-6.63-.82-8.94 0-2.58.92-5.01 2.86-7.44 6.32" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">Dribbble</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">Shots</span>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Footer Note -->
            <footer class="contact__footer">
                <p class="contact__footer-text">
                    Designed & Developed with 💛 · © 2026
                </p>
            </footer>
        </section>

    </main>

    <!-- Scripts -->
    <!-- GSAP Core + Plugins -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/gsap.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/ScrollTrigger.min.js"></script>

    <!-- Swiper -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@11/swiper-bundle.min.js"></script>

    <!-- Custom Scripts -->
    <script src="./js/common.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/heroAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/aboutAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/worksAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/contactAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/swiper/heroSwiper.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/swiper/worksSwiper.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/main.js"></script>
</body>

</html>

```

```javascript
/**
 * main.js
 * 메인 애플리케이션 진입점
 * 모든 모듈 초기화 및 조율
 */

class App {
    constructor() {
        // Module instances
        this.loadingScreen = null;
        this.customCursor = null;
        
        // Animation modules
        this.heroAnimation = null;
        this.aboutAnimation = null;
        this.worksAnimation = null;
        this.contactAnimation = null;
        
        // Swiper modules
        this.heroSwiper = null;
        this.worksSwiper = null;

        // State
        this.isReady = false;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onReady = this.onReady.bind(this);
        this.setupEventListeners = this.setupEventListeners.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize the application
     */
    init() {
        console.log('🚀 App initializing...');

        // Initialize loading screen
        this.loadingScreen = new LoadingScreen();
        
        // Start loading animation
        this.loadingScreen.start(() => {
            this.onReady();
        });

        // Initialize custom cursor (can start immediately)
        this.customCursor = new CustomCursor();
        this.customCursor.init();

        // Setup global event listeners
        this.setupEventListeners();
    }

    /**
     * Called when loading is complete
     */
    onReady() {
        console.log('✅ App ready');
        this.isReady = true;

        // Initialize all animation modules
        this.initAnimations();
        
        // Initialize all swiper modules
        this.initSwipers();

        // Play entrance animations
        setTimeout(() => {
            if (this.heroAnimation) {
                this.heroAnimation.play();
            }
        }, 100);

        // Add ready class to body
        document.body.classList.add('is-ready');
    }

    /**
     * Initialize all animation modules
     */
    initAnimations() {
        // Hero Animation
        if (typeof HeroAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.heroAnimation = new HeroAnimation();
            this.heroAnimation.init();
        }

        // About Animation
        if (typeof AboutAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.aboutAnimation = new AboutAnimation();
            this.aboutAnimation.init();
        }

        // Works Animation
        if (typeof WorksAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.worksAnimation = new WorksAnimation();
            this.worksAnimation.init();
        }

        // Contact Animation
        if (typeof ContactAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.contactAnimation = new ContactAnimation();
            this.contactAnimation.init();
        }

        console.log('🎬 All animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Initialize all swiper modules
     */
    initSwipers() {
        // Hero Swiper
        if (typeof HeroSwiper !== 'undefined') {
            this.heroSwiper = new HeroSwiper();
            this.heroSwiper.init();
        }

        // Works Swiper (with animation reference)
        if (typeof WorksSwiper !== 'undefined') {
            this.worksSwiper = new WorksSwiper();
            this.worksSwiper.init(this.worksAnimation);
        }

        console.log('🎠 All swipers initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Setup global event listeners
     */
    setupEventListeners() {
        // Scroll button handler (Hero)
        const scrollBtn = document.querySelector('.hero__scroll');
        if (scrollBtn) {
            scrollBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const aboutSection = document.querySelector('#about');
                if (aboutSection) {
                    aboutSection.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
                }
            });
        }

        // Smooth scroll for all anchor links
        document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
            anchor.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                const href = anchor.getAttribute('href');
                if (href && href !== '#') {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    const target = document.querySelector(href);
                    if (target) {
                        target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
                    }
                }
            });
        });

        // Resize handler (debounced)
        window.addEventListener('resize', utils.debounce(() => {
            this.onResize();
        }, 250));

        // Visibility change handler
        document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
            if (document.hidden) {
                // Pause autoplay when tab is hidden
                this.pauseAutoplay();
            } else {
                // Resume when tab is visible
                this.resumeAutoplay();
            }
        });

        // Keyboard navigation for swipers
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            // Only respond if no input is focused
            if (document.activeElement.tagName === 'INPUT' || 
                document.activeElement.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') {
                return;
            }

            // Get current section in view
            const sections = document.querySelectorAll('[data-section]');
            let currentSection = null;

            sections.forEach(section => {
                const rect = section.getBoundingClientRect();
                if (rect.top <= window.innerHeight / 2 && rect.bottom >= window.innerHeight / 2) {
                    currentSection = section.dataset.section;
                }
            });

            // Handle arrow keys based on current section
            if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                if (currentSection === 'hero' && this.heroSwiper) {
                    this.heroSwiper.next();
                } else if (currentSection === 'works' && this.worksSwiper) {
                    this.worksSwiper.next();
                }
            } else if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                if (currentSection === 'hero' && this.heroSwiper) {
                    this.heroSwiper.prev();
                } else if (currentSection === 'works' && this.worksSwiper) {
                    this.worksSwiper.prev();
                }
            }
        });

        // Update cursor on new interactive elements
        this.observeNewElements();
    }

    /**
     * Observe for new interactive elements (for cursor)
     */
    observeNewElements() {
        if (!this.customCursor || !this.customCursor.isEnabled) return;

        const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
            mutations.forEach((mutation) => {
                mutation.addedNodes.forEach((node) => {
                    if (node.nodeType === 1) {
                        const interactives = node.querySelectorAll?.('a, button, [data-cursor="hover"]') || [];
                        interactives.forEach(el => {
                            el.addEventListener('mouseenter', this.customCursor.onMouseEnter);
                            el.addEventListener('mouseleave', this.customCursor.onMouseLeave);
                        });
                    }
                });
            });
        });

        observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
    }

    /**
     * Pause all autoplay
     */
    pauseAutoplay() {
        if (this.heroSwiper) {
            this.heroSwiper.stopAutoplay();
        }
        if (this.worksSwiper) {
            this.worksSwiper.stopAutoplay();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Resume all autoplay
     */
    resumeAutoplay() {
        if (this.heroSwiper) {
            this.heroSwiper.startAutoplay();
        }
        if (this.worksSwiper) {
            this.worksSwiper.startAutoplay();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle window resize
     */
    onResize() {
        // Refresh ScrollTrigger on resize
        if (typeof ScrollTrigger !== 'undefined') {
            ScrollTrigger.refresh();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy all modules
     */
    destroy() {
        // Destroy animations
        if (this.heroAnimation) {
            this.heroAnimation.destroy();
        }
        if (this.aboutAnimation) {
            this.aboutAnimation.destroy();
        }
        if (this.worksAnimation) {
            this.worksAnimation.destroy();
        }
        if (this.contactAnimation) {
            this.contactAnimation.destroy();
        }

        // Destroy swipers
        if (this.heroSwiper) {
            this.heroSwiper.destroy();
        }
        if (this.worksSwiper) {
            this.worksSwiper.destroy();
        }

        // Destroy cursor
        if (this.customCursor) {
            this.customCursor.destroy();
        }
    }
}

// Initialize app when DOM is ready
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    const app = new App();
    app.init();

    // Expose app instance globally for debugging
    window.app = app;
});

// Handle page unload
window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => {
    if (window.app) {
        window.app.destroy();
    }
});

```

모든 섹션이 완성되었습니다. 최종 프로젝트 구조와 각 섹션의 기획 의도를 정리해 드리겠습니다.

---

## 🎨 UI/UX Designer Portfolio - 완성

### 📁 최종 폴더 구조

```
/portfolio
 ┣ /assets
 ┃ ┣ /fonts           → 커스텀 폰트 저장소
 ┃ ┣ /icons           → SVG 아이콘, favicon
 ┃ ┗ /images          → 프로젝트 이미지
 ┣ /components        → 재사용 가능한 HTML 컴포넌트
 ┃ ┣ hero.html
 ┃ ┣ about.html
 ┃ ┣ works.html
 ┃ ┗ contact.html
 ┣ /css
 ┃ ┣ reset.css        → 브라우저 초기화
 ┃ ┣ variables.css    → 디자인 토큰
 ┃ ┣ common.css       → 공통 스타일
 ┃ ┣ hero.css         → Hero 섹션
 ┃ ┣ about.css        → About 섹션
 ┃ ┣ works.css        → Works 섹션
 ┃ ┗ contact.css      → Contact 섹션
 ┣ /js
 ┃ ┣ /gsap            → GSAP 애니메이션 모듈
 ┃ ┃ ┣ heroAnimation.js
 ┃ ┃ ┣ aboutAnimation.js
 ┃ ┃ ┣ worksAnimation.js
 ┃ ┃ ┗ contactAnimation.js
 ┃ ┣ /swiper          → Swiper 설정 모듈
 ┃ ┃ ┣ heroSwiper.js
 ┃ ┃ ┗ worksSwiper.js
 ┃ ┣ common.js        → 유틸리티 함수
 ┃ ┗ main.js          → 앱 진입점
 ┗ index.html         → 메인 페이지
```

---

## 📋 각 섹션 기획 의도 및 UX 관점 설명

### 1️⃣ About Section

**목표**: "읽지 않아도 느껴지는" 디자이너 정체성 전달

**레이아웃 결정**:
- **2단 구조** (텍스트 + 비주얼): 정보 밀도를 낮추면서 시각적 균형 확보
- 모바일에서 세로 스택으로 전환하여 스크롤 경험 최적화

**핵심 인터랙션**:
| 요소 | 애니메이션 | UX 의도 |
|------|-----------|--------|
| 핵심 문장 | 스크롤 진입 시 순차 reveal | 가장 중요한 메시지에 시선 집중 |
| "experiences" 하이라이트 | 언더라인 애니메이션 | 핵심 키워드 강조 |
| 키워드 블록 | Stagger 등장 + hover 효과 | 스킬셋을 인터랙티브하게 탐색 |
| 프로필 이미지 | 마우스 따라 미세 이동 | 생동감 부여, 디테일 강조 |

**왜 이 구조인가?**
- "I design experiences, not just screens" - 이 한 문장이 섹션의 핵심
- 키워드 블록이 글을 읽지 않아도 역량을 파악할 수 있게 함
- 통계(5+ Years, 40+ Projects)로 신뢰도 확보

---

### 2️⃣ Works Section

**목표**: "문제 해결 능력"을 증명하는 포트폴리오 쇼케이스

**레이아웃 결정**:
- **풀 와이드 + 가로 스크롤**: 프로젝트 카드에 충분한 공간 부여
- 왼쪽 정렬 시작점으로 자연스러운 탐색 유도

**Swiper.js 활용 전략**:
```javascript
// 핵심 설정
slidesPerView: 'auto'      // 카드 크기 유지
centeredSlides: false      // 왼쪽 시작
grabCursor: true           // 드래그 가능 표시
```

**핵심 인터랙션**:
| 요소 | 애니메이션 | UX 의도 |
|------|-----------|--------|
| 프로젝트 카드 | 3D 틸트 효과 | 인터랙티브한 탐색 경험 |
| 카드 이미지 | Hover 시 scale up | 클릭 유도 |
| 슬라이드 전환 | 콘텐츠 순차 등장 | 새 정보 인지 강화 |
| 프로그레스 바 | 실시간 업데이트 | 전체 맥락 파악 |

**왜 이 구조인가?**
- 각 카드에 "How might we..." 문제 정의 포함 → UX 사고방식 증명
- 태그로 역할(UX/UI/Interaction/Front-end) 명시 → 범위 명확화
- View Case Study CTA → 깊이 있는 탐색 유도

---

### 3️⃣ Contact Section

**목표**: "연락하고 싶다"는 감정을 행동으로 전환

**레이아웃 결정**:
- **중앙 정렬**: 마지막 섹션답게 집중력 극대화
- 심플한 구조로 CTA 강조

**핵심 인터랙션**:
| 요소 | 애니메이션 | UX 의도 |
|------|-----------|--------|
| 메인 문구 | 순차 reveal | 메시지 각인 |
| "meaningful" 하이라이트 | 언더라인 애니메이션 | 핵심 가치 강조 |
| CTA 버튼 | 마그네틱 효과 + 컬러 전환 | 클릭 유도 극대화 |
| 연락처 링크 | 아이콘 bounce 효과 | 친근한 인터랙션 |

**왜 이 구조인가?**
- "Let's build meaningful experiences together" - 협업 제안으로 마무리
- 다양한 연락 수단(Email, LinkedIn, Notion, Dribbble) 제공
- 과하지 않은 애니메이션으로 신뢰감 유지

---

## 🔥 전체 인터랙션 설계 철학

### 1. **절제된 과감함**
- 모든 애니메이션에 명확한 목적 부여
- "와, 멋있다"가 아니라 "아, 이 사람은 디테일을 안다"는 인상

### 2. **스크롤 기반 스토리텔링**
```
Hero (첫인상) → About (정체성) → Works (증거) → Contact (행동 유도)
```
- 각 섹션이 자연스럽게 연결되는 내러티브

### 3. **성능과 접근성 균형**
- `prefers-reduced-motion` 지원
- 모바일에서 애니메이션 간소화
- 탭 비활성화 시 autoplay 중지

### 4. **모듈화된 코드 구조**
- 각 섹션 독립적으로 재사용 가능
- 클래스 기반 JavaScript로 유지보수 용이
- CSS 변수로 테마 변경 간편

---

## 🚀 실행 방법

```bash
# VS Code Live Server 또는
npx serve .
# 또는
python -m http.server 8000
```

---

이 포트폴리오는 **"감각적인데 이유가 있는 UI"**를 목표로 설계되었습니다.

- ✅ GSAP Timeline + ScrollTrigger 적극 활용
- ✅ Swiper.js와 GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션
- ✅ Desktop/Tablet/Mobile 완전 반응형
- ✅ 실무 수준의 모듈화된 코드 구조
- ✅ 디자이너 포트폴리오 상위 10% 퀄리티

```plaintext
/portfolio
 ┣ /assets
 ┃ ┣ /fonts           → 커스텀 폰트 저장소
 ┃ ┣ /icons           → SVG 아이콘, favicon
 ┃ ┗ /images          → 프로젝트 이미지
 ┣ /components        → 재사용 가능한 HTML 컴포넌트
 ┃ ┣ hero.html
 ┃ ┣ about.html
 ┃ ┣ works.html
 ┃ ┗ contact.html
 ┣ /css
 ┃ ┣ reset.css        → 브라우저 초기화
 ┃ ┣ variables.css    → 디자인 토큰
 ┃ ┣ common.css       → 공통 스타일
 ┃ ┣ hero.css         → Hero 섹션
 ┃ ┣ about.css        → About 섹션
 ┃ ┣ works.css        → Works 섹션
 ┃ ┗ contact.css      → Contact 섹션
 ┣ /js
 ┃ ┣ /gsap            → GSAP 애니메이션 모듈
 ┃ ┃ ┣ heroAnimation.js
 ┃ ┃ ┣ aboutAnimation.js
 ┃ ┃ ┣ worksAnimation.js
 ┃ ┃ ┗ contactAnimation.js
 ┃ ┣ /swiper          → Swiper 설정 모듈
 ┃ ┃ ┣ heroSwiper.js
 ┃ ┃ ┗ worksSwiper.js
 ┃ ┣ common.js        → 유틸리티 함수
 ┃ ┗ main.js          → 앱 진입점
 ┗ index.html         → 메인 페이지
```

```javascript
// 핵심 설정
slidesPerView: 'auto'      // 카드 크기 유지
centeredSlides: false      // 왼쪽 시작
grabCursor: true           // 드래그 가능 표시
```

```plaintext
Hero (첫인상) → About (정체성) → Works (증거) → Contact (행동 유도)
```

```shellscript
# VS Code Live Server 또는
npx serve .
# 또는
python -m http.server 8000
```

---

**User**

히어로 영역은  기능이 적용이 안되고 빈화면으로 보여요

---

**Cursor**

Hero 섹션이 빈 화면으로 보이는 문제를 확인하겠습니다. GSAP 애니메이션 초기 상태에서 요소들이 숨겨져 있고, 애니메이션이 제대로 실행되지 않는 것 같습니다.

문제를 찾았습니다. Hero 애니메이션이 `paused: true`로 설정되어 있어서 `play()` 메서드가 호출되어야 하는데, 로딩 스크린이 없거나 제대로 작동하지 않으면 애니메이션이 시작되지 않습니다. 또한 초기 상태에서 모든 요소가 숨겨져 있습니다.

이 문제를 수정하겠습니다:

```javascript
/**
 * heroAnimation.js
 * Hero Section GSAP 애니메이션
 * Timeline 기반 순차 애니메이션 + ScrollTrigger 패럴랙스
 */

class HeroAnimation {
    constructor() {
        this.hero = document.querySelector('.hero');
        this.isInitialized = false;
        
        // Animation targets
        this.elements = {
            label: document.querySelector('.hero__label'),
            titleLines: document.querySelectorAll('.hero__title-text'),
            highlight: document.querySelector('.hero__title-highlight'),
            subtitle: document.querySelector('.hero__subtitle'),
            cta: document.querySelector('.hero__cta'),
            keywords: document.querySelectorAll('.hero__keyword'),
            visual: document.querySelector('.hero__visual'),
            decoGrid: document.querySelector('.hero__deco--grid'),
            decoLine: document.querySelector('.hero__deco--line'),
            progress: document.querySelector('.hero__progress')
        };

        // Timelines
        this.masterTimeline = null;
        this.scrollTimeline = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.createEntranceAnimation = this.createEntranceAnimation.bind(this);
        this.createScrollAnimation = this.createScrollAnimation.bind(this);
        this.createHighlightAnimation = this.createHighlightAnimation.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize all hero animations
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.hero) return;

        // Register GSAP plugins
        gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger);

        // Set initial states
        this.setInitialStates();

        // Create animations
        this.createEntranceAnimation();
        this.createScrollAnimation();
        this.createKeywordAnimation();
        this.createHighlightAnimation();

        // Add highlight styles
        this.addHighlightStyles();

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('🎬 Hero animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Add CSS styles for highlight animation
     */
    addHighlightStyles() {
        if (document.querySelector('#hero-highlight-styles')) return;

        const style = document.createElement('style');
        style.id = 'hero-highlight-styles';
        style.textContent = `
            .hero__title-highlight {
                --highlight-scale: 0;
            }
            .hero__title-highlight::after {
                transform: scaleX(var(--highlight-scale, 0));
            }
        `;
        document.head.appendChild(style);
    }

    /**
     * Set initial states for all animated elements
     */
    setInitialStates() {
        // Title lines - hidden below
        if (this.elements.titleLines.length) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
                yPercent: 100,
                opacity: 0
            });
        }

        // Label - invisible
        if (this.elements.label) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.label, {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 30
            });
        }

        // Subtitle - invisible
        if (this.elements.subtitle) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.subtitle, {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 30
            });
        }

        // CTA - invisible
        if (this.elements.cta) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.cta, {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 30
            });
        }

        // Keywords - scattered and invisible
        if (this.elements.keywords.length) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.keywords, {
                opacity: 0,
                scale: 0.8
            });
        }

        // Visual area
        if (this.elements.visual) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.visual, {
                opacity: 0,
                x: 50
            });
        }

        // Progress counter
        if (this.elements.progress) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.progress, {
                opacity: 0,
                y: -20
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Create entrance animation timeline
     * Triggered after loading screen completes
     */
    createEntranceAnimation() {
        this.masterTimeline = gsap.timeline({
            paused: true,
            defaults: {
                ease: 'expo.out',
                duration: 1.2
            }
        });

        // Phase 1: Label appears
        if (this.elements.label) {
            this.masterTimeline.to(this.elements.label, {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                duration: 0.8
            }, 0);
        }

        // Phase 2: Title lines reveal (staggered)
        if (this.elements.titleLines.length) {
            this.masterTimeline.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
                yPercent: 0,
                opacity: 1,
                duration: 1.4,
                stagger: 0.15,
                ease: 'expo.out'
            }, 0.3);
        }

        // Phase 3: Subtitle fades in
        if (this.elements.subtitle) {
            this.masterTimeline.to(this.elements.subtitle, {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                duration: 1
            }, 0.8);
        }

        // Phase 4: CTA appears
        if (this.elements.cta) {
            this.masterTimeline.to(this.elements.cta, {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                duration: 0.8
            }, 1);
        }

        // Phase 5: Visual area slides in
        if (this.elements.visual) {
            this.masterTimeline.to(this.elements.visual, {
                opacity: 1,
                x: 0,
                duration: 1.2
            }, 0.6);
        }

        // Phase 6: Progress counter
        if (this.elements.progress) {
            this.masterTimeline.to(this.elements.progress, {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                duration: 0.6
            }, 1.2);
        }

        // Phase 7: Highlight underline animation
        this.masterTimeline.add(() => {
            this.animateHighlightUnderline();
        }, 1.5);

        return this.masterTimeline;
    }

    /**
     * Animate the highlight underline with CSS custom property
     */
    animateHighlightUnderline() {
        if (!this.elements.highlight) return;

        gsap.to(this.elements.highlight, {
            '--highlight-scale': 1,
            duration: 0.8,
            ease: 'expo.out'
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create scroll-triggered animations
     */
    createScrollAnimation() {
        // Parallax effect on title
        if (this.elements.titleLines.length) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
                yPercent: -30,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.hero,
                    start: 'top top',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 1.5
                }
            });
        }

        // Subtitle parallax (slower)
        if (this.elements.subtitle) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.subtitle, {
                yPercent: -20,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.hero,
                    start: 'top top',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2
                }
            });
        }

        // Visual area parallax (opposite direction)
        if (this.elements.visual) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.visual, {
                yPercent: 10,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.hero,
                    start: 'top top',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 1
                }
            });
        }

        // Decorative grid fade
        if (this.elements.decoGrid) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.decoGrid, {
                opacity: 0,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.hero,
                    start: 'center top',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: true
                }
            });
        }

        // Label and CTA fade out on scroll
        const fadeElements = [this.elements.label, this.elements.cta].filter(el => el);
        if (fadeElements.length) {
            gsap.to(fadeElements, {
                opacity: 0,
                y: -30,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.hero,
                    start: '20% top',
                    end: '50% top',
                    scrub: true
                }
            });
        }

        // Scale down visual on scroll
        const slideInners = document.querySelectorAll('.hero__slide-inner');
        if (slideInners.length) {
            gsap.to(slideInners, {
                scale: 0.9,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.hero,
                    start: 'top top',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 1.5
                }
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Create floating keyword animations
     */
    createKeywordAnimation() {
        if (!this.elements.keywords.length) return;

        // Staggered entrance (delayed to play after main entrance)
        this.masterTimeline.to(this.elements.keywords, {
            opacity: 1,
            scale: 1,
            duration: 1,
            stagger: {
                each: 0.2,
                from: 'random'
            },
            ease: 'back.out(1.7)'
        }, 2);

        // Continuous floating animation (starts after entrance)
        this.elements.keywords.forEach((keyword, index) => {
            gsap.to(keyword, {
                y: 'random(-20, 20)',
                x: 'random(-10, 10)',
                duration: 'random(3, 5)',
                repeat: -1,
                yoyo: true,
                ease: 'sine.inOut',
                delay: 3 + index * 0.3
            });
        });

        // Scroll fade out
        gsap.to(this.elements.keywords, {
            opacity: 0,
            ease: 'none',
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.hero,
                start: '30% top',
                end: '60% top',
                scrub: true
            }
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create highlight text interaction
     */
    createHighlightAnimation() {
        if (!this.elements.highlight) return;

        // Hover effect on highlight text
        this.elements.highlight.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
            gsap.to(this.elements.highlight, {
                color: 'var(--color-accent)',
                duration: 0.3,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        });

        this.elements.highlight.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            gsap.to(this.elements.highlight, {
                color: 'var(--color-primary)',
                duration: 0.3,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Play entrance animation
     * Called after loading screen completes
     */
    play() {
        if (this.masterTimeline) {
            this.masterTimeline.play();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Pause all animations
     */
    pause() {
        if (this.masterTimeline) {
            this.masterTimeline.pause();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Reset animations to initial state
     */
    reset() {
        if (this.masterTimeline) {
            this.masterTimeline.progress(0).pause();
        }
        this.setInitialStates();
    }

    /**
     * Kill all animations and clean up
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.masterTimeline) {
            this.masterTimeline.kill();
        }
        ScrollTrigger.getAll().forEach(trigger => {
            if (trigger.vars.trigger === this.hero) {
                trigger.kill();
            }
        });
        this.isInitialized = false;
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.HeroAnimation = HeroAnimation;

```

```javascript
/**
 * main.js
 * 메인 애플리케이션 진입점
 * 모든 모듈 초기화 및 조율
 */

class App {
    constructor() {
        // Module instances
        this.loadingScreen = null;
        this.customCursor = null;
        
        // Animation modules
        this.heroAnimation = null;
        this.aboutAnimation = null;
        this.worksAnimation = null;
        this.contactAnimation = null;
        
        // Swiper modules
        this.heroSwiper = null;
        this.worksSwiper = null;

        // State
        this.isReady = false;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onReady = this.onReady.bind(this);
        this.setupEventListeners = this.setupEventListeners.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize the application
     */
    init() {
        console.log('🚀 App initializing...');

        // Check if loading screen exists
        const loadingScreenEl = document.getElementById('loading-screen');
        
        if (loadingScreenEl && typeof LoadingScreen !== 'undefined') {
            // Initialize loading screen
            this.loadingScreen = new LoadingScreen();
            
            // Start loading animation
            this.loadingScreen.start(() => {
                this.onReady();
            });
        } else {
            // No loading screen, initialize immediately
            console.log('⚡ No loading screen, initializing immediately');
            this.onReady();
        }

        // Initialize custom cursor (can start immediately)
        if (typeof CustomCursor !== 'undefined') {
            this.customCursor = new CustomCursor();
            this.customCursor.init();
        }

        // Setup global event listeners
        this.setupEventListeners();
    }

    /**
     * Called when loading is complete
     */
    onReady() {
        console.log('✅ App ready');
        this.isReady = true;

        // Initialize all animation modules
        this.initAnimations();
        
        // Initialize all swiper modules
        this.initSwipers();

        // Play entrance animations with a small delay
        setTimeout(() => {
            if (this.heroAnimation) {
                console.log('▶️ Playing hero animation');
                this.heroAnimation.play();
            }
        }, 100);

        // Add ready class to body
        document.body.classList.add('is-ready');
    }

    /**
     * Initialize all animation modules
     */
    initAnimations() {
        // Hero Animation
        if (typeof HeroAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.heroAnimation = new HeroAnimation();
            this.heroAnimation.init();
            console.log('✅ HeroAnimation created');
        } else {
            console.warn('⚠️ HeroAnimation not found');
        }

        // About Animation
        if (typeof AboutAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.aboutAnimation = new AboutAnimation();
            this.aboutAnimation.init();
        }

        // Works Animation
        if (typeof WorksAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.worksAnimation = new WorksAnimation();
            this.worksAnimation.init();
        }

        // Contact Animation
        if (typeof ContactAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.contactAnimation = new ContactAnimation();
            this.contactAnimation.init();
        }

        console.log('🎬 All animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Initialize all swiper modules
     */
    initSwipers() {
        // Hero Swiper
        if (typeof HeroSwiper !== 'undefined') {
            this.heroSwiper = new HeroSwiper();
            this.heroSwiper.init();
            console.log('✅ HeroSwiper created');
        } else {
            console.warn('⚠️ HeroSwiper not found');
        }

        // Works Swiper (with animation reference)
        if (typeof WorksSwiper !== 'undefined') {
            this.worksSwiper = new WorksSwiper();
            this.worksSwiper.init(this.worksAnimation);
        }

        console.log('🎠 All swipers initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Setup global event listeners
     */
    setupEventListeners() {
        // Scroll button handler (Hero)
        const scrollBtn = document.querySelector('.hero__scroll');
        if (scrollBtn) {
            scrollBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const aboutSection = document.querySelector('#about');
                if (aboutSection) {
                    aboutSection.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
                }
            });
        }

        // Smooth scroll for all anchor links
        document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
            anchor.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                const href = anchor.getAttribute('href');
                if (href && href !== '#') {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    const target = document.querySelector(href);
                    if (target) {
                        target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
                    }
                }
            });
        });

        // Resize handler (debounced)
        if (typeof utils !== 'undefined' && utils.debounce) {
            window.addEventListener('resize', utils.debounce(() => {
                this.onResize();
            }, 250));
        } else {
            let resizeTimeout;
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                clearTimeout(resizeTimeout);
                resizeTimeout = setTimeout(() => this.onResize(), 250);
            });
        }

        // Visibility change handler
        document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
            if (document.hidden) {
                // Pause autoplay when tab is hidden
                this.pauseAutoplay();
            } else {
                // Resume when tab is visible
                this.resumeAutoplay();
            }
        });

        // Keyboard navigation for swipers
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            // Only respond if no input is focused
            if (document.activeElement.tagName === 'INPUT' || 
                document.activeElement.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') {
                return;
            }

            // Get current section in view
            const sections = document.querySelectorAll('[data-section]');
            let currentSection = null;

            sections.forEach(section => {
                const rect = section.getBoundingClientRect();
                if (rect.top <= window.innerHeight / 2 && rect.bottom >= window.innerHeight / 2) {
                    currentSection = section.dataset.section;
                }
            });

            // Handle arrow keys based on current section
            if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                if (currentSection === 'hero' && this.heroSwiper) {
                    this.heroSwiper.next();
                } else if (currentSection === 'works' && this.worksSwiper) {
                    this.worksSwiper.next();
                }
            } else if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                if (currentSection === 'hero' && this.heroSwiper) {
                    this.heroSwiper.prev();
                } else if (currentSection === 'works' && this.worksSwiper) {
                    this.worksSwiper.prev();
                }
            }
        });

        // Update cursor on new interactive elements
        this.observeNewElements();
    }

    /**
     * Observe for new interactive elements (for cursor)
     */
    observeNewElements() {
        if (!this.customCursor || !this.customCursor.isEnabled) return;

        const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
            mutations.forEach((mutation) => {
                mutation.addedNodes.forEach((node) => {
                    if (node.nodeType === 1) {
                        const interactives = node.querySelectorAll?.('a, button, [data-cursor="hover"]') || [];
                        interactives.forEach(el => {
                            el.addEventListener('mouseenter', this.customCursor.onMouseEnter);
                            el.addEventListener('mouseleave', this.customCursor.onMouseLeave);
                        });
                    }
                });
            });
        });

        observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
    }

    /**
     * Pause all autoplay
     */
    pauseAutoplay() {
        if (this.heroSwiper) {
            this.heroSwiper.stopAutoplay();
        }
        if (this.worksSwiper) {
            this.worksSwiper.stopAutoplay();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Resume all autoplay
     */
    resumeAutoplay() {
        if (this.heroSwiper) {
            this.heroSwiper.startAutoplay();
        }
        if (this.worksSwiper) {
            this.worksSwiper.startAutoplay();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle window resize
     */
    onResize() {
        // Refresh ScrollTrigger on resize
        if (typeof ScrollTrigger !== 'undefined') {
            ScrollTrigger.refresh();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy all modules
     */
    destroy() {
        // Destroy animations
        if (this.heroAnimation) {
            this.heroAnimation.destroy();
        }
        if (this.aboutAnimation) {
            this.aboutAnimation.destroy();
        }
        if (this.worksAnimation) {
            this.worksAnimation.destroy();
        }
        if (this.contactAnimation) {
            this.contactAnimation.destroy();
        }

        // Destroy swipers
        if (this.heroSwiper) {
            this.heroSwiper.destroy();
        }
        if (this.worksSwiper) {
            this.worksSwiper.destroy();
        }

        // Destroy cursor
        if (this.customCursor) {
            this.customCursor.destroy();
        }
    }
}

// Initialize app when DOM is ready
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    // Small delay to ensure all scripts are loaded
    setTimeout(() => {
        const app = new App();
        app.init();

        // Expose app instance globally for debugging
        window.app = app;
    }, 50);
});

// Handle page unload
window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => {
    if (window.app) {
        window.app.destroy();
    }
});

```

이제 Hero Swiper도 확인하고 수정하겠습니다:

Swiper 코드는 괜찮아 보입니다. 브라우저 콘솔에서 오류가 있는지 확인하기 위해 CSS에서 초기 상태를 보이게 하는 폴백을 추가하겠습니다. 또한 로딩 스크린이 제대로 작동하지 않을 경우를 대비한 CSS 폴백을 추가합니다:

CSS에서 초기 상태가 숨겨져 있습니다 (`opacity: 0`, `transform: translateY(100%)`). JavaScript가 제대로 로드되지 않으면 콘텐츠가 보이지 않습니다. CSS에 폴백을 추가하고, JavaScript 애니메이션이 제대로 작동하도록 수정하겠습니다:

```css
/**
 * hero.css
 * Hero Section 전용 스타일
 * GSAP 애니메이션 및 Swiper 통합 스타일
 */

/* ===== Hero Section Layout ===== */
.hero {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-dark);
}

.hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.05) 0%, transparent 50%);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* ===== Hero Content Area (Left) ===== */
.hero__content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    padding-left: calc(var(--container-padding) + 5vw);
}

/* Label / Eyebrow */
.hero__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 24px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.hero__label-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.2); }
}

/* Main Title */
.hero__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-hero);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    transform: translateY(100%);
}

.hero__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.hero__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.1em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.15em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Subtitle */
.hero__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 480px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* CTA Area */
.hero__cta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__cta-btn::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover .hero__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* Scroll Indicator */
.hero__scroll {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__scroll:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.hero__scroll-line {
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-600);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__scroll-line::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    animation: scrollLine 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes scrollLine {
    0% { transform: translateX(-100%); }
    50% { transform: translateX(0%); }
    100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
}

/* ===== Hero Visual Area (Right) ===== */
.hero__visual {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Swiper Container */
.hero__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    height: 70vh;
    max-height: 600px;
}

.hero__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: center;
}

.hero__slide {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__slide-inner {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 450px;
    aspect-ratio: 4/5;
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transform: scale(0.85);
    opacity: 0.4;
    transition: all var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-inner {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 1;
}
```
