```css
    .about__description {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    .about__stats {
        left: 50%;
        transform: translateX(-50%);
        bottom: -20px;
    }

    .about__number {
        font-size: var(--text-6xl);
        top: var(--space-8);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .about {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .about__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .about__statement {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .about__description {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .about__keywords {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-3);
    }

    .about__keyword {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .about__image-wrapper {
        max-width: 280px;
    }

    .about__stats {
        flex-direction: row;
        gap: var(--space-2);
    }

    .about__stat {
        padding: var(--space-3) var(--space-4);
    }

    .about__stat-number {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .about__image-frame {
        display: none;
    }

    .about__deco--dots,
    .about__deco--circle {
        display: none;
    }

    .about__number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .about {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .about__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .about__statement {
        font-size: var(--text-xl);
    }

    .about__image-wrapper {
        max-width: 240px;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .about__keyword,
    .about__image {
        transition: none;
    }

    .about__keyword::before {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-32) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto var(--space-16);
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-6xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-4);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    padding-left: calc((100vw - var(--container-xl)) / 2 + var(--container-padding));
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 600px;
    height: auto;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    transform: translateY(-8px);
    box-shadow: 0 30px 60px -20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/10;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        transparent 0%,
        transparent 60%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.8) 100%
    );
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-4);
    left: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    flex: 1;
}

/* Card Category */
.works__card-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-3);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-3);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    flex: 1;
}

/* Card Tags */
.works__card-tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-tag {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

    .works__swiper-container {
        padding-left: var(--container-padding);
    }
}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 450px;
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 320px;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 280px;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```css
/**
 * contact.css
 * Contact Section 전용 스타일
 * 심플한 중앙 정렬 + CTA 중심 디자인
 */

/* ===== Contact Section Layout ===== */
.contact {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-32) var(--container-padding);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.contact__bg {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 100%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.1) 0%, transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.03) 0%, transparent 40%);
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Contact Container ===== */
.contact__container {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    max-width: 900px;
    text-align: center;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.contact__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
}

.contact__label::before,
.contact__label::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
}

/* ===== Main Title ===== */
.contact__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-6xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.contact__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.contact__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.contact__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.05em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.12em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.7;
}

/* ===== Subtitle ===== */
.contact__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto var(--space-12);
}

.contact__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* ===== CTA Buttons ===== */
.contact__cta {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-16);
}

.contact__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-5) var(--space-10);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary {
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--color-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
}

.contact__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__cta-btn:hover .contact__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Contact Links ===== */
.contact__links {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-8);
}

.contact__link {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-6);
    min-width: 120px;
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    text-decoration: none;
}

.contact__link:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    border-color: var(--color-gray-800);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
}

.contact__link-icon {
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-icon {
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.contact__link-label {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-label {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.contact__link-hint {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.contact__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.contact__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -10%;
    left: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

.contact__deco--circle {
    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 10%;
    right: -100px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

.contact__deco--circle-sm {
    width: 150px;
    height: 150px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    bottom: 20%;
    left: -50px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

/* ===== Footer Note ===== */
.contact__footer {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    text-align: center;
}

.contact__footer-text {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
}

.contact__footer-text a {
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__footer-text a:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .contact__deco--number {
        font-size: 14rem;
    }

    .contact__deco--circle {
        width: 200px;
        height: 200px;
        right: -80px;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding);
        min-height: auto;
        padding-bottom: var(--space-24);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .contact__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-3);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .contact__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 300px;
    }

    .contact__links {
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link {
        min-width: 100px;
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__deco--number,
    .contact__deco--circle,
    .contact__deco--circle-sm {
        display: none;
    }

    .contact__footer {
        position: relative;
        bottom: auto;
        left: auto;
        transform: none;
        margin-top: var(--space-12);
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .contact__links {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-2);
    }

    .contact__link {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 200px;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link-icon {
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .contact__cta-btn,
    .contact__link,
    .contact__link-icon {
        transition: none;
    }

    .contact__cta-btn::before {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```css
/**
 * hero.css
 * Hero Section 전용 스타일
 * GSAP 애니메이션 및 Swiper 통합 스타일
 */

/* ===== Hero Section Layout ===== */
.hero {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-dark);
}

.hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.05) 0%, transparent 50%);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* ===== Hero Content Area (Left) ===== */
.hero__content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    padding-left: calc(var(--container-padding) + 5vw);
}

/* Label / Eyebrow */
.hero__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 24px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.hero__label-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.2); }
}

/* Main Title */
.hero__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-hero);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.hero__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.hero__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.1em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.15em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Subtitle */
.hero__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 480px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* CTA Area */
.hero__cta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__cta-btn::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover .hero__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* Scroll Indicator */
.hero__scroll {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__scroll:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.hero__scroll-line {
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-600);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__scroll-line::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    animation: scrollLine 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes scrollLine {
    0% { transform: translateX(-100%); }
    50% { transform: translateX(0%); }
    100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
}

/* ===== Hero Visual Area (Right) ===== */
.hero__visual {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Swiper Container */
.hero__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    height: 70vh;
    max-height: 600px;
}

.hero__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: center;
}

.hero__slide {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__slide-inner {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 450px;
    aspect-ratio: 4/5;
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transform: scale(0.85);
    opacity: 0.4;
    transition: all var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-inner {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__slide-inner:hover .hero__slide-image {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Slide Overlay */
.hero__slide-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        transparent 0%,
        transparent 50%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.9) 100%
    );
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.hero__slide-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
}

/* Swiper Navigation */
.hero__swiper-nav {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-btn {
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.hero__swiper-btn svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
}

/* Swiper Pagination */
.hero__swiper-pagination {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet {
    width: 24px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 0;
    opacity: 1;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet-active {
    width: 48px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Progress Counter */
.hero__progress {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__progress-current {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.hero__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.hero__deco--grid {
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        linear-gradient(var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    opacity: 0.3;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--circle {
    width: 400px;
    height: 400px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--line {
    width: 1px;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
    left: 50%;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* Floating Keywords */
.hero__keywords {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__keyword {
    position: absolute;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-700);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__keyword:nth-child(1) { top: 15%; left: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(2) { top: 25%; right: 15%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(3) { bottom: 30%; left: 5%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(4) { bottom: 20%; right: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(5) { top: 60%; left: 15%; }

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .hero {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
        min-height: auto;
    }

    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding) var(--space-12);
        text-align: center;
    }

    .hero__label {
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    .hero__cta {
        justify-content: center;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 60vh;
    }

    .hero__swiper {
        height: 100%;
        max-height: none;
    }

    .hero__deco--grid {
        width: 100%;
        opacity: 0.15;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding) var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__label {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__title {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 50vh;
        min-height: 400px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 280px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-nav {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__swiper-btn {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-pagination {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        left: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__progress {
        top: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__keywords {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding) var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 45vh;
        min-height: 350px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 240px;
    }

    .hero__slide-overlay {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__slide-title {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .hero__label-dot,
    .hero__scroll-line::after {
        animation: none;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner,
    .hero__cta-btn,
    .hero__swiper-btn {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```


타이틀 애니메이션이 완료된 후에도 유지되도록 수정 중입니다.


```javascript
/**
 * aboutAnimation.js
 * About Section GSAP 애니메이션
 * ScrollTrigger 기반 순차 등장 + 패럴랙스 효과
 */

class AboutAnimation {
    constructor() {
        this.section = document.querySelector('.about');
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation targets
        this.elements = {
            label: document.querySelector('.about__label'),
            titleLines: document.querySelectorAll('.about__title-text'),
            statement: document.querySelector('.about__statement'),
            statementHighlight: document.querySelector('.about__statement-highlight'),
            description: document.querySelector('.about__description'),
            keywords: document.querySelectorAll('.about__keyword'),
            imageWrapper: document.querySelector('.about__image-wrapper'),
            image: document.querySelector('.about__image'),
            stats: document.querySelectorAll('.about__stat'),
            number: document.querySelector('.about__number'),
            decos: document.querySelectorAll('.about__deco')
        };

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize about section animations
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.section) return;

        // Set initial states
        this.setInitialStates();

        // Create scroll-triggered animations
        this.createEntranceAnimation();
        this.createParallaxEffects();
        this.createKeywordAnimations();
        this.createImageAnimations();

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('📝 About animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Set initial states for all animated elements
     */
    setInitialStates() {
        // Label
        gsap.set(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 0,
            x: -30
        });

        // Title lines
        gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 100,
            opacity: 0
        });

        // Statement
        gsap.set(this.elements.statement, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 40
        });

        // Description
        gsap.set(this.elements.description, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 30
        });

        // Keywords
        gsap.set(this.elements.keywords, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 40,
            scale: 0.95
        });

        // Image wrapper
        gsap.set(this.elements.imageWrapper, {
            opacity: 0,
            scale: 0.9,
            y: 60
        });

        // Stats
        gsap.set(this.elements.stats, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 30
        });

        // Section number
        if (this.elements.number) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.number, {
                opacity: 0,
                x: 50
            });
        }

        // Decorative elements
        gsap.set(this.elements.decos, {
            opacity: 0,
            scale: 0.8
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create main entrance animation with ScrollTrigger
     */
    createEntranceAnimation() {
        const tl = gsap.timeline({
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top 80%',
                end: 'top 20%',
                toggleActions: 'play none none none',
                once: false,
                markers: false,
                invalidateOnRefresh: true
            },
            defaults: {
                ease: 'expo.out',
                duration: 1
            }
        });

        // Phase 1: Label slides in
        tl.to(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 1,
            x: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0);

        // Phase 2: Title lines reveal
        tl.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 0,
            opacity: 1,
            duration: 1.2,
            stagger: 0.12
        }, 0.2);

        // Phase 3: Section number
        if (this.elements.number) {
            tl.to(this.elements.number, {
                opacity: 1,
                x: 0,
                duration: 1
            }, 0.3);
        }

        // Phase 4: Statement appears
        tl.to(this.elements.statement, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 1
        }, 0.5);

        // Phase 5: Highlight underline
        tl.to(this.elements.statementHighlight, {
            '--highlight-scale': 1,
            duration: 0.8,
            ease: 'power2.out'
        }, 0.9);

        // Phase 6: Description
        tl.to(this.elements.description, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0.7);

        // Phase 7: Keywords stagger
        tl.to(this.elements.keywords, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            scale: 1,
            duration: 0.8,
            stagger: 0.1
        }, 0.9);

        // Phase 8: Image area
        tl.to(this.elements.imageWrapper, {
            opacity: 1,
            scale: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 1.2
        }, 0.4);

        // Phase 9: Stats
        tl.to(this.elements.stats, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.6,
            stagger: 0.1
        }, 1);

        // Phase 10: Decorations
        tl.to(this.elements.decos, {
            opacity: 0.5,
            scale: 1,
            duration: 1,
            stagger: 0.2
        }, 0.8);

        // Add CSS for highlight animation
        this.addHighlightStyles();
    }

    /**
     * Add CSS styles for highlight animation
     */
    addHighlightStyles() {
        if (document.querySelector('#about-highlight-styles')) return;

        const style = document.createElement('style');
        style.id = 'about-highlight-styles';
        style.textContent = `
            .about__statement-highlight {
                --highlight-scale: 0;
            }
            .about__statement-highlight::after {
                transform: scaleX(var(--highlight-scale));
            }
        `;
        document.head.appendChild(style);
    }

    /**
     * Create parallax effects on scroll
     */
    createParallaxEffects() {
        // Title parallax removed - keep titles always visible
        // Only apply parallax to non-essential elements

        // Image parallax - moves up faster
        gsap.to(this.elements.image, {
            yPercent: -10,
            ease: 'none',
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top bottom',
                end: 'bottom top',
                scrub: 2
            }
        });

        // Section number parallax
        if (this.elements.number) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.number, {
                yPercent: 30,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 1
                }
            });
        }

        // Decorations parallax
        this.elements.decos.forEach((deco, index) => {
            gsap.to(deco, {
                y: index % 2 === 0 ? -50 : 50,
                rotation: index % 2 === 0 ? 10 : -10,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2
                }
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create keyword hover animations
     */
    createKeywordAnimations() {
        this.elements.keywords.forEach(keyword => {
            const icon = keyword.querySelector('.about__keyword-icon');

            keyword.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                gsap.to(icon, {
                    scale: 1.2,
                    rotation: 5,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'back.out(1.7)'
                });
            });

            keyword.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(icon, {
                    scale: 1,
                    rotation: 0,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create image hover animations
     */
    createImageAnimations() {
        if (!this.elements.imageWrapper) return;

        const frame = this.elements.imageWrapper.querySelector('.about__image-frame');

        this.elements.imageWrapper.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
            if (frame) {
                gsap.to(frame, {
                    scale: 1.02,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        });

        this.elements.imageWrapper.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            if (frame) {
                gsap.to(frame, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        });

        // Mouse move effect
        this.elements.imageWrapper.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
            const rect = this.elements.imageWrapper.getBoundingClientRect();
            const x = (e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2) / rect.width;
            const y = (e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2) / rect.height;

            gsap.to(this.elements.image, {
                x: x * 10,
                y: y * 10,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        });

        this.elements.imageWrapper.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            gsap.to(this.elements.image, {
                x: 0,
                y: 0,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Destroy animations and clean up
     */
    destroy() {
        ScrollTrigger.getAll().forEach(trigger => {
            if (trigger.vars.trigger === this.section) {
                trigger.kill();
            }
        });
        this.isInitialized = false;
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.AboutAnimation = AboutAnimation;

```

```javascript
/**
 * aboutAnimation.js
 * About Section GSAP 애니메이션
 * ScrollTrigger 기반 순차 등장 + 패럴랙스 효과
 */

class AboutAnimation {
    constructor() {
        this.section = document.querySelector('.about');
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation targets
        this.elements = {
            label: document.querySelector('.about__label'),
            titleLines: document.querySelectorAll('.about__title-text'),
            statement: document.querySelector('.about__statement'),
            statementHighlight: document.querySelector('.about__statement-highlight'),
            description: document.querySelector('.about__description'),
            keywords: document.querySelectorAll('.about__keyword'),
            imageWrapper: document.querySelector('.about__image-wrapper'),
            image: document.querySelector('.about__image'),
            stats: document.querySelectorAll('.about__stat'),
            number: document.querySelector('.about__number'),
            decos: document.querySelectorAll('.about__deco')
        };

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize about section animations
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.section) return;

        // Set initial states
        this.setInitialStates();

        // Create scroll-triggered animations
        this.createEntranceAnimation();
        this.createParallaxEffects();
        this.createKeywordAnimations();
        this.createImageAnimations();

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('📝 About animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Set initial states for all animated elements
     */
    setInitialStates() {
        // Label
        gsap.set(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 0,
            x: -30
        });

        // Title lines
        gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 100,
            opacity: 0
        });

        // Statement
        gsap.set(this.elements.statement, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 40
        });

        // Description
        gsap.set(this.elements.description, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 30
        });

        // Keywords
        gsap.set(this.elements.keywords, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 40,
            scale: 0.95
        });

        // Image wrapper
        gsap.set(this.elements.imageWrapper, {
            opacity: 0,
            scale: 0.9,
            y: 60
        });

        // Stats
        gsap.set(this.elements.stats, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 30
        });

        // Section number
        if (this.elements.number) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.number, {
                opacity: 0,
                x: 50
            });
        }

        // Decorative elements
        gsap.set(this.elements.decos, {
            opacity: 0,
            scale: 0.8
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create main entrance animation with ScrollTrigger
     */
    createEntranceAnimation() {
        const tl = gsap.timeline({
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top 80%',
                end: 'top 20%',
                toggleActions: 'play none none none',
                once: false,
                markers: false,
                invalidateOnRefresh: true
            },
            defaults: {
                ease: 'expo.out',
                duration: 1
            }
        });

        // Phase 1: Label slides in
        tl.to(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 1,
            x: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0);

        // Phase 2: Title lines reveal - keep visible after animation
        tl.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 0,
            opacity: 1,
            duration: 1.2,
            stagger: 0.12,
            onComplete: () => {
                // Ensure titles stay visible
                gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
                    opacity: 1,
                    yPercent: 0,
                    clearProps: 'all'
                });
            }
        }, 0.2);

        // Phase 3: Section number
        if (this.elements.number) {
            tl.to(this.elements.number, {
                opacity: 1,
                x: 0,
                duration: 1
            }, 0.3);
        }

        // Phase 4: Statement appears
        tl.to(this.elements.statement, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 1
        }, 0.5);

        // Phase 5: Highlight underline
        tl.to(this.elements.statementHighlight, {
            '--highlight-scale': 1,
            duration: 0.8,
            ease: 'power2.out'
        }, 0.9);

        // Phase 6: Description
        tl.to(this.elements.description, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0.7);

        // Phase 7: Keywords stagger
        tl.to(this.elements.keywords, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            scale: 1,
            duration: 0.8,
            stagger: 0.1
        }, 0.9);

        // Phase 8: Image area
        tl.to(this.elements.imageWrapper, {
            opacity: 1,
            scale: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 1.2
        }, 0.4);

        // Phase 9: Stats
        tl.to(this.elements.stats, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.6,
            stagger: 0.1
        }, 1);

        // Phase 10: Decorations
        tl.to(this.elements.decos, {
            opacity: 0.5,
            scale: 1,
            duration: 1,
            stagger: 0.2
        }, 0.8);

        // Add CSS for highlight animation
        this.addHighlightStyles();
    }

    /**
     * Add CSS styles for highlight animation
     */
    addHighlightStyles() {
        if (document.querySelector('#about-highlight-styles')) return;

        const style = document.createElement('style');
        style.id = 'about-highlight-styles';
        style.textContent = `
            .about__statement-highlight {
                --highlight-scale: 0;
            }
            .about__statement-highlight::after {
                transform: scaleX(var(--highlight-scale));
            }
        `;
        document.head.appendChild(style);
    }

    /**
     * Create parallax effects on scroll
     */
    createParallaxEffects() {
        // Title parallax removed - keep titles always visible
        // Only apply parallax to non-essential elements

        // Image parallax - moves up faster
        gsap.to(this.elements.image, {
            yPercent: -10,
            ease: 'none',
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top bottom',
                end: 'bottom top',
                scrub: 2
            }
        });

        // Section number parallax
        if (this.elements.number) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.number, {
                yPercent: 30,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 1
                }
            });
        }

        // Decorations parallax
        this.elements.decos.forEach((deco, index) => {
            gsap.to(deco, {
                y: index % 2 === 0 ? -50 : 50,
                rotation: index % 2 === 0 ? 10 : -10,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2
                }
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create keyword hover animations
     */
    createKeywordAnimations() {
        this.elements.keywords.forEach(keyword => {
            const icon = keyword.querySelector('.about__keyword-icon');

            keyword.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                gsap.to(icon, {
                    scale: 1.2,
                    rotation: 5,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'back.out(1.7)'
                });
            });

            keyword.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(icon, {
                    scale: 1,
                    rotation: 0,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create image hover animations
     */
    createImageAnimations() {
        if (!this.elements.imageWrapper) return;

        const frame = this.elements.imageWrapper.querySelector('.about__image-frame');

        this.elements.imageWrapper.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
            if (frame) {
                gsap.to(frame, {
                    scale: 1.02,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        });

        this.elements.imageWrapper.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            if (frame) {
                gsap.to(frame, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        });

        // Mouse move effect
        this.elements.imageWrapper.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
            const rect = this.elements.imageWrapper.getBoundingClientRect();
            const x = (e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2) / rect.width;
            const y = (e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2) / rect.height;

            gsap.to(this.elements.image, {
                x: x * 10,
                y: y * 10,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        });

        this.elements.imageWrapper.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            gsap.to(this.elements.image, {
                x: 0,
                y: 0,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Destroy animations and clean up
     */
    destroy() {
        ScrollTrigger.getAll().forEach(trigger => {
            if (trigger.vars.trigger === this.section) {
                trigger.kill();
            }
        });
        this.isInitialized = false;
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.AboutAnimation = AboutAnimation;

```

```javascript
/**
 * worksAnimation.js
 * Works Section GSAP 애니메이션
 * ScrollTrigger 기반 섹션 등장 + Swiper 연동 트랜지션
 */

class WorksAnimation {
    constructor() {
        this.section = document.querySelector('.works');
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation targets
        this.elements = {
            label: document.querySelector('.works__label'),
            titleLines: document.querySelectorAll('.works__title-text'),
            subtitle: document.querySelector('.works__subtitle'),
            nav: document.querySelector('.works__nav'),
            cards: document.querySelectorAll('.works__card'),
            decoNumber: document.querySelector('.works__deco--number')
        };

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.animateCardContent = this.animateCardContent.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize works section animations
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.section) return;

        // Set initial states
        this.setInitialStates();

        // Create scroll-triggered animations
        this.createEntranceAnimation();
        this.createParallaxEffects();
        this.createCardAnimations();

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('💼 Works animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Set initial states for all animated elements
     */
    setInitialStates() {
        // Label
        gsap.set(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 0,
            x: -30
        });

        // Title lines
        gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 100,
            opacity: 0
        });

        // Subtitle
        gsap.set(this.elements.subtitle, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 20
        });

        // Navigation
        gsap.set(this.elements.nav, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 20
        });

        // Cards - initial state for entrance
        gsap.set(this.elements.cards, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 60
        });

        // Decorative number
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                opacity: 0,
                x: 100
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Create main entrance animation with ScrollTrigger
     */
    createEntranceAnimation() {
        const tl = gsap.timeline({
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top 80%',
                end: 'top 20%',
                toggleActions: 'play none none none',
                once: false,
                markers: false,
                invalidateOnRefresh: true
            },
            defaults: {
                ease: 'expo.out',
                duration: 1
            }
        });

        // Phase 1: Label slides in
        tl.to(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 1,
            x: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0);

        // Phase 2: Title lines reveal
        tl.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 0,
            opacity: 1,
            duration: 1.2,
            stagger: 0.12
        }, 0.2);

        // Phase 3: Subtitle
        tl.to(this.elements.subtitle, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0.5);

        // Phase 4: Navigation
        tl.to(this.elements.nav, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.6
        }, 0.6);

        // Phase 5: Cards stagger
        tl.to(this.elements.cards, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 1,
            stagger: 0.15
        }, 0.7);

        // Phase 6: Decorative number
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            tl.to(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                opacity: 0.5,
                x: 0,
                duration: 1.2
            }, 0.4);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Create parallax effects on scroll
     */
    createParallaxEffects() {
        // Title parallax removed - keep titles always visible
        // Only apply parallax to decorative elements

        // Decorative number parallax
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                yPercent: 20,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2
                }
            });
        }

        // Cards subtle parallax (different speeds)
        this.elements.cards.forEach((card, index) => {
            gsap.to(card, {
                y: (index % 2 === 0 ? -20 : 20),
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2 + index * 0.3
                }
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create card hover and interaction animations
     */
    createCardAnimations() {
        this.elements.cards.forEach(card => {
            const image = card.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            const content = card.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const title = card.querySelector('.works__card-title');
            const cta = card.querySelector('.works__card-cta');

            // Mouse enter
            card.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1.08,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });

                gsap.to(content, {
                    y: -5,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            // Mouse leave
            card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });

                gsap.to(content, {
                    y: 0,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            // Magnetic effect on card
            card.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = (e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2) / rect.width;
                const y = (e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2) / rect.height;

                gsap.to(card, {
                    rotateY: x * 5,
                    rotateX: -y * 5,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out',
                    transformPerspective: 1000
                });
            });

            card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(card, {
                    rotateY: 0,
                    rotateX: 0,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Animate card content on slide change (called from Swiper)
     * @param {number} index - Active slide index
     */
    animateCardContent(index) {
        const activeCard = this.elements.cards[index];
        if (!activeCard) return;

        const elements = {
            category: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-category'),
            title: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-title'),
            problem: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-problem'),
            tags: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-tags'),
            cta: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-cta')
        };

        // Reset and animate content
        const tl = gsap.timeline();

        tl.fromTo([elements.category, elements.title, elements.problem, elements.tags, elements.cta],
            {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 20
            },
            {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                duration: 0.5,
                stagger: 0.08,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Destroy animations and clean up
     */
    destroy() {
        ScrollTrigger.getAll().forEach(trigger => {
            if (trigger.vars.trigger === this.section) {
                trigger.kill();
            }
        });
        this.isInitialized = false;
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksAnimation = WorksAnimation;

```

```javascript
/**
 * worksAnimation.js
 * Works Section GSAP 애니메이션
 * ScrollTrigger 기반 섹션 등장 + Swiper 연동 트랜지션
 */

class WorksAnimation {
    constructor() {
        this.section = document.querySelector('.works');
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation targets
        this.elements = {
            label: document.querySelector('.works__label'),
            titleLines: document.querySelectorAll('.works__title-text'),
            subtitle: document.querySelector('.works__subtitle'),
            nav: document.querySelector('.works__nav'),
            cards: document.querySelectorAll('.works__card'),
            decoNumber: document.querySelector('.works__deco--number')
        };

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.animateCardContent = this.animateCardContent.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize works section animations
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.section) return;

        // Set initial states
        this.setInitialStates();

        // Create scroll-triggered animations
        this.createEntranceAnimation();
        this.createParallaxEffects();
        this.createCardAnimations();

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('💼 Works animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Set initial states for all animated elements
     */
    setInitialStates() {
        // Label
        gsap.set(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 0,
            x: -30
        });

        // Title lines
        gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 100,
            opacity: 0
        });

        // Subtitle
        gsap.set(this.elements.subtitle, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 20
        });

        // Navigation
        gsap.set(this.elements.nav, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 20
        });

        // Cards - initial state for entrance
        gsap.set(this.elements.cards, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 60
        });

        // Decorative number
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                opacity: 0,
                x: 100
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Create main entrance animation with ScrollTrigger
     */
    createEntranceAnimation() {
        const tl = gsap.timeline({
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top 80%',
                end: 'top 20%',
                toggleActions: 'play none none none',
                once: false,
                markers: false,
                invalidateOnRefresh: true
            },
            defaults: {
                ease: 'expo.out',
                duration: 1
            }
        });

        // Phase 1: Label slides in
        tl.to(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 1,
            x: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0);

        // Phase 2: Title lines reveal - keep visible after animation
        tl.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 0,
            opacity: 1,
            duration: 1.2,
            stagger: 0.12,
            onComplete: () => {
                // Ensure titles stay visible
                gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
                    opacity: 1,
                    yPercent: 0,
                    clearProps: 'all'
                });
            }
        }, 0.2);

        // Phase 3: Subtitle
        tl.to(this.elements.subtitle, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0.5);

        // Phase 4: Navigation
        tl.to(this.elements.nav, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.6
        }, 0.6);

        // Phase 5: Cards stagger
        tl.to(this.elements.cards, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 1,
            stagger: 0.15
        }, 0.7);

        // Phase 6: Decorative number
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            tl.to(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                opacity: 0.5,
                x: 0,
                duration: 1.2
            }, 0.4);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Create parallax effects on scroll
     */
    createParallaxEffects() {
        // Title parallax removed - keep titles always visible
        // Only apply parallax to decorative elements

        // Decorative number parallax
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                yPercent: 20,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2
                }
            });
        }

        // Cards subtle parallax (different speeds)
        this.elements.cards.forEach((card, index) => {
            gsap.to(card, {
                y: (index % 2 === 0 ? -20 : 20),
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2 + index * 0.3
                }
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create card hover and interaction animations
     */
    createCardAnimations() {
        this.elements.cards.forEach(card => {
            const image = card.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            const content = card.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const title = card.querySelector('.works__card-title');
            const cta = card.querySelector('.works__card-cta');

            // Mouse enter
            card.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1.08,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });

                gsap.to(content, {
                    y: -5,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            // Mouse leave
            card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });

                gsap.to(content, {
                    y: 0,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            // Magnetic effect on card
            card.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = (e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2) / rect.width;
                const y = (e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2) / rect.height;

                gsap.to(card, {
                    rotateY: x * 5,
                    rotateX: -y * 5,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out',
                    transformPerspective: 1000
                });
            });

            card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(card, {
                    rotateY: 0,
                    rotateX: 0,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Animate card content on slide change (called from Swiper)
     * @param {number} index - Active slide index
     */
    animateCardContent(index) {
        const activeCard = this.elements.cards[index];
        if (!activeCard) return;

        const elements = {
            category: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-category'),
            title: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-title'),
            problem: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-problem'),
            tags: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-tags'),
            cta: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-cta')
        };

        // Reset and animate content
        const tl = gsap.timeline();

        tl.fromTo([elements.category, elements.title, elements.problem, elements.tags, elements.cta],
            {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 20
            },
            {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                duration: 0.5,
                stagger: 0.08,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Destroy animations and clean up
     */
    destroy() {
        ScrollTrigger.getAll().forEach(trigger => {
            if (trigger.vars.trigger === this.section) {
                trigger.kill();
            }
        });
        this.isInitialized = false;
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksAnimation = WorksAnimation;

```

```javascript
/**
 * contactAnimation.js
 * Contact Section GSAP 애니메이션
 * 절제되지만 인상적인 마지막 섹션 애니메이션
 */

class ContactAnimation {
    constructor() {
        this.section = document.querySelector('.contact');
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation targets
        this.elements = {
            label: document.querySelector('.contact__label'),
            titleLines: document.querySelectorAll('.contact__title-text'),
            titleHighlight: document.querySelector('.contact__title-highlight'),
            subtitle: document.querySelector('.contact__subtitle'),
            cta: document.querySelector('.contact__cta'),
            ctaBtns: document.querySelectorAll('.contact__cta-btn'),
            links: document.querySelectorAll('.contact__link'),
            footer: document.querySelector('.contact__footer'),
            decoNumber: document.querySelector('.contact__deco--number'),
            decoCircles: document.querySelectorAll('.contact__deco--circle, .contact__deco--circle-sm')
        };

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize contact section animations
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.section) return;

        // Set initial states
        this.setInitialStates();

        // Create scroll-triggered animations
        this.createEntranceAnimation();
        this.createParallaxEffects();
        this.createButtonAnimations();
        this.createLinkAnimations();

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('📬 Contact animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Set initial states for all animated elements
     */
    setInitialStates() {
        // Label
        gsap.set(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 20
        });

        // Title lines
        gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 100,
            opacity: 0
        });

        // Subtitle
        gsap.set(this.elements.subtitle, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 30
        });

        // CTA buttons
        gsap.set(this.elements.ctaBtns, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 30
        });

        // Links
        gsap.set(this.elements.links, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 40
        });

        // Footer
        if (this.elements.footer) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.footer, {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 20
            });
        }

        // Decorative number
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                opacity: 0,
                x: -100
            });
        }

        // Decorative circles
        gsap.set(this.elements.decoCircles, {
            opacity: 0,
            scale: 0.8
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create main entrance animation with ScrollTrigger
     */
    createEntranceAnimation() {
        const tl = gsap.timeline({
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top 80%',
                end: 'top 20%',
                toggleActions: 'play none none none',
                once: false,
                markers: false,
                invalidateOnRefresh: true
            },
            defaults: {
                ease: 'expo.out',
                duration: 1
            }
        });

        // Phase 1: Label
        tl.to(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0);

        // Phase 2: Title lines reveal
        tl.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 0,
            opacity: 1,
            duration: 1.2,
            stagger: 0.12
        }, 0.2);

        // Phase 3: Highlight underline
        tl.add(() => {
            this.animateHighlightUnderline();
        }, 0.8);

        // Phase 4: Subtitle
        tl.to(this.elements.subtitle, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 1
        }, 0.6);

        // Phase 5: CTA buttons
        tl.to(this.elements.ctaBtns, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.8,
            stagger: 0.1
        }, 0.9);

        // Phase 6: Links stagger
        tl.to(this.elements.links, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.8,
            stagger: 0.08
        }, 1.1);

        // Phase 7: Footer
        if (this.elements.footer) {
            tl.to(this.elements.footer, {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                duration: 0.6
            }, 1.4);
        }

        // Phase 8: Decorative elements
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            tl.to(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                opacity: 0.5,
                x: 0,
                duration: 1.2
            }, 0.4);
        }

        tl.to(this.elements.decoCircles, {
            opacity: 0.3,
            scale: 1,
            duration: 1,
            stagger: 0.2
        }, 0.6);
    }

    /**
     * Animate highlight underline
     */
    animateHighlightUnderline() {
        if (!this.elements.titleHighlight) return;

        // Add CSS for highlight animation
        if (!document.querySelector('#contact-highlight-styles')) {
            const style = document.createElement('style');
            style.id = 'contact-highlight-styles';
            style.textContent = `
                .contact__title-highlight {
                    --highlight-scale: 0;
                }
                .contact__title-highlight::after {
                    transform: scaleX(var(--highlight-scale));
                }
            `;
            document.head.appendChild(style);
        }

        gsap.to(this.elements.titleHighlight, {
            '--highlight-scale': 1,
            duration: 0.8,
            ease: 'power2.out'
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create parallax effects on scroll
     */
    createParallaxEffects() {
        // Title parallax removed - keep titles always visible
        // Only apply parallax to decorative elements

        // Decorative number parallax
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                yPercent: 15,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2
                }
            });
        }

        // Circles parallax
        this.elements.decoCircles.forEach((circle, index) => {
            gsap.to(circle, {
                y: index % 2 === 0 ? -30 : 30,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2 + index * 0.5
                }
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create CTA button hover animations
     */
    createButtonAnimations() {
        this.elements.ctaBtns.forEach(btn => {
            const icon = btn.querySelector('.contact__cta-btn-icon');

            // Magnetic effect
            btn.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                const rect = btn.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = (e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2) * 0.15;
                const y = (e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2) * 0.15;

                gsap.to(btn, {
                    x: x,
                    y: y,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            btn.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(btn, {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'elastic.out(1, 0.5)'
                });
            });

            // Icon animation on hover
```
