    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-2);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding-left: calc((100vw - var(--container-xl)) / 2 + var(--container-padding));
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 600px;
    height: auto;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    transform: translateY(-8px);
    box-shadow: 0 30px 60px -20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/10;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        transparent 0%,
        transparent 60%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.8) 100%
    );
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-4);
    left: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    flex: 1;
}

/* Card Category */
.works__card-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-3);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-3);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    flex: 1;
}

/* Card Tags */
.works__card-tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-tag {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

    .works__swiper-container {
        padding-left: var(--container-padding);
    }
}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 450px;
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 320px;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 280px;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-2);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding-left: calc((100vw - var(--container-xl)) / 2 + var(--container-padding));
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 600px;
    height: auto;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    transform: translateY(-8px);
    box-shadow: 0 30px 60px -20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/10;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        transparent 0%,
        transparent 60%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.8) 100%
    );
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-4);
    left: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    flex: 1;
}

/* Card Category */
.works__card-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-3);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-3);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    flex: 1;
}

/* Card Tags */
.works__card-tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-tag {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

    .works__swiper-container {
        padding-left: var(--container-padding);
    }
}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 450px;
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 320px;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 280px;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```css
/**
 * contact.css
 * Contact Section 전용 스타일
 * 심플한 중앙 정렬 + CTA 중심 디자인
 */

/* ===== Contact Section Layout ===== */
.contact {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-8) var(--container-padding);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.contact__bg {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 100%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.1) 0%, transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.03) 0%, transparent 40%);
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Contact Container ===== */
.contact__container {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    max-width: 900px;
    text-align: center;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.contact__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
}

.contact__label::before,
.contact__label::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
}

/* ===== Main Title ===== */
.contact__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-6xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.contact__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.contact__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.contact__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.05em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.12em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.7;
}

/* ===== Subtitle ===== */
.contact__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto var(--space-12);
}

.contact__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* ===== CTA Buttons ===== */
.contact__cta {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-16);
}

.contact__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-5) var(--space-10);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary {
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--color-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
}

.contact__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__cta-btn:hover .contact__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Contact Links ===== */
.contact__links {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-8);
}

.contact__link {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-6);
    min-width: 120px;
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    text-decoration: none;
}

.contact__link:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    border-color: var(--color-gray-800);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
}

.contact__link-icon {
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-icon {
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.contact__link-label {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-label {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.contact__link-hint {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.contact__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.contact__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -10%;
    left: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

.contact__deco--circle {
    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 10%;
    right: -100px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

.contact__deco--circle-sm {
    width: 150px;
    height: 150px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    bottom: 20%;
    left: -50px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

/* ===== Footer Note ===== */
.contact__footer {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    text-align: center;
}

.contact__footer-text {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
}

.contact__footer-text a {
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__footer-text a:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .contact__deco--number {
        font-size: 14rem;
    }

    .contact__deco--circle {
        width: 200px;
        height: 200px;
        right: -80px;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding);
        min-height: auto;
        padding-bottom: var(--space-24);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .contact__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-3);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .contact__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 300px;
    }

    .contact__links {
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link {
        min-width: 100px;
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__deco--number,
    .contact__deco--circle,
    .contact__deco--circle-sm {
        display: none;
    }

    .contact__footer {
        position: relative;
        bottom: auto;
        left: auto;
        transform: none;
        margin-top: var(--space-12);
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .contact__links {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-2);
    }

    .contact__link {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 200px;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link-icon {
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .contact__cta-btn,
    .contact__link,
    .contact__link-icon {
        transition: none;
    }

    .contact__cta-btn::before {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```css
/**
 * contact.css
 * Contact Section 전용 스타일
 * 심플한 중앙 정렬 + CTA 중심 디자인
 */

/* ===== Contact Section Layout ===== */
.contact {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-8) var(--container-padding);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.contact__bg {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 100%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.1) 0%, transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.03) 0%, transparent 40%);
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Contact Container ===== */
.contact__container {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    max-width: 900px;
    text-align: center;
    padding: var(--space-4) 0;
    max-height: 100%;
    overflow-y: auto;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.contact__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
}

.contact__label::before,
.contact__label::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
}

/* ===== Main Title ===== */
.contact__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-6xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.contact__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.contact__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.contact__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.05em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.12em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.7;
}

/* ===== Subtitle ===== */
.contact__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto var(--space-12);
}

.contact__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* ===== CTA Buttons ===== */
.contact__cta {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-16);
}

.contact__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-5) var(--space-10);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary {
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--color-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
}

.contact__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__cta-btn:hover .contact__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Contact Links ===== */
.contact__links {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-8);
}

.contact__link {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-6);
    min-width: 120px;
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    text-decoration: none;
}

.contact__link:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    border-color: var(--color-gray-800);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
}

.contact__link-icon {
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-icon {
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.contact__link-label {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-label {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.contact__link-hint {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.contact__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.contact__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -10%;
    left: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

.contact__deco--circle {
    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 10%;
    right: -100px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

.contact__deco--circle-sm {
    width: 150px;
    height: 150px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    bottom: 20%;
    left: -50px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

/* ===== Footer Note ===== */
.contact__footer {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    text-align: center;
}

.contact__footer-text {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
}

.contact__footer-text a {
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__footer-text a:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .contact__deco--number {
        font-size: 14rem;
    }

    .contact__deco--circle {
        width: 200px;
        height: 200px;
        right: -80px;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding);
        min-height: auto;
        padding-bottom: var(--space-24);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .contact__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-3);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .contact__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 300px;
    }

    .contact__links {
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link {
        min-width: 100px;
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__deco--number,
    .contact__deco--circle,
    .contact__deco--circle-sm {
        display: none;
    }

    .contact__footer {
        position: relative;
        bottom: auto;
        left: auto;
        transform: none;
        margin-top: var(--space-12);
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .contact__links {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-2);
    }

    .contact__link {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 200px;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link-icon {
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .contact__cta-btn,
    .contact__link,
    .contact__link-icon {
        transition: none;
    }

    .contact__cta-btn::before {
        transition: none;
    }
}

 * contact.css
 * Contact Section 전용 스타일
 * 심플한 중앙 정렬 + CTA 중심 디자인
 */

/* ===== Contact Section Layout ===== */
.contact {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-8) var(--container-padding);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.contact__bg {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 100%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.1) 0%, transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.03) 0%, transparent 40%);

}

/* ===== Contact Container ===== */
.contact__container {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;

}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */

/* ===== Subtitle ===== */
.contact__subtitle {

    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);

}

    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* ===== CTA Buttons ===== */
.contact__cta {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-16);
}

.contact__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-5) var(--space-10);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary {
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--color-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
}

.contact__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__cta-btn:hover .contact__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Contact Links ===== */
.contact__links {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-8);
}

.contact__link {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-6);
    min-width: 120px;
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    text-decoration: none;
}

.contact__link:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    border-color: var(--color-gray-800);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
}

.contact__link-icon {
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-icon {
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.contact__link-label {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-label {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.contact__link-hint {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.contact__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.contact__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -10%;
    left: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

.contact__deco--circle {
    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 10%;
    right: -100px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

.contact__deco--circle-sm {
    width: 150px;
    height: 150px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    bottom: 20%;
    left: -50px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

/* ===== Footer Note ===== */
.contact__footer {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    text-align: center;
}

.contact__footer-text {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
}

.contact__footer-text a {
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__footer-text a:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .contact__deco--number {
        font-size: 14rem;
    }

    .contact__deco--circle {
        width: 200px;
        height: 200px;
        right: -80px;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding);
        min-height: auto;
        padding-bottom: var(--space-24);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .contact__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-3);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .contact__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 300px;
    }

    .contact__links {
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link {
        min-width: 100px;
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__deco--number,
    .contact__deco--circle,
    .contact__deco--circle-sm {
        display: none;
    }

    .contact__footer {
        position: relative;
        bottom: auto;
        left: auto;
        transform: none;
        margin-top: var(--space-12);
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .contact__links {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-2);
    }

    .contact__link {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 200px;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link-icon {
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .contact__cta-btn,
    .contact__link,
    .contact__link-icon {
        transition: none;
    }

    .contact__cta-btn::before {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```css
/**
 * contact.css
 * Contact Section 전용 스타일
 * 심플한 중앙 정렬 + CTA 중심 디자인
 */

/* ===== Contact Section Layout ===== */
.contact {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-8) var(--container-padding);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.contact__bg {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 100%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.1) 0%, transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.03) 0%, transparent 40%);
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Contact Container ===== */
.contact__container {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    max-width: 900px;
    text-align: center;
    padding: var(--space-4) 0;
    max-height: 100%;
    overflow-y: auto;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.contact__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.contact__label::before,
.contact__label::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
}

/* ===== Main Title ===== */
.contact__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.contact__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.contact__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.contact__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.05em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.12em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.7;
}

/* ===== Subtitle ===== */
.contact__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto var(--space-12);
}

.contact__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* ===== CTA Buttons ===== */
.contact__cta {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-16);
}

.contact__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-5) var(--space-10);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary {
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--color-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
}

.contact__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__cta-btn:hover .contact__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Contact Links ===== */
.contact__links {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-8);
}

.contact__link {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-6);
    min-width: 120px;
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    text-decoration: none;
}

.contact__link:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    border-color: var(--color-gray-800);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
}

.contact__link-icon {
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-icon {
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.contact__link-label {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-label {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.contact__link-hint {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.contact__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.contact__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -10%;
    left: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

.contact__deco--circle {
    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 10%;
    right: -100px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

.contact__deco--circle-sm {
    width: 150px;
    height: 150px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    bottom: 20%;
    left: -50px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

/* ===== Footer Note ===== */
.contact__footer {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    text-align: center;
}

.contact__footer-text {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
}

.contact__footer-text a {
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__footer-text a:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .contact__deco--number {
        font-size: 14rem;
    }

    .contact__deco--circle {
        width: 200px;
        height: 200px;
        right: -80px;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding);
        min-height: auto;
        padding-bottom: var(--space-24);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .contact__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-3);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .contact__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 300px;
    }

    .contact__links {
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link {
        min-width: 100px;
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__deco--number,
    .contact__deco--circle,
    .contact__deco--circle-sm {
        display: none;
    }

    .contact__footer {
        position: relative;
        bottom: auto;
        left: auto;
        transform: none;
        margin-top: var(--space-12);
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .contact__links {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-2);
    }

    .contact__link {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 200px;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link-icon {
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .contact__cta-btn,
    .contact__link,
    .contact__link-icon {
        transition: none;
    }

    .contact__cta-btn::before {
        transition: none;
    }
}

}

/* ===== Contact Links ===== */
.contact__links {

}

    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    border-color: var(--color-gray-800);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
}

    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-icon {
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.contact__link-label {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-label {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.contact__link-hint {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.contact__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.contact__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -10%;
    left: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

.contact__deco--circle {
    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 10%;
    right: -100px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

.contact__deco--circle-sm {
    width: 150px;
    height: 150px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    bottom: 20%;
    left: -50px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

/* ===== Footer Note ===== */
.contact__footer {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    text-align: center;
}

.contact__footer-text {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
}

.contact__footer-text a {
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__footer-text a:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .contact__deco--number {
        font-size: 14rem;
    }

    .contact__deco--circle {
        width: 200px;
        height: 200px;
        right: -80px;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding);
        min-height: auto;
        padding-bottom: var(--space-24);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .contact__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-3);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .contact__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 300px;
    }

    .contact__links {
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link {
        min-width: 100px;
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__deco--number,
    .contact__deco--circle,
    .contact__deco--circle-sm {
        display: none;
    }

    .contact__footer {
        position: relative;
        bottom: auto;
        left: auto;
        transform: none;
        margin-top: var(--space-12);
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .contact__links {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-2);
    }

    .contact__link {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 200px;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link-icon {
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .contact__cta-btn,
    .contact__link,
    .contact__link-icon {
        transition: none;
    }

    .contact__cta-btn::before {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```css
/**
 * contact.css
 * Contact Section 전용 스타일
 * 심플한 중앙 정렬 + CTA 중심 디자인
 */

/* ===== Contact Section Layout ===== */
.contact {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-8) var(--container-padding);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.contact__bg {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 100%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.1) 0%, transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.03) 0%, transparent 40%);
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Contact Container ===== */
.contact__container {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    max-width: 900px;
    text-align: center;
    padding: var(--space-4) 0;
    max-height: 100%;
    overflow-y: auto;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.contact__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.contact__label::before,
.contact__label::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
}

/* ===== Main Title ===== */
.contact__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.contact__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.contact__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.contact__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.05em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.12em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.7;
}

/* ===== Subtitle ===== */
.contact__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto var(--space-4);
}

.contact__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* ===== CTA Buttons ===== */
.contact__cta {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.contact__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-5) var(--space-10);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary {
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--color-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
}

.contact__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__cta-btn:hover .contact__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Contact Links ===== */
.contact__links {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-8);
}

.contact__link {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-6);
    min-width: 120px;
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    text-decoration: none;
}

.contact__link:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    border-color: var(--color-gray-800);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
}

.contact__link-icon {
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-icon {
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.contact__link-label {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-label {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.contact__link-hint {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.contact__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.contact__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -10%;
    left: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

.contact__deco--circle {
    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 10%;
    right: -100px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

.contact__deco--circle-sm {
    width: 150px;
    height: 150px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    bottom: 20%;
    left: -50px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

/* ===== Footer Note ===== */
.contact__footer {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    text-align: center;
}

.contact__footer-text {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
}

.contact__footer-text a {
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__footer-text a:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .contact__deco--number {
        font-size: 14rem;
    }

    .contact__deco--circle {
        width: 200px;
        height: 200px;
        right: -80px;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding);
        min-height: auto;
        padding-bottom: var(--space-24);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .contact__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-3);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .contact__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 300px;
    }

    .contact__links {
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link {
        min-width: 100px;
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__deco--number,
    .contact__deco--circle,
    .contact__deco--circle-sm {
        display: none;
    }

    .contact__footer {
        position: relative;
        bottom: auto;
        left: auto;
        transform: none;
        margin-top: var(--space-12);
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .contact__links {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-2);
    }

    .contact__link {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 200px;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link-icon {
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .contact__cta-btn,
    .contact__link,
    .contact__link-icon {
        transition: none;
    }

    .contact__cta-btn::before {
        transition: none;
    }
}

 * contact.css
 * Contact Section 전용 스타일

    position: relative;

    max-height: 100vh;

.contact__bg {

}

.contact__links {

    flex-direction: column;

    min-width: 120px;

    border: 1px solid transparent;

    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    text-decoration: none;
}

    border-color: var(--color-gray-800);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
}

    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.contact__link-label {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-label {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.contact__link-hint {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.contact__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.contact__deco--number {

    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -10%;
    left: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 10%;
    right: -100px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

.contact__deco--circle-sm {
    width: 150px;
    height: 150px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    bottom: 20%;
    left: -50px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

/* ===== Footer Note ===== */
.contact__footer {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    text-align: center;
}

.contact__footer-text {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
}

.contact__footer-text a {
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__footer-text a:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

        font-size: 14rem;
    }

        width: 200px;
