```css
        right: -80px;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding);
        min-height: auto;
        padding-bottom: var(--space-24);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .contact__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-3);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .contact__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 300px;
    }

    .contact__links {
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link {
        min-width: 100px;
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__deco--number,
    .contact__deco--circle,
    .contact__deco--circle-sm {
        display: none;
    }

    .contact__footer {
        position: relative;
        bottom: auto;
        left: auto;
        transform: none;
        margin-top: var(--space-12);
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .contact__links {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-2);
    }

    .contact__link {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 200px;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link-icon {
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .contact__cta-btn,
    .contact__link,
    .contact__link-icon {
        transition: none;
    }

    .contact__cta-btn::before {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```css
/**
 * contact.css
 * Contact Section 전용 스타일
 * 심플한 중앙 정렬 + CTA 중심 디자인
 */

/* ===== Contact Section Layout ===== */
.contact {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-8) var(--container-padding);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.contact__bg {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 100%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.1) 0%, transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.03) 0%, transparent 40%);
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Contact Container ===== */
.contact__container {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    max-width: 900px;
    text-align: center;
    padding: var(--space-4) 0;
    max-height: 100%;
    overflow-y: auto;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.contact__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.contact__label::before,
.contact__label::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
}

/* ===== Main Title ===== */
.contact__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.contact__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.contact__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.contact__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.05em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.12em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.7;
}

/* ===== Subtitle ===== */
.contact__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto var(--space-4);
}

.contact__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* ===== CTA Buttons ===== */
.contact__cta {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.contact__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    padding: var(--space-3) var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary {
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--color-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
}

.contact__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__cta-btn:hover .contact__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Contact Links ===== */
.contact__links {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.contact__link {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-6);
    min-width: 120px;
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    text-decoration: none;
}

.contact__link:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    border-color: var(--color-gray-800);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
}

.contact__link-icon {
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-icon {
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.contact__link-label {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-label {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.contact__link-hint {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.contact__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.contact__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -10%;
    left: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

.contact__deco--circle {
    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 10%;
    right: -100px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

.contact__deco--circle-sm {
    width: 150px;
    height: 150px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    bottom: 20%;
    left: -50px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

/* ===== Footer Note ===== */
.contact__footer {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    text-align: center;
}

.contact__footer-text {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
}

.contact__footer-text a {
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__footer-text a:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .contact__deco--number {
        font-size: 14rem;
    }

    .contact__deco--circle {
        width: 200px;
        height: 200px;
        right: -80px;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding);
        min-height: auto;
        padding-bottom: var(--space-24);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .contact__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-3);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .contact__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 300px;
    }

    .contact__links {
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link {
        min-width: 100px;
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__deco--number,
    .contact__deco--circle,
    .contact__deco--circle-sm {
        display: none;
    }

    .contact__footer {
        position: relative;
        bottom: auto;
        left: auto;
        transform: none;
        margin-top: var(--space-12);
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .contact__links {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-2);
    }

    .contact__link {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 200px;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link-icon {
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .contact__cta-btn,
    .contact__link,
    .contact__link-icon {
        transition: none;
    }

    .contact__cta-btn::before {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```css
    content: '';

    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);

}

/* ===== Subtitle ===== */
.contact__subtitle {

    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);

.contact__cta {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.contact__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    padding: var(--space-3) var(--space-8);

    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);

    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;

    left: 0;
}

    color: var(--color-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);

    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
}

    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Contact Links ===== */
.contact__links {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    padding: var(--space-4);
    min-width: 100px;
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    text-decoration: none;
}

    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    border-color: var(--color-gray-800);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
}

    width: 32px;

}

    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.contact__link-label {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-label {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.contact__link-hint {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.contact__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.contact__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -10%;
    left: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 10%;
    right: -100px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

.contact__deco--circle-sm {
    width: 150px;
    height: 150px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    bottom: 20%;
    left: -50px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

/* ===== Footer Note ===== */
.contact__footer {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    text-align: center;
}

.contact__footer-text {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
}

.contact__footer-text a {
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__footer-text a:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {

    }

    }

        font-size: var(--text-lg);
```

```css
/**
 * contact.css
 * Contact Section 전용 스타일
 * 심플한 중앙 정렬 + CTA 중심 디자인
 */

/* ===== Contact Section Layout ===== */
.contact {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-8) var(--container-padding);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.contact__bg {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 100%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.1) 0%, transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.03) 0%, transparent 40%);
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Contact Container ===== */
.contact__container {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    max-width: 900px;
    text-align: center;
    padding: var(--space-4) 0;
    max-height: 100%;
    overflow-y: auto;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.contact__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.contact__label::before,
.contact__label::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
}

/* ===== Main Title ===== */
.contact__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.contact__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.contact__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.contact__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.05em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.12em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.7;
}

/* ===== Subtitle ===== */
.contact__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto var(--space-4);
}

.contact__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* ===== CTA Buttons ===== */
.contact__cta {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.contact__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    padding: var(--space-3) var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary {
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.contact__cta-btn--primary:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--color-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
}

.contact__cta-btn--secondary:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
}

.contact__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__cta-btn:hover .contact__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Contact Links ===== */
.contact__links {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.contact__link {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    padding: var(--space-4);
    min-width: 100px;
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    text-decoration: none;
}

.contact__link:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    border-color: var(--color-gray-800);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
}

.contact__link-icon {
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-icon {
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.contact__link-label {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__link:hover .contact__link-label {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.contact__link-hint {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.contact__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.contact__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -10%;
    left: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

.contact__deco--circle {
    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 10%;
    right: -100px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

.contact__deco--circle-sm {
    width: 150px;
    height: 150px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    bottom: 20%;
    left: -50px;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

/* ===== Footer Note ===== */
.contact__footer {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-4);
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    text-align: center;
}

.contact__footer-text {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-600);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
}

.contact__footer-text a {
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.contact__footer-text a:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .contact__deco--number {
        font-size: 14rem;
    }

    .contact__deco--circle {
        width: 200px;
        height: 200px;
        right: -80px;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding);
        min-height: auto;
        padding-bottom: var(--space-24);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .contact__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-3);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .contact__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 300px;
    }

    .contact__links {
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link {
        min-width: 100px;
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__deco--number,
    .contact__deco--circle,
    .contact__deco--circle-sm {
        display: none;
    }

    .contact__footer {
        position: relative;
        bottom: auto;
        left: auto;
        transform: none;
        margin-top: var(--space-12);
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .contact {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .contact__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .contact__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .contact__links {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-2);
    }

    .contact__link {
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 200px;
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .contact__link-icon {
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .contact__cta-btn,
    .contact__link,
    .contact__link-icon {
        transition: none;
    }

    .contact__cta-btn::before {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```


hero.css의 subtitle 부분을 확인 중입니다.


```css
/**
 * hero.css
 * Hero Section 전용 스타일
 * GSAP 애니메이션 및 Swiper 통합 스타일
 */

/* ===== Hero Section Layout ===== */
.hero {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-dark);
}

.hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.05) 0%, transparent 50%);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* ===== Hero Content Area (Left) ===== */
.hero__content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-8);
    padding-left: calc(var(--container-padding) + 3vw);
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* Label / Eyebrow */
.hero__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 24px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.hero__label-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.2); }
}

/* Main Title */
.hero__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(3.6rem, 8vw, 9.6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.hero__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.hero__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.1em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.15em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Subtitle */
.hero__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 480px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.hero__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* CTA Area */
.hero__cta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__cta-btn::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover .hero__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* Scroll Indicator */
.hero__scroll {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__scroll:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.hero__scroll-line {
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-600);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__scroll-line::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    animation: scrollLine 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes scrollLine {
    0% { transform: translateX(-100%); }
    50% { transform: translateX(0%); }
    100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
}

/* ===== Hero Visual Area (Right) ===== */
.hero__visual {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Swiper Container */
.hero__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    height: 60vh;
    max-height: 500px;
}

.hero__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: center;
}

.hero__slide {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__slide-inner {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 450px;
    aspect-ratio: 4/5;
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transform: scale(0.85);
    opacity: 0.4;
    transition: all var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-inner {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__slide-inner:hover .hero__slide-image {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Slide Overlay */
.hero__slide-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        transparent 0%,
        transparent 50%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.9) 100%
    );
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.hero__slide-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
}

/* Swiper Navigation */
.hero__swiper-nav {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-btn {
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.hero__swiper-btn svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
}

/* Swiper Pagination */
.hero__swiper-pagination {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet {
    width: 24px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 0;
    opacity: 1;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet-active {
    width: 48px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Progress Counter */
.hero__progress {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__progress-current {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.hero__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.hero__deco--grid {
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        linear-gradient(var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    opacity: 0.3;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--circle {
    width: 400px;
    height: 400px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--line {
    width: 1px;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
    left: 50%;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* Floating Keywords */
.hero__keywords {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__keyword {
    position: absolute;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-700);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__keyword:nth-child(1) { top: 15%; left: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(2) { top: 25%; right: 15%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(3) { bottom: 30%; left: 5%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(4) { bottom: 20%; right: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(5) { top: 60%; left: 15%; }

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .hero {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
        min-height: auto;
    }

    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding) var(--space-12);
        text-align: center;
    }

    .hero__label {
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    .hero__cta {
        justify-content: center;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 60vh;
    }

    .hero__swiper {
        height: 100%;
        max-height: none;
    }

    .hero__deco--grid {
        width: 100%;
        opacity: 0.15;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding) var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__label {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__title {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 50vh;
        min-height: 400px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 280px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-nav {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__swiper-btn {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-pagination {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        left: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__progress {
        top: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__keywords {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding) var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 45vh;
        min-height: 350px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 240px;
    }

    .hero__slide-overlay {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__slide-title {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .hero__label-dot,
    .hero__scroll-line::after {
        animation: none;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner,
    .hero__cta-btn,
    .hero__swiper-btn {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```


label의 margin도 조정 중입니다.


```css
/**
 * hero.css
 * Hero Section 전용 스타일
 * GSAP 애니메이션 및 Swiper 통합 스타일
 */

/* ===== Hero Section Layout ===== */
.hero {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-dark);
}

.hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.05) 0%, transparent 50%);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* ===== Hero Content Area (Left) ===== */
.hero__content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-8);
    padding-left: calc(var(--container-padding) + 3vw);
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* Label / Eyebrow */
.hero__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 24px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.hero__label-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.2); }
}

/* Main Title */
.hero__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(3.6rem, 8vw, 9.6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.hero__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.hero__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.1em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.15em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Subtitle */
.hero__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 480px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.hero__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* CTA Area */
.hero__cta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__cta-btn::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover .hero__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* Scroll Indicator */
.hero__scroll {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__scroll:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.hero__scroll-line {
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-600);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__scroll-line::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    animation: scrollLine 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes scrollLine {
    0% { transform: translateX(-100%); }
    50% { transform: translateX(0%); }
    100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
}

/* ===== Hero Visual Area (Right) ===== */
.hero__visual {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Swiper Container */
.hero__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    height: 60vh;
    max-height: 500px;
}

.hero__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: center;
}

.hero__slide {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__slide-inner {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 450px;
    aspect-ratio: 4/5;
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transform: scale(0.85);
    opacity: 0.4;
    transition: all var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-inner {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__slide-inner:hover .hero__slide-image {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Slide Overlay */
.hero__slide-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        transparent 0%,
        transparent 50%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.9) 100%
    );
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.hero__slide-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
}

/* Swiper Navigation */
.hero__swiper-nav {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-btn {
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.hero__swiper-btn svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
}

/* Swiper Pagination */
.hero__swiper-pagination {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet {
    width: 24px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 0;
    opacity: 1;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet-active {
    width: 48px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Progress Counter */
.hero__progress {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__progress-current {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.hero__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.hero__deco--grid {
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        linear-gradient(var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    opacity: 0.3;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--circle {
    width: 400px;
    height: 400px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--line {
    width: 1px;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
    left: 50%;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* Floating Keywords */
.hero__keywords {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__keyword {
    position: absolute;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-700);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__keyword:nth-child(1) { top: 15%; left: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(2) { top: 25%; right: 15%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(3) { bottom: 30%; left: 5%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(4) { bottom: 20%; right: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(5) { top: 60%; left: 15%; }

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .hero {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
        min-height: auto;
    }

    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding) var(--space-12);
        text-align: center;
    }

    .hero__label {
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    .hero__cta {
        justify-content: center;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 60vh;
    }

    .hero__swiper {
        height: 100%;
        max-height: none;
    }

    .hero__deco--grid {
        width: 100%;
        opacity: 0.15;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding) var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__label {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__title {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 50vh;
        min-height: 400px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 280px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-nav {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__swiper-btn {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-pagination {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        left: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__progress {
        top: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__keywords {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding) var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 45vh;
        min-height: 350px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 240px;
    }

    .hero__slide-overlay {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__slide-title {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .hero__label-dot,
    .hero__scroll-line::after {
        animation: none;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner,
    .hero__cta-btn,
    .hero__swiper-btn {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```css
/**
 * about.css
 * About Section 전용 스타일
 * 2단 레이아웃 + 키워드 블록 + 스크롤 애니메이션
 */

/* ===== About Section Layout ===== */
.about {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.about::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

.about__container {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    align-items: center;
    height: 100%;
    max-height: 100vh;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.about__header {
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.about__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.about__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.about__number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-8xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-16);
    right: var(--space-8);
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
}

/* ===== Content Area (Left) ===== */
.about__content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.about__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 6vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.about__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.about__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

/* Main Statement */
.about__statement {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 3rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    line-height: var(--leading-snug);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
    position: relative;
}

.about__statement-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.about__statement-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 3px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
}

/* Description */
.about__description {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 520px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.about__description strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* ===== Keywords Grid ===== */
.about__keywords {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: var(--space-2);
}

.about__keyword {
    position: relative;
    padding: var(--space-3) var(--space-4);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.about__keyword::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 3px;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-primary);
    transform: scaleY(0);
    transform-origin: bottom;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.about__keyword:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

.about__keyword:hover::before {
    transform: scaleY(1);
}

.about__keyword-icon {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-3);
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.about__keyword-title {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
}

.about__keyword-desc {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    margin-top: var(--space-1);
}

/* ===== Visual Area (Right) ===== */
.about__visual {
    position: relative;
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* Profile Image Container */
.about__image-wrapper {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 380px;
    max-height: 75vh;
    aspect-ratio: 3/4;
}

.about__image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    filter: grayscale(20%);
    transition: filter var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.about__image-wrapper:hover .about__image {
    filter: grayscale(0%);
}

/* Image Frame Decoration */
.about__image-frame {
    position: absolute;
    inset: -20px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-2xl);
    pointer-events: none;
}

.about__image-frame::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    width: 60%;
    height: 60%;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-primary);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    opacity: 0.3;
}

/* Floating Stats */
.about__stats {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-4);
    left: var(--space-4);
    display: flex;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    z-index: 2;
}

.about__stat {
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-6);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    text-align: center;
}

.about__stat-number {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    line-height: 1;
}

.about__stat-label {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-top: var(--space-1);
}

/* Decorative Elements */
.about__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.about__deco--dots {
    top: 10%;
    right: 10%;
    width: 100px;
    height: 100px;
    background-image: radial-gradient(var(--color-gray-800) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 10px 10px;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

.about__deco--circle {
    bottom: 20%;
    right: -50px;
    width: 200px;
    height: 200px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .about {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .about__container {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-12);
        min-height: auto;
        padding-top: var(--space-8);
        padding-bottom: var(--space-16);
    }
    
    .about__visual {
        padding-bottom: var(--space-16);
    }

    .about__content {
        order: 2;
        text-align: center;
    }

    .about__visual {
        order: 1;
        min-height: auto;
    }

    .about__image-wrapper {
        max-width: 350px;
        margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .about__keywords {
        max-width: 500px;
        margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .about__description {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    .about__stats {
        left: 50%;
        transform: translateX(-50%);
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        position: relative;
        margin-top: var(--space-8);
    }

    .about__number {
        font-size: var(--text-6xl);
        top: var(--space-8);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .about {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .about__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .about__statement {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .about__description {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .about__keywords {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-3);
    }

    .about__keyword {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .about__image-wrapper {
        max-width: 280px;
    }

    .about__stats {
        flex-direction: row;
        gap: var(--space-2);
    }

    .about__stat {
        padding: var(--space-3) var(--space-4);
    }

    .about__stat-number {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .about__image-frame {
        display: none;
    }

    .about__deco--dots,
    .about__deco--circle {
        display: none;
    }

    .about__number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .about {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .about__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .about__statement {
        font-size: var(--text-xl);
    }

    .about__image-wrapper {
        max-width: 240px;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .about__keyword,
    .about__image {
        transition: none;
    }

    .about__keyword::before {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```


수정 완료. 변경 사항 요약:

## 수정 내용

### 1. **각 섹션을 정확히 100vh로 고정**
- `height: 100vh` + `max-height: 100vh` 설정
- `overflow: hidden`으로 콘텐츠가 넘치지 않도록 제한

### 2. **Hero 섹션**
- Padding: `var(--space-16)` → `var(--space-8)`
- 타이틀: `clamp(3.6rem, 8vw, 9.6rem)`로 반응형 크기 조정
- 서브타이틀: `var(--text-lg)` → `var(--text-base)`
- Swiper 높이: `70vh` → `60vh`, `max-height: 500px`
- Content에 flexbox로 중앙 정렬

### 3. **About 섹션**
- Padding: `var(--space-32)` → `var(--space-12)`
- Container gap: `var(--space-16)` → `var(--space-8)`
- 타이틀: `clamp(3rem, 6vw, 6rem)`
- Statement: `clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 3rem)`
- Description: `var(--text-lg)` → `var(--text-sm)`
- Keywords gap: `var(--space-4)` → `var(--space-2)`
- Keyword padding: `var(--space-5)` → `var(--space-3)`
- 이미지 최대 크기: `450px` → `380px`, `max-height: 75vh`

### 4. **Works 섹션**
- Flexbox 레이아웃으로 헤더와 Swiper 분리
- Padding: `var(--space-32)` → `var(--space-8)`
- 타이틀: `clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem)`
- 서브타이틀: `var(--text-lg)` → `var(--text-sm)`
- Swiper 컨테이너를 flex: 1로 설정하여 남은 공간 차지

### 5. **Contact 섹션**
- Padding: `var(--space-32)` → `var(--space-8)`
- 타이틀: `clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem)`
- 서브타이틀: `var(--text-xl)` → `var(--text-base)`
- CTA 버튼: padding과 font-size 축소
- Links gap: `var(--space-8)` → `var(--space-4)`
- Container에 `max-height: 100%` + `overflow-y: auto` 추가

이제 각 섹션이 정확히 100vh 높이로 표시되며, 콘텐츠가 화면을 넘지 않습니다. 페이지를 새로고침하여 확인해 주세요.

---

**User**

전체적으로 영어로 된 타이틀과 내용들을 한글로 의역해서 작성해주세요

---

**Cursor**


영어 텍스트를 한글로 의역 중입니다. `index.html`을 확인해 변경할 텍스트를 파악합니다.



영어 텍스트를 한글로 의역 중입니다.


```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="description"
        content="UI/UX 디자이너 포트폴리오 - 전략적 디자인 사고와 매끄러운 인터랙션을 통해 의미 있는 디지털 경험을 만듭니다.">
    <meta name="keywords" content="UI/UX 디자이너, 포트폴리오, 웹 디자인, 인터랙션 디자인, 사용자 경험">
    <meta name="author" content="Designer Name">

    <!-- Open Graph -->
    <meta property="og:title" content="UI/UX 디자이너 포트폴리오">
    <meta property="og:description"
        content="전략적 디자인 사고와 매끄러운 인터랙션을 통해 의미 있는 디지털 경험을 만듭니다.">
    <meta property="og:type" content="website">
    <meta property="og:image" content="./assets/images/og-image.jpg">

    <!-- Favicon -->
    <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="./assets/icons/favicon.svg">

    <!-- Preconnect for Performance -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net">

    <!-- Stylesheets -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/reset.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/variables.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/common.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/hero.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/about.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/works.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/contact.css">

    <!-- Swiper CSS -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@11/swiper-bundle.min.css">

    <title>UI/UX Designer | Portfolio</title>
</head>

<body>
    <!-- Loading Screen -->
    <div class="loading-screen" id="loading-screen">
        <div class="loading-screen__progress">
            <div class="loading-screen__bar" id="loading-bar"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Noise Overlay -->
    <div class="noise-overlay" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <!-- Custom Cursor (Desktop Only) -->
    <div class="cursor" id="cursor" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <!-- Main Content -->
    <main id="main-content">

        <!-- ========== HERO SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="hero" id="hero" data-section="hero">
            <!-- Background Decorations -->
            <div class="hero__deco hero__deco--grid" aria-hidden="true"></div>
            <div class="hero__deco hero__deco--line" aria-hidden="true"></div>

            <!-- Floating Keywords -->
            <div class="hero__keywords" aria-hidden="true">
                <span class="hero__keyword">User Experience</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">Interaction</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">Design System</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">Prototyping</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">Motion Design</span>
            </div>

            <!-- Content Area (Left) -->
            <div class="hero__content">
                <!-- Label / Eyebrow -->
                <div class="hero__label">
                    <span class="hero__label-dot"></span>
                    <span>Available for projects</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Main Title -->
                <h1 class="hero__title">
                    <span class="hero__title-line">
                        <span class="hero__title-text">UI/UX Designer</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="hero__title-line">
                        <span class="hero__title-text">who <span class="hero__title-highlight">codes</span></span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="hero__title-line">
                        <span class="hero__title-text">interactions</span>
                    </span>
                </h1>

                <!-- Subtitle -->
                <p class="hero__subtitle">
                    Crafting <strong>meaningful digital experiences</strong> through
                    strategic design thinking, seamless interactions, and
                    pixel-perfect execution. I bridge the gap between
                    <strong>design and development</strong>.
                </p>

                <!-- CTA Area -->
                <div class="hero__cta">
                    <a href="#works" class="hero__cta-btn">
                        <span>View Projects</span>
                        <svg class="hero__cta-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                    <button class="hero__scroll" aria-label="Scroll to next section">
                        <span class="hero__scroll-line"></span>
                        <span>Scroll</span>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Visual Area (Right) -->
            <div class="hero__visual">
                <!-- Progress Counter -->
                <div class="hero__progress">
                    <span class="hero__progress-current">01</span>
                    <span>/</span>
                    <span class="hero__progress-total">04</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Swiper Container -->
                <div class="hero__swiper swiper">
                    <div class="swiper-wrapper">
                        <!-- Slide 1 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1618005182384-a83a8bd57fbe?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="Abstract gradient design" class="hero__slide-image" loading="eager">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">Brand Identity</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Lumina App</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 2 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1634017839464-5c339bbe3c35?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="Modern UI design" class="hero__slide-image" loading="lazy">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">Web Design</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Nexus Platform</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 3 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558591710-4b4a1ae0f04d?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="Creative abstract art" class="hero__slide-image" loading="lazy">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">Mobile App</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Flow Finance</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 4 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1614850523459-c2f4c699c52e?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="Geometric design pattern" class="hero__slide-image" loading="lazy">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">Design System</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">Vertex UI</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Swiper Pagination -->
                <div class="hero__swiper-pagination"></div>

                <!-- Swiper Navigation -->
                <div class="hero__swiper-nav">
                    <button class="hero__swiper-btn hero__swiper-btn--prev" aria-label="Previous slide">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                    <button class="hero__swiper-btn hero__swiper-btn--next" aria-label="Next slide">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- ========== ABOUT SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="about" id="about" data-section="about">
            <!-- Section Number (Decorative) -->
            <span class="about__number" aria-hidden="true">01</span>

            <div class="about__container">
                <!-- Content Area (Left) -->
                <div class="about__content">
                    <!-- Section Header -->
                    <div class="about__header">
                        <div class="about__label">
                            <span>About Me</span>
                        </div>
                        <h2 class="about__title">
                            <span class="about__title-line">
                                <span class="about__title-text">Designer &</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="about__title-line">
                                <span class="about__title-text">Problem Solver</span>
                            </span>
                        </h2>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Main Statement -->
                    <p class="about__statement">
                        I design <span class="about__statement-highlight">experiences</span>,<br>
                        not just screens.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Description -->
                    <p class="about__description">
                        With a foundation in <strong>user-centered design</strong> and a passion for
                        <strong>interactive experiences</strong>, I approach every project as an opportunity
                        to solve real problems. I believe great design emerges from understanding
                        user needs, defining clear objectives, and iterating relentlessly.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Keywords Grid -->
                    <div class="about__keywords">
                        <!-- Keyword 1 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">UX Research</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">Data-driven design decisions</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Keyword 2 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path d="M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">Interaction</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">Motion that tells stories</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Keyword 3 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path
                                    d="M4 5a1 1 0 011-1h14a1 1 0 011 1v2a1 1 0 01-1 1H5a1 1 0 01-1-1V5zM4 13a1 1 0 011-1h6a1 1 0 011 1v6a1 1 0 01-1 1H5a1 1 0 01-1-1v-6zM16 13a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v6a1 1 0 01-1 1h-2a1 1 0 01-1-1v-6z" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">Prototyping</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">From concept to reality</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Keyword 4 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path d="M10 20l4-16m4 4l4 4-4 4M6 16l-4-4 4-4" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">Dev Thinking</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">Design with feasibility</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Visual Area (Right) -->
                <div class="about__visual">
                    <!-- Decorative Elements -->
                    <div class="about__deco about__deco--dots" aria-hidden="true"></div>
                    <div class="about__deco about__deco--circle" aria-hidden="true"></div>

                    <!-- Profile Image -->
                    <div class="about__image-wrapper">
                        <div class="about__image-frame" aria-hidden="true"></div>
                        <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=600&q=80"
                            alt="Designer portrait" class="about__image" loading="lazy">

                        <!-- Floating Stats -->
                        <div class="about__stats">
                            <div class="about__stat">
                                <span class="about__stat-number">5+</span>
                                <span class="about__stat-label">Years Exp</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="about__stat">
                                <span class="about__stat-number">40+</span>
                                <span class="about__stat-label">Projects</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- ========== WORKS SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="works" id="works" data-section="works">
            <!-- Decorative Number -->
            <span class="works__deco works__deco--number" aria-hidden="true">02</span>

            <!-- Section Header -->
            <header class="works__header">
                <div class="works__header-content">
                    <div class="works__label">
                        <span>Selected Works</span>
                    </div>
                    <h2 class="works__title">
                        <span class="works__title-line">
                            <span class="works__title-text">Featured</span>
                        </span>
                        <span class="works__title-line">
                            <span class="works__title-text">Projects</span>
                        </span>
                    </h2>
                    <p class="works__subtitle">
                        A collection of problems I've solved through strategic design thinking and user-centered
                        approaches.
                    </p>
                </div>

                <!-- Navigation & Progress -->
                <div class="works__nav">
                    <div class="works__progress">
                        <span class="works__progress-current">01</span>
                        <div class="works__progress-bar">
                            <div class="works__progress-fill"></div>
                        </div>
                        <span class="works__progress-total">04</span>
                    </div>
                    <button class="works__nav-btn works__nav-btn--prev" aria-label="Previous project">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                    <button class="works__nav-btn works__nav-btn--next" aria-label="Next project">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </header>

            <!-- Swiper Container -->
            <div class="works__swiper-container">
                <div class="works__swiper swiper">
                    <div class="swiper-wrapper">
                        <!-- Project 1 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                            <article class="works__card">
                                <div class="works__card-image">
                                    <span class="works__card-number">01</span>
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551650975-87deedd944c3?w=800&q=80"
                                        alt="Lumina App project" class="works__card-img" loading="lazy">
                                    <div class="works__card-overlay"></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="works__card-content">
                                    <span class="works__card-category">Mobile App</span>
                                    <h3 class="works__card-title">Lumina Health</h3>
                                    <p class="works__card-problem">
```
