```html
                </div>
            </header>

            <!-- Swiper Container -->
            <div class="works__swiper-container">
                <div class="works__swiper swiper">
                    <div class="swiper-wrapper">
                        <!-- Project 1 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                            <article class="works__card">
                                <div class="works__card-image">
                                    <span class="works__card-number">01</span>
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551650975-87deedd944c3?w=800&q=80"
                                        alt="루미나 앱 프로젝트" class="works__card-img" loading="lazy">
                                    <div class="works__card-overlay"></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="works__card-content">
                                    <span class="works__card-category">모바일 앱</span>
                                    <h3 class="works__card-title">루미나 헬스</h3>
                                    <p class="works__card-problem">
                                        사용자의 일상에 인지적 부담을 주지 않으면서도 정신 건강을 추적할 수 있도록 돕는 방법은 무엇일까요?
                                    </p>
                                    <div class="works__card-tags">
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">UX 리서치</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">UI 디자인</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">프로토타이핑</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                        <span>케이스 스터디 보기</span>
                                        <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                                            stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                        </svg>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </article>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Project 2 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                            <article class="works__card">
                                <div class="works__card-image">
                                    <span class="works__card-number">02</span>
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1460925895917-afdab827c52f?w=800&q=80"
                                        alt="넥서스 플랫폼 프로젝트" class="works__card-img" loading="lazy">
                                    <div class="works__card-overlay"></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="works__card-content">
                                    <span class="works__card-category">웹 플랫폼</span>
                                    <h3 class="works__card-title">넥서스 애널리틱스</h3>
                                    <p class="works__card-problem">
                                        분석의 깊이를 유지하면서도 비기술 이해관계자들을 위해 복잡한 데이터 시각화를 단순화하는 방법은 무엇일까요?
                                    </p>
                                    <div class="works__card-tags">
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">대시보드</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">데이터 시각화</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">프론트엔드</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                        <span>케이스 스터디 보기</span>
                                        <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                                            stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                        </svg>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </article>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Project 3 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                            <article class="works__card">
                                <div class="works__card-image">
                                    <span class="works__card-number">03</span>
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1563013544-824ae1b704d3?w=800&q=80"
                                        alt="플로우 파이낸스 프로젝트" class="works__card-img" loading="lazy">
                                    <div class="works__card-overlay"></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="works__card-content">
                                    <span class="works__card-category">핀테크</span>
                                    <h3 class="works__card-title">플로우 파이낸스</h3>
                                    <p class="works__card-problem">
                                        초보 투자자들이 개인 자금 관리에 덜 부담을 느낄 수 있도록 만드는 방법은 무엇일까요?
                                    </p>
                                    <div class="works__card-tags">
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">UX 전략</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">UI 디자인</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">인터랙션</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                        <span>케이스 스터디 보기</span>
                                        <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                                            stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                        </svg>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </article>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Project 4 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                            <article class="works__card">
                                <div class="works__card-image">
                                    <span class="works__card-number">04</span>
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558655146-9f40138edfeb?w=800&q=80"
                                        alt="버텍스 UI 프로젝트" class="works__card-img" loading="lazy">
                                    <div class="works__card-overlay"></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="works__card-content">
                                    <span class="works__card-category">디자인 시스템</span>
                                    <h3 class="works__card-title">버텍스 UI 키트</h3>
                                    <p class="works__card-problem">
                                        일관성을 보장하면서도 제품 개발을 가속화할 수 있는 확장 가능한 디자인 시스템을 만드는 방법은 무엇일까요?
                                    </p>
                                    <div class="works__card-tags">
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">디자인 시스템</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">컴포넌트</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-tag">문서화</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                        <span>케이스 스터디 보기</span>
                                        <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                                            stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                        </svg>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </article>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- ========== CONTACT SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="contact" id="contact" data-section="contact">
            <!-- Background -->
            <div class="contact__bg" aria-hidden="true"></div>

            <!-- Decorative Elements -->
            <span class="contact__deco contact__deco--number" aria-hidden="true">03</span>
            <div class="contact__deco contact__deco--circle" aria-hidden="true"></div>
            <div class="contact__deco contact__deco--circle-sm" aria-hidden="true"></div>

            <!-- Main Content -->
            <div class="contact__container">
                <!-- Section Label -->
                <div class="contact__label">
                    <span>연락하기</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Main Title -->
                <h2 class="contact__title">
                    <span class="contact__title-line">
                        <span class="contact__title-text">함께 만들어요</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="contact__title-line">
                        <span class="contact__title-text"><span class="contact__title-highlight">의미 있는</span>
                            경험을</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="contact__title-line">
                        <span class="contact__title-text">함께.</span>
                    </span>
                </h2>

                <!-- Subtitle -->
                <p class="contact__subtitle">
                    <strong>새로운 프로젝트</strong>, 창의적인 아이디어, 또는 여러분의 비전에 함께할 기회에 대해
                    항상 열려있습니다. 정규직, 프리랜스 프로젝트, 또는 단순히 디자인에 대한 대화까지 환영합니다.
                </p>

                <!-- CTA Buttons -->
                <div class="contact__cta">
                    <a href="mailto:hello@designer.com" class="contact__cta-btn contact__cta-btn--primary">
                        <span>안녕하세요</span>
                        <svg class="contact__cta-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                    <a href="#" class="contact__cta-btn contact__cta-btn--secondary" download>
                        <span>이력서 다운로드</span>
                        <svg class="contact__cta-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2v-4M7 10l5 5 5-5M12 15V3" />
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                </div>

                <!-- Contact Links -->
                <div class="contact__links">
                    <!-- Email -->
                    <a href="mailto:hello@designer.com" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <path
                                d="M3 8l7.89 5.26a2 2 0 002.22 0L21 8M5 19h14a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2z" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">이메일</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">hello@designer.com</span>
                    </a>

                    <!-- LinkedIn -->
                    <a href="https://linkedin.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <path
                                d="M16 8a6 6 0 016 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 00-2-2 2 2 0 00-2 2v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 016-6zM2 9h4v12H2zM4 6a2 2 0 100-4 2 2 0 000 4z" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">링크드인</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">연결하기</span>
                    </a>

                    <!-- Notion -->
                    <a href="https://notion.so" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z" />
                            <path d="M8 2v4M16 2v4M2 10h20" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">노션</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">포트폴리오</span>
                    </a>

                    <!-- Dribbble -->
                    <a href="https://dribbble.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" />
                            <path
                                d="M8.56 2.75c4.37 6.03 6.02 9.42 8.03 17.72m2.54-15.38c-3.72 4.35-8.94 5.66-16.88 5.85m19.5 1.9c-3.5-.93-6.63-.82-8.94 0-2.58.92-5.01 2.86-7.44 6.32" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">드리블</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">작업물</span>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Footer Note -->
            <footer class="contact__footer">
                <p class="contact__footer-text">
                    💛과 함께 디자인하고 개발했습니다 · © 2026
                </p>
            </footer>
        </section>

    </main>

    <!-- Scripts -->
    <!-- GSAP Core + Plugins -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/gsap.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/ScrollTrigger.min.js"></script>

    <!-- Swiper -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@11/swiper-bundle.min.js"></script>

    <!-- Custom Scripts -->
    <script src="./js/common.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/heroAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/aboutAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/worksAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/contactAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/swiper/heroSwiper.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/swiper/worksSwiper.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/main.js"></script>
</body>

</html>
```

```css
/* Progress Counter */
.hero__progress {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    z-index: 10;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-4);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Autoplay Control Button */
.hero__autoplay-btn {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    right: calc(var(--space-8) + 100px);
    z-index: 10;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    color: var(--color-light);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    position: absolute;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth),
                transform var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}
```

```css
    opacity: 1;

}
```

```javascript
/**
 * heroSwiper.js
 * Hero Section Swiper 설정
 * GSAP과 연동된 커스텀 트랜지션 효과
 */

class HeroSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.hero__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Elements
        this.elements = {
            prevBtn: document.querySelector('.hero__swiper-btn--prev'),
            nextBtn: document.querySelector('.hero__swiper-btn--next'),
            pagination: document.querySelector('.hero__swiper-pagination'),
            progressCurrent: document.querySelector('.hero__progress-current'),
            progressTotal: document.querySelector('.hero__progress-total'),
            autoplayBtn: document.querySelector('.hero__autoplay-btn')
        };

        // Autoplay state
        this.isAutoplayPaused = false;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
        this.animateSlideTransition = this.animateSlideTransition.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ HeroSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        try {
            this.swiper = new Swiper('.hero__swiper', {
            // Core settings
            slidesPerView: 'auto',
            centeredSlides: true,
            spaceBetween: 30,
            loop: true,
            speed: 800,
            
            // Autoplay
            autoplay: {
                delay: 4000,
                disableOnInteraction: false,
                pauseOnMouseEnter: true
            },

            // Effect
            effect: 'slide',
            
            // Grab cursor
            grabCursor: true,

            // Navigation
            navigation: {
                prevEl: '.hero__swiper-btn--prev',
                nextEl: '.hero__swiper-btn--next'
            },

            // Pagination
            pagination: {
                el: '.hero__swiper-pagination',
                clickable: true,
                type: 'bullets'
            },

            // Breakpoints
            breakpoints: {
                320: {
                    slidesPerView: 1.2,
                    spaceBetween: 20
                },
                480: {
                    slidesPerView: 1.4,
                    spaceBetween: 25
                },
                768: {
                    slidesPerView: 1.6,
                    spaceBetween: 30
                },
                1024: {
                    slidesPerView: 'auto',
                    spaceBetween: 40
                }
            },

            // Events
            on: {
                init: () => {
                    // Delay to ensure Swiper is fully initialized
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        this.updateProgress();
                        this.initCustomEffects();
                    }, 100);
                },
                slideChange: () => {
                    this.onSlideChange();
                },
                slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                    this.animateSlideTransition('start');
                },
                slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                    this.animateSlideTransition('end');
                }
            }
        });

        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ HeroSwiper initialization error:', error);
            return;
        }

        // Set total slides count (with delay to ensure Swiper is ready)
        setTimeout(() => {
            if (this.elements.progressTotal && this.swiper && this.swiper.slides) {
                const totalSlides = this.swiper.slides.length / (this.swiper.params.loop ? 3 : 1);
                this.elements.progressTotal.textContent = String(Math.round(totalSlides)).padStart(2, '0');
            }
        }, 200);

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('🎠 Hero Swiper initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Initialize custom visual effects
     */
    initCustomEffects() {
        // Add GSAP-powered hover effects to slides
        const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.hero__slide-inner');
        
        slides.forEach(slide => {
            const image = slide.querySelector('.hero__slide-image');
            const overlay = slide.querySelector('.hero__slide-overlay');

            // Mouse enter effect
            slide.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1.08,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
                
                gsap.to(overlay, {
                    opacity: 1,
                    duration: 0.3
                });
            });

            // Mouse leave effect
            slide.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            // Magnetic effect on mouse move
            slide.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                const rect = slide.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2;
                const y = e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2;

                gsap.to(slide, {
                    x: x * 0.05,
                    y: y * 0.05,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            slide.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(slide, {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'elastic.out(1, 0.5)'
                });
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        this.updateProgress();
        this.animateProgressCounter();
    }

    /**
     * Update progress counter
     */
    updateProgress() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.elements.progressCurrent) {
            return;
        }

        if (this.swiper.realIndex !== undefined) {
            const realIndex = this.swiper.realIndex + 1;
            this.elements.progressCurrent.textContent = String(realIndex).padStart(2, '0');
        } else if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            const activeIndex = this.swiper.activeIndex + 1;
            this.elements.progressCurrent.textContent = String(activeIndex).padStart(2, '0');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate progress counter change
     */
    animateProgressCounter() {
        if (!this.elements.progressCurrent) return;

        gsap.fromTo(this.elements.progressCurrent, 
            {
                y: 20,
                opacity: 0
            },
            {
                y: 0,
                opacity: 1,
                duration: 0.4,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Custom slide transition animation
     * @param {string} phase - 'start' or 'end'
     */
    animateSlideTransition(phase) {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides || this.swiper.activeIndex === undefined) {
            return;
        }

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];
        const activeInner = activeSlide?.querySelector('.hero__slide-inner');

        if (!activeInner) return;

        if (phase === 'start') {
            // Transition start - scale down slightly
            gsap.to(activeInner, {
                scale: 0.95,
                duration: 0.3,
                ease: 'power2.in'
            });
        } else {
            // Transition end - scale back up with bounce
            gsap.to(activeInner, {
                scale: 1,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'back.out(1.2)'
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideToLoop(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.HeroSwiper = HeroSwiper;

```

```css
/**
 * hero.css
 * Hero Section 전용 스타일
 * GSAP 애니메이션 및 Swiper 통합 스타일
 */

/* ===== Hero Section Layout ===== */
.hero {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-dark);
}

.hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.05) 0%, transparent 50%);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* ===== Hero Content Area (Left) ===== */
.hero__content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-8);
    padding-left: calc(var(--container-padding) + 3vw);
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* Label / Eyebrow */
.hero__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 24px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.hero__label-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.2); }
}

/* Main Title */
.hero__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(3.6rem, 8vw, 9.6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.hero__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.hero__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.1em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.15em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Subtitle */
.hero__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 480px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.hero__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* CTA Area */
.hero__cta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__cta-btn::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover .hero__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* Scroll Indicator */
.hero__scroll {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__scroll:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.hero__scroll-line {
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-600);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__scroll-line::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    animation: scrollLine 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes scrollLine {
    0% { transform: translateX(-100%); }
    50% { transform: translateX(0%); }
    100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
}

/* ===== Hero Visual Area (Right) ===== */
.hero__visual {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Swiper Container */
.hero__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    height: 60vh;
    max-height: 500px;
}

.hero__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: center;
}

.hero__slide {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__slide-inner {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 450px;
    aspect-ratio: 4/5;
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transform: scale(0.85);
    opacity: 0.4;
    transition: all var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-inner {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__slide-inner:hover .hero__slide-image {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Slide Overlay */
.hero__slide-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        transparent 0%,
        transparent 50%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.9) 100%
    );
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.hero__slide-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
}

/* Swiper Navigation */
.hero__swiper-nav {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-btn {
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.hero__swiper-btn svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
}

/* Swiper Pagination */
.hero__swiper-pagination {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet {
    width: 24px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 0;
    opacity: 1;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet-active {
    width: 48px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Progress Counter */
.hero__progress {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    z-index: 10;
}

/* Autoplay Control Button */
.hero__autoplay-btn {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    right: calc(var(--space-8) + 100px);
    z-index: 10;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    color: var(--color-light);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    position: absolute;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth),
                transform var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

.hero__progress-current {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.hero__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.hero__deco--grid {
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        linear-gradient(var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    opacity: 0.3;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--circle {
    width: 400px;
    height: 400px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--line {
    width: 1px;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
    left: 50%;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* Floating Keywords */
.hero__keywords {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__keyword {
    position: absolute;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-700);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__keyword:nth-child(1) { top: 15%; left: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(2) { top: 25%; right: 15%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(3) { bottom: 30%; left: 5%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(4) { bottom: 20%; right: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(5) { top: 60%; left: 15%; }

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .hero {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
        min-height: auto;
    }

    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding) var(--space-12);
        text-align: center;
    }

    .hero__label {
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    .hero__cta {
        justify-content: center;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 60vh;
    }

    .hero__swiper {
        height: 100%;
        max-height: none;
    }

    .hero__deco--grid {
        width: 100%;
        opacity: 0.15;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding) var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__label {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__title {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 50vh;
        min-height: 400px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 280px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-nav {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__swiper-btn {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-pagination {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        left: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__progress {
        top: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__keywords {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding) var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 45vh;
        min-height: 350px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 240px;
    }

    .hero__slide-overlay {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__slide-title {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .hero__label-dot,
    .hero__scroll-line::after {
        animation: none;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner,
    .hero__cta-btn,
    .hero__swiper-btn {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```javascript
/**
 * heroSwiper.js
 * Hero Section Swiper 설정
 * GSAP과 연동된 커스텀 트랜지션 효과
 */

class HeroSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.hero__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Elements
        this.elements = {
            prevBtn: document.querySelector('.hero__swiper-btn--prev'),
            nextBtn: document.querySelector('.hero__swiper-btn--next'),
            pagination: document.querySelector('.hero__swiper-pagination'),
            progressCurrent: document.querySelector('.hero__progress-current'),
            progressTotal: document.querySelector('.hero__progress-total'),
            autoplayBtn: document.querySelector('.hero__autoplay-btn')
        };

        // Autoplay state
        this.isAutoplayPaused = false;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
        this.animateSlideTransition = this.animateSlideTransition.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ HeroSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        try {
            this.swiper = new Swiper('.hero__swiper', {
            // Core settings
            slidesPerView: 'auto',
            centeredSlides: true,
            spaceBetween: 30,
            loop: true,
            speed: 800,
            
            // Autoplay
            autoplay: {
                delay: 4000,
                disableOnInteraction: false,
                pauseOnMouseEnter: true
            },

            // Effect
            effect: 'slide',
            
            // Grab cursor
            grabCursor: true,

            // Navigation
            navigation: {
                prevEl: '.hero__swiper-btn--prev',
                nextEl: '.hero__swiper-btn--next'
            },

            // Pagination
            pagination: {
                el: '.hero__swiper-pagination',
                clickable: true,
                type: 'bullets'
            },

            // Breakpoints
            breakpoints: {
                320: {
                    slidesPerView: 1.2,
                    spaceBetween: 20
                },
                480: {
                    slidesPerView: 1.4,
                    spaceBetween: 25
                },
                768: {
                    slidesPerView: 1.6,
                    spaceBetween: 30
                },
                1024: {
                    slidesPerView: 'auto',
                    spaceBetween: 40
                }
            },

            // Events
            on: {
                init: () => {
                    // Delay to ensure Swiper is fully initialized
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        this.updateProgress();
                        this.initCustomEffects();
                    }, 100);
                },
                slideChange: () => {
                    this.onSlideChange();
                },
                slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                    this.animateSlideTransition('start');
                },
                slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                    this.animateSlideTransition('end');
                }
            }
        });

        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ HeroSwiper initialization error:', error);
            return;
        }

        // Set total slides count (with delay to ensure Swiper is ready)
        setTimeout(() => {
            if (this.elements.progressTotal && this.swiper && this.swiper.slides) {
                const totalSlides = this.swiper.slides.length / (this.swiper.params.loop ? 3 : 1);
                this.elements.progressTotal.textContent = String(Math.round(totalSlides)).padStart(2, '0');
            }
        }, 200);

        // Initialize autoplay button
        this.initAutoplayButton();

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('🎠 Hero Swiper initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Initialize autoplay control button
     */
    initAutoplayButton() {
        if (!this.elements.autoplayBtn || !this.swiper) return;

        // Set initial state
        this.isAutoplayPaused = false;
        this.elements.autoplayBtn.classList.remove('is-paused');

        // Add click event listener
        this.elements.autoplayBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            this.toggleAutoplay();
        });
    }

    /**
     * Toggle autoplay on/off
     */
    toggleAutoplay() {
        if (!this.swiper) return;

        this.isAutoplayPaused = !this.isAutoplayPaused;

        if (this.isAutoplayPaused) {
            // Pause autoplay
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
            this.elements.autoplayBtn.classList.add('is-paused');
        } else {
            // Resume autoplay
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
            this.elements.autoplayBtn.classList.remove('is-paused');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Initialize custom visual effects
     */
    initCustomEffects() {
        // Add GSAP-powered hover effects to slides
        const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.hero__slide-inner');
        
        slides.forEach(slide => {
            const image = slide.querySelector('.hero__slide-image');
            const overlay = slide.querySelector('.hero__slide-overlay');

            // Mouse enter effect
            slide.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1.08,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
                
                gsap.to(overlay, {
                    opacity: 1,
                    duration: 0.3
                });
            });

            // Mouse leave effect
            slide.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            // Magnetic effect on mouse move
            slide.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                const rect = slide.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2;
                const y = e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2;

                gsap.to(slide, {
                    x: x * 0.05,
                    y: y * 0.05,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            slide.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(slide, {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'elastic.out(1, 0.5)'
                });
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        this.updateProgress();
        this.animateProgressCounter();
    }

    /**
     * Update progress counter
     */
    updateProgress() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.elements.progressCurrent) {
            return;
        }

        if (this.swiper.realIndex !== undefined) {
            const realIndex = this.swiper.realIndex + 1;
            this.elements.progressCurrent.textContent = String(realIndex).padStart(2, '0');
        } else if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            const activeIndex = this.swiper.activeIndex + 1;
            this.elements.progressCurrent.textContent = String(activeIndex).padStart(2, '0');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate progress counter change
     */
    animateProgressCounter() {
        if (!this.elements.progressCurrent) return;

        gsap.fromTo(this.elements.progressCurrent, 
            {
                y: 20,
                opacity: 0
            },
            {
                y: 0,
                opacity: 1,
                duration: 0.4,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Custom slide transition animation
     * @param {string} phase - 'start' or 'end'
     */
    animateSlideTransition(phase) {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides || this.swiper.activeIndex === undefined) {
            return;
        }

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];
        const activeInner = activeSlide?.querySelector('.hero__slide-inner');

        if (!activeInner) return;

        if (phase === 'start') {
            // Transition start - scale down slightly
            gsap.to(activeInner, {
                scale: 0.95,
                duration: 0.3,
                ease: 'power2.in'
            });
        } else {
            // Transition end - scale back up with bounce
            gsap.to(activeInner, {
                scale: 1,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'back.out(1.2)'
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideToLoop(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.HeroSwiper = HeroSwiper;

```


반응형 스타일 조정 및 Works 섹션 풀 와이드 적용 중입니다.


```css
    .hero__progress {
        font-size: var(--text-xs);
    }

    .hero__autoplay-btn {
        right: calc(var(--space-8) + 80px);
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__autoplay-icon {
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
    }
```

```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    /* overflow: hidden; */
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-2);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    filter: grayscale(20%);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: grayscale(0%);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4) 0%,
            transparent 50%);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Card Category */
.works__card-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    flex: 1;
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Card Tags */
.works__card-tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-tag {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-4);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-tag {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    color: var(--color-gray-300);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 50vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 40vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: auto;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```


모바일 반응형 스타일 조정 중입니다.


```css
    .hero__progress {
        font-size: var(--text-xs);
        top: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__autoplay-btn {
        top: var(--space-4);
        right: calc(var(--space-4) + 80px);
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__autoplay-icon {
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
    }
```

```css
/**
 * hero.css
 * Hero Section 전용 스타일
 * GSAP 애니메이션 및 Swiper 통합 스타일
 */

/* ===== Hero Section Layout ===== */
.hero {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-dark);
}

.hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.05) 0%, transparent 50%);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* ===== Hero Content Area (Left) ===== */
.hero__content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-8);
    padding-left: calc(var(--container-padding) + 3vw);
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* Label / Eyebrow */
.hero__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 24px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.hero__label-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.2); }
}

/* Main Title */
.hero__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(3.6rem, 8vw, 9.6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.hero__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.hero__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.1em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.15em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Subtitle */
.hero__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 480px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.hero__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* CTA Area */
.hero__cta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__cta-btn::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover .hero__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* Scroll Indicator */
.hero__scroll {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__scroll:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.hero__scroll-line {
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-600);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__scroll-line::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    animation: scrollLine 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes scrollLine {
    0% { transform: translateX(-100%); }
    50% { transform: translateX(0%); }
    100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
}

/* ===== Hero Visual Area (Right) ===== */
.hero__visual {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Swiper Container */
.hero__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    height: 60vh;
    max-height: 500px;
}

.hero__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: center;
}

.hero__slide {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__slide-inner {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 450px;
    aspect-ratio: 4/5;
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transform: scale(0.85);
    opacity: 0.4;
    transition: all var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-inner {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__slide-inner:hover .hero__slide-image {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Slide Overlay */
.hero__slide-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        transparent 0%,
        transparent 50%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.9) 100%
    );
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.hero__slide-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
}

/* Swiper Navigation */
.hero__swiper-nav {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-btn {
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.hero__swiper-btn svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
}

/* Swiper Pagination */
.hero__swiper-pagination {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet {
    width: 24px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 0;
    opacity: 1;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet-active {
    width: 48px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Progress Counter */
.hero__progress {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    z-index: 10;
}

/* Autoplay Control Button */
.hero__autoplay-btn {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    right: calc(var(--space-8) + 100px);
    z-index: 10;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    color: var(--color-light);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    position: absolute;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth),
                transform var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

.hero__progress-current {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.hero__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.hero__deco--grid {
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        linear-gradient(var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    opacity: 0.3;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--circle {
    width: 400px;
    height: 400px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--line {
    width: 1px;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
    left: 50%;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* Floating Keywords */
.hero__keywords {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__keyword {
    position: absolute;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-700);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__keyword:nth-child(1) { top: 15%; left: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(2) { top: 25%; right: 15%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(3) { bottom: 30%; left: 5%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(4) { bottom: 20%; right: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(5) { top: 60%; left: 15%; }

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .hero {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
        min-height: auto;
    }

    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding) var(--space-12);
        text-align: center;
    }

    .hero__label {
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    .hero__cta {
        justify-content: center;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 60vh;
    }

    .hero__swiper {
        height: 100%;
        max-height: none;
    }

    .hero__deco--grid {
        width: 100%;
        opacity: 0.15;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding) var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__label {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__title {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 50vh;
        min-height: 400px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 280px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-nav {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__swiper-btn {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-pagination {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        left: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__progress {
        top: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__autoplay-btn {
        top: var(--space-4);
        right: calc(var(--space-4) + 80px);
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__autoplay-icon {
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
    }

    .hero__keywords {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding) var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 45vh;
        min-height: 350px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 240px;
    }

    .hero__slide-overlay {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__slide-title {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .hero__label-dot,
    .hero__scroll-line::after {
        animation: none;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner,
    .hero__cta-btn,
    .hero__swiper-btn {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```


변경 사항 요약:

## 완료된 작업

### 1. **Works 섹션 - 2개씩 표시**
- `slidesPerView: 2`로 설정 (데스크탑)
- 각 슬라이드 너비: `50%` (2개가 나란히 표시)
- 좌측 이미지, 우측 내용 레이아웃 유지

### 2. **Works 섹션 - 풀 와이드**
- Swiper 컨테이너의 패딩 제거
- 화면 전체 너비 사용

### 3. **히어로 영역 - 재생/멈춤 버튼 추가**
- HTML: 재생/멈춤 아이콘 버튼 추가
- CSS: 버튼 스타일 및 호버 효과
- JS: `toggleAutoplay()` 메서드로 재생/멈춤 토글
- 위치: Progress Counter 왼쪽에 배치

### 4. **반응형 조정**
- 태블릿/모바일: 1개씩 표시
- 모바일에서 autoplay 버튼 크기 조정

Works 섹션은 한 열에 2개씩 표시되며, 히어로 영역에는 재생/멈춤 버튼이 추가되었습니다. 페이지를 새로고침하여 확인해 주세요.

---

**User**

대표작업물 타이틀을 자기소개 타이틀의 왼쪽 정렬로 맞춰주고 가로값도 각영역의 가로값과 맞춰주세요

---

**Cursor**


About 섹션의 타이틀 정렬과 가로값을 확인하고, Works 섹션 타이틀을 동일하게 맞추는 중입니다.



About 섹션의 타이틀 정렬과 가로값을 확인하고, Works 섹션 타이틀을 동일하게 맞추는 중입니다.


```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    /* overflow: hidden; */
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-2);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
```
