```css
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    filter: grayscale(20%);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: grayscale(0%);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4) 0%,
            transparent 50%);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Card Category */
.works__card-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    flex: 1;
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Card Tags */
.works__card-tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-tag {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-4);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-tag {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    color: var(--color-gray-300);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 50vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 40vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: auto;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```


About 섹션의 label margin-bottom을 확인하고, Works 섹션도 동일하게 맞추는 중입니다.


```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    /* overflow: hidden; */
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-2);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    filter: grayscale(20%);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: grayscale(0%);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4) 0%,
            transparent 50%);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Card Category */
.works__card-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    flex: 1;
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Card Tags */
.works__card-tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-tag {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-4);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-tag {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    color: var(--color-gray-300);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 50vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 40vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: auto;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```


반응형 스타일 확인 및 조정 중입니다.



변경 완료. Works 섹션 타이틀을 About 섹션과 동일한 왼쪽 정렬과 가로값으로 맞췄습니다.

## 변경 사항

### 1. **헤더 패딩 조정**
- `.works__header`의 `padding`을 `var(--space-4) var(--container-padding)`에서 `0 var(--container-padding)`으로 변경
- About 섹션의 `.about__container`와 동일한 패딩 적용

### 2. **Label 마진 조정**
- `.works__label`의 `margin-bottom`을 `var(--space-4)`에서 `var(--space-2)`로 변경
- About 섹션의 `.about__label`과 동일한 마진 적용

이제 두 섹션의 타이틀이 동일한 왼쪽 정렬과 가로값을 사용합니다. 페이지를 새로고침하여 확인해 주세요.

---

**User**

아직도 안맞아요

---

**Cursor**


About과 Works 섹션의 구조를 비교해 정확히 맞추는 중입니다.



About과 Works 섹션의 구조 차이를 확인하고 정렬을 맞추는 중입니다.



About 섹션의 실제 정렬 위치를 확인하고, Works 섹션을 동일하게 맞추는 중입니다.



`.works__header-content`에 추가 패딩이나 마진이 있는지 확인하고, Works 섹션의 구조를 About과 동일하게 맞추는 중입니다.


```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    /* overflow: hidden; */
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-2);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    filter: grayscale(20%);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: grayscale(0%);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4) 0%,
            transparent 50%);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Card Category */
.works__card-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    flex: 1;
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Card Tags */
.works__card-tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-tag {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-4);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-tag {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    color: var(--color-gray-300);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 50vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 40vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: auto;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```


About 섹션의 정확한 위치를 확인하고, Works 섹션을 동일하게 맞추는 중입니다. Works 섹션의 헤더 구조를 About과 동일하게 조정 중입니다.


```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    /* overflow: hidden; */
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-2);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    filter: grayscale(20%);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: grayscale(0%);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4) 0%,
            transparent 50%);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Card Category */
.works__card-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    flex: 1;
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Card Tags */
.works__card-tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-tag {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-4);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-tag {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    color: var(--color-gray-300);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 50vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 40vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: auto;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```


About 섹션의 정확한 정렬을 확인하고, Works 섹션을 동일하게 맞추는 중입니다. About은 grid, Works는 flex 레이아웃이라 차이가 있을 수 있습니다.



About 섹션의 정확한 정렬을 확인하고, Works 섹션을 동일하게 맞추는 중입니다. About은 grid, Works는 flex 레이아웃이라 차이가 있을 수 있습니다.


```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    /* overflow: hidden; */
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-2);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    filter: grayscale(20%);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: grayscale(0%);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4) 0%,
            transparent 50%);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Card Category */
.works__card-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    flex: 1;
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Card Tags */
.works__card-tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-tag {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-4);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-tag {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    color: var(--color-gray-300);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 50vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 40vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: auto;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```


변경 완료. About 섹션과 동일한 패딩을 적용했습니다. 정렬이 여전히 맞지 않으면, Works 섹션 헤더의 구조를 About과 동일하게 조정하겠습니다.


```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    /* overflow: hidden; */
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-2);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    filter: grayscale(20%);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: grayscale(0%);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4) 0%,
            transparent 50%);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Card Category */
.works__card-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    flex: 1;
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Card Tags */
.works__card-tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-tag {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-4);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-tag {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    color: var(--color-gray-300);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 50vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 40vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: auto;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```


변경 완료. Works 섹션 타이틀을 About 섹션과 동일한 정렬과 가로값으로 맞췄습니다.

## 변경 사항

1. **섹션 패딩 통일**: `.works`의 `padding`을 `var(--space-8) 0`에서 `var(--space-12) 0`으로 변경해 About과 동일하게 맞춤
2. **헤더 박스 모델**: `.works__header`에 `width: 100%`, `box-sizing: border-box` 추가
3. **헤더 콘텐츠 최적화**: `.works__header-content`에 `min-width: 0` 추가

이제 두 섹션의 타이틀이 동일한 왼쪽 정렬과 가로값을 사용합니다. 페이지를 새로고침해 확인해 주세요. 여전히 맞지 않으면 알려주세요.

---

**User**

대표작업물으 리스트 컬럼들은 이전처럼 가로로 풀로 100% 꽉차야 합니다.

---

**Cursor**


Works 섹션의 프로젝트 카드가 가로 100%를 차지하도록 변경 중입니다.



각 프로젝트 카드가 화면 전체 너비를 차지하도록 변경 중입니다.


```javascript
/**
 * worksSwiper.js
 * Works Section Swiper 설정
 * GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션 + 프로그레스 인디케이터
 */

class WorksSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.works__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Elements
        this.elements = {
            prevBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--prev'),
            nextBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--next'),
            progressCurrent: document.querySelector('.works__progress-current'),
            progressTotal: document.querySelector('.works__progress-total'),
            progressFill: document.querySelector('.works__progress-fill')
        };

        // Animation reference
        this.worksAnimation = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     * @param {WorksAnimation} worksAnimation - Reference to works animation instance
     */
    init(worksAnimation = null) {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        this.worksAnimation = worksAnimation;

        try {
            this.swiper = new Swiper('.works__swiper', {
                // Core settings
                slidesPerView: 1, // Full width slides
                spaceBetween: 0,
                speed: 800,
                loop: false,
                centeredSlides: false,
                slidesOffsetBefore: 0,
                
                // Autoplay
                autoplay: {
                    delay: 5000,
                    disableOnInteraction: false,
                    pauseOnMouseEnter: true
                },

                // Grab cursor
                grabCursor: true,

                // Navigation
                navigation: {
                    prevEl: '.works__nav-btn--prev',
                    nextEl: '.works__nav-btn--next'
                },

                // Breakpoints
                breakpoints: {
                    320: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    },
                    768: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    },
                    1024: {
                        slidesPerView: 2,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    }
                },

                // Events
                on: {
                    init: () => {
                        // Delay to ensure Swiper is fully initialized
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            this.updateProgress();
                            this.setTotalSlides();
                        }, 100);
                    },
                    slideChange: () => {
                        this.onSlideChange();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionStart();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionEnd();
                    }
                }
            });

            this.isInitialized = true;
            console.log('🎠 Works Swiper initialized');
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ WorksSwiper initialization error:', error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Set total slides count
     */
    setTotalSlides() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available');
            return;
        }

        if (this.elements.progressTotal && this.swiper.slides && this.swiper.slides.length) {
            const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
            this.elements.progressTotal.textContent = String(total).padStart(2, '0');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available in onSlideChange');
            return;
        }

        this.updateProgress();
        this.animateProgressCounter();

        // Trigger card content animation if available
        if (this.worksAnimation && this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.worksAnimation.animateCardContent(this.swiper.activeIndex);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update progress indicator
     */
    updateProgress() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides || this.swiper.slides.length === 0) {
            return;
        }

        const current = (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined ? this.swiper.activeIndex : 0) + 1;
        const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
        const progress = (current / total) * 100;

        // Update current number
        if (this.elements.progressCurrent) {
            this.elements.progressCurrent.textContent = String(current).padStart(2, '0');
        }

        // Update progress bar
        if (this.elements.progressFill) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.progressFill, {
                width: `${progress}%`,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate progress counter change
     */
    animateProgressCounter() {
        if (!this.elements.progressCurrent) return;

        gsap.fromTo(this.elements.progressCurrent,
            {
                y: 20,
                opacity: 0
            },
            {
                y: 0,
                opacity: 1,
                duration: 0.4,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition start
     */
    animateTransitionStart() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];
        const prevSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.previousIndex];

        // Animate out previous slide content
        if (prevSlide) {
            const prevContent = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            if (prevContent) {
                gsap.to(prevContent, {
                    opacity: 0.5,
                    y: 10,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'power2.in'
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition end
     */
    animateTransitionEnd() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];

        if (activeSlide) {
            const content = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            if (content) {
                gsap.to(content, {
                    opacity: 1,
                    y: 0,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        }

        // Reset all non-active slides
        if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.swiper.slides.forEach((slide, index) => {
                if (index !== this.swiper.activeIndex) {
                    const content = slide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
                    if (content) {
                        gsap.set(content, { opacity: 1, y: 0 });
                    }
                }
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideTo(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksSwiper = WorksSwiper;

```

```javascript
/**
 * worksSwiper.js
 * Works Section Swiper 설정
 * GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션 + 프로그레스 인디케이터
 */

class WorksSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.works__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Elements
        this.elements = {
            prevBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--prev'),
            nextBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--next'),
            progressCurrent: document.querySelector('.works__progress-current'),
            progressTotal: document.querySelector('.works__progress-total'),
            progressFill: document.querySelector('.works__progress-fill')
        };

        // Animation reference
        this.worksAnimation = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     * @param {WorksAnimation} worksAnimation - Reference to works animation instance
     */
    init(worksAnimation = null) {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        this.worksAnimation = worksAnimation;

        try {
            this.swiper = new Swiper('.works__swiper', {
                // Core settings
                slidesPerView: 1, // Full width slides
                spaceBetween: 0,
                speed: 800,
                loop: false,
                centeredSlides: false,
                slidesOffsetBefore: 0,
                
                // Autoplay
                autoplay: {
                    delay: 5000,
                    disableOnInteraction: false,
                    pauseOnMouseEnter: true
                },

                // Grab cursor
                grabCursor: true,

                // Navigation
                navigation: {
                    prevEl: '.works__nav-btn--prev',
                    nextEl: '.works__nav-btn--next'
                },

                // Breakpoints - always 1 slide per view for full width
                breakpoints: {
                    320: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    },
                    768: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    },
                    1024: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    }
                },

                // Events
                on: {
                    init: () => {
                        // Delay to ensure Swiper is fully initialized
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            this.updateProgress();
                            this.setTotalSlides();
                        }, 100);
                    },
                    slideChange: () => {
                        this.onSlideChange();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionStart();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionEnd();
                    }
                }
            });

            this.isInitialized = true;
            console.log('🎠 Works Swiper initialized');
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ WorksSwiper initialization error:', error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Set total slides count
     */
    setTotalSlides() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available');
            return;
        }

        if (this.elements.progressTotal && this.swiper.slides && this.swiper.slides.length) {
            const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
            this.elements.progressTotal.textContent = String(total).padStart(2, '0');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available in onSlideChange');
            return;
        }

        this.updateProgress();
        this.animateProgressCounter();

        // Trigger card content animation if available
        if (this.worksAnimation && this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.worksAnimation.animateCardContent(this.swiper.activeIndex);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update progress indicator
     */
    updateProgress() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides || this.swiper.slides.length === 0) {
            return;
        }

        const current = (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined ? this.swiper.activeIndex : 0) + 1;
        const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
        const progress = (current / total) * 100;

        // Update current number
        if (this.elements.progressCurrent) {
            this.elements.progressCurrent.textContent = String(current).padStart(2, '0');
        }

        // Update progress bar
        if (this.elements.progressFill) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.progressFill, {
                width: `${progress}%`,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate progress counter change
     */
    animateProgressCounter() {
        if (!this.elements.progressCurrent) return;

        gsap.fromTo(this.elements.progressCurrent,
            {
                y: 20,
                opacity: 0
            },
            {
                y: 0,
                opacity: 1,
                duration: 0.4,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition start
     */
    animateTransitionStart() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];
        const prevSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.previousIndex];

        // Animate out previous slide content
        if (prevSlide) {
            const prevContent = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            if (prevContent) {
                gsap.to(prevContent, {
                    opacity: 0.5,
                    y: 10,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'power2.in'
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition end
     */
    animateTransitionEnd() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];

        if (activeSlide) {
```
