```javascript
            const content = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            if (content) {
                gsap.to(content, {
                    opacity: 1,
                    y: 0,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        }

        // Reset all non-active slides
        if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.swiper.slides.forEach((slide, index) => {
                if (index !== this.swiper.activeIndex) {
                    const content = slide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
                    if (content) {
                        gsap.set(content, { opacity: 1, y: 0 });
                    }
                }
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideTo(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksSwiper = WorksSwiper;

```

```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    /* overflow: hidden; */
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-2);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    filter: grayscale(20%);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: grayscale(0%);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4) 0%,
            transparent 50%);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Card Category */
.works__card-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    flex: 1;
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Card Tags */
.works__card-tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-tag {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-4);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-tag {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    color: var(--color-gray-300);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 50vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 40vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: auto;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```


변경 완료. Works 섹션의 프로젝트 카드가 가로 100%를 차지하도록 수정했습니다.

## 변경 사항

### 1. **Swiper 설정 변경**
- `slidesPerView: 2` → `slidesPerView: 1` (전체 너비 슬라이드)
- 모든 breakpoint에서 `slidesPerView: 1`로 통일

### 2. **CSS 슬라이드 너비 조정**
- `.works__slide`의 `width: 50%` → `width: 100%`

이제 각 프로젝트 카드가 화면 전체 너비를 차지합니다. 페이지를 새로고침해 확인해 주세요.

---

**User**

음 한 열에 컬림이 두개씩 보이게 해야해요 가로값이 윈도위 창에 꽉차게 보이게해야합니다.

---

**Cursor**


한 열에 2개씩 보이도록 설정하고, 섹션이 화면 전체 너비를 차지하도록 조정 중입니다.



한 열에 2개씩 보이도록 설정하고, 섹션이 화면 전체 너비를 차지하도록 조정 중입니다.


```javascript
/**
 * worksSwiper.js
 * Works Section Swiper 설정
 * GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션 + 프로그레스 인디케이터
 */

class WorksSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.works__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Elements
        this.elements = {
            prevBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--prev'),
            nextBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--next'),
            progressCurrent: document.querySelector('.works__progress-current'),
            progressTotal: document.querySelector('.works__progress-total'),
            progressFill: document.querySelector('.works__progress-fill')
        };

        // Animation reference
        this.worksAnimation = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     * @param {WorksAnimation} worksAnimation - Reference to works animation instance
     */
    init(worksAnimation = null) {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        this.worksAnimation = worksAnimation;

        try {
            this.swiper = new Swiper('.works__swiper', {
                // Core settings
                slidesPerView: 2, // 2 cards per view
                spaceBetween: 0,
                speed: 800,
                loop: false,
                centeredSlides: false,
                slidesOffsetBefore: 0,
                
                // Autoplay
                autoplay: {
                    delay: 5000,
                    disableOnInteraction: false,
                    pauseOnMouseEnter: true
                },

                // Grab cursor
                grabCursor: true,

                // Navigation
                navigation: {
                    prevEl: '.works__nav-btn--prev',
                    nextEl: '.works__nav-btn--next'
                },

                // Breakpoints - always 1 slide per view for full width
                breakpoints: {
                    320: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    },
                    768: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    },
                    1024: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    }
                },

                // Events
                on: {
                    init: () => {
                        // Delay to ensure Swiper is fully initialized
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            this.updateProgress();
                            this.setTotalSlides();
                        }, 100);
                    },
                    slideChange: () => {
                        this.onSlideChange();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionStart();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionEnd();
                    }
                }
            });

            this.isInitialized = true;
            console.log('🎠 Works Swiper initialized');
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ WorksSwiper initialization error:', error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Set total slides count
     */
    setTotalSlides() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available');
            return;
        }

        if (this.elements.progressTotal && this.swiper.slides && this.swiper.slides.length) {
            const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
            this.elements.progressTotal.textContent = String(total).padStart(2, '0');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available in onSlideChange');
            return;
        }

        this.updateProgress();
        this.animateProgressCounter();

        // Trigger card content animation if available
        if (this.worksAnimation && this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.worksAnimation.animateCardContent(this.swiper.activeIndex);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update progress indicator
     */
    updateProgress() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides || this.swiper.slides.length === 0) {
            return;
        }

        const current = (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined ? this.swiper.activeIndex : 0) + 1;
        const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
        const progress = (current / total) * 100;

        // Update current number
        if (this.elements.progressCurrent) {
            this.elements.progressCurrent.textContent = String(current).padStart(2, '0');
        }

        // Update progress bar
        if (this.elements.progressFill) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.progressFill, {
                width: `${progress}%`,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate progress counter change
     */
    animateProgressCounter() {
        if (!this.elements.progressCurrent) return;

        gsap.fromTo(this.elements.progressCurrent,
            {
                y: 20,
                opacity: 0
            },
            {
                y: 0,
                opacity: 1,
                duration: 0.4,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition start
     */
    animateTransitionStart() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];
        const prevSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.previousIndex];

        // Animate out previous slide content
        if (prevSlide) {
            const prevContent = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            if (prevContent) {
                gsap.to(prevContent, {
                    opacity: 0.5,
                    y: 10,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'power2.in'
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition end
     */
    animateTransitionEnd() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];

        if (activeSlide) {
            const content = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            if (content) {
                gsap.to(content, {
                    opacity: 1,
                    y: 0,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        }

        // Reset all non-active slides
        if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.swiper.slides.forEach((slide, index) => {
                if (index !== this.swiper.activeIndex) {
                    const content = slide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
                    if (content) {
                        gsap.set(content, { opacity: 1, y: 0 });
                    }
                }
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideTo(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksSwiper = WorksSwiper;

```

```javascript
/**
 * worksSwiper.js
 * Works Section Swiper 설정
 * GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션 + 프로그레스 인디케이터
 */

class WorksSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.works__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Elements
        this.elements = {
            prevBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--prev'),
            nextBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--next'),
            progressCurrent: document.querySelector('.works__progress-current'),
            progressTotal: document.querySelector('.works__progress-total'),
            progressFill: document.querySelector('.works__progress-fill')
        };

        // Animation reference
        this.worksAnimation = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     * @param {WorksAnimation} worksAnimation - Reference to works animation instance
     */
    init(worksAnimation = null) {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        this.worksAnimation = worksAnimation;

        try {
            this.swiper = new Swiper('.works__swiper', {
                // Core settings
                slidesPerView: 2, // 2 cards per view
                spaceBetween: 0,
                speed: 800,
                loop: false,
                centeredSlides: false,
                slidesOffsetBefore: 0,
                
                // Autoplay
                autoplay: {
                    delay: 5000,
                    disableOnInteraction: false,
                    pauseOnMouseEnter: true
                },

                // Grab cursor
                grabCursor: true,

                // Navigation
                navigation: {
                    prevEl: '.works__nav-btn--prev',
                    nextEl: '.works__nav-btn--next'
                },

                // Breakpoints
                breakpoints: {
                    320: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    },
                    768: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    },
                    1024: {
                        slidesPerView: 2,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    }
                },

                // Events
                on: {
                    init: () => {
                        // Delay to ensure Swiper is fully initialized
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            this.updateProgress();
                            this.setTotalSlides();
                        }, 100);
                    },
                    slideChange: () => {
                        this.onSlideChange();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionStart();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionEnd();
                    }
                }
            });

            this.isInitialized = true;
            console.log('🎠 Works Swiper initialized');
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ WorksSwiper initialization error:', error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Set total slides count
     */
    setTotalSlides() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available');
            return;
        }

        if (this.elements.progressTotal && this.swiper.slides && this.swiper.slides.length) {
            const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
            this.elements.progressTotal.textContent = String(total).padStart(2, '0');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available in onSlideChange');
            return;
        }

        this.updateProgress();
        this.animateProgressCounter();

        // Trigger card content animation if available
        if (this.worksAnimation && this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.worksAnimation.animateCardContent(this.swiper.activeIndex);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update progress indicator
     */
    updateProgress() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides || this.swiper.slides.length === 0) {
            return;
        }

        const current = (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined ? this.swiper.activeIndex : 0) + 1;
        const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
        const progress = (current / total) * 100;

        // Update current number
        if (this.elements.progressCurrent) {
            this.elements.progressCurrent.textContent = String(current).padStart(2, '0');
        }

        // Update progress bar
        if (this.elements.progressFill) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.progressFill, {
                width: `${progress}%`,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate progress counter change
     */
    animateProgressCounter() {
        if (!this.elements.progressCurrent) return;

        gsap.fromTo(this.elements.progressCurrent,
            {
                y: 20,
                opacity: 0
            },
            {
                y: 0,
                opacity: 1,
                duration: 0.4,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition start
     */
    animateTransitionStart() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];
        const prevSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.previousIndex];

        // Animate out previous slide content
        if (prevSlide) {
            const prevContent = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            if (prevContent) {
                gsap.to(prevContent, {
                    opacity: 0.5,
                    y: 10,
                    duration: 0.3,
                    ease: 'power2.in'
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition end
     */
    animateTransitionEnd() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];

        if (activeSlide) {
            const content = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            if (content) {
                gsap.to(content, {
                    opacity: 1,
                    y: 0,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        }

        // Reset all non-active slides
        if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.swiper.slides.forEach((slide, index) => {
                if (index !== this.swiper.activeIndex) {
                    const content = slide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
                    if (content) {
                        gsap.set(content, { opacity: 1, y: 0 });
                    }
                }
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideTo(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksSwiper = WorksSwiper;

```

```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    /* overflow: hidden; */
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-2);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    filter: grayscale(20%);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: grayscale(0%);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4) 0%,
            transparent 50%);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Card Category */
.works__card-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    flex: 1;
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Card Tags */
.works__card-tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-tag {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-4);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-tag {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    color: var(--color-gray-300);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 50vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 40vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: auto;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```

```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    /* overflow: hidden; */
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-2);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    filter: grayscale(20%);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: grayscale(0%);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4) 0%,
            transparent 50%);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Card Category */
.works__card-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    flex: 1;
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Card Tags */
.works__card-tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-tag {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-4);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-tag {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    color: var(--color-gray-300);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 50vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 40vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: auto;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```


변경 완료. Works 섹션이 한 열에 2개씩 보이도록 설정하고, 화면 전체 너비를 차지하도록 조정했습니다.

## 변경 사항

### 1. **Swiper 설정 변경**
- `slidesPerView: 1` → `slidesPerView: 2` (데스크탑에서 2개씩 표시)
- Breakpoint: 1024px 이상에서 `slidesPerView: 2` 유지

### 2. **풀 와이드 레이아웃**
- `.works__swiper-container`에서 `max-width: var(--container-xl)` 제거
- `padding: 0 var(--container-padding)` 제거 → `padding: 0`
- 화면 전체 너비 사용

### 3. **슬라이드 너비 조정**
- `.works__slide`의 `width: 100%` → `width: 50%` (2개씩 나란히 표시)

이제 한 열에 2개의 프로젝트 카드가 나란히 보이고, 섹션이 화면 전체 너비를 차지합니다. 페이지를 새로고침해 확인해 주세요.

---

**User**

헤더에 메뉴를 만들어서 공통적인 컴포넌트로 만들어주세요. 메뉴 클릭시 해당위치로 옮기는 기능도 넣어주세요

---

**Cursor**


헤더 메뉴를 공통 컴포넌트로 추가하고, 클릭 시 해당 섹션으로 스크롤되도록 구현 중입니다.



헤더 메뉴 컴포넌트 생성 중입니다.


```html
<!-- ========== HEADER / NAVIGATION ========== -->
<header class="header" id="header">
    <div class="header__container">
        <!-- Logo / Brand -->
        <div class="header__logo">
            <a href="#hero" class="header__logo-link" data-scroll-to="hero">
                <span class="header__logo-text">Portfolio</span>
            </a>
        </div>

        <!-- Navigation Menu -->
        <nav class="header__nav" aria-label="메인 네비게이션">
            <ul class="header__nav-list">
                <li class="header__nav-item">
                    <a href="#hero" class="header__nav-link" data-scroll-to="hero">
                        <span class="header__nav-text">홈</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li class="header__nav-item">
                    <a href="#about" class="header__nav-link" data-scroll-to="about">
                        <span class="header__nav-text">자기소개</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li class="header__nav-item">
                    <a href="#works" class="header__nav-link" data-scroll-to="works">
                        <span class="header__nav-text">작업물</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li class="header__nav-item">
                    <a href="#contact" class="header__nav-link" data-scroll-to="contact">
                        <span class="header__nav-text">연락처</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </nav>

        <!-- Mobile Menu Toggle -->
        <button class="header__menu-toggle" aria-label="메뉴 열기/닫기" aria-expanded="false">
            <span class="header__menu-toggle-line"></span>
            <span class="header__menu-toggle-line"></span>
            <span class="header__menu-toggle-line"></span>
        </button>
    </div>
</header>

```

```css
/**
 * header.css
 * Header / Navigation 전용 스타일
 * 공통 컴포넌트로 사용
 */

/* ===== Header Layout ===== */
.header {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    z-index: 1000;
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.8);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.header.is-scrolled {
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.95);
    border-bottom-color: var(--color-gray-700);
}

.header__container {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: var(--space-8);
}

/* ===== Logo ===== */
.header__logo {
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.header__logo-link {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.header__logo-link:hover {
    opacity: 0.8;
}

.header__logo-text {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-tight);
}

/* ===== Navigation ===== */
.header__nav {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
}

.header__nav-list {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    list-style: none;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
}

.header__nav-item {
    position: relative;
}

.header__nav-link {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    text-decoration: none;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.header__nav-link::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 0;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.header__nav-link:hover,
.header__nav-link.is-active {
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.header__nav-link:hover::before,
.header__nav-link.is-active::before {
    width: 100%;
}

.header__nav-text {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* ===== Mobile Menu Toggle ===== */
.header__menu-toggle {
    display: none;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    padding: 0;
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    gap: 6px;
    z-index: 1001;
}

.header__menu-toggle-line {
    width: 24px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    transform-origin: center;
}

.header__menu-toggle[aria-expanded="true"] .header__menu-toggle-line:nth-child(1) {
    transform: translateY(8px) rotate(45deg);
}

.header__menu-toggle[aria-expanded="true"] .header__menu-toggle-line:nth-child(2) {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scaleX(0);
}

.header__menu-toggle[aria-expanded="true"] .header__menu-toggle-line:nth-child(3) {
    transform: translateY(-8px) rotate(-45deg);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .header__nav {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0;
        right: -100%;
        width: 280px;
        height: 100vh;
        background: var(--color-dark);
        border-left: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
        flex-direction: column;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--space-8);
        transition: right var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
        z-index: 1000;
    }

    .header__nav.is-open {
        right: 0;
    }

    .header__nav-list {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-4);
        width: 100%;
    }

    .header__nav-item {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .header__nav-link {
        width: 100%;
        padding: var(--space-3) var(--space-4);
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .header__menu-toggle {
        display: flex;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .header__container {
        padding: var(--space-3) var(--container-padding);
    }

    .header__logo-text {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
    }

    .header__nav {
        width: 100%;
        right: -100%;
    }

    .header__nav.is-open {
        right: 0;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .header__nav-link,
    .header__menu-toggle-line {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```javascript
/**
 * header.js
 * Header / Navigation 기능
 * 스크롤 감지, 메뉴 활성화, 부드러운 스크롤
 */

class Header {
    constructor() {
        this.header = document.querySelector('.header');
        this.navLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.header__nav-link');
        this.menuToggle = document.querySelector('.header__menu-toggle');
        this.nav = document.querySelector('.header__nav');
        this.sections = document.querySelectorAll('section[data-section]');
        
        this.isMenuOpen = false;
        this.scrollThreshold = 100;
        
        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.handleScroll = this.handleScroll.bind(this);
        this.handleNavClick = this.handleNavClick.bind(this);
        this.toggleMenu = this.toggleMenu.bind(this);
        this.closeMenu = this.closeMenu.bind(this);
        this.updateActiveNav = this.updateActiveNav.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize header functionality
     */
    init() {
        if (!this.header) {
            console.warn('⚠️ Header: Header element not found');
            return;
        }

        // Scroll event listener
        window.addEventListener('scroll', this.handleScroll, { passive: true });
        
        // Navigation link click handlers
        this.navLinks.forEach(link => {
            link.addEventListener('click', this.handleNavClick);
        });

        // Menu toggle handler
        if (this.menuToggle) {
            this.menuToggle.addEventListener('click', this.toggleMenu);
        }

        // Close menu on outside click
        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (this.isMenuOpen && 
                !this.nav.contains(e.target) && 
                !this.menuToggle.contains(e.target)) {
                this.closeMenu();
            }
        });

        // Close menu on escape key
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'Escape' && this.isMenuOpen) {
                this.closeMenu();
            }
        });

        // Initial scroll state
        this.handleScroll();

        console.log('✅ Header initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Handle scroll events
     */
    handleScroll() {
        const scrollY = window.scrollY;

        // Add scrolled class when scrolling
        if (scrollY > this.scrollThreshold) {
            this.header.classList.add('is-scrolled');
        } else {
            this.header.classList.remove('is-scrolled');
        }

        // Update active navigation
        this.updateActiveNav();
    }

    /**
     * Handle navigation link clicks
     */
    handleNavClick(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        const link = e.currentTarget;
        const targetId = link.getAttribute('data-scroll-to') || link.getAttribute('href')?.replace('#', '');
        
        if (!targetId) return;

        // Close mobile menu if open
        if (this.isMenuOpen) {
            this.closeMenu();
        }

        // Scroll to target section
        this.scrollToSection(targetId);

        // Update active state
        this.setActiveNav(link);
    }

    /**
     * Scroll to target section smoothly
     */
    scrollToSection(sectionId) {
        const targetSection = document.getElementById(sectionId) || 
                             document.querySelector(`[data-section="${sectionId}"]`);
        
        if (!targetSection) {
            console.warn(`⚠️ Header: Section "${sectionId}" not found`);
            return;
        }

        const headerHeight = this.header.offsetHeight;
        const targetPosition = targetSection.offsetTop - headerHeight;

        window.scrollTo({
            top: targetPosition,
            behavior: 'smooth'
        });
    }

    /**
     * Update active navigation based on scroll position
     */
    updateActiveNav() {
        const headerHeight = this.header.offsetHeight;
        const scrollPosition = window.scrollY + headerHeight + 100;

        let activeSection = null;

        this.sections.forEach(section => {
            const sectionTop = section.offsetTop;
            const sectionBottom = sectionTop + section.offsetHeight;
            const sectionId = section.id || section.getAttribute('data-section');

            if (scrollPosition >= sectionTop && scrollPosition < sectionBottom) {
                activeSection = sectionId;
            }
        });

        // Set active nav link
        if (activeSection) {
            this.navLinks.forEach(link => {
                const linkTarget = link.getAttribute('data-scroll-to') || 
                                  link.getAttribute('href')?.replace('#', '');
                
                if (linkTarget === activeSection) {
                    link.classList.add('is-active');
                } else {
                    link.classList.remove('is-active');
                }
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Set active navigation link
     */
    setActiveNav(activeLink) {
        this.navLinks.forEach(link => {
            link.classList.remove('is-active');
        });
        activeLink.classList.add('is-active');
    }

    /**
     * Toggle mobile menu
     */
    toggleMenu() {
        this.isMenuOpen = !this.isMenuOpen;
        
        if (this.menuToggle) {
            this.menuToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', this.isMenuOpen);
        }
        
        if (this.nav) {
            if (this.isMenuOpen) {
                this.nav.classList.add('is-open');
                document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
            } else {
                this.nav.classList.remove('is-open');
                document.body.style.overflow = '';
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Close mobile menu
     */
    closeMenu() {
        if (!this.isMenuOpen) return;

        this.isMenuOpen = false;
        
        if (this.menuToggle) {
            this.menuToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        }
        
        if (this.nav) {
            this.nav.classList.remove('is-open');
            document.body.style.overflow = '';
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
if (typeof module !== 'undefined' && module.exports) {
    module.exports = Header;
}

```


index.html에 헤더를 추가하고 CSS/JS를 연결 중입니다.


```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="description" content="UI/UX 디자이너 포트폴리오 - 전략적 디자인 사고와 매끄러운 인터랙션을 통해 의미 있는 디지털 경험을 만듭니다.">
    <meta name="keywords" content="UI/UX 디자이너, 포트폴리오, 웹 디자인, 인터랙션 디자인, 사용자 경험">
    <meta name="author" content="Designer Name">

    <!-- Open Graph -->
    <meta property="og:title" content="UI/UX 디자이너 포트폴리오">
    <meta property="og:description" content="전략적 디자인 사고와 매끄러운 인터랙션을 통해 의미 있는 디지털 경험을 만듭니다.">
    <meta property="og:type" content="website">
    <meta property="og:image" content="./assets/images/og-image.jpg">

    <!-- Favicon -->
    <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="./assets/icons/favicon.svg">

    <!-- Preconnect for Performance -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net">

    <!-- Stylesheets -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/reset.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/variables.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/common.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/header.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/hero.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/about.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/works.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/contact.css">

    <!-- Swiper CSS -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@11/swiper-bundle.min.css">

    <title>UI/UX 디자이너 | 포트폴리오</title>
</head>

<body>
    <!-- Loading Screen -->
    <div class="loading-screen" id="loading-screen">
        <div class="loading-screen__progress">
            <div class="loading-screen__bar" id="loading-bar"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Noise Overlay -->
    <div class="noise-overlay" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <!-- Custom Cursor (Desktop Only) -->
    <div class="cursor" id="cursor" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <!-- Main Content -->
    <main id="main-content">

        <!-- ========== HERO SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="hero" id="hero" data-section="hero">
            <!-- Background Decorations -->
            <div class="hero__deco hero__deco--grid" aria-hidden="true"></div>
            <div class="hero__deco hero__deco--line" aria-hidden="true"></div>

            <!-- Floating Keywords -->
            <div class="hero__keywords" aria-hidden="true">
                <span class="hero__keyword">사용자 경험</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">인터랙션</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">디자인 시스템</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">프로토타이핑</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">모션 디자인</span>
            </div>

            <!-- Content Area (Left) -->
            <div class="hero__content">
                <!-- Label / Eyebrow -->
                <div class="hero__label">
                    <span class="hero__label-dot"></span>
                    <span>프로젝트 가능</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Main Title -->
                <h1 class="hero__title">
                    <span class="hero__title-line">
                        <span class="hero__title-text">UI/UX 디자이너</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="hero__title-line">
                        <span class="hero__title-text">개발도 하는 <span class="hero__title-highlight">인터랙션</span></span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="hero__title-line">
                        <span class="hero__title-text">디자이너</span>
                    </span>
                </h1>

                <!-- Subtitle -->
                <p class="hero__subtitle">
                    전략적 디자인 사고와 매끄러운 인터랙션, 픽셀 단위의 완벽한 실행을 통해
                    <strong>의미 있는 디지털 경험</strong>을 만듭니다.
                    <strong>디자인과 개발</strong> 사이의 간격을 메웁니다.
                </p>

                <!-- CTA Area -->
                <div class="hero__cta">
                    <a href="#works" class="hero__cta-btn">
                        <span>프로젝트 보기</span>
                        <svg class="hero__cta-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                    <button class="hero__scroll" aria-label="다음 섹션으로 스크롤">
                        <span class="hero__scroll-line"></span>
                        <span>스크롤</span>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Visual Area (Right) -->
            <div class="hero__visual">
                <!-- Progress Counter -->
                <div class="hero__progress">
                    <span class="hero__progress-current">01</span>
                    <span>/</span>
                    <span class="hero__progress-total">04</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Autoplay Control -->
                <button class="hero__autoplay-btn" aria-label="자동 재생 제어">
                    <svg class="hero__autoplay-icon hero__autoplay-icon--play" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <path d="M5 3l14 9-14 9V3z" />
                    </svg>
                    <svg class="hero__autoplay-icon hero__autoplay-icon--pause" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <path d="M6 4h4v16H6V4zM14 4h4v16h-4V4z" />
                    </svg>
                </button>

                <!-- Swiper Container -->
                <div class="hero__swiper swiper">
                    <div class="swiper-wrapper">
                        <!-- Slide 1 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1618005182384-a83a8bd57fbe?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="추상 그라데이션 디자인" class="hero__slide-image" loading="eager">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">브랜드 아이덴티티</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">루미나 앱</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 2 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1634017839464-5c339bbe3c35?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="모던 UI 디자인" class="hero__slide-image" loading="lazy">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">웹 디자인</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">넥서스 플랫폼</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 3 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558591710-4b4a1ae0f04d?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="창의적 추상 아트" class="hero__slide-image" loading="lazy">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">모바일 앱</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">플로우 파이낸스</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 4 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1614850523459-c2f4c699c52e?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="기하학적 디자인 패턴" class="hero__slide-image" loading="lazy">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">디자인 시스템</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">버텍스 UI</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Swiper Pagination -->
                <div class="hero__swiper-pagination"></div>

                <!-- Swiper Navigation -->
                <div class="hero__swiper-nav">
                    <button class="hero__swiper-btn hero__swiper-btn--prev" aria-label="이전 슬라이드">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                    <button class="hero__swiper-btn hero__swiper-btn--next" aria-label="다음 슬라이드">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- ========== ABOUT SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="about" id="about" data-section="about">
            <!-- Section Number (Decorative) -->
            <span class="about__number" aria-hidden="true">01</span>

            <div class="about__container">
                <!-- Content Area (Left) -->
                <div class="about__content">
                    <!-- Section Header -->
                    <div class="about__header">
                        <div class="about__label">
                            <span>자기소개</span>
                        </div>
                        <h2 class="about__title">
                            <span class="about__title-line">
                                <span class="about__title-text">디자이너이자</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="about__title-line">
                                <span class="about__title-text">문제 해결자</span>
                            </span>
                        </h2>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Main Statement -->
                    <p class="about__statement">
                        저는 단순한 화면이 아닌<br>
                        <span class="about__statement-highlight">경험</span>을 디자인합니다.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Description -->
                    <p class="about__description">
                        <strong>사용자 중심 디자인</strong>을 기반으로 하고
                        <strong>인터랙티브 경험</strong>에 대한 열정을 가지고,
                        모든 프로젝트를 실제 문제를 해결할 기회로 접근합니다.
                        훌륭한 디자인은 사용자 니즈를 이해하고, 명확한 목표를 정의하며,
                        끊임없이 반복하는 과정에서 탄생한다고 믿습니다.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Keywords Grid -->
                    <div class="about__keywords">
                        <!-- Keyword 1 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">UX 리서치</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">데이터 기반 디자인 결정</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Keyword 2 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path d="M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">인터랙션</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">스토리를 전달하는 모션</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Keyword 3 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path
                                    d="M4 5a1 1 0 011-1h14a1 1 0 011 1v2a1 1 0 01-1 1H5a1 1 0 01-1-1V5zM4 13a1 1 0 011-1h6a1 1 0 011 1v6a1 1 0 01-1 1H5a1 1 0 01-1-1v-6zM16 13a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v6a1 1 0 01-1 1h-2a1 1 0 01-1-1v-6z" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">프로토타이핑</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">컨셉에서 현실로</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Keyword 4 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path d="M10 20l4-16m4 4l4 4-4 4M6 16l-4-4 4-4" />
                            </svg>
```
