```javascript
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2
                }
            });
        }

        // Cards subtle parallax (different speeds)
        this.elements.cards.forEach((card, index) => {
            gsap.to(card, {
                y: (index % 2 === 0 ? -20 : 20),
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2 + index * 0.3
                }
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create card hover and interaction animations
     */
    createCardAnimations() {
        this.elements.cards.forEach(card => {
            const image = card.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            const content = card.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const title = card.querySelector('.works__card-title');
            const cta = card.querySelector('.works__card-cta');

            // Mouse enter
            card.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1.08,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });

                gsap.to(content, {
                    y: -5,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            // Mouse leave
            card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });

                gsap.to(content, {
                    y: 0,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            // Magnetic effect on card
            card.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = (e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2) / rect.width;
                const y = (e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2) / rect.height;

                gsap.to(card, {
                    rotateY: x * 5,
                    rotateX: -y * 5,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out',
                    transformPerspective: 1000
                });
            });

            card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(card, {
                    rotateY: 0,
                    rotateX: 0,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Animate card content on slide change (called from Swiper)
     * @param {number} index - Active slide index
     */
    animateCardContent(index) {
        const activeCard = this.elements.cards[index];
        if (!activeCard) return;

        const elements = {
            category: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-category'),
            title: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-title'),
            problem: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-problem'),
            tags: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-tags'),
            cta: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-cta')
        };

        // Reset and animate content
        const tl = gsap.timeline();

        tl.fromTo([elements.category, elements.title, elements.problem, elements.tags, elements.cta],
            {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 20
            },
            {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                duration: 0.5,
                stagger: 0.08,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Destroy animations and clean up
     */
    destroy() {
        ScrollTrigger.getAll().forEach(trigger => {
            if (trigger.vars.trigger === this.section) {
                trigger.kill();
            }
        });
        this.isInitialized = false;
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksAnimation = WorksAnimation;

```

```javascript
/**
 * worksAnimation.js
 * Works Section GSAP 애니메이션
 * ScrollTrigger 기반 섹션 등장 + Swiper 연동 트랜지션
 */

class WorksAnimation {
    constructor() {
        this.section = document.querySelector('.works');
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation targets
        this.elements = {
            label: document.querySelector('.works__label'),
            titleLines: document.querySelectorAll('.works__title-text'),
            nav: document.querySelector('.works__nav'),
            cards: document.querySelectorAll('.works__card'),
            decoNumber: document.querySelector('.works__deco--number')
        };

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.animateCardContent = this.animateCardContent.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize works section animations
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.section) return;

        // Set initial states
        this.setInitialStates();

        // Create scroll-triggered animations
        this.createEntranceAnimation();
        this.createParallaxEffects();
        this.createCardAnimations();

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('💼 Works animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Set initial states for all animated elements
     */
    setInitialStates() {
        // Label
        gsap.set(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 0,
            x: -30
        });

        // Title lines
        gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 100,
            opacity: 0
        });

        // Navigation
        gsap.set(this.elements.nav, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 20
        });

        // Cards - initial state for entrance
        gsap.set(this.elements.cards, {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 60
        });

        // Decorative number
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                opacity: 0,
                x: 100
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Create main entrance animation with ScrollTrigger
     */
    createEntranceAnimation() {
        const tl = gsap.timeline({
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top 80%',
                end: 'top 20%',
                toggleActions: 'play none none none',
                once: false,
                markers: false,
                invalidateOnRefresh: true
            },
            defaults: {
                ease: 'expo.out',
                duration: 1
            }
        });

        // Phase 1: Label slides in
        tl.to(this.elements.label, {
            opacity: 1,
            x: 0,
            duration: 0.8
        }, 0);

        // Phase 2: Title lines reveal - keep visible after animation
        tl.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
            yPercent: 0,
            opacity: 1,
            duration: 1.2,
            stagger: 0.12,
            onComplete: () => {
                // Ensure titles stay visible
                gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
                    opacity: 1,
                    yPercent: 0,
                    clearProps: 'all'
                });
            }
        }, 0.2);

        // Phase 3: Navigation
        tl.to(this.elements.nav, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 0.6
        }, 0.5);

        // Phase 4: Cards stagger
        tl.to(this.elements.cards, {
            opacity: 1,
            y: 0,
            duration: 1,
            stagger: 0.15
        }, 0.6);

        // Phase 5: Decorative number
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            tl.to(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                opacity: 0.5,
                x: 0,
                duration: 1.2
            }, 0.4);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Create parallax effects on scroll
     */
    createParallaxEffects() {
        // Title parallax removed - keep titles always visible
        // Only apply parallax to decorative elements

        // Decorative number parallax
        if (this.elements.decoNumber) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.decoNumber, {
                yPercent: 20,
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2
                }
            });
        }

        // Cards subtle parallax (different speeds)
        this.elements.cards.forEach((card, index) => {
            gsap.to(card, {
                y: (index % 2 === 0 ? -20 : 20),
                ease: 'none',
                scrollTrigger: {
                    trigger: this.section,
                    start: 'top bottom',
                    end: 'bottom top',
                    scrub: 2 + index * 0.3
                }
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Create card hover and interaction animations
     */
    createCardAnimations() {
        this.elements.cards.forEach(card => {
            const image = card.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            const content = card.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const title = card.querySelector('.works__card-title');
            const cta = card.querySelector('.works__card-cta');

            // Mouse enter
            card.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1.08,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });

                gsap.to(content, {
                    y: -5,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            // Mouse leave
            card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });

                gsap.to(content, {
                    y: 0,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });

            // Magnetic effect on card
            card.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = (e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2) / rect.width;
                const y = (e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2) / rect.height;

                gsap.to(card, {
                    rotateY: x * 5,
                    rotateX: -y * 5,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out',
                    transformPerspective: 1000
                });
            });

            card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                gsap.to(card, {
                    rotateY: 0,
                    rotateX: 0,
                    duration: 0.5,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            });
        });
    }

    /**
     * Animate card content on slide change (called from Swiper)
     * @param {number} index - Active slide index
     */
    animateCardContent(index) {
        const activeCard = this.elements.cards[index];
        if (!activeCard) return;

        const elements = {
            category: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-category'),
            title: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-title'),
            problem: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-problem'),
            tags: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-tags'),
            cta: activeCard.querySelector('.works__card-cta')
        };

        // Reset and animate content
        const tl = gsap.timeline();

        tl.fromTo([elements.category, elements.title, elements.problem, elements.tags, elements.cta],
            {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 20
            },
            {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                duration: 0.5,
                stagger: 0.08,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Destroy animations and clean up
     */
    destroy() {
        ScrollTrigger.getAll().forEach(trigger => {
            if (trigger.vars.trigger === this.section) {
                trigger.kill();
            }
        });
        this.isInitialized = false;
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksAnimation = WorksAnimation;

```

Works 섹션 수정 완료. 요청 사항에 맞게 재구성했습니다.

## 변경 사항 요약

### 1. **섹션 타이틀 변경**
- "대표 작업물" → "Selected Works"
- 라벨: "주요 프로젝트" → "Portfolio"
- 서브타이틀 제거 (간결한 구성)

### 2. **프로젝트 카드 구조 변경**
- 카테고리 제거
- 프로젝트명 유지
- 한 줄 문제 정의 (영문, 이탤릭 스타일)
- 역할 태그: `UX`, `UI`, `Interaction`, `Front-end` 등
- "View Case" 버튼

### 3. **CSS 스타일 업데이트**
- `.works__card-roles` 추가 (역할 태그 스타일)
- `.works__card-role` 추가 (accent 컬러 배경)
- 문제 정의 스타일 조정 (이탤릭, 작은 폰트)

### 4. **Swiper.js GSAP 연동 강화**
- 슬라이드 전환 시 이미지/텍스트 분리 트랜지션
- 이미지: scale 애니메이션
- 콘텐츠: x축 이동 + opacity 애니메이션
- 내부 요소 stagger 애니메이션 (타이틀 → 문제 → 역할 → CTA)

### 5. **GSAP 인터랙션**
- 섹션 진입 시 타이틀 등장
- 슬라이드 변경 시 내부 요소 애니메이션
- 스크롤과 연동된 섹션 강조 효과

페이지를 새로고침하여 확인해 주세요.

---

**User**

Works 영역 리스트가 한줄에 2개씩 보이게 해주세요. 그리고 좌우버튼 기능도 적용시켜주세요

---

**Cursor**


Works 섹션을 한 줄에 2개씩 표시하고, 좌우 버튼이 동작하도록 수정 중입니다.



한 줄에 2개씩 표시되도록 설정하고, 좌우 버튼이 동작하도록 수정 중입니다.



한 줄에 2개씩 표시되도록 설정하고, 좌우 버튼이 동작하도록 수정 중입니다.


```javascript
/**
 * worksSwiper.js
 * Works Section Swiper 설정
 * GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션 + 프로그레스 인디케이터
 */

class WorksSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.works__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Elements
        this.elements = {
            prevBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--prev'),
            nextBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--next'),
            progressCurrent: document.querySelector('.works__progress-current'),
            progressTotal: document.querySelector('.works__progress-total'),
            progressFill: document.querySelector('.works__progress-fill')
        };

        // Animation reference
        this.worksAnimation = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     * @param {WorksAnimation} worksAnimation - Reference to works animation instance
     */
    init(worksAnimation = null) {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        this.worksAnimation = worksAnimation;

        try {
            this.swiper = new Swiper('.works__swiper', {
                // Core settings
                slidesPerView: 2, // 2 cards per view
                spaceBetween: 0,
                speed: 800,
                loop: false,
                centeredSlides: false,
                slidesOffsetBefore: 0,
                watchSlidesProgress: true,
                
                // Autoplay
                autoplay: {
                    delay: 5000,
                    disableOnInteraction: false,
                    pauseOnMouseEnter: true
                },

                // Grab cursor
                grabCursor: true,

                // Navigation
                navigation: {
                    prevEl: '.works__nav-btn--prev',
                    nextEl: '.works__nav-btn--next'
                },

                // Breakpoints
                breakpoints: {
                    320: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    },
                    768: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    },
                    1024: {
                        slidesPerView: 2,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    }
                },

                // Events
                on: {
                    init: () => {
                        // Delay to ensure Swiper is fully initialized
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            this.updateProgress();
                            this.setTotalSlides();
                        }, 100);
                    },
                    slideChange: () => {
                        this.onSlideChange();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionStart();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionEnd();
                    }
                }
            });

            this.isInitialized = true;
            console.log('🎠 Works Swiper initialized');
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ WorksSwiper initialization error:', error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Set total slides count
     */
    setTotalSlides() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available');
            return;
        }

        if (this.elements.progressTotal && this.swiper.slides && this.swiper.slides.length) {
            const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
            this.elements.progressTotal.textContent = String(total).padStart(2, '0');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available in onSlideChange');
            return;
        }

        this.updateProgress();
        this.animateProgressCounter();

        // Trigger card content animation if available
        if (this.worksAnimation && this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.worksAnimation.animateCardContent(this.swiper.activeIndex);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update progress indicator
     */
    updateProgress() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides || this.swiper.slides.length === 0) {
            return;
        }

        const current = (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined ? this.swiper.activeIndex : 0) + 1;
        const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
        const progress = (current / total) * 100;

        // Update current number
        if (this.elements.progressCurrent) {
            this.elements.progressCurrent.textContent = String(current).padStart(2, '0');
        }

        // Update progress bar
        if (this.elements.progressFill) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.progressFill, {
                width: `${progress}%`,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate progress counter change
     */
    animateProgressCounter() {
        if (!this.elements.progressCurrent) return;

        gsap.fromTo(this.elements.progressCurrent,
            {
                y: 20,
                opacity: 0
            },
            {
                y: 0,
                opacity: 1,
                duration: 0.4,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition start - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionStart() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const prevSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.previousIndex];

        // Animate out previous slide - separate image and content transitions
        if (prevSlide) {
            const prevContent = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const prevImage = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            
            // Animate content out
            if (prevContent) {
                gsap.to(prevContent, {
                    opacity: 0,
                    x: -30,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.in'
                });
            }
            
            // Animate image with different timing
            if (prevImage) {
                gsap.to(prevImage, {
                    scale: 1.1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.inOut'
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition end - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionEnd() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];

        if (activeSlide) {
            const content = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const image = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            const title = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-title');
            const problem = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-problem');
            const roles = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-roles');
            const cta = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-cta');

            // Reset and animate content in with stagger
            if (content) {
                gsap.fromTo(content,
                    { opacity: 0, x: 30 },
                    { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.out' }
                );
            }

            // Staggered animation for content elements
            const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.2 });
            
            if (title) {
                tl.fromTo(title,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 20 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0
                );
            }
            
            if (problem) {
                tl.fromTo(problem,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 15 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0.1
                );
            }
            
            if (roles) {
                tl.fromTo(roles,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 10 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.3, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0.2
                );
            }
            
            if (cta) {
                tl.fromTo(cta,
                    { opacity: 0, x: -10 },
                    { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.3, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0.3
                );
            }

            // Animate image
            if (image) {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        }

        // Reset all non-active slides
        if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.swiper.slides.forEach((slide, index) => {
                if (index !== this.swiper.activeIndex) {
                    const content = slide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
                    const image = slide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
                    if (content) {
                        gsap.set(content, { opacity: 1, x: 0 });
                    }
                    if (image) {
                        gsap.set(image, { scale: 1 });
                    }
                }
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideTo(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksSwiper = WorksSwiper;

```

```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    /* overflow: hidden; */
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-2);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: hidden;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
    display: flex;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 50% !important;
    height: 100%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    display: flex;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    filter: grayscale(20%);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: grayscale(0%);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4) 0%,
            transparent 50%);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    max-width: 450px;
}

/* Card Roles */
.works__card-roles {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-role {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.1);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.3);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-role {
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.2);
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 50vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 40vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: auto;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```


버튼 활성화/비활성화 상태를 처리하고, Swiper 초기화를 개선 중입니다.


```javascript
/**
 * worksSwiper.js
 * Works Section Swiper 설정
 * GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션 + 프로그레스 인디케이터
 */

class WorksSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.works__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Elements
        this.elements = {
            prevBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--prev'),
            nextBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--next'),
            progressCurrent: document.querySelector('.works__progress-current'),
            progressTotal: document.querySelector('.works__progress-total'),
            progressFill: document.querySelector('.works__progress-fill')
        };

        // Animation reference
        this.worksAnimation = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     * @param {WorksAnimation} worksAnimation - Reference to works animation instance
     */
    init(worksAnimation = null) {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        this.worksAnimation = worksAnimation;

        try {
            this.swiper = new Swiper('.works__swiper', {
                // Core settings
                slidesPerView: 2, // 2 cards per view
                spaceBetween: 0,
                speed: 800,
                loop: false,
                centeredSlides: false,
                slidesOffsetBefore: 0,
                watchSlidesProgress: true,
                
                // Autoplay
                autoplay: {
                    delay: 5000,
                    disableOnInteraction: false,
                    pauseOnMouseEnter: true
                },

                // Grab cursor
                grabCursor: true,

                // Navigation
                navigation: {
                    prevEl: '.works__nav-btn--prev',
                    nextEl: '.works__nav-btn--next'
                },

                // Breakpoints
                breakpoints: {
                    320: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    },
                    768: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    },
                    1024: {
                        slidesPerView: 2,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    }
                },

                // Events
                on: {
                    init: () => {
                        // Delay to ensure Swiper is fully initialized
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            this.updateProgress();
                            this.setTotalSlides();
                            this.updateNavButtons();
                        }, 100);
                    },
                    slideChange: () => {
                        this.onSlideChange();
                        this.updateNavButtons();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionStart();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionEnd();
                    },
                    reachBeginning: () => {
                        this.updateNavButtons();
                    },
                    reachEnd: () => {
                        this.updateNavButtons();
                    }
                }
            });

            this.isInitialized = true;
            console.log('🎠 Works Swiper initialized');
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ WorksSwiper initialization error:', error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Set total slides count
     */
    setTotalSlides() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available');
            return;
        }

        if (this.elements.progressTotal && this.swiper.slides && this.swiper.slides.length) {
            const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
            this.elements.progressTotal.textContent = String(total).padStart(2, '0');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available in onSlideChange');
            return;
        }

        this.updateProgress();
        this.animateProgressCounter();

        // Trigger card content animation if available
        if (this.worksAnimation && this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.worksAnimation.animateCardContent(this.swiper.activeIndex);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update progress indicator
     */
    updateProgress() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides || this.swiper.slides.length === 0) {
            return;
        }

        const current = (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined ? this.swiper.activeIndex : 0) + 1;
        const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
        const progress = (current / total) * 100;

        // Update current number
        if (this.elements.progressCurrent) {
            this.elements.progressCurrent.textContent = String(current).padStart(2, '0');
        }

        // Update progress bar
        if (this.elements.progressFill) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.progressFill, {
                width: `${progress}%`,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate progress counter change
     */
    animateProgressCounter() {
        if (!this.elements.progressCurrent) return;

        gsap.fromTo(this.elements.progressCurrent,
            {
                y: 20,
                opacity: 0
            },
            {
                y: 0,
                opacity: 1,
                duration: 0.4,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition start - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionStart() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const prevSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.previousIndex];

        // Animate out previous slide - separate image and content transitions
        if (prevSlide) {
            const prevContent = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const prevImage = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            
            // Animate content out
            if (prevContent) {
                gsap.to(prevContent, {
                    opacity: 0,
                    x: -30,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.in'
                });
            }
            
            // Animate image with different timing
            if (prevImage) {
                gsap.to(prevImage, {
                    scale: 1.1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.inOut'
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition end - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionEnd() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];

        if (activeSlide) {
            const content = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const image = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            const title = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-title');
            const problem = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-problem');
            const roles = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-roles');
            const cta = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-cta');

            // Reset and animate content in with stagger
            if (content) {
                gsap.fromTo(content,
                    { opacity: 0, x: 30 },
                    { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.out' }
                );
            }

            // Staggered animation for content elements
            const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.2 });
            
            if (title) {
                tl.fromTo(title,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 20 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0
                );
            }
            
            if (problem) {
                tl.fromTo(problem,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 15 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0.1
                );
            }
            
            if (roles) {
                tl.fromTo(roles,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 10 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.3, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0.2
                );
            }
            
            if (cta) {
                tl.fromTo(cta,
                    { opacity: 0, x: -10 },
                    { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.3, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0.3
                );
            }

            // Animate image
            if (image) {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        }

        // Reset all non-active slides
        if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.swiper.slides.forEach((slide, index) => {
                if (index !== this.swiper.activeIndex) {
                    const content = slide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
                    const image = slide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
                    if (content) {
                        gsap.set(content, { opacity: 1, x: 0 });
                    }
                    if (image) {
                        gsap.set(image, { scale: 1 });
                    }
                }
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideTo(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksSwiper = WorksSwiper;

```


버튼 상태 업데이트 메서드 추가 중입니다.


```javascript
/**
 * worksSwiper.js
 * Works Section Swiper 설정
 * GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션 + 프로그레스 인디케이터
 */

class WorksSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.works__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Elements
        this.elements = {
            prevBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--prev'),
            nextBtn: document.querySelector('.works__nav-btn--next'),
            progressCurrent: document.querySelector('.works__progress-current'),
            progressTotal: document.querySelector('.works__progress-total'),
            progressFill: document.querySelector('.works__progress-fill')
        };

        // Animation reference
        this.worksAnimation = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     * @param {WorksAnimation} worksAnimation - Reference to works animation instance
     */
    init(worksAnimation = null) {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        this.worksAnimation = worksAnimation;

        try {
            this.swiper = new Swiper('.works__swiper', {
                // Core settings
                slidesPerView: 2, // 2 cards per view
                spaceBetween: 0,
                speed: 800,
                loop: false,
                centeredSlides: false,
                slidesOffsetBefore: 0,
                watchSlidesProgress: true,
                
                // Autoplay
                autoplay: {
                    delay: 5000,
                    disableOnInteraction: false,
                    pauseOnMouseEnter: true
                },

                // Grab cursor
                grabCursor: true,

                // Navigation
                navigation: {
                    prevEl: '.works__nav-btn--prev',
                    nextEl: '.works__nav-btn--next'
                },

                // Breakpoints
                breakpoints: {
                    320: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    },
                    768: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    },
                    1024: {
                        slidesPerView: 2,
                        spaceBetween: 0
                    }
                },

                // Events
                on: {
                    init: () => {
                        // Delay to ensure Swiper is fully initialized
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            this.updateProgress();
                            this.setTotalSlides();
                            this.updateNavButtons();
                        }, 100);
                    },
                    slideChange: () => {
                        this.onSlideChange();
                        this.updateNavButtons();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionStart();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionEnd();
                    },
                    reachBeginning: () => {
                        this.updateNavButtons();
                    },
                    reachEnd: () => {
                        this.updateNavButtons();
                    }
                }
            });

            this.isInitialized = true;
            console.log('🎠 Works Swiper initialized');
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ WorksSwiper initialization error:', error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Set total slides count
     */
    setTotalSlides() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available');
            return;
        }

        if (this.elements.progressTotal && this.swiper.slides && this.swiper.slides.length) {
            const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
            this.elements.progressTotal.textContent = String(total).padStart(2, '0');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available in onSlideChange');
            return;
        }

        this.updateProgress();
        this.animateProgressCounter();

        // Trigger card content animation if available
        if (this.worksAnimation && this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.worksAnimation.animateCardContent(this.swiper.activeIndex);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update progress indicator
     */
    updateProgress() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides || this.swiper.slides.length === 0) {
            return;
        }

        const current = (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined ? this.swiper.activeIndex : 0) + 1;
        const total = this.swiper.slides.length;
        const progress = (current / total) * 100;

        // Update current number
        if (this.elements.progressCurrent) {
            this.elements.progressCurrent.textContent = String(current).padStart(2, '0');
        }

        // Update progress bar
        if (this.elements.progressFill) {
            gsap.to(this.elements.progressFill, {
                width: `${progress}%`,
                duration: 0.5,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate progress counter change
     */
    animateProgressCounter() {
        if (!this.elements.progressCurrent) return;

        gsap.fromTo(this.elements.progressCurrent,
            {
                y: 20,
                opacity: 0
            },
            {
                y: 0,
                opacity: 1,
                duration: 0.4,
                ease: 'power2.out'
            }
        );
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition start - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionStart() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const prevSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.previousIndex];

        // Animate out previous slide - separate image and content transitions
        if (prevSlide) {
            const prevContent = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const prevImage = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            
            // Animate content out
            if (prevContent) {
                gsap.to(prevContent, {
                    opacity: 0,
                    x: -30,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.in'
                });
            }
            
            // Animate image with different timing
            if (prevImage) {
                gsap.to(prevImage, {
                    scale: 1.1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.inOut'
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition end - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionEnd() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];

        if (activeSlide) {
            const content = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const image = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            const title = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-title');
            const problem = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-problem');
            const roles = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-roles');
            const cta = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-cta');

            // Reset and animate content in with stagger
            if (content) {
                gsap.fromTo(content,
                    { opacity: 0, x: 30 },
                    { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.out' }
                );
            }

            // Staggered animation for content elements
            const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.2 });
            
            if (title) {
                tl.fromTo(title,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 20 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0
                );
            }
            
            if (problem) {
                tl.fromTo(problem,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 15 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0.1
                );
            }
            
            if (roles) {
                tl.fromTo(roles,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 10 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.3, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0.2
                );
            }
            
            if (cta) {
                tl.fromTo(cta,
                    { opacity: 0, x: -10 },
                    { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.3, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0.3
                );
            }

            // Animate image
            if (image) {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        }

        // Reset all non-active slides
        if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.swiper.slides.forEach((slide, index) => {
                if (index !== this.swiper.activeIndex) {
                    const content = slide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
                    const image = slide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
                    if (content) {
                        gsap.set(content, { opacity: 1, x: 0 });
                    }
                    if (image) {
                        gsap.set(image, { scale: 1 });
                    }
                }
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update navigation buttons state
     */
    updateNavButtons() {
        if (!this.swiper) return;

        const isBeginning = this.swiper.isBeginning;
        const isEnd = this.swiper.isEnd;

        // Update prev button
        if (this.elements.prevBtn) {
            if (isBeginning) {
                this.elements.prevBtn.classList.add('swiper-button-disabled');
                this.elements.prevBtn.disabled = true;
            } else {
                this.elements.prevBtn.classList.remove('swiper-button-disabled');
                this.elements.prevBtn.disabled = false;
            }
        }

        // Update next button
        if (this.elements.nextBtn) {
            if (isEnd) {
                this.elements.nextBtn.classList.add('swiper-button-disabled');
                this.elements.nextBtn.disabled = true;
            } else {
                this.elements.nextBtn.classList.remove('swiper-button-disabled');
                this.elements.nextBtn.disabled = false;
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideTo(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksSwiper = WorksSwiper;

```


버튼 스타일을 조정하고, Swiper가 2개씩 표시되도록 설정을 확인 중입니다.


```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    /* overflow: hidden; */
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-2);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled,
.works__nav-btn.swiper-button-disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: hidden;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
    display: flex;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 50% !important;
    height: 100%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    display: flex;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    filter: grayscale(20%);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: grayscale(0%);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4) 0%,
            transparent 50%);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    max-width: 450px;
}

/* Card Roles */
.works__card-roles {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-role {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.1);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.3);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-role {
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.2);
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 50vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 40vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__nav-btn {
        width: 48px;
        height: 48px;
    }

    .works__progress-bar {
        width: 60px;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-16) 0;
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: auto;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card-tags {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__nav-btn,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```


Swiper 설정을 확인하고, 슬라이드가 2개씩 표시되도록 조정 중입니다.


```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
    /* overflow: hidden; */
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.works__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    margin-top: var(--space-2);
    max-width: 500px;
}

/* Navigation Controls */
.works__nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

.works__nav-btn {
    width: 56px;
    height: 56px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: transparent;
}

.works__nav-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.works__nav-btn:disabled,
.works__nav-btn.swiper-button-disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__nav-btn svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
}

/* Progress Indicator */
.works__progress {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
}

.works__progress-bar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__progress-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    width: 25%;
    transition: width var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: hidden;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
    display: flex;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    display: flex;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    filter: grayscale(20%);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: grayscale(0%);
}

/* Card Image Overlay */
.works__card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,
            rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4) 0%,
            transparent 50%);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-overlay {
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Card Number */
.works__card-number {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-light);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    padding: var(--space-16) var(--space-12);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    max-width: 450px;
}

/* Card Roles */
.works__card-roles {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-role {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.1);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.3);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-role {
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.2);
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.works__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.works__deco--number {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 20rem;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-gray-900);
    line-height: 1;
    bottom: -5%;
    right: 5%;
    z-index: 0;
    user-select: none;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Large Desktop */
@media (max-width: 1400px) {
    .works__slide {
        width: 500px;
    }

}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: 50vh 1fr;
    }

    .works__card-content {
        padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-8);
    }

    .works__nav {
        align-self: flex-start;
    }

    .works__deco--number {
        font-size: 12rem;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
    }

    .works__slide {
        width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card {
```
