```css
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 24px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.hero__label-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.2); }
}

/* Main Title */
.hero__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(3.6rem, 8vw, 9.6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.hero__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.hero__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.1em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.15em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Subtitle */
.hero__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 480px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.hero__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* CTA Area */
.hero__cta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__cta-btn::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover .hero__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* Scroll Indicator */
.hero__scroll {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__scroll:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.hero__scroll-line {
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-600);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__scroll-line::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    animation: scrollLine 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes scrollLine {
    0% { transform: translateX(-100%); }
    50% { transform: translateX(0%); }
    100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
}

/* ===== Hero Visual Area (Right) ===== */
.hero__visual {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Swiper Container */
.hero__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    height: 60vh;
    max-height: 500px;
}

.hero__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: center;
}

.hero__slide {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__slide-inner {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 450px;
    aspect-ratio: 4/5;
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transform: scale(0.85);
    opacity: 0.4;
    transition: all var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-inner {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    display: block;
}

.hero__slide-inner:hover .hero__slide-image {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Slide Overlay */
.hero__slide-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        transparent 0%,
        transparent 40%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.7) 70%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.95) 100%
    );
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
    z-index: 2;
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
    display: block;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 3;
}

.hero__slide-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    display: block;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 3;
}

/* Swiper Navigation */
.hero__swiper-nav {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-btn {
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.hero__swiper-btn svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
}

/* Swiper Pagination */
.hero__swiper-pagination {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet {
    width: 24px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 0;
    opacity: 1;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet-active {
    width: 48px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Progress Counter */
.hero__progress {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    z-index: 10;
}

/* Autoplay Control Button */
.hero__autoplay-btn {
    position: fixed;
    top: calc(var(--space-8) + 80px);
    right: calc(var(--space-8) + 100px);
    z-index: 1001;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    color: var(--color-light);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    position: absolute;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth),
                transform var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

.hero__progress-current {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.hero__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.hero__deco--grid {
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        linear-gradient(var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    opacity: 0.3;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--circle {
    width: 400px;
    height: 400px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--line {
    width: 1px;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
    left: 50%;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* Floating Keywords */
.hero__keywords {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__keyword {
    position: absolute;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-700);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__keyword:nth-child(1) { top: 15%; left: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(2) { top: 25%; right: 15%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(3) { bottom: 30%; left: 5%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(4) { bottom: 20%; right: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(5) { top: 60%; left: 15%; }

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .hero {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
        min-height: auto;
    }

    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding) var(--space-12);
        text-align: center;
    }

    .hero__label {
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    .hero__cta {
        justify-content: center;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 60vh;
    }

    .hero__swiper {
        height: 100%;
        max-height: none;
    }

    .hero__deco--grid {
        width: 100%;
        opacity: 0.15;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding) var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__label {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__title {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 50vh;
        min-height: 400px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 280px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-nav {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__swiper-btn {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-pagination {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        left: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__progress {
        top: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__autoplay-btn {
        top: calc(var(--space-4) + 60px);
        right: calc(var(--space-4) + 80px);
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__autoplay-icon {
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
    }

    .hero__keywords {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding) var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 45vh;
        min-height: 350px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 240px;
    }

    .hero__slide-overlay {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__slide-title {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .hero__label-dot,
    .hero__scroll-line::after {
        animation: none;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner,
    .hero__cta-btn,
    .hero__swiper-btn {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```css
/**
 * hero.css
 * Hero Section 전용 스타일
 * GSAP 애니메이션 및 Swiper 통합 스타일
 */

/* ===== Hero Section Layout ===== */
.hero {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-dark);
}

.hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.05) 0%, transparent 50%);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* ===== Hero Content Area (Left) ===== */
.hero__content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-8);
    padding-left: calc(var(--container-padding) + 3vw);
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* Label / Eyebrow */
.hero__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 24px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.hero__label-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.2); }
}

/* Main Title */
.hero__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(3.6rem, 8vw, 9.6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.hero__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.hero__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.1em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.15em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Subtitle */
.hero__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 480px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.hero__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* CTA Area */
.hero__cta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__cta-btn::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover .hero__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* Scroll Indicator */
.hero__scroll {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__scroll:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.hero__scroll-line {
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-600);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__scroll-line::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    animation: scrollLine 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes scrollLine {
    0% { transform: translateX(-100%); }
    50% { transform: translateX(0%); }
    100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
}

/* ===== Hero Visual Area (Right) ===== */
.hero__visual {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Swiper Container */
.hero__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    height: 60vh;
    max-height: 500px;
}

.hero__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: center;
}

.hero__slide {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__slide-inner {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 450px;
    aspect-ratio: 4/5;
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transform: scale(0.85);
    opacity: 0.4;
    transition: all var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-inner {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    display: block;
}

.hero__slide-inner:hover .hero__slide-image {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Slide Overlay */
.hero__slide-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        transparent 0%,
        transparent 40%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.7) 70%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.95) 100%
    );
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
    z-index: 2;
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
    display: block;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 3;
}

.hero__slide-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    display: block;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 3;
}

/* Swiper Navigation */
.hero__swiper-nav {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-btn {
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.hero__swiper-btn svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
}

/* Swiper Pagination */
.hero__swiper-pagination {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet {
    width: 24px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 0;
    opacity: 1;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet-active {
    width: 48px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Progress Counter */
.hero__progress {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    z-index: 10;
}

/* Autoplay Control Button */
.hero__autoplay-btn {
    position: fixed;
    top: calc(var(--space-8) + 80px);
    right: calc(var(--space-8) + 100px);
    z-index: 1001;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    color: var(--color-light);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    position: absolute;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth),
                transform var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

.hero__progress-current {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.hero__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.hero__deco--grid {
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        linear-gradient(var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    opacity: 0.3;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--circle {
    width: 400px;
    height: 400px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--line {
    width: 1px;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
    left: 50%;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* Floating Keywords */
.hero__keywords {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__keyword {
    position: absolute;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-700);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__keyword:nth-child(1) { top: 15%; left: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(2) { top: 25%; right: 15%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(3) { bottom: 30%; left: 5%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(4) { bottom: 20%; right: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(5) { top: 60%; left: 15%; }

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .hero {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
        min-height: auto;
    }

    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding) var(--space-12);
        text-align: center;
    }

    .hero__label {
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    .hero__cta {
        justify-content: center;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 60vh;
    }

    .hero__swiper {
        height: 100%;
        max-height: none;
    }

    .hero__deco--grid {
        width: 100%;
        opacity: 0.15;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding) var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__label {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__title {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 50vh;
        min-height: 400px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 280px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-nav {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__swiper-btn {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-pagination {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        left: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__progress {
        top: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__autoplay-btn {
        top: calc(var(--space-4) + 60px);
        right: calc(var(--space-4) + 80px);
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__autoplay-icon {
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
    }

    .hero__keywords {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding) var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 45vh;
        min-height: 350px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 240px;
    }

    .hero__slide-overlay {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__slide-title {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .hero__label-dot,
    .hero__scroll-line::after {
        animation: none;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner,
    .hero__cta-btn,
    .hero__swiper-btn {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```


히어로 슬라이드의 카테고리와 타이틀 표시 문제와 이미지 잘림을 수정했습니다.

## 수정 사항

### 1. **Overlay 표시 개선**
- `opacity: 0` → `opacity: 1`로 변경 (항상 표시)
- 그라데이션 조정 (더 명확한 텍스트 가독성)
- `z-index: 2` 추가

### 2. **이미지 잘림 방지**
- `object-position: center` 추가
- `display: block` 추가
- `.hero__slide-inner`에 배경색 추가

### 3. **카테고리와 타이틀 표시 개선**
- 카테고리와 타이틀에 `z-index: 3` 추가
- 카테고리와 타이틀 순서를 HTML과 일치 (카테고리가 먼저)
- `display: block` 추가로 확실히 표시

### 4. **텍스트 가독성 향상**
- 그라데이션 조정으로 하단 텍스트 가독성 개선
- 카테고리와 타이틀에 적절한 마진 적용

이제 히어로 슬라이드에서 카테고리와 타이틀이 표시되고, 이미지가 잘리지 않습니다. 페이지를 새로고침하여 확인해 주세요.

---

**User**

여전히 ㄸ짤려보여요

---

**Cursor**


이미지 잘림 문제를 해결하기 위해 관련 CSS를 확인하고 수정 중입니다.



이미지 잘림 문제를 해결하기 위해 `object-fit`과 컨테이너 설정을 조정 중입니다.


```css
/**
 * hero.css
 * Hero Section 전용 스타일
 * GSAP 애니메이션 및 Swiper 통합 스타일
 */

/* ===== Hero Section Layout ===== */
.hero {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-dark);
}

.hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.05) 0%, transparent 50%);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* ===== Hero Content Area (Left) ===== */
.hero__content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-8);
    padding-left: calc(var(--container-padding) + 3vw);
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* Label / Eyebrow */
.hero__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 24px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.hero__label-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.2); }
}

/* Main Title */
.hero__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(3.6rem, 8vw, 9.6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.hero__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.hero__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.1em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.15em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Subtitle */
.hero__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 480px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.hero__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* CTA Area */
.hero__cta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__cta-btn::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover .hero__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* Scroll Indicator */
.hero__scroll {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__scroll:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.hero__scroll-line {
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-600);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__scroll-line::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    animation: scrollLine 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes scrollLine {
    0% { transform: translateX(-100%); }
    50% { transform: translateX(0%); }
    100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
}

/* ===== Hero Visual Area (Right) ===== */
.hero__visual {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Swiper Container */
.hero__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    height: 60vh;
    max-height: 500px;
}

.hero__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: center;
}

.hero__slide {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__slide-inner {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 450px;
    height: 100%;
    min-height: 400px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transform: scale(0.85);
    opacity: 0.4;
    transition: all var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-inner {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    display: block;
}

.hero__slide-inner:hover .hero__slide-image {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Slide Overlay */
.hero__slide-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        transparent 0%,
        transparent 40%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.7) 70%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.95) 100%
    );
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
    z-index: 2;
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
    display: block;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 3;
}

.hero__slide-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    display: block;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 3;
}

/* Swiper Navigation */
.hero__swiper-nav {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-btn {
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.hero__swiper-btn svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
}

/* Swiper Pagination */
.hero__swiper-pagination {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet {
    width: 24px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 0;
    opacity: 1;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet-active {
    width: 48px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Progress Counter */
.hero__progress {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    z-index: 10;
}

/* Autoplay Control Button */
.hero__autoplay-btn {
    position: fixed;
    top: calc(var(--space-8) + 80px);
    right: calc(var(--space-8) + 100px);
    z-index: 1001;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    color: var(--color-light);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    position: absolute;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth),
                transform var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

.hero__progress-current {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.hero__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.hero__deco--grid {
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        linear-gradient(var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    opacity: 0.3;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--circle {
    width: 400px;
    height: 400px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--line {
    width: 1px;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
    left: 50%;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* Floating Keywords */
.hero__keywords {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__keyword {
    position: absolute;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-700);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__keyword:nth-child(1) { top: 15%; left: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(2) { top: 25%; right: 15%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(3) { bottom: 30%; left: 5%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(4) { bottom: 20%; right: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(5) { top: 60%; left: 15%; }

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .hero {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
        min-height: auto;
    }

    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding) var(--space-12);
        text-align: center;
    }

    .hero__label {
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    .hero__cta {
        justify-content: center;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 60vh;
    }

    .hero__swiper {
        height: 100%;
        max-height: none;
    }

    .hero__deco--grid {
        width: 100%;
        opacity: 0.15;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding) var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__label {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__title {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 50vh;
        min-height: 400px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 280px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-nav {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__swiper-btn {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-pagination {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        left: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__progress {
        top: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__autoplay-btn {
        top: calc(var(--space-4) + 60px);
        right: calc(var(--space-4) + 80px);
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__autoplay-icon {
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
    }

    .hero__keywords {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding) var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 45vh;
        min-height: 350px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 240px;
    }

    .hero__slide-overlay {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__slide-title {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .hero__label-dot,
    .hero__scroll-line::after {
        animation: none;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner,
    .hero__cta-btn,
    .hero__swiper-btn {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```css
/**
 * hero.css
 * Hero Section 전용 스타일
 * GSAP 애니메이션 및 Swiper 통합 스타일
 */

/* ===== Hero Section Layout ===== */
.hero {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-dark);
}

.hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.05) 0%, transparent 50%);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* ===== Hero Content Area (Left) ===== */
.hero__content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-8);
    padding-left: calc(var(--container-padding) + 3vw);
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* Label / Eyebrow */
.hero__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 24px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.hero__label-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.2); }
}

/* Main Title */
.hero__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(3.6rem, 8vw, 9.6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.hero__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.hero__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.1em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.15em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Subtitle */
.hero__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 480px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.hero__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* CTA Area */
.hero__cta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__cta-btn::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover .hero__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* Scroll Indicator */
.hero__scroll {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__scroll:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.hero__scroll-line {
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-600);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__scroll-line::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    animation: scrollLine 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes scrollLine {
    0% { transform: translateX(-100%); }
    50% { transform: translateX(0%); }
    100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
}

/* ===== Hero Visual Area (Right) ===== */
.hero__visual {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Swiper Container */
.hero__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    height: 60vh;
    max-height: 500px;
}

.hero__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: center;
}

.hero__slide {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__slide-inner {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 450px;
    height: 100%;
    min-height: 400px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transform: scale(0.85);
    opacity: 0.4;
    transition: all var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-inner {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    object-position: center;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    display: block;
}

.hero__slide-inner:hover .hero__slide-image {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Slide Overlay */
.hero__slide-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        transparent 0%,
        transparent 40%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.7) 70%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.95) 100%
    );
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
    z-index: 2;
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
    display: block;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 3;
}

.hero__slide-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    display: block;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 3;
}

/* Swiper Navigation */
.hero__swiper-nav {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-btn {
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.hero__swiper-btn svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
}

/* Swiper Pagination */
.hero__swiper-pagination {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet {
    width: 24px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 0;
    opacity: 1;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet-active {
    width: 48px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Progress Counter */
.hero__progress {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    z-index: 10;
}

/* Autoplay Control Button */
.hero__autoplay-btn {
    position: fixed;
    top: calc(var(--space-8) + 80px);
    right: calc(var(--space-8) + 100px);
    z-index: 1001;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    color: var(--color-light);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    position: absolute;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth),
                transform var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

.hero__progress-current {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.hero__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.hero__deco--grid {
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        linear-gradient(var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    opacity: 0.3;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--circle {
    width: 400px;
    height: 400px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--line {
    width: 1px;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
    left: 50%;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* Floating Keywords */
.hero__keywords {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__keyword {
    position: absolute;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-700);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__keyword:nth-child(1) { top: 15%; left: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(2) { top: 25%; right: 15%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(3) { bottom: 30%; left: 5%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(4) { bottom: 20%; right: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(5) { top: 60%; left: 15%; }

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .hero {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
        min-height: auto;
    }

    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding) var(--space-12);
        text-align: center;
    }

    .hero__label {
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    .hero__cta {
        justify-content: center;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 60vh;
    }

    .hero__swiper {
        height: 100%;
        max-height: none;
    }

    .hero__deco--grid {
        width: 100%;
        opacity: 0.15;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding) var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__label {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__title {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 50vh;
        min-height: 400px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 280px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-nav {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__swiper-btn {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-pagination {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        left: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__progress {
        top: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__autoplay-btn {
        top: calc(var(--space-4) + 60px);
        right: calc(var(--space-4) + 80px);
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__autoplay-icon {
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
    }

    .hero__keywords {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding) var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 45vh;
        min-height: 350px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 240px;
    }

    .hero__slide-overlay {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__slide-title {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .hero__label-dot,
    .hero__scroll-line::after {
        animation: none;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner,
    .hero__cta-btn,
    .hero__swiper-btn {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```

```css
/* Swiper Container */
.hero__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    height: 70vh;
    max-height: 600px;
    min-height: 450px;

```

```css
/**
 * hero.css
 * Hero Section 전용 스타일
 * GSAP 애니메이션 및 Swiper 통합 스타일
 */

/* ===== Hero Section Layout ===== */
.hero {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--color-dark);
}

.hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: 
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%, rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.05) 0%, transparent 50%);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* ===== Hero Content Area (Left) ===== */
.hero__content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    padding: var(--space-8) var(--space-8);
    padding-left: calc(var(--container-padding) + 3vw);
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* Label / Eyebrow */
.hero__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 24px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.hero__label-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.2); }
}

/* Main Title */
.hero__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(3.6rem, 8vw, 9.6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

.hero__title-line {
    display: block;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    /* Ensure title is always visible */
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

.hero__title-highlight {
    color: var(--color-primary);
    position: relative;
}

.hero__title-highlight::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0.1em;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 0.15em;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Subtitle */
.hero__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-light);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    max-width: 480px;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.hero__subtitle strong {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
}

/* CTA Area */
.hero__cta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-primary);
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__cta-btn::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: left var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    z-index: -1;
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover {
    color: var(--color-dark);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-accent);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover::before {
    left: 0;
}

.hero__cta-btn-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__cta-btn:hover .hero__cta-btn-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* Scroll Indicator */
.hero__scroll {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__scroll:hover {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.hero__scroll-line {
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-gray-600);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hero__scroll-line::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    animation: scrollLine 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes scrollLine {
    0% { transform: translateX(-100%); }
    50% { transform: translateX(0%); }
    100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
}

/* ===== Hero Visual Area (Right) ===== */
.hero__visual {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    z-index: 1;
}

/* Swiper Container */
.hero__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    height: 70vh;
    max-height: 600px;
    min-height: 450px;
}

.hero__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: center;
}

.hero__slide {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
}

.hero__slide-inner {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 450px;
    height: 100%;
    min-height: 400px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    overflow: hidden;
    transform: scale(0.85);
    opacity: 0.4;
    transition: all var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out-expo);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-inner {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    object-position: center;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
    display: block;
}

.hero__slide-inner:hover .hero__slide-image {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Slide Overlay */
.hero__slide-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
        180deg,
        transparent 0%,
        transparent 40%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.7) 70%,
        rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.95) 100%
    );
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-smooth);
    z-index: 2;
}

.swiper-slide-active .hero__slide-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

.hero__slide-category {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
    display: block;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 3;
}

.hero__slide-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    display: block;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 3;
}

/* Swiper Navigation */
.hero__swiper-nav {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-4);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-btn {
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--color-light);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.hero__swiper-btn svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
}

/* Swiper Pagination */
.hero__swiper-pagination {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: var(--space-8);
    left: var(--space-8);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    z-index: 10;
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet {
    width: 24px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 0;
    opacity: 1;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.hero__swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet-active {
    width: 48px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Progress Counter */
.hero__progress {
    position: absolute;
    top: var(--space-8);
    right: var(--space-8);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    z-index: 10;
}

/* Autoplay Control Button */
.hero__autoplay-btn {
    position: fixed;
    top: calc(var(--space-8) + 80px);
    right: calc(var(--space-8) + 100px);
    z-index: 1001;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-700);
    border-radius: 50%;
    color: var(--color-light);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    transform: scale(1.1);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    position: absolute;
    transition: opacity var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth),
                transform var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

.hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--play {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
}

.hero__autoplay-btn.is-paused .hero__autoplay-icon--pause {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
}

.hero__progress-current {
    color: var(--color-light);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
}

/* ===== Decorative Elements ===== */
.hero__deco {
    position: absolute;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.hero__deco--grid {
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 50%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        linear-gradient(var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, var(--color-gray-900) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    opacity: 0.3;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--circle {
    width: 400px;
    height: 400px;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__deco--line {
    width: 1px;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
    left: 50%;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 0;
}

/* Floating Keywords */
.hero__keywords {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
}

.hero__keyword {
    position: absolute;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-700);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wider);
    opacity: 0;
}

.hero__keyword:nth-child(1) { top: 15%; left: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(2) { top: 25%; right: 15%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(3) { bottom: 30%; left: 5%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(4) { bottom: 20%; right: 10%; }
.hero__keyword:nth-child(5) { top: 60%; left: 15%; }

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .hero {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
        min-height: auto;
    }

    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-24) var(--container-padding) var(--space-12);
        text-align: center;
    }

    .hero__label {
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    .hero__cta {
        justify-content: center;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 60vh;
    }

    .hero__swiper {
        height: 100%;
        max-height: none;
    }

    .hero__deco--grid {
        width: 100%;
        opacity: 0.15;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-20) var(--container-padding) var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__label {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__title {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__subtitle {
        font-size: var(--text-base);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero__cta {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 50vh;
        min-height: 400px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 280px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-nav {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__swiper-btn {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__swiper-pagination {
        bottom: var(--space-4);
        left: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__progress {
        top: var(--space-4);
        right: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__autoplay-btn {
        top: calc(var(--space-4) + 60px);
        right: calc(var(--space-4) + 80px);
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
    }

    .hero__autoplay-icon {
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
    }

    .hero__keywords {
        display: none;
    }
}

/* Small Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .hero__content {
        padding: var(--space-16) var(--container-padding) var(--space-6);
    }

    .hero__cta-btn {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .hero__visual {
        height: 45vh;
        min-height: 350px;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner {
        max-width: 240px;
    }

    .hero__slide-overlay {
        padding: var(--space-4);
    }

    .hero__slide-title {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .hero__label-dot,
    .hero__scroll-line::after {
        animation: none;
    }

    .hero__slide-inner,
    .hero__cta-btn,
    .hero__swiper-btn {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```


이미지 잘림 문제를 해결했습니다.

## 수정 사항

### 1. **이미지 표시 방식 변경**
- `object-fit: cover` → `object-fit: contain`으로 변경
- 이미지 전체가 보이도록 조정

### 2. **슬라이드 컨테이너 크기 조정**
- `aspect-ratio: 4/5` 제거
- `height: 100%`와 `min-height: 400px` 사용
- `display: flex`와 `align-items: center`로 중앙 정렬

### 3. **Swiper 컨테이너 높이 증가**
- `height: 60vh` → `height: 70vh`
- `max-height: 500px` → `max-height: 600px`
- `min-height: 450px` 추가

이제 이미지가 잘리지 않고 전체가 표시됩니다. 페이지를 새로고침하여 확인해 주세요.

만약 이미지 주변에 빈 공간이 생기는 것이 문제라면, `object-fit: cover`로 되돌리고 컨테이너 비율을 조정할 수 있습니다. 원하시는 방향을 알려주세요.

---

**User**

영역을 추가하려고 합니다. [2. Works Section]
--------------------------------------------------
[목표]
이 디자이너가
“실제로 어떤 문제를 어떻게 해결했는지”를 보여줍니다.

[레이아웃]
- 풀 와이드 섹션
- 중앙 Swiper 기반 포트폴리오 슬라이드

[콘텐츠 구성]
- 섹션 타이틀: Selected Works
- 각 프로젝트 카드 구성:
  - 프로젝트명
  - 한 줄 문제 정의
  - 사용한 역할 (UX / UI / Interaction / Front-end)
  - View Case 버튼

[Swiper.js 활용]
- 세로 슬라이드
- 마우스 드래그 가능
- 자동 재생 + 인터랙션 시 정지
- 슬라이드 전환 시 GSAP 연동 애니메이션
  (텍스트, 이미지 분리 트랜지션)

[GSAP 인터랙션]
- 섹션 진입 시 타이틀 등장
- 슬라이드 변경 시 내부 요소 애니메이션
- 스크롤과 연동된 섹션 강조 효과

---

**Cursor**


Works 섹션을 세로 슬라이드로 추가 중입니다.



Works 섹션을 세로 슬라이드로 추가 중입니다.


```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + 세로 Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    max-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: hidden;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: center;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 800px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: var(--space-12);
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-12);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/10;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Roles */
.works__card-roles {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-role {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.1);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.3);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-role {
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.2);
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
```
