```html
                </button>

                <!-- Swiper Container -->
                <div class="hero__swiper swiper">
                    <div class="swiper-wrapper">
                        <!-- Slide 1 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1618005182384-a83a8bd57fbe?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="추상 그라데이션 디자인" class="hero__slide-image" loading="eager">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">브랜드 아이덴티티</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">루미나 앱</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 2 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1634017839464-5c339bbe3c35?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="모던 UI 디자인" class="hero__slide-image" loading="lazy">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">웹 디자인</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">넥서스 플랫폼</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 3 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558591710-4b4a1ae0f04d?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="창의적 추상 아트" class="hero__slide-image" loading="lazy">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">모바일 앱</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">플로우 파이낸스</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 4 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1614850523459-c2f4c699c52e?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="기하학적 디자인 패턴" class="hero__slide-image" loading="lazy">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">디자인 시스템</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">버텍스 UI</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Swiper Pagination -->
                <div class="hero__swiper-pagination"></div>

                <!-- Swiper Navigation -->
                <div class="hero__swiper-nav">
                    <button class="hero__swiper-btn hero__swiper-btn--prev" aria-label="이전 슬라이드">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                    <button class="hero__swiper-btn hero__swiper-btn--next" aria-label="다음 슬라이드">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- ========== ABOUT SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="about" id="about" data-section="about">
            <!-- Section Number (Decorative) -->
            <span class="about__number" aria-hidden="true">01</span>

            <div class="about__container">
                <!-- Content Area (Left) -->
                <div class="about__content">
                    <!-- Section Header -->
                    <div class="about__header">
                        <div class="about__label">
                            <span>자기소개</span>
                        </div>
                        <h2 class="about__title">
                            <span class="about__title-line">
                                <span class="about__title-text">디자이너이자</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="about__title-line">
                                <span class="about__title-text">문제 해결자</span>
                            </span>
                        </h2>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Main Statement -->
                    <p class="about__statement">
                        저는 단순한 화면이 아닌<br>
                        <span class="about__statement-highlight">경험</span>을 디자인합니다.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Description -->
                    <p class="about__description">
                        <strong>사용자 중심 디자인</strong>을 기반으로 하고
                        <strong>인터랙티브 경험</strong>에 대한 열정을 가지고,
                        모든 프로젝트를 실제 문제를 해결할 기회로 접근합니다.
                        훌륭한 디자인은 사용자 니즈를 이해하고, 명확한 목표를 정의하며,
                        끊임없이 반복하는 과정에서 탄생한다고 믿습니다.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Keywords Grid -->
                    <div class="about__keywords">
                        <!-- Keyword 1 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">UX 리서치</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">데이터 기반 디자인 결정</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Keyword 2 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path d="M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">인터랙션</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">스토리를 전달하는 모션</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Keyword 3 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path
                                    d="M4 5a1 1 0 011-1h14a1 1 0 011 1v2a1 1 0 01-1 1H5a1 1 0 01-1-1V5zM4 13a1 1 0 011-1h6a1 1 0 011 1v6a1 1 0 01-1 1H5a1 1 0 01-1-1v-6zM16 13a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v6a1 1 0 01-1 1h-2a1 1 0 01-1-1v-6z" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">프로토타이핑</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">컨셉에서 현실로</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Keyword 4 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path d="M10 20l4-16m4 4l4 4-4 4M6 16l-4-4 4-4" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">개발 사고</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">실현 가능성을 고려한 디자인</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Visual Area (Right) -->
                <div class="about__visual">
                    <!-- Decorative Elements -->
                    <div class="about__deco about__deco--dots" aria-hidden="true"></div>
                    <div class="about__deco about__deco--circle" aria-hidden="true"></div>

                    <!-- Profile Image -->
                    <div class="about__image-wrapper">
                        <div class="about__image-frame" aria-hidden="true"></div>
                        <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=600&q=80"
                            alt="디자이너 프로필 사진" class="about__image" loading="lazy">

                        <!-- Floating Stats -->
                        <div class="about__stats">
                            <div class="about__stat">
                                <span class="about__stat-number">5+</span>
                                <span class="about__stat-label">년 경력</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="about__stat">
                                <span class="about__stat-number">40+</span>
                                <span class="about__stat-label">프로젝트</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- ========== WORKS SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="works" id="works" data-section="works">
            <!-- Section Header -->
            <header class="works__header">
                <div class="works__header-content">
                    <div class="works__label">
                        <span>Portfolio</span>
                    </div>
                    <h2 class="works__title">
                        <span class="works__title-line">
                            <span class="works__title-text">Selected</span>
                        </span>
                        <span class="works__title-line">
                            <span class="works__title-text">Works</span>
                        </span>
                    </h2>
                </div>
            </header>

            <!-- Swiper Container -->
            <div class="works__swiper-container">
                <div class="works__swiper swiper">
                    <div class="swiper-wrapper">
                        <!-- Project 1 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                            <article class="works__card">
                                <div class="works__card-image">
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551650975-87deedd944c3?w=800&q=80"
                                        alt="Lumina Health App" class="works__card-img" loading="lazy">
                                </div>
                                <div class="works__card-content">
                                    <h3 class="works__card-title">Lumina Health</h3>
                                    <p class="works__card-problem">
                                        How might we help users track their mental wellness without adding cognitive burden to their daily routine?
                                    </p>
                                    <div class="works__card-roles">
                                        <span class="works__card-role">UX</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-role">UI</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-role">Interaction</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                        <span>View Case</span>
                                        <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                                            stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                        </svg>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </article>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Project 2 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                            <article class="works__card">
                                <div class="works__card-image">
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1460925895917-afdab827c52f?w=800&q=80"
                                        alt="Nexus Analytics Platform" class="works__card-img" loading="lazy">
                                </div>
                                <div class="works__card-content">
                                    <h3 class="works__card-title">Nexus Analytics</h3>
                                    <p class="works__card-problem">
                                        How might we simplify complex data visualization for non-technical stakeholders while maintaining analytical depth?
                                    </p>
                                    <div class="works__card-roles">
                                        <span class="works__card-role">UX</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-role">UI</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-role">Front-end</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                        <span>View Case</span>
                                        <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                                            stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                        </svg>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </article>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Project 3 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                            <article class="works__card">
                                <div class="works__card-image">
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1563013544-824ae1b704d3?w=800&q=80"
                                        alt="Flow Finance App" class="works__card-img" loading="lazy">
                                </div>
                                <div class="works__card-content">
                                    <h3 class="works__card-title">Flow Finance</h3>
                                    <p class="works__card-problem">
                                        How might we make personal finance management feel less intimidating for first-time investors?
                                    </p>
                                    <div class="works__card-roles">
                                        <span class="works__card-role">UX</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-role">UI</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-role">Interaction</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                        <span>View Case</span>
                                        <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                                            stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                        </svg>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </article>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Project 4 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide works__slide">
                            <article class="works__card">
                                <div class="works__card-image">
                                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558655146-9f40138edfeb?w=800&q=80"
                                        alt="Vertex Design System" class="works__card-img" loading="lazy">
                                </div>
                                <div class="works__card-content">
                                    <h3 class="works__card-title">Vertex UI Kit</h3>
                                    <p class="works__card-problem">
                                        How might we create a scalable design system that accelerates product development while ensuring consistency?
                                    </p>
                                    <div class="works__card-roles">
                                        <span class="works__card-role">UI</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-role">Front-end</span>
                                        <span class="works__card-role">Documentation</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <a href="#" class="works__card-cta">
                                        <span>View Case</span>
                                        <svg class="works__card-cta-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                                            stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                                        </svg>
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </article>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- ========== CONTACT SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="contact" id="contact" data-section="contact">
            <!-- Background -->
            <div class="contact__bg" aria-hidden="true"></div>

            <!-- Decorative Elements -->
            <span class="contact__deco contact__deco--number" aria-hidden="true">03</span>
            <div class="contact__deco contact__deco--circle" aria-hidden="true"></div>
            <div class="contact__deco contact__deco--circle-sm" aria-hidden="true"></div>

            <!-- Main Content -->
            <div class="contact__container">
                <!-- Section Label -->
                <div class="contact__label">
                    <span>연락하기</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Main Title -->
                <h2 class="contact__title">
                    <span class="contact__title-line">
                        <span class="contact__title-text">함께 만들어요</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="contact__title-line">
                        <span class="contact__title-text"><span class="contact__title-highlight">의미 있는</span>
                            경험을</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="contact__title-line">
                        <span class="contact__title-text">함께.</span>
                    </span>
                </h2>

                <!-- Subtitle -->
                <p class="contact__subtitle">
                    <strong>새로운 프로젝트</strong>, 창의적인 아이디어, 또는 여러분의 비전에 함께할 기회에 대해
                    항상 열려있습니다. 정규직, 프리랜스 프로젝트, 또는 단순히 디자인에 대한 대화까지 환영합니다.
                </p>

                <!-- CTA Buttons -->
                <div class="contact__cta">
                    <a href="mailto:hello@designer.com" class="contact__cta-btn contact__cta-btn--primary">
                        <span>안녕하세요</span>
                        <svg class="contact__cta-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                    <a href="#" class="contact__cta-btn contact__cta-btn--secondary" download>
                        <span>이력서 다운로드</span>
                        <svg class="contact__cta-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2v-4M7 10l5 5 5-5M12 15V3" />
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                </div>

                <!-- Contact Links -->
                <div class="contact__links">
                    <!-- Email -->
                    <a href="mailto:hello@designer.com" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <path
                                d="M3 8l7.89 5.26a2 2 0 002.22 0L21 8M5 19h14a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2z" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">이메일</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">hello@designer.com</span>
                    </a>

                    <!-- LinkedIn -->
                    <a href="https://linkedin.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <path
                                d="M16 8a6 6 0 016 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 00-2-2 2 2 0 00-2 2v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 016-6zM2 9h4v12H2zM4 6a2 2 0 100-4 2 2 0 000 4z" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">링크드인</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">연결하기</span>
                    </a>

                    <!-- Notion -->
                    <a href="https://notion.so" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z" />
                            <path d="M8 2v4M16 2v4M2 10h20" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">노션</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">포트폴리오</span>
                    </a>

                    <!-- Dribbble -->
                    <a href="https://dribbble.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" />
                            <path
                                d="M8.56 2.75c4.37 6.03 6.02 9.42 8.03 17.72m2.54-15.38c-3.72 4.35-8.94 5.66-16.88 5.85m19.5 1.9c-3.5-.93-6.63-.82-8.94 0-2.58.92-5.01 2.86-7.44 6.32" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">드리블</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">작업물</span>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Footer Note -->
            <footer class="contact__footer">
                <p class="contact__footer-text">
                    💛과 함께 디자인하고 개발했습니다 · © 2026
                </p>
            </footer>
        </section>

    </main>

    <!-- Scripts -->
    <!-- GSAP Core + Plugins -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/gsap.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/ScrollTrigger.min.js"></script>

    <!-- Swiper -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@11/swiper-bundle.min.js"></script>

    <!-- Custom Scripts -->
    <script src="./js/common.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/header.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/heroAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/aboutAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/worksAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/contactAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/swiper/heroSwiper.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/swiper/worksSwiper.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/main.js"></script>
</body>

</html>
```


main.js에 Works Animation과 Works Swiper 초기화 코드 추가 중입니다.


```javascript
        // Animation modules
        this.heroAnimation = null;
        this.aboutAnimation = null;
        this.worksAnimation = null;
        this.contactAnimation = null;
        
        // Swiper modules
        this.heroSwiper = null;
        this.worksSwiper = null;
```

```javascript
/**
 * main.js
 * 메인 애플리케이션 진입점
 * 모든 모듈 초기화 및 조율
 */

class App {
    constructor() {
        // Module instances
        this.loadingScreen = null;
        this.customCursor = null;
        this.header = null;
        
        // Animation modules
        this.heroAnimation = null;
        this.aboutAnimation = null;
        this.worksAnimation = null;
        this.contactAnimation = null;
        
        // Swiper modules
        this.heroSwiper = null;
        this.worksSwiper = null;

        // State
        this.isReady = false;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onReady = this.onReady.bind(this);
        this.setupEventListeners = this.setupEventListeners.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize the application
     */
    init() {
        console.log('🚀 App initializing...');

        // Check if loading screen exists
        const loadingScreenEl = document.getElementById('loading-screen');
        
        if (loadingScreenEl && typeof LoadingScreen !== 'undefined') {
            // Initialize loading screen
            this.loadingScreen = new LoadingScreen();
            
            // Start loading animation
            this.loadingScreen.start(() => {
                this.onReady();
            });
        } else {
            // No loading screen, initialize immediately
            console.log('⚡ No loading screen, initializing immediately');
            this.onReady();
        }

        // Initialize custom cursor (can start immediately)
        if (typeof CustomCursor !== 'undefined') {
            this.customCursor = new CustomCursor();
            this.customCursor.init();
        }

        // Initialize header (can start immediately)
        if (typeof Header !== 'undefined') {
            this.header = new Header();
            this.header.init();
        }

        // Setup global event listeners
        this.setupEventListeners();
    }

    /**
     * Called when loading is complete
     */
    onReady() {
        console.log('✅ App ready');
        this.isReady = true;

        // Initialize all animation modules
        this.initAnimations();
        
        // Initialize all swiper modules
        this.initSwipers();

        // Play entrance animations with a small delay
        setTimeout(() => {
            if (this.heroAnimation) {
                console.log('▶️ Playing hero animation');
                this.heroAnimation.play();
            }
        }, 100);

        // Add ready class to body
        document.body.classList.add('is-ready');
    }

    /**
     * Initialize all animation modules
     */
    initAnimations() {
        // Hero Animation
        if (typeof HeroAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.heroAnimation = new HeroAnimation();
            this.heroAnimation.init();
            console.log('✅ HeroAnimation created');
        } else {
            console.warn('⚠️ HeroAnimation not found');
        }

        // About Animation
        if (typeof AboutAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.aboutAnimation = new AboutAnimation();
            this.aboutAnimation.init();
        }

        // Works Animation
        if (typeof WorksAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.worksAnimation = new WorksAnimation();
            this.worksAnimation.init();
        }

        // Contact Animation
        if (typeof ContactAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.contactAnimation = new ContactAnimation();
            this.contactAnimation.init();
        }

        console.log('🎬 All animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Initialize all swiper modules
     */
    initSwipers() {
        // Hero Swiper
        if (typeof HeroSwiper !== 'undefined') {
            this.heroSwiper = new HeroSwiper();
            this.heroSwiper.init();
            console.log('✅ HeroSwiper created');
        } else {
            console.warn('⚠️ HeroSwiper not found');
        }


        console.log('🎠 All swipers initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Setup global event listeners
     */
    setupEventListeners() {
        // Scroll button handler (Hero)
        const scrollBtn = document.querySelector('.hero__scroll');
        if (scrollBtn) {
            scrollBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const aboutSection = document.querySelector('#about');
                if (aboutSection) {
                    aboutSection.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
                }
            });
        }

        // Smooth scroll for all anchor links
        document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
            anchor.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                const href = anchor.getAttribute('href');
                if (href && href !== '#') {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    const target = document.querySelector(href);
                    if (target) {
                        target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
                    }
                }
            });
        });

        // Resize handler (debounced)
        if (typeof utils !== 'undefined' && utils.debounce) {
            window.addEventListener('resize', utils.debounce(() => {
                this.onResize();
            }, 250));
        } else {
            let resizeTimeout;
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                clearTimeout(resizeTimeout);
                resizeTimeout = setTimeout(() => this.onResize(), 250);
            });
        }

        // Visibility change handler
        document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
            if (document.hidden) {
                // Pause autoplay when tab is hidden
                this.pauseAutoplay();
            } else {
                // Resume when tab is visible
                this.resumeAutoplay();
            }
        });

        // Keyboard navigation for swipers
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            // Only respond if no input is focused
            if (document.activeElement.tagName === 'INPUT' || 
                document.activeElement.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') {
                return;
            }

            // Get current section in view
            const sections = document.querySelectorAll('[data-section]');
            let currentSection = null;

            sections.forEach(section => {
                const rect = section.getBoundingClientRect();
                if (rect.top <= window.innerHeight / 2 && rect.bottom >= window.innerHeight / 2) {
                    currentSection = section.dataset.section;
                }
            });

            // Handle arrow keys based on current section
            if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                if (currentSection === 'hero' && this.heroSwiper) {
                    this.heroSwiper.next();
                } else if (currentSection === 'works' && this.worksSwiper) {
                    this.worksSwiper.next();
                }
            } else if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                if (currentSection === 'hero' && this.heroSwiper) {
                    this.heroSwiper.prev();
                } else if (currentSection === 'works' && this.worksSwiper) {
                    this.worksSwiper.prev();
                }
            }
        });

        // Update cursor on new interactive elements
        this.observeNewElements();
    }

    /**
     * Observe for new interactive elements (for cursor)
     */
    observeNewElements() {
        if (!this.customCursor || !this.customCursor.isEnabled) return;

        const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
            mutations.forEach((mutation) => {
                mutation.addedNodes.forEach((node) => {
                    if (node.nodeType === 1) {
                        const interactives = node.querySelectorAll?.('a, button, [data-cursor="hover"]') || [];
                        interactives.forEach(el => {
                            el.addEventListener('mouseenter', this.customCursor.onMouseEnter);
                            el.addEventListener('mouseleave', this.customCursor.onMouseLeave);
                        });
                    }
                });
            });
        });

        observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
    }

    /**
     * Pause all autoplay
     */
    pauseAutoplay() {
        if (this.heroSwiper) {
            this.heroSwiper.stopAutoplay();
        }
        if (this.worksSwiper) {
            this.worksSwiper.stopAutoplay();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Resume all autoplay
     */
    resumeAutoplay() {
        if (this.heroSwiper) {
            this.heroSwiper.startAutoplay();
        }
        if (this.worksSwiper) {
            this.worksSwiper.startAutoplay();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle window resize
     */
    onResize() {
        // Refresh ScrollTrigger on resize
        if (typeof ScrollTrigger !== 'undefined') {
            ScrollTrigger.refresh();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy all modules
     */
    destroy() {
        // Destroy animations
        if (this.heroAnimation) {
            this.heroAnimation.destroy();
        }
        if (this.aboutAnimation) {
            this.aboutAnimation.destroy();
        }
        if (this.worksAnimation) {
            this.worksAnimation.destroy();
        }
        if (this.contactAnimation) {
            this.contactAnimation.destroy();
        }

        // Destroy swipers
        if (this.heroSwiper) {
            this.heroSwiper.destroy();
        }
        if (this.worksSwiper) {
            this.worksSwiper.destroy();
        }

        // Destroy cursor
        if (this.customCursor) {
            this.customCursor.destroy();
        }
    }
}

// Initialize app when DOM is ready
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    // Small delay to ensure all scripts are loaded
    setTimeout(() => {
        const app = new App();
        app.init();

        // Expose app instance globally for debugging
        window.app = app;
    }, 50);
});

// Handle page unload
window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => {
    if (window.app) {
        window.app.destroy();
    }
});

```

```javascript
/**
 * main.js
 * 메인 애플리케이션 진입점
 * 모든 모듈 초기화 및 조율
 */

class App {
    constructor() {
        // Module instances
        this.loadingScreen = null;
        this.customCursor = null;
        this.header = null;
        
        // Animation modules
        this.heroAnimation = null;
        this.aboutAnimation = null;
        this.worksAnimation = null;
        this.contactAnimation = null;
        
        // Swiper modules
        this.heroSwiper = null;
        this.worksSwiper = null;

        // State
        this.isReady = false;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onReady = this.onReady.bind(this);
        this.setupEventListeners = this.setupEventListeners.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize the application
     */
    init() {
        console.log('🚀 App initializing...');

        // Check if loading screen exists
        const loadingScreenEl = document.getElementById('loading-screen');
        
        if (loadingScreenEl && typeof LoadingScreen !== 'undefined') {
            // Initialize loading screen
            this.loadingScreen = new LoadingScreen();
            
            // Start loading animation
            this.loadingScreen.start(() => {
                this.onReady();
            });
        } else {
            // No loading screen, initialize immediately
            console.log('⚡ No loading screen, initializing immediately');
            this.onReady();
        }

        // Initialize custom cursor (can start immediately)
        if (typeof CustomCursor !== 'undefined') {
            this.customCursor = new CustomCursor();
            this.customCursor.init();
        }

        // Initialize header (can start immediately)
        if (typeof Header !== 'undefined') {
            this.header = new Header();
            this.header.init();
        }

        // Setup global event listeners
        this.setupEventListeners();
    }

    /**
     * Called when loading is complete
     */
    onReady() {
        console.log('✅ App ready');
        this.isReady = true;

        // Initialize all animation modules
        this.initAnimations();
        
        // Initialize all swiper modules
        this.initSwipers();

        // Play entrance animations with a small delay
        setTimeout(() => {
            if (this.heroAnimation) {
                console.log('▶️ Playing hero animation');
                this.heroAnimation.play();
            }
        }, 100);

        // Add ready class to body
        document.body.classList.add('is-ready');
    }

    /**
     * Initialize all animation modules
     */
    initAnimations() {
        // Hero Animation
        if (typeof HeroAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.heroAnimation = new HeroAnimation();
            this.heroAnimation.init();
            console.log('✅ HeroAnimation created');
        } else {
            console.warn('⚠️ HeroAnimation not found');
        }

        // About Animation
        if (typeof AboutAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.aboutAnimation = new AboutAnimation();
            this.aboutAnimation.init();
        }

        // Works Animation
        if (typeof WorksAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.worksAnimation = new WorksAnimation();
            this.worksAnimation.init();
        }

        // Contact Animation
        if (typeof ContactAnimation !== 'undefined') {
            this.contactAnimation = new ContactAnimation();
            this.contactAnimation.init();
        }

        console.log('🎬 All animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Initialize all swiper modules
     */
    initSwipers() {
        // Hero Swiper
        if (typeof HeroSwiper !== 'undefined') {
            this.heroSwiper = new HeroSwiper();
            this.heroSwiper.init();
            console.log('✅ HeroSwiper created');
        } else {
            console.warn('⚠️ HeroSwiper not found');
        }

        // Works Swiper (with animation reference)
        if (typeof WorksSwiper !== 'undefined') {
            this.worksSwiper = new WorksSwiper();
            this.worksSwiper.init(this.worksAnimation);
        }

        console.log('🎠 All swipers initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Setup global event listeners
     */
    setupEventListeners() {
        // Scroll button handler (Hero)
        const scrollBtn = document.querySelector('.hero__scroll');
        if (scrollBtn) {
            scrollBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const aboutSection = document.querySelector('#about');
                if (aboutSection) {
                    aboutSection.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
                }
            });
        }

        // Smooth scroll for all anchor links
        document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
            anchor.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                const href = anchor.getAttribute('href');
                if (href && href !== '#') {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    const target = document.querySelector(href);
                    if (target) {
                        target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
                    }
                }
            });
        });

        // Resize handler (debounced)
        if (typeof utils !== 'undefined' && utils.debounce) {
            window.addEventListener('resize', utils.debounce(() => {
                this.onResize();
            }, 250));
        } else {
            let resizeTimeout;
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                clearTimeout(resizeTimeout);
                resizeTimeout = setTimeout(() => this.onResize(), 250);
            });
        }

        // Visibility change handler
        document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
            if (document.hidden) {
                // Pause autoplay when tab is hidden
                this.pauseAutoplay();
            } else {
                // Resume when tab is visible
                this.resumeAutoplay();
            }
        });

        // Keyboard navigation for swipers
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            // Only respond if no input is focused
            if (document.activeElement.tagName === 'INPUT' || 
                document.activeElement.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') {
                return;
            }

            // Get current section in view
            const sections = document.querySelectorAll('[data-section]');
            let currentSection = null;

            sections.forEach(section => {
                const rect = section.getBoundingClientRect();
                if (rect.top <= window.innerHeight / 2 && rect.bottom >= window.innerHeight / 2) {
                    currentSection = section.dataset.section;
                }
            });

            // Handle arrow keys based on current section
            if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                if (currentSection === 'hero' && this.heroSwiper) {
                    this.heroSwiper.next();
                } else if (currentSection === 'works' && this.worksSwiper) {
                    this.worksSwiper.next();
                }
            } else if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                if (currentSection === 'hero' && this.heroSwiper) {
                    this.heroSwiper.prev();
                } else if (currentSection === 'works' && this.worksSwiper) {
                    this.worksSwiper.prev();
                }
            }
        });

        // Update cursor on new interactive elements
        this.observeNewElements();
    }

    /**
     * Observe for new interactive elements (for cursor)
     */
    observeNewElements() {
        if (!this.customCursor || !this.customCursor.isEnabled) return;

        const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
            mutations.forEach((mutation) => {
                mutation.addedNodes.forEach((node) => {
                    if (node.nodeType === 1) {
                        const interactives = node.querySelectorAll?.('a, button, [data-cursor="hover"]') || [];
                        interactives.forEach(el => {
                            el.addEventListener('mouseenter', this.customCursor.onMouseEnter);
                            el.addEventListener('mouseleave', this.customCursor.onMouseLeave);
                        });
                    }
                });
            });
        });

        observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
    }

    /**
     * Pause all autoplay
     */
    pauseAutoplay() {
        if (this.heroSwiper) {
            this.heroSwiper.stopAutoplay();
        }
        if (this.worksSwiper) {
            this.worksSwiper.stopAutoplay();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Resume all autoplay
     */
    resumeAutoplay() {
        if (this.heroSwiper) {
            this.heroSwiper.startAutoplay();
        }
        if (this.worksSwiper) {
            this.worksSwiper.startAutoplay();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle window resize
     */
    onResize() {
        // Refresh ScrollTrigger on resize
        if (typeof ScrollTrigger !== 'undefined') {
            ScrollTrigger.refresh();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy all modules
     */
    destroy() {
        // Destroy animations
        if (this.heroAnimation) {
            this.heroAnimation.destroy();
        }
        if (this.aboutAnimation) {
            this.aboutAnimation.destroy();
        }
        if (this.worksAnimation) {
            this.worksAnimation.destroy();
        }
        if (this.contactAnimation) {
            this.contactAnimation.destroy();
        }

        // Destroy swipers
        if (this.heroSwiper) {
            this.heroSwiper.destroy();
        }
        if (this.worksSwiper) {
            this.worksSwiper.destroy();
        }

        // Destroy cursor
        if (this.customCursor) {
            this.customCursor.destroy();
        }
    }
}

// Initialize app when DOM is ready
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    // Small delay to ensure all scripts are loaded
    setTimeout(() => {
        const app = new App();
        app.init();

        // Expose app instance globally for debugging
        window.app = app;
    }, 50);
});

// Handle page unload
window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => {
    if (window.app) {
        window.app.destroy();
    }
});

```


Works 섹션을 세로 슬라이드로 추가했습니다.

## 생성된 파일

### 1. **`css/works.css`**
- 풀 와이드 섹션 레이아웃
- 세로 슬라이드용 스타일
- 프로젝트 카드 그리드 레이아웃 (이미지 + 콘텐츠)
- 반응형 스타일

### 2. **`js/swiper/worksSwiper.js`**
- 세로 슬라이드 설정 (`direction: 'vertical'`)
- 마우스 휠 제어
- 키보드 제어
- 자동 재생 (인터랙션 시 정지)
- GSAP 연동 애니메이션 (텍스트/이미지 분리 트랜지션)

### 3. **`js/gsap/worksAnimation.js`**
- 섹션 진입 시 타이틀 등장 애니메이션
- 슬라이드 변경 시 내부 요소 애니메이션
- 스크롤 연동 패럴랙스 효과

### 4. **`index.html` 업데이트**
- Works 섹션 HTML 추가 (4개 프로젝트 카드)
- CSS/JS 파일 링크 추가

### 5. **`js/main.js` 업데이트**
- Works Animation 초기화
- Works Swiper 초기화

## 주요 기능

1. 세로 슬라이드: 마우스 휠/드래그로 세로 스크롤
2. 자동 재생: 5초 간격 자동 전환 (인터랙션 시 정지)
3. GSAP 애니메이션: 슬라이드 전환 시 텍스트와 이미지 분리 애니메이션
4. 프로젝트 카드: 이미지 + 프로젝트명 + 문제 정의 + 역할 태그 + View Case 버튼
5. 반응형: 데스크탑/태블릿/모바일 대응

페이지를 새로고침하면 Works 섹션이 세로 슬라이드로 표시됩니다.

---

**User**

work영역의 세로 높이값은 100vh일 필요는 없습니다. 총 리스트를 8개로 만들어주시고  6개가 먼저보이고 스크롤을 내리면 나머지가 보이게 하는 기능을 넣어주세요. [GSAP 인터랙션][Swiper.js 활용] 

---

**Cursor**


Works 영역을 8개 항목으로 확장하고, 처음 6개를 보여주고 스크롤로 나머지를 표시하도록 변경 중입니다.



Works 영역을 8개 항목으로 확장하고, 처음 6개를 보여주고 스크롤로 나머지를 표시하도록 변경 중입니다.


```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + 세로 Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: visible;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: hidden;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: center;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 800px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: var(--space-12);
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-12);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/10;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Roles */
.works__card-roles {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-role {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.1);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.3);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-role {
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.2);
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 600px;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 16/9;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__card {
        padding: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + 세로 Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: visible;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: visible;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    height: auto;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: var(--space-8);
    transform: none !important;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: stretch;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 800px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: var(--space-12);
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-12);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/10;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Roles */
.works__card-roles {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-role {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.1);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.3);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-role {
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.2);
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 600px;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 16/9;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__card {
        padding: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```
