```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + 세로 Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: visible;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: visible;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    height: auto;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: var(--space-8);
    transform: none !important;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: stretch;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(40px);
}

.works__card:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/10;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Roles */
.works__card-roles {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-role {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.1);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.3);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-role {
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.2);
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 600px;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 16/9;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__card {
        padding: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```


Works 영역을 8개 항목으로 확장하고, 처음 6개를 보여주고 스크롤로 나머지를 표시하도록 변경 중입니다. Swiper를 그리드 레이아웃으로 전환합니다.


```javascript
/**
 * worksSwiper.js
 * Works Section Swiper 설정
 * 세로 슬라이드 + GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션
 */

class WorksSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.works__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation reference
        this.worksAnimation = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     * @param {WorksAnimation} worksAnimation - Reference to works animation instance
     */
    init(worksAnimation = null) {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        this.worksAnimation = worksAnimation;

        try {
            this.swiper = new Swiper('.works__swiper', {
                // Core settings - Grid layout with scroll
                direction: 'horizontal',
                slidesPerView: 2,
                spaceBetween: var(--space-8),
                speed: 800,
                loop: false,
                centeredSlides: false,
                slidesPerGroup: 2,
                
                // Autoplay disabled for scroll-based reveal
                autoplay: false,

                // Grab cursor
                grabCursor: true,

                // Mouse wheel control
                mousewheel: {
                    enabled: true,
                    sensitivity: 1,
                    releaseOnEdges: false
                },

                // Keyboard control
                keyboard: {
                    enabled: true,
                    onlyInViewport: true
                },

                // Breakpoints
                breakpoints: {
                    320: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: var(--space-4)
                    },
                    768: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: var(--space-6)
                    },
                    1024: {
                        slidesPerView: 2,
                        spaceBetween: var(--space-8)
                    }
                },

                // Events
                on: {
                    init: () => {
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            if (this.swiper) {
                                this.swiper.update();
                            }
                            console.log('✅ Works Swiper initialized (vertical)');
                        }, 100);
                    },
                    slideChange: () => {
                        this.onSlideChange();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionStart();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionEnd();
                    }
                }
            });

            this.isInitialized = true;
            console.log('🎠 Works Swiper initialized');
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ WorksSwiper initialization error:', error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available in onSlideChange');
            return;
        }

        // Trigger card content animation if available
        if (this.worksAnimation && this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.worksAnimation.animateCardContent(this.swiper.activeIndex);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition start - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionStart() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const prevSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.previousIndex];

        // Animate out previous slide - separate image and content transitions
        if (prevSlide) {
            const prevContent = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const prevImage = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            
            // Animate content out
            if (prevContent) {
                gsap.to(prevContent, {
                    opacity: 0,
                    y: -30,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.in'
                });
            }
            
            // Animate image with different timing
            if (prevImage) {
                gsap.to(prevImage, {
                    scale: 1.1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.inOut'
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition end - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionEnd() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];

        if (activeSlide) {
            const content = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const image = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            const title = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-title');
            const problem = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-problem');
            const roles = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-roles');
            const cta = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-cta');

            // Reset and animate content in with stagger
            if (content) {
                gsap.fromTo(content,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 30 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.out' }
                );
            }

            // Staggered animation for content elements
            const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.2 });
            
            if (title) {
                tl.fromTo(title,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 20 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0
                );
            }
            
            if (problem) {
                tl.fromTo(problem,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 15 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0.1
                );
            }
            
            if (roles) {
                tl.fromTo(roles,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 10 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.3, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0.2
                );
            }
            
            if (cta) {
                tl.fromTo(cta,
                    { opacity: 0, x: -10 },
                    { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.3, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0.3
                );
            }

            // Animate image
            if (image) {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        }

        // Reset all non-active slides
        if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.swiper.slides.forEach((slide, index) => {
                if (index !== this.swiper.activeIndex) {
                    const content = slide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
                    const image = slide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
                    if (content) {
                        gsap.set(content, { opacity: 1, y: 0 });
                    }
                    if (image) {
                        gsap.set(image, { scale: 1 });
                    }
                }
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideTo(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksSwiper = WorksSwiper;

```

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="description" content="UI/UX 디자이너 포트폴리오 - 전략적 디자인 사고와 매끄러운 인터랙션을 통해 의미 있는 디지털 경험을 만듭니다.">
    <meta name="keywords" content="UI/UX 디자이너, 포트폴리오, 웹 디자인, 인터랙션 디자인, 사용자 경험">
    <meta name="author" content="Designer Name">

    <!-- Open Graph -->
    <meta property="og:title" content="UI/UX 디자이너 포트폴리오">
    <meta property="og:description" content="전략적 디자인 사고와 매끄러운 인터랙션을 통해 의미 있는 디지털 경험을 만듭니다.">
    <meta property="og:type" content="website">
    <meta property="og:image" content="./assets/images/og-image.jpg">

    <!-- Favicon -->
    <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="./assets/icons/favicon.svg">

    <!-- Preconnect for Performance -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net">

    <!-- Stylesheets -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/reset.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/variables.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/common.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/header.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/hero.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/about.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/works.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/contact.css">

    <!-- Swiper CSS -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@11/swiper-bundle.min.css">

    <title>UI/UX 디자이너 | 포트폴리오</title>
</head>

<body>
    <!-- Loading Screen -->
    <div class="loading-screen" id="loading-screen">
        <div class="loading-screen__progress">
            <div class="loading-screen__bar" id="loading-bar"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Noise Overlay -->
    <div class="noise-overlay" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <!-- Custom Cursor (Desktop Only) -->
    <div class="cursor" id="cursor" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <!-- Header / Navigation -->
    <header class="header" id="header">
        <div class="header__container">
            <!-- Logo / Brand -->
            <div class="header__logo">
                <a href="#hero" class="header__logo-link" data-scroll-to="hero">
                    <span class="header__logo-text">Portfolio</span>
                </a>
            </div>

            <!-- Navigation Menu -->
            <nav class="header__nav" aria-label="메인 네비게이션">
                <ul class="header__nav-list">
                    <li class="header__nav-item">
                        <a href="#hero" class="header__nav-link" data-scroll-to="hero">
                            <span class="header__nav-text">홈</span>
                        </a>
                    </li>
                    <li class="header__nav-item">
                        <a href="#about" class="header__nav-link" data-scroll-to="about">
                            <span class="header__nav-text">자기소개</span>
                        </a>
                    </li>
                    <li class="header__nav-item">
                        <a href="#works" class="header__nav-link" data-scroll-to="works">
                            <span class="header__nav-text">작업물</span>
                        </a>
                    </li>
                    <li class="header__nav-item">
                        <a href="#contact" class="header__nav-link" data-scroll-to="contact">
                            <span class="header__nav-text">연락처</span>
                        </a>
                    </li>
                </ul>
            </nav>

            <!-- Mobile Menu Toggle -->
            <button class="header__menu-toggle" aria-label="메뉴 열기/닫기" aria-expanded="false">
                <span class="header__menu-toggle-line"></span>
                <span class="header__menu-toggle-line"></span>
                <span class="header__menu-toggle-line"></span>
            </button>
        </div>
    </header>

    <!-- Main Content -->
    <main id="main-content">

        <!-- ========== HERO SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="hero" id="hero" data-section="hero">
            <!-- Background Decorations -->
            <div class="hero__deco hero__deco--grid" aria-hidden="true"></div>
            <div class="hero__deco hero__deco--line" aria-hidden="true"></div>

            <!-- Floating Keywords -->
            <div class="hero__keywords" aria-hidden="true">
                <span class="hero__keyword">사용자 경험</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">인터랙션</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">디자인 시스템</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">프로토타이핑</span>
                <span class="hero__keyword">모션 디자인</span>
            </div>

            <!-- Content Area (Left) -->
            <div class="hero__content">
                <!-- Label / Eyebrow -->
                <div class="hero__label">
                    <span class="hero__label-dot"></span>
                    <span>프로젝트 가능</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Main Title -->
                <h1 class="hero__title">
                    <span class="hero__title-line">
                        <span class="hero__title-text">UI/UX 디자이너</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="hero__title-line">
                        <span class="hero__title-text">개발도 하는 <span class="hero__title-highlight">인터랙션</span></span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="hero__title-line">
                        <span class="hero__title-text">디자이너</span>
                    </span>
                </h1>

                <!-- Subtitle -->
                <p class="hero__subtitle">
                    전략적 디자인 사고와 매끄러운 인터랙션, 픽셀 단위의 완벽한 실행을 통해
                    <strong>의미 있는 디지털 경험</strong>을 만듭니다.
                    <strong>디자인과 개발</strong> 사이의 간격을 메웁니다.
                </p>

                <!-- CTA Area -->
                <div class="hero__cta">
                    <a href="#works" class="hero__cta-btn">
                        <span>프로젝트 보기</span>
                        <svg class="hero__cta-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                    <button class="hero__scroll" aria-label="다음 섹션으로 스크롤">
                        <span class="hero__scroll-line"></span>
                        <span>스크롤</span>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Visual Area (Right) -->
            <div class="hero__visual">
                <!-- Progress Counter -->
                <div class="hero__progress">
                    <span class="hero__progress-current">01</span>
                    <span>/</span>
                    <span class="hero__progress-total">04</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Autoplay Control -->
                <button class="hero__autoplay-btn" aria-label="자동 재생 제어">
                    <svg class="hero__autoplay-icon hero__autoplay-icon--play" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <path d="M5 3l14 9-14 9V3z" />
                    </svg>
                    <svg class="hero__autoplay-icon hero__autoplay-icon--pause" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <path d="M6 4h4v16H6V4zM14 4h4v16h-4V4z" />
                    </svg>
                </button>

                <!-- Swiper Container -->
                <div class="hero__swiper swiper">
                    <div class="swiper-wrapper">
                        <!-- Slide 1 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1618005182384-a83a8bd57fbe?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="추상 그라데이션 디자인" class="hero__slide-image" loading="eager">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">브랜드 아이덴티티</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">루미나 앱</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 2 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1634017839464-5c339bbe3c35?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="모던 UI 디자인" class="hero__slide-image" loading="lazy">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">웹 디자인</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">넥서스 플랫폼</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 3 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558591710-4b4a1ae0f04d?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="창의적 추상 아트" class="hero__slide-image" loading="lazy">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">모바일 앱</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">플로우 파이낸스</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Slide 4 -->
                        <div class="swiper-slide hero__slide">
                            <div class="hero__slide-inner">
                                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1614850523459-c2f4c699c52e?w=800&q=80"
                                    alt="기하학적 디자인 패턴" class="hero__slide-image" loading="lazy">
                                <div class="hero__slide-overlay">
                                    <span class="hero__slide-category">디자인 시스템</span>
                                    <h3 class="hero__slide-title">버텍스 UI</h3>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Swiper Pagination -->
                <div class="hero__swiper-pagination"></div>

                <!-- Swiper Navigation -->
                <div class="hero__swiper-nav">
                    <button class="hero__swiper-btn hero__swiper-btn--prev" aria-label="이전 슬라이드">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                    <button class="hero__swiper-btn hero__swiper-btn--next" aria-label="다음 슬라이드">
                        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- ========== ABOUT SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="about" id="about" data-section="about">
            <!-- Section Number (Decorative) -->
            <span class="about__number" aria-hidden="true">01</span>

            <div class="about__container">
                <!-- Content Area (Left) -->
                <div class="about__content">
                    <!-- Section Header -->
                    <div class="about__header">
                        <div class="about__label">
                            <span>자기소개</span>
                        </div>
                        <h2 class="about__title">
                            <span class="about__title-line">
                                <span class="about__title-text">디자이너이자</span>
                            </span>
                            <span class="about__title-line">
                                <span class="about__title-text">문제 해결자</span>
                            </span>
                        </h2>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Main Statement -->
                    <p class="about__statement">
                        저는 단순한 화면이 아닌<br>
                        <span class="about__statement-highlight">경험</span>을 디자인합니다.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Description -->
                    <p class="about__description">
                        <strong>사용자 중심 디자인</strong>을 기반으로 하고
                        <strong>인터랙티브 경험</strong>에 대한 열정을 가지고,
                        모든 프로젝트를 실제 문제를 해결할 기회로 접근합니다.
                        훌륭한 디자인은 사용자 니즈를 이해하고, 명확한 목표를 정의하며,
                        끊임없이 반복하는 과정에서 탄생한다고 믿습니다.
                    </p>

                    <!-- Keywords Grid -->
                    <div class="about__keywords">
                        <!-- Keyword 1 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">UX 리서치</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">데이터 기반 디자인 결정</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Keyword 2 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path d="M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">인터랙션</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">스토리를 전달하는 모션</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Keyword 3 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path
                                    d="M4 5a1 1 0 011-1h14a1 1 0 011 1v2a1 1 0 01-1 1H5a1 1 0 01-1-1V5zM4 13a1 1 0 011-1h6a1 1 0 011 1v6a1 1 0 01-1 1H5a1 1 0 01-1-1v-6zM16 13a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v6a1 1 0 01-1 1h-2a1 1 0 01-1-1v-6z" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">프로토타이핑</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">컨셉에서 현실로</p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Keyword 4 -->
                        <div class="about__keyword">
                            <svg class="about__keyword-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                                stroke-width="1.5">
                                <path d="M10 20l4-16m4 4l4 4-4 4M6 16l-4-4 4-4" />
                            </svg>
                            <h3 class="about__keyword-title">개발 사고</h3>
                            <p class="about__keyword-desc">실현 가능성을 고려한 디자인</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Visual Area (Right) -->
                <div class="about__visual">
                    <!-- Decorative Elements -->
                    <div class="about__deco about__deco--dots" aria-hidden="true"></div>
                    <div class="about__deco about__deco--circle" aria-hidden="true"></div>

                    <!-- Profile Image -->
                    <div class="about__image-wrapper">
                        <div class="about__image-frame" aria-hidden="true"></div>
                        <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=600&q=80"
                            alt="디자이너 프로필 사진" class="about__image" loading="lazy">

                        <!-- Floating Stats -->
                        <div class="about__stats">

                                <span class="about__stat-number">5+</span>
                                <span class="about__stat-label">년 경력</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="about__stat">
                                <span class="about__stat-number">40+</span>
                                <span class="about__stat-label">프로젝트</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- ========== WORKS SECTION ========== -->
        <section class="works" id="works" data-section="works">
            <!-- Section Header -->
            <header class="works__header">
                <div class="works__header-content">
                    <div class="works__label">
                        <span>Portfolio</span>
                    </div>
                    <h2 class="works__title">

                        <span class="works__title-line">

                        </span>

            <!-- Swiper Container -->

        <!-- ========== CONTACT SECTION ========== -->

            <!-- Main Content -->

                    <span>연락하기</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Main Title -->

                    <span class="contact__title-line">
                        <span class="contact__title-text">함께 만들어요</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="contact__title-line">

                            경험을</span>
                    </span>
                    <span class="contact__title-line">
                        <span class="contact__title-text">함께.</span>
                    </span>
                </h2>

                <!-- Subtitle -->

                    <strong>새로운 프로젝트</strong>, 창의적인 아이디어, 또는 여러분의 비전에 함께할 기회에 대해
                    항상 열려있습니다. 정규직, 프리랜스 프로젝트, 또는 단순히 디자인에 대한 대화까지 환영합니다.
                </p>

                <!-- CTA Buttons -->
                <div class="contact__cta">
                    <a href="mailto:hello@designer.com" class="contact__cta-btn contact__cta-btn--primary">
                        <span>안녕하세요</span>

                            stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                    <a href="#" class="contact__cta-btn contact__cta-btn--secondary" download>
                        <span>이력서 다운로드</span>
                        <svg class="contact__cta-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="2">
                            <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2v-4M7 10l5 5 5-5M12 15V3" />
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                </div>

                <!-- Contact Links -->
                <div class="contact__links">
                    <!-- Email -->
                    <a href="mailto:hello@designer.com" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <path
                                d="M3 8l7.89 5.26a2 2 0 002.22 0L21 8M5 19h14a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2z" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">이메일</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">hello@designer.com</span>
                    </a>

                    <!-- LinkedIn -->
                    <a href="https://linkedin.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <path
                                d="M16 8a6 6 0 016 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 00-2-2 2 2 0 00-2 2v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 016-6zM2 9h4v12H2zM4 6a2 2 0 100-4 2 2 0 000 4z" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">링크드인</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">연결하기</span>
                    </a>

                    <!-- Notion -->
                    <a href="https://notion.so" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z" />
                            <path d="M8 2v4M16 2v4M2 10h20" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">노션</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">포트폴리오</span>
                    </a>

                    <!-- Dribbble -->
                    <a href="https://dribbble.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="contact__link">
                        <svg class="contact__link-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                            stroke-width="1.5">
                            <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" />
                            <path
                                d="M8.56 2.75c4.37 6.03 6.02 9.42 8.03 17.72m2.54-15.38c-3.72 4.35-8.94 5.66-16.88 5.85m19.5 1.9c-3.5-.93-6.63-.82-8.94 0-2.58.92-5.01 2.86-7.44 6.32" />
                        </svg>
                        <span class="contact__link-label">드리블</span>
                        <span class="contact__link-hint">작업물</span>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Footer Note -->
            <footer class="contact__footer">
                <p class="contact__footer-text">
                    💛과 함께 디자인하고 개발했습니다 · © 2026
                </p>
            </footer>
        </section>

    </main>

    <!-- Scripts -->
    <!-- GSAP Core + Plugins -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/gsap.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.5/dist/ScrollTrigger.min.js"></script>

    <!-- Swiper -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@11/swiper-bundle.min.js"></script>

    <!-- Custom Scripts -->
    <script src="./js/common.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/header.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/heroAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/aboutAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/worksAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/gsap/contactAnimation.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/swiper/heroSwiper.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/swiper/worksSwiper.js"></script>
    <script src="./js/main.js"></script>
</body>

</html>
```


Swiper를 그리드 레이아웃으로 전환하고, 처음 6개를 보여주고 스크롤로 나머지를 표시하도록 수정 중입니다.


```javascript
/**
 * worksSwiper.js
 * Works Section Swiper 설정
 * 세로 슬라이드 + GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션
 */

class WorksSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.works__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation reference
        this.worksAnimation = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     * @param {WorksAnimation} worksAnimation - Reference to works animation instance
     */
    init(worksAnimation = null) {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        this.worksAnimation = worksAnimation;

        try {
            this.swiper = new Swiper('.works__swiper', {
                // Core settings - Grid layout with scroll
                direction: 'horizontal',
                slidesPerView: 2,
                spaceBetween: 32,
                speed: 800,
                loop: false,
                centeredSlides: false,
                slidesPerGroup: 2,
                
                // Autoplay disabled for scroll-based reveal
                autoplay: false,

                // Grab cursor
                grabCursor: true,

                // Mouse wheel control
                mousewheel: {
                    enabled: true,
                    sensitivity: 1,
                    releaseOnEdges: false
                },

                // Keyboard control
                keyboard: {
                    enabled: true,
                    onlyInViewport: true
                },

                // Breakpoints
                breakpoints: {
                    320: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 16
                    },
                    768: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 24
                    },
                    1024: {
                        slidesPerView: 2,
                        spaceBetween: 32
                    }
                },

                // Events
                on: {
                    init: () => {
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            if (this.swiper) {
                                this.swiper.update();
                            }
                            console.log('✅ Works Swiper initialized (vertical)');
                        }, 100);
                    },
                    slideChange: () => {
                        this.onSlideChange();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionStart();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionEnd();
                    }
                }
            });

            this.isInitialized = true;
            console.log('🎠 Works Swiper initialized');
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ WorksSwiper initialization error:', error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available in onSlideChange');
            return;
        }

        // Trigger card content animation if available
        if (this.worksAnimation && this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.worksAnimation.animateCardContent(this.swiper.activeIndex);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition start - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionStart() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const prevSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.previousIndex];

        // Animate out previous slide - separate image and content transitions
        if (prevSlide) {
            const prevContent = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const prevImage = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            
            // Animate content out
            if (prevContent) {
                gsap.to(prevContent, {
                    opacity: 0,
                    y: -30,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.in'
                });
            }
            
            // Animate image with different timing
            if (prevImage) {
                gsap.to(prevImage, {
                    scale: 1.1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.inOut'
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition end - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionEnd() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];

        if (activeSlide) {
            const content = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const image = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            const title = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-title');
            const problem = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-problem');
            const roles = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-roles');
            const cta = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-cta');

            // Reset and animate content in with stagger
            if (content) {
                gsap.fromTo(content,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 30 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.out' }
                );
            }

            // Staggered animation for content elements
            const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.2 });
            
            if (title) {
                tl.fromTo(title,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 20 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0
                );
            }
            
            if (problem) {
                tl.fromTo(problem,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 15 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0.1
                );
            }
            
            if (roles) {
                tl.fromTo(roles,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 10 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.3, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0.2
                );
            }
            
            if (cta) {
                tl.fromTo(cta,
                    { opacity: 0, x: -10 },
                    { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.3, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0.3
                );
            }

            // Animate image
            if (image) {
                gsap.to(image, {
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        }

        // Reset all non-active slides
        if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.swiper.slides.forEach((slide, index) => {
                if (index !== this.swiper.activeIndex) {
                    const content = slide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
                    const image = slide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
                    if (content) {
                        gsap.set(content, { opacity: 1, y: 0 });
                    }
                    if (image) {
                        gsap.set(image, { scale: 1 });
                    }
                }
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideTo(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksSwiper = WorksSwiper;

```

```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + 세로 Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: visible;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

/* ===== Swiper Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: visible;
}

.works__swiper {
    overflow: visible;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    height: auto;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    align-items: stretch;
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: calc(50% - 16px) !important;
    height: auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: stretch;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(40px);
}

.works__card:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/10;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Roles */
.works__card-roles {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-role {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.1);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.3);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-role {
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.2);
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 600px;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 16/9;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__card {
        padding: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```


GSAP 애니메이션을 조정해 처음 6개를 보여주고 스크롤로 나머지를 표시하도록 수정 중입니다.


```javascript
/**
 * worksAnimation.js
 * Works Section GSAP 애니메이션
 * ScrollTrigger 기반 섹션 등장 + Swiper 연동 트랜지션
 */

class WorksAnimation {
    constructor() {
        this.section = document.querySelector('.works');
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation targets
        this.elements = {
            label: document.querySelector('.works__label'),
            titleLines: document.querySelectorAll('.works__title-text'),
            cards: document.querySelectorAll('.works__card')
        };

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.animateCardContent = this.animateCardContent.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize works section animations
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.section) return;

        // Set initial states
        this.setInitialStates();

        // Create scroll-triggered animations
        this.createEntranceAnimation();
        this.createParallaxEffects();

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('💼 Works animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Set initial states for all animated elements
     */
    setInitialStates() {
        // Label
        if (this.elements.label) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.label, {
                opacity: 0,
                x: -30
            });
        }

        // Title lines
        if (this.elements.titleLines && this.elements.titleLines.length > 0) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
                yPercent: 100,
                opacity: 0
            });
        }

        // Cards - initial state for entrance
        if (this.elements.cards && this.elements.cards.length > 0) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.cards, {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 60
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Create main entrance animation with ScrollTrigger
     */
    createEntranceAnimation() {
        const tl = gsap.timeline({
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top 80%',
                end: 'top 20%',
                toggleActions: 'play none none none',
                once: false,
                markers: false,
                invalidateOnRefresh: true
            },
            defaults: {
                ease: 'expo.out',
                duration: 1
            }
        });

        // Phase 1: Label slides in
        if (this.elements.label) {
            tl.to(this.elements.label, {
                opacity: 1,
                x: 0,
                duration: 0.8
            }, 0);
        }

        // Phase 2: Title lines reveal - keep visible after animation
        if (this.elements.titleLines && this.elements.titleLines.length > 0) {
            tl.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
                yPercent: 0,
                opacity: 1,
                duration: 1.2,
                stagger: 0.12,
                onComplete: () => {
                    // Ensure titles stay visible
                    gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
                        opacity: 1,
                        yPercent: 0,
                        clearProps: 'all'
                    });
                }
            }, 0.2);
        }

        // Phase 3: First 6 cards appear on section entry
        if (this.elements.cards && this.elements.cards.length > 0) {
            const firstSixCards = Array.from(this.elements.cards).slice(0, 6);
            const remainingCards = Array.from(this.elements.cards).slice(6);

            // Animate first 6 cards
            tl.to(firstSixCards, {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                duration: 1,
                stagger: 0.1
            }, 0.5);

            // Animate remaining cards on scroll
            if (remainingCards.length > 0) {
                remainingCards.forEach((card, index) => {
                    gsap.to(card, {
                        opacity: 1,
                        y: 0,
                        duration: 0.8,
                        ease: 'power2.out',
                        scrollTrigger: {
                            trigger: card,
                            start: 'top 85%',
                            end: 'top 50%',
                            toggleActions: 'play none none none',
                            once: true
                        }
                    });
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Create parallax effects on scroll
     */
    createParallaxEffects() {
        // Subtle parallax for cards
        if (this.elements.cards && this.elements.cards.length > 0) {
            this.elements.cards.forEach((card, index) => {
                gsap.to(card, {
                    yPercent: -5,
                    ease: 'none',
                    scrollTrigger: {
                        trigger: this.section,
                        start: 'top bottom',
                        end: 'bottom top',
                        scrub: 2,
                        invalidateOnRefresh: true
                    }
                });
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate card content on slide change
     * @param {number} index - Card index
     */
    animateCardContent(index) {
        const card = this.elements.cards[index];
        if (!card) return;

        const content = card.querySelector('.works__card-content');
        const image = card.querySelector('.works__card-img');

        if (content) {
            gsap.fromTo(content,
                { opacity: 0, y: 20 },
                { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power2.out' }
            );
        }

        if (image) {
            gsap.fromTo(image,
                { scale: 0.95 },
                { scale: 1, duration: 0.8, ease: 'power2.out' }
            );
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksAnimation = WorksAnimation;

```

```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + 세로 Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: visible;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */

}

    display: block;
}

}

.works__swiper-container {

    width: 100%;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: visible;
}

    overflow: visible;

    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

    width: calc(50% - 16px) !important;
    height: auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: stretch;

    margin: 0;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);

    background: var(--color-gray-900);

    border-color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 600px;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 16/9;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__card {
        padding: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```


Swiper를 제거하고 일반 그리드 레이아웃으로 전환하고, GSAP로 스크롤 애니메이션을 추가 중입니다.


```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + 세로 Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: visible;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

/* ===== Works Grid Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: visible;
}

.works__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    height: auto;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: var(--space-8);
    align-items: stretch;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: stretch;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/10;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Roles */
.works__card-roles {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-role {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.1);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.3);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-role {
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.2);
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 600px;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 16/9;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__card {
        padding: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```javascript
/**
 * worksSwiper.js
 * Works Section Swiper 설정
 * 세로 슬라이드 + GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션
 */

class WorksSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.works__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation reference
        this.worksAnimation = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     * @param {WorksAnimation} worksAnimation - Reference to works animation instance
     */
    init(worksAnimation = null) {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        this.worksAnimation = worksAnimation;

        try {
            // Initialize Swiper for grid layout with scroll
            this.swiper = new Swiper('.works__swiper', {
                // Core settings - Grid layout
                direction: 'horizontal',
                slidesPerView: 2,
                spaceBetween: 32,
                speed: 800,
                loop: false,
                centeredSlides: false,
                slidesPerGroup: 2,
                
                // Autoplay disabled for scroll-based reveal
                autoplay: false,

                // Grab cursor
                grabCursor: true,

                // Mouse wheel control for smooth scrolling
                mousewheel: {
                    enabled: true,
                    sensitivity: 1,
                    releaseOnEdges: false,
                    forceToAxis: true
                },

                // Keyboard control
                keyboard: {
                    enabled: true,
                    onlyInViewport: true
                },

                // Breakpoints
                breakpoints: {
                    320: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 16
                    },
                    768: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 24
                    },
                    1024: {
                        slidesPerView: 2,
                        spaceBetween: 32
                    }
                },

                // Events
                on: {
                    init: () => {
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            if (this.swiper) {
                                this.swiper.update();
                            }
                            console.log('✅ Works Swiper initialized (grid layout)');
                        }, 100);
                    },
                    slideChange: () => {
                        this.onSlideChange();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionStart();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionEnd();
                    }
                }
            });

            this.isInitialized = true;
            console.log('🎠 Works Swiper initialized');
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ WorksSwiper initialization error:', error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available in onSlideChange');
            return;
        }

        // Trigger card content animation if available
        if (this.worksAnimation && this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.worksAnimation.animateCardContent(this.swiper.activeIndex);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition start - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionStart() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const prevSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.previousIndex];

        // Animate out previous slide - separate image and content transitions
        if (prevSlide) {
            const prevContent = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const prevImage = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            
            // Animate content out
            if (prevContent) {
                gsap.to(prevContent, {
                    opacity: 0,
                    y: -30,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.in'
                });
            }
            
            // Animate image with different timing
            if (prevImage) {
                gsap.to(prevImage, {
                    scale: 1.1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.inOut'
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition end - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionEnd() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];

        if (activeSlide) {
            const content = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const image = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            const title = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-title');
            const problem = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-problem');
            const roles = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-roles');
            const cta = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card-cta');

            // Reset and animate content in with stagger
            if (content) {
                gsap.fromTo(content,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 30 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.out' }
                );
            }

            // Staggered animation for content elements
            const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.2 });
            
            if (title) {
                tl.fromTo(title,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 20 },
                    { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                    0
                );
            }
            
            if (problem) {
                tl.fromTo(problem,
                    { opacity: 0, y: 15 },
```
