```css
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__swiper {
        height: 100vh;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 600px;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 16/9;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-4);
    }

    .works__card {
        padding: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```

```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + 세로 Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: visible;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

/* ===== Works Grid Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: visible;
}

.works__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    height: 100vh;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 1200px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: var(--space-12);
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-12);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(60px);
}

.works__card:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/10;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Roles */
.works__card-roles {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-role {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.1);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.3);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-role {
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.2);
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__swiper {
        height: 100vh;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 600px;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 16/9;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__swiper {
        height: 100vh;
    }

    .works__card {
        padding: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}

```


나머지 코드를 정리하고 첫 번째 슬라이드가 초기화 시 나타나도록 수정 중입니다.


```javascript
        // Reset all non-active slides to hidden state
        if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.swiper.slides.forEach((slide, index) => {
                if (index !== this.swiper.activeIndex) {
                    const card = slide.querySelector('.works__card');
                    if (card) {
                        gsap.set(card, {
                            opacity: 0,
                            y: 60,
                            scale: 0.95
                        });
                    }
                }
            });
        }
    }
```

```javascript
/**
 * worksSwiper.js
 * Works Section Swiper 설정
 * 세로 슬라이드 + GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션
 */

class WorksSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.works__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation reference
        this.worksAnimation = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     * @param {WorksAnimation} worksAnimation - Reference to works animation instance
     */
    init(worksAnimation = null) {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        this.worksAnimation = worksAnimation;

        try {
            // Initialize Swiper for grid layout with scroll
            this.swiper = new Swiper('.works__swiper', {
                // Core settings - Vertical scroll, one at a time
                direction: 'vertical',
                slidesPerView: 1,
                spaceBetween: 0,
                speed: 1000,
                loop: false,
                centeredSlides: true,
                slidesPerGroup: 1,
                
                // Autoplay disabled
                autoplay: false,

                // Grab cursor
                grabCursor: true,

                // Mouse wheel control - one slide per scroll
                mousewheel: {
                    enabled: true,
                    sensitivity: 1,
                    releaseOnEdges: false,
                    forceToAxis: true,
                    thresholdDelta: 50,
                    thresholdTime: 500
                },

                // Keyboard control
                keyboard: {
                    enabled: true,
                    onlyInViewport: true
                },

                // No breakpoints needed - always 1 slide per view

                // Events
                on: {
                    init: () => {
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            if (this.swiper) {
                                this.swiper.update();
                                // Animate first slide on init
                                const firstSlide = this.swiper.slides[0];
                                if (firstSlide) {
                                    const firstCard = firstSlide.querySelector('.works__card');
                                    if (firstCard) {
                                        gsap.fromTo(firstCard,
                                            { opacity: 0, y: 60, scale: 0.95 },
                                            { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 1, ease: 'power3.out' }
                                        );
                                        // Animate first card content
                                        const title = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-title');
                                        const problem = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-problem');
                                        const roles = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-roles');
                                        const cta = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-cta');
                                        const image = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-img');
                                        
                                        gsap.set([title, problem, roles, cta], { opacity: 0, y: 20 });
                                        const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.3 });
                                        if (title) tl.to(title, { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0);
                                        if (problem) tl.to(problem, { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0.15);
                                        if (roles) tl.to(roles, { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0.3);
                                        if (cta) tl.to(cta, { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0.4);
                                        if (image) {
                                            gsap.fromTo(image,
                                                { opacity: 0, scale: 1.1 },
                                                { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8, ease: 'power2.out', delay: 0.2 }
                                            );
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                            console.log('✅ Works Swiper initialized (vertical scroll)');
                        }, 100);
                    },
                    slideChange: () => {
                        this.onSlideChange();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionStart();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionEnd();
                    }
                }
            });

            this.isInitialized = true;
            console.log('🎠 Works Swiper initialized');
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ WorksSwiper initialization error:', error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available in onSlideChange');
            return;
        }

        // Trigger card content animation if available
        if (this.worksAnimation && this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.worksAnimation.animateCardContent(this.swiper.activeIndex);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition start - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionStart() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const prevSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.previousIndex];

        // Animate out previous slide - separate image and content transitions
        if (prevSlide) {
            const prevContent = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const prevImage = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            
            // Animate content out
            if (prevContent) {
                gsap.to(prevContent, {
                    opacity: 0,
                    y: -30,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.in'
                });
            }
            
            // Animate image with different timing
            if (prevImage) {
                gsap.to(prevImage, {
                    scale: 1.1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.inOut'
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition end - GSAP linked animation
     * Each card appears one by one on mouse wheel scroll
     */
    animateTransitionEnd() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];
        if (!activeSlide) return;

        const card = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card');
        if (!card) return;

        // Animate the entire card appearing
        gsap.fromTo(card,
            {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 60,
                scale: 0.95
            },
            {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                scale: 1,
                duration: 1,
                ease: 'power3.out'
            }
        );

        // Then animate content elements with stagger
        const content = card.querySelector('.works__card-content');
        const image = card.querySelector('.works__card-img');
        const title = card.querySelector('.works__card-title');
        const problem = card.querySelector('.works__card-problem');
        const roles = card.querySelector('.works__card-roles');
        const cta = card.querySelector('.works__card-cta');

        // Set initial states for content elements
        gsap.set([title, problem, roles, cta], {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 20
        });

        // Staggered animation for content elements
        const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.3 });
        
        if (title) {
            tl.to(title,
                { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0
            );
        }
        
        if (problem) {
            tl.to(problem,
                { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0.15
            );
        }
        
        if (roles) {
            tl.to(roles,
                { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0.3
            );
        }
        
        if (cta) {
            tl.to(cta,
                { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0.4
            );
        }

        // Animate image separately
        if (image) {
            gsap.fromTo(image,
                { opacity: 0, scale: 1.1 },
                {
                    opacity: 1,
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.8,
                    ease: 'power2.out',
                    delay: 0.2
                }
            );
        }
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        }

        // Reset all non-active slides
        if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.swiper.slides.forEach((slide, index) => {
                if (index !== this.swiper.activeIndex) {
                    const content = slide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
                    const image = slide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
                    if (content) {
                        gsap.set(content, { opacity: 1, y: 0 });
                    }
                    if (image) {
                        gsap.set(image, { scale: 1 });
                    }
                }
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideTo(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksSwiper = WorksSwiper;

```


중복 코드를 정리 중입니다.


```javascript
/**
 * worksSwiper.js
 * Works Section Swiper 설정
 * 세로 슬라이드 + GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션
 */

class WorksSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.works__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation reference
        this.worksAnimation = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     * @param {WorksAnimation} worksAnimation - Reference to works animation instance
     */
    init(worksAnimation = null) {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        this.worksAnimation = worksAnimation;

        try {
            // Initialize Swiper for grid layout with scroll
            this.swiper = new Swiper('.works__swiper', {
                // Core settings - Vertical scroll, one at a time
                direction: 'vertical',
                slidesPerView: 1,
                spaceBetween: 0,
                speed: 1000,
                loop: false,
                centeredSlides: true,
                slidesPerGroup: 1,
                
                // Autoplay disabled
                autoplay: false,

                // Grab cursor
                grabCursor: true,

                // Mouse wheel control - one slide per scroll
                mousewheel: {
                    enabled: true,
                    sensitivity: 1,
                    releaseOnEdges: false,
                    forceToAxis: true,
                    thresholdDelta: 50,
                    thresholdTime: 500
                },

                // Keyboard control
                keyboard: {
                    enabled: true,
                    onlyInViewport: true
                },

                // No breakpoints needed - always 1 slide per view

                // Events
                on: {
                    init: () => {
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            if (this.swiper) {
                                this.swiper.update();
                                // Animate first slide on init
                                const firstSlide = this.swiper.slides[0];
                                if (firstSlide) {
                                    const firstCard = firstSlide.querySelector('.works__card');
                                    if (firstCard) {
                                        gsap.fromTo(firstCard,
                                            { opacity: 0, y: 60, scale: 0.95 },
                                            { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 1, ease: 'power3.out' }
                                        );
                                        // Animate first card content
                                        const title = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-title');
                                        const problem = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-problem');
                                        const roles = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-roles');
                                        const cta = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-cta');
                                        const image = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-img');
                                        
                                        gsap.set([title, problem, roles, cta], { opacity: 0, y: 20 });
                                        const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.3 });
                                        if (title) tl.to(title, { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0);
                                        if (problem) tl.to(problem, { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0.15);
                                        if (roles) tl.to(roles, { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0.3);
                                        if (cta) tl.to(cta, { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0.4);
                                        if (image) {
                                            gsap.fromTo(image,
                                                { opacity: 0, scale: 1.1 },
                                                { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8, ease: 'power2.out', delay: 0.2 }
                                            );
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                            console.log('✅ Works Swiper initialized (vertical scroll)');
                        }, 100);
                    },
                    slideChange: () => {
                        this.onSlideChange();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionStart();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionEnd();
                    }
                }
            });

            this.isInitialized = true;
            console.log('🎠 Works Swiper initialized');
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ WorksSwiper initialization error:', error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available in onSlideChange');
            return;
        }

        // Trigger card content animation if available
        if (this.worksAnimation && this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.worksAnimation.animateCardContent(this.swiper.activeIndex);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition start - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionStart() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const prevSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.previousIndex];

        // Animate out previous slide - separate image and content transitions
        if (prevSlide) {
            const prevContent = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const prevImage = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            
            // Animate content out
            if (prevContent) {
                gsap.to(prevContent, {
                    opacity: 0,
                    y: -30,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.in'
                });
            }
            
            // Animate image with different timing
            if (prevImage) {
                gsap.to(prevImage, {
                    scale: 1.1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.inOut'
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition end - GSAP linked animation
     * Each card appears one by one on mouse wheel scroll
     */
    animateTransitionEnd() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];
        if (!activeSlide) return;

        const card = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card');
        if (!card) return;

        // Animate the entire card appearing
        gsap.fromTo(card,
            {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 60,
                scale: 0.95
            },
            {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                scale: 1,
                duration: 1,
                ease: 'power3.out'
            }
        );

        // Then animate content elements with stagger
        const content = card.querySelector('.works__card-content');
        const image = card.querySelector('.works__card-img');
        const title = card.querySelector('.works__card-title');
        const problem = card.querySelector('.works__card-problem');
        const roles = card.querySelector('.works__card-roles');
        const cta = card.querySelector('.works__card-cta');

        // Set initial states for content elements
        gsap.set([title, problem, roles, cta], {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 20
        });

        // Staggered animation for content elements
        const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.3 });
        
        if (title) {
            tl.to(title,
                { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0
            );
        }
        
        if (problem) {
            tl.to(problem,
                { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0.15
            );
        }
        
        if (roles) {
            tl.to(roles,
                { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0.3
            );
        }
        
        if (cta) {
            tl.to(cta,
                { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0.4
            );
        }

        // Animate image separately
        if (image) {
            gsap.fromTo(image,
                { opacity: 0, scale: 1.1 },
                {
                    opacity: 1,
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.8,
                    ease: 'power2.out',
                    delay: 0.2
                }
            );
        }
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.out'
                });
            }
        }

        // Reset all non-active slides to hidden state
        if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.swiper.slides.forEach((slide, index) => {
                if (index !== this.swiper.activeIndex) {
                    const card = slide.querySelector('.works__card');
                    if (card) {
                        gsap.set(card, {
                            opacity: 0,
                            y: 60,
                            scale: 0.95
                        });
                    }
                }
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideTo(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksSwiper = WorksSwiper;

```


중복 코드 확인 및 정리 중입니다.



중복 코드 제거 중입니다.


```javascript
/**
 * worksSwiper.js
 * Works Section Swiper 설정
 * 세로 슬라이드 + GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션
 */

class WorksSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.works__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation reference
        this.worksAnimation = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     * @param {WorksAnimation} worksAnimation - Reference to works animation instance
     */
    init(worksAnimation = null) {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        this.worksAnimation = worksAnimation;

        try {
            // Initialize Swiper for grid layout with scroll
            this.swiper = new Swiper('.works__swiper', {
                // Core settings - Vertical scroll, one at a time
                direction: 'vertical',
                slidesPerView: 1,
                spaceBetween: 0,
                speed: 1000,
                loop: false,
                centeredSlides: true,
                slidesPerGroup: 1,
                
                // Autoplay disabled
                autoplay: false,

                // Grab cursor
                grabCursor: true,

                // Mouse wheel control - one slide per scroll
                mousewheel: {
                    enabled: true,
                    sensitivity: 1,
                    releaseOnEdges: false,
                    forceToAxis: true,
                    thresholdDelta: 50,
                    thresholdTime: 500
                },

                // Keyboard control
                keyboard: {
                    enabled: true,
                    onlyInViewport: true
                },

                // No breakpoints needed - always 1 slide per view

                // Events
                on: {
                    init: () => {
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            if (this.swiper) {
                                this.swiper.update();
                                // Animate first slide on init
                                const firstSlide = this.swiper.slides[0];
                                if (firstSlide) {
                                    const firstCard = firstSlide.querySelector('.works__card');
                                    if (firstCard) {
                                        gsap.fromTo(firstCard,
                                            { opacity: 0, y: 60, scale: 0.95 },
                                            { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 1, ease: 'power3.out' }
                                        );
                                        // Animate first card content
                                        const title = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-title');
                                        const problem = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-problem');
                                        const roles = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-roles');
                                        const cta = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-cta');
                                        const image = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-img');
                                        
                                        gsap.set([title, problem, roles, cta], { opacity: 0, y: 20 });
                                        const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.3 });
                                        if (title) tl.to(title, { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0);
                                        if (problem) tl.to(problem, { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0.15);
                                        if (roles) tl.to(roles, { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0.3);
                                        if (cta) tl.to(cta, { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0.4);
                                        if (image) {
                                            gsap.fromTo(image,
                                                { opacity: 0, scale: 1.1 },
                                                { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8, ease: 'power2.out', delay: 0.2 }
                                            );
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                            console.log('✅ Works Swiper initialized (vertical scroll)');
                        }, 100);
                    },
                    slideChange: () => {
                        this.onSlideChange();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionStart();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionEnd();
                    }
                }
            });

            this.isInitialized = true;
            console.log('🎠 Works Swiper initialized');
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ WorksSwiper initialization error:', error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available in onSlideChange');
            return;
        }

        // Trigger card content animation if available
        if (this.worksAnimation && this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.worksAnimation.animateCardContent(this.swiper.activeIndex);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition start - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionStart() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const prevSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.previousIndex];

        // Animate out previous slide - separate image and content transitions
        if (prevSlide) {
            const prevContent = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const prevImage = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            
            // Animate content out
            if (prevContent) {
                gsap.to(prevContent, {
                    opacity: 0,
                    y: -30,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.in'
                });
            }
            
            // Animate image with different timing
            if (prevImage) {
                gsap.to(prevImage, {
                    scale: 1.1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.inOut'
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition end - GSAP linked animation
     * Each card appears one by one on mouse wheel scroll
     */
    animateTransitionEnd() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];
        if (!activeSlide) return;

        const card = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card');
        if (!card) return;

        // Animate the entire card appearing
        gsap.fromTo(card,
            {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 60,
                scale: 0.95
            },
            {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                scale: 1,
                duration: 1,
                ease: 'power3.out'
            }
        );

        // Then animate content elements with stagger
        const content = card.querySelector('.works__card-content');
        const image = card.querySelector('.works__card-img');
        const title = card.querySelector('.works__card-title');
        const problem = card.querySelector('.works__card-problem');
        const roles = card.querySelector('.works__card-roles');
        const cta = card.querySelector('.works__card-cta');

        // Set initial states for content elements
        gsap.set([title, problem, roles, cta], {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 20
        });

        // Staggered animation for content elements
        const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.3 });
        
        if (title) {
            tl.to(title,
                { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0
            );
        }
        
        if (problem) {
            tl.to(problem,
                { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0.15
            );
        }
        
        if (roles) {
            tl.to(roles,
                { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0.3
            );
        }
        
        if (cta) {
            tl.to(cta,
                { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0.4
            );
        }

        // Animate image separately
        if (image) {
            gsap.fromTo(image,
                { opacity: 0, scale: 1.1 },
                {
                    opacity: 1,
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.8,
                    ease: 'power2.out',
                    delay: 0.2
                }
            );
        }

        // Reset all non-active slides to hidden state
        if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.swiper.slides.forEach((slide, index) => {
                if (index !== this.swiper.activeIndex) {
                    const card = slide.querySelector('.works__card');
                    if (card) {
                        gsap.set(card, {
                            opacity: 0,
                            y: 60,
                            scale: 0.95
                        });
                    }
                }
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideTo(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksSwiper = WorksSwiper;

```


Works 영역의 가로 스크롤을 제거하고, 마우스 휠로 카드가 하나씩 나타나도록 변경했습니다.

## 변경 사항

### 1. **가로 스크롤 제거**
- Swiper를 세로 방향(`direction: 'vertical'`)으로 변경
- 그리드 레이아웃 제거, 세로 슬라이드로 전환

### 2. **마우스 휠로 하나씩 나타나는 효과**
- `slidesPerView: 1` 설정 (한 번에 하나씩)
- 마우스 휠 제어 활성화 (`mousewheel` 설정)
- 각 슬라이드 전환 시 GSAP 애니메이션으로 카드 등장

### 3. **GSAP 애니메이션**
- 카드 전체: `opacity: 0 → 1`, `y: 60 → 0`, `scale: 0.95 → 1`
- 콘텐츠 요소: 제목, 문제 정의, 역할, CTA 순차 등장
- 이미지: 별도 애니메이션 적용

### 4. **레이아웃 조정**
- 각 슬라이드 높이: `100vh`
- 카드 중앙 정렬
- 반응형 유지 (모바일/태블릿)

이제 Works 섹션에서:
- 마우스 휠을 내리면 각 프로젝트 카드가 하나씩 나타납니다
- 가로 스크롤은 비활성화되었습니다
- 각 카드는 부드러운 GSAP 애니메이션으로 등장합니다

페이지를 새로고침하여 확인해 주세요.

---

**User**

work 영역에서는 그리고 마우스 휠을 내리면 각각 하나씩 나오는 효과는 삭제하고 기존 배열대로 해주세요

---

**Cursor**


Works 영역을 그리드 레이아웃으로 되돌리고, 마우스 휠 슬라이드 효과를 제거 중입니다.



Works 영역을 그리드 레이아웃으로 복원하고, 마우스 휠 슬라이드 효과를 제거 중입니다.


```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + 세로 Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: visible;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

/* ===== Works Grid Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: visible;
}

.works__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    height: auto;
    overflow: visible;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: var(--space-8);
    align-items: stretch;
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    transform: none !important;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: stretch;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/10;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Roles */
.works__card-roles {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-role {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.1);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.3);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-role {
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.2);
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__swiper {
        height: 100vh;
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 600px;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 16/9;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__swiper {
        height: 100vh;
    }

    .works__card {
        padding: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```

```javascript
/**
 * worksSwiper.js
 * Works Section Swiper 설정
 * 세로 슬라이드 + GSAP 연동 커스텀 트랜지션
 */

class WorksSwiper {
    constructor() {
        this.swiperContainer = document.querySelector('.works__swiper');
        this.swiper = null;
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation reference
        this.worksAnimation = null;

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.onSlideChange = this.onSlideChange.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize Swiper with custom configuration
     * @param {WorksAnimation} worksAnimation - Reference to works animation instance
     */
    init(worksAnimation = null) {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.swiperContainer) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Already initialized or container not found');
            return;
        }

        this.worksAnimation = worksAnimation;

        // Swiper is disabled - using grid layout instead
        // Just mark as initialized to prevent errors
        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('✅ Works Swiper disabled - using grid layout');
        return;

        try {
            // Swiper initialization removed - using grid layout

                // Events
                on: {
                    init: () => {
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            if (this.swiper) {
                                this.swiper.update();
                                // Animate first slide on init
                                const firstSlide = this.swiper.slides[0];
                                if (firstSlide) {
                                    const firstCard = firstSlide.querySelector('.works__card');
                                    if (firstCard) {
                                        gsap.fromTo(firstCard,
                                            { opacity: 0, y: 60, scale: 0.95 },
                                            { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 1, ease: 'power3.out' }
                                        );
                                        // Animate first card content
                                        const title = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-title');
                                        const problem = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-problem');
                                        const roles = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-roles');
                                        const cta = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-cta');
                                        const image = firstCard.querySelector('.works__card-img');
                                        
                                        gsap.set([title, problem, roles, cta], { opacity: 0, y: 20 });
                                        const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.3 });
                                        if (title) tl.to(title, { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0);
                                        if (problem) tl.to(problem, { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0.15);
                                        if (roles) tl.to(roles, { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0.3);
                                        if (cta) tl.to(cta, { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' }, 0.4);
                                        if (image) {
                                            gsap.fromTo(image,
                                                { opacity: 0, scale: 1.1 },
                                                { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8, ease: 'power2.out', delay: 0.2 }
                                            );
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                            console.log('✅ Works Swiper initialized (vertical scroll)');
                        }, 100);
                    },
                    slideChange: () => {
                        this.onSlideChange();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionStart: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionStart();
                    },
                    slideChangeTransitionEnd: () => {
                        this.animateTransitionEnd();
                    }
                }
            });

            this.isInitialized = true;
            console.log('🎠 Works Swiper initialized');
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('❌ WorksSwiper initialization error:', error);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Handle slide change event
     */
    onSlideChange() {
        if (!this.swiper) {
            console.warn('⚠️ WorksSwiper: Swiper instance not available in onSlideChange');
            return;
        }

        // Trigger card content animation if available
        if (this.worksAnimation && this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.worksAnimation.animateCardContent(this.swiper.activeIndex);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition start - GSAP linked animation
     */
    animateTransitionStart() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const prevSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.previousIndex];

        // Animate out previous slide - separate image and content transitions
        if (prevSlide) {
            const prevContent = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-content');
            const prevImage = prevSlide.querySelector('.works__card-img');
            
            // Animate content out
            if (prevContent) {
                gsap.to(prevContent, {
                    opacity: 0,
                    y: -30,
                    duration: 0.4,
                    ease: 'power2.in'
                });
            }
            
            // Animate image with different timing
            if (prevImage) {
                gsap.to(prevImage, {
                    scale: 1.1,
                    duration: 0.6,
                    ease: 'power2.inOut'
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate transition end - GSAP linked animation
     * Each card appears one by one on mouse wheel scroll
     */
    animateTransitionEnd() {
        if (!this.swiper || !this.swiper.slides) return;

        const activeSlide = this.swiper.slides[this.swiper.activeIndex];
        if (!activeSlide) return;

        const card = activeSlide.querySelector('.works__card');
        if (!card) return;

        // Animate the entire card appearing
        gsap.fromTo(card,
            {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 60,
                scale: 0.95
            },
            {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                scale: 1,
                duration: 1,
                ease: 'power3.out'
            }
        );

        // Then animate content elements with stagger
        const content = card.querySelector('.works__card-content');
        const image = card.querySelector('.works__card-img');
        const title = card.querySelector('.works__card-title');
        const problem = card.querySelector('.works__card-problem');
        const roles = card.querySelector('.works__card-roles');
        const cta = card.querySelector('.works__card-cta');

        // Set initial states for content elements
        gsap.set([title, problem, roles, cta], {
            opacity: 0,
            y: 20
        });

        // Staggered animation for content elements
        const tl = gsap.timeline({ delay: 0.3 });
        
        if (title) {
            tl.to(title,
                { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0
            );
        }
        
        if (problem) {
            tl.to(problem,
                { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0.15
            );
        }
        
        if (roles) {
            tl.to(roles,
                { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0.3
            );
        }
        
        if (cta) {
            tl.to(cta,
                { opacity: 1, x: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' },
                0.4
            );
        }

        // Animate image separately
        if (image) {
            gsap.fromTo(image,
                { opacity: 0, scale: 1.1 },
                {
                    opacity: 1,
                    scale: 1,
                    duration: 0.8,
                    ease: 'power2.out',
                    delay: 0.2
                }
            );
        }

        // Reset all non-active slides to hidden state
        if (this.swiper.activeIndex !== undefined) {
            this.swiper.slides.forEach((slide, index) => {
                if (index !== this.swiper.activeIndex) {
                    const card = slide.querySelector('.works__card');
                    if (card) {
                        gsap.set(card, {
                            opacity: 0,
                            y: 60,
                            scale: 0.95
                        });
                    }
                }
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to specific slide
     * @param {number} index - Slide index
     */
    goTo(index) {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideTo(index);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to next slide
     */
    next() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slideNext();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Go to previous slide
     */
    prev() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.slidePrev();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Start autoplay
     */
    startAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.start();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Stop autoplay
     */
    stopAutoplay() {
        if (this.swiper?.autoplay) {
            this.swiper.autoplay.stop();
        }
    }

    /**
     * Destroy swiper instance
     */
    destroy() {
        if (this.swiper) {
            this.swiper.destroy(true, true);
            this.swiper = null;
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksSwiper = WorksSwiper;

```

```javascript
/**
 * worksAnimation.js
 * Works Section GSAP 애니메이션
 * ScrollTrigger 기반 섹션 등장 + Swiper 연동 트랜지션
 */

class WorksAnimation {
    constructor() {
        this.section = document.querySelector('.works');
        this.isInitialized = false;

        // Animation targets
        this.elements = {
            label: document.querySelector('.works__label'),
            titleLines: document.querySelectorAll('.works__title-text'),
            cards: document.querySelectorAll('.works__card')
        };

        // Bind methods
        this.init = this.init.bind(this);
        this.animateCardContent = this.animateCardContent.bind(this);
    }

    /**
     * Initialize works section animations
     */
    init() {
        if (this.isInitialized || !this.section) return;

        // Set initial states
        this.setInitialStates();

        // Create scroll-triggered animations
        this.createEntranceAnimation();
        this.createParallaxEffects();

        this.isInitialized = true;
        console.log('💼 Works animations initialized');
    }

    /**
     * Set initial states for all animated elements
     */
    setInitialStates() {
        // Label
        if (this.elements.label) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.label, {
                opacity: 0,
                x: -30
            });
        }

        // Title lines
        if (this.elements.titleLines && this.elements.titleLines.length > 0) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
                yPercent: 100,
                opacity: 0
            });
        }

        // Cards - initial state for entrance
        if (this.elements.cards && this.elements.cards.length > 0) {
            gsap.set(this.elements.cards, {
                opacity: 0,
                y: 60
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Create main entrance animation with ScrollTrigger
     */
    createEntranceAnimation() {
        const tl = gsap.timeline({
            scrollTrigger: {
                trigger: this.section,
                start: 'top 80%',
                end: 'top 20%',
                toggleActions: 'play none none none',
                once: false,
                markers: false,
                invalidateOnRefresh: true
            },
            defaults: {
                ease: 'expo.out',
                duration: 1
            }
        });

        // Phase 1: Label slides in
        if (this.elements.label) {
            tl.to(this.elements.label, {
                opacity: 1,
                x: 0,
                duration: 0.8
            }, 0);
        }

        // Phase 2: Title lines reveal - keep visible after animation
        if (this.elements.titleLines && this.elements.titleLines.length > 0) {
            tl.to(this.elements.titleLines, {
                yPercent: 0,
                opacity: 1,
                duration: 1.2,
                stagger: 0.12,
                onComplete: () => {
                    // Ensure titles stay visible
                    gsap.set(this.elements.titleLines, {
                        opacity: 1,
                        yPercent: 0,
                        clearProps: 'all'
                    });
                }
            }, 0.2);
        }

        // Phase 3: First 6 cards appear on section entry, remaining 2 on scroll
        if (this.elements.cards && this.elements.cards.length > 0) {
            const firstSixCards = Array.from(this.elements.cards).slice(0, 6);
            const remainingCards = Array.from(this.elements.cards).slice(6);

            // Animate first 6 cards
            tl.to(firstSixCards, {
                opacity: 1,
                y: 0,
                duration: 1,
                stagger: 0.1
            }, 0.5);

            // Animate remaining cards on scroll
            if (remainingCards.length > 0) {
                remainingCards.forEach((card, index) => {
                    gsap.to(card, {
                        opacity: 1,
                        y: 0,
                        duration: 0.8,
                        ease: 'power2.out',
                        scrollTrigger: {
                            trigger: card,
                            start: 'top 85%',
                            end: 'top 50%',
                            toggleActions: 'play none none none',
                            once: true
                        }
                    });
                });
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Create parallax effects on scroll
     */
    createParallaxEffects() {
        // Subtle parallax for cards
        if (this.elements.cards && this.elements.cards.length > 0) {
            this.elements.cards.forEach((card, index) => {
                gsap.to(card, {
                    yPercent: -5,
                    ease: 'none',
                    scrollTrigger: {
                        trigger: this.section,
                        start: 'top bottom',
                        end: 'bottom top',
                        scrub: 2,
                        invalidateOnRefresh: true
                    }
                });
            });
        }
    }

    /**
     * Animate card content on slide change
     * @param {number} index - Card index
     */
    animateCardContent(index) {
        const card = this.elements.cards[index];
        if (!card) return;

        const content = card.querySelector('.works__card-content');
        const image = card.querySelector('.works__card-img');

        if (content) {
            gsap.fromTo(content,
                { opacity: 0, y: 20 },
                { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power2.out' }
            );
        }

        if (image) {
            gsap.fromTo(image,
                { scale: 0.95 },
                { scale: 1, duration: 0.8, ease: 'power2.out' }
            );
        }
    }
}

// Export for use in main.js
window.WorksAnimation = WorksAnimation;

```


반응형 스타일을 수정 중입니다.


```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + 세로 Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: visible;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

/* ===== Works Grid Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: visible;
}

.works__swiper {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    height: auto;
    overflow: visible;
}

.works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: var(--space-8);
    align-items: stretch;
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    transform: none !important;
}

/* ===== Project Card ===== */
.works__slide {
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: stretch;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
}

.works__card {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    align-items: center;
    padding: var(--space-8);
    background: var(--color-dark);
    border: 1px solid var(--color-gray-800);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover {
    border-color: var(--color-gray-700);
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

/* Card Image */
.works__card-image {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/10;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    background: var(--color-gray-800);
}

.works__card-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform var(--duration-slower) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

/* Card Content */
.works__card-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Title */
.works__card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: var(--text-3xl);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
    transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-title {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card Problem Statement */
.works__card-problem {
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--color-gray-400);
    line-height: var(--leading-relaxed);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
}

/* Card Roles */
.works__card-roles {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-2);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
}

.works__card-role {
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-accent);
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.1);
    padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-full);
    border: 1px solid rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.3);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-smooth);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-role {
    background: rgba(240, 255, 54, 0.2);
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
}

/* Card CTA */
.works__card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: var(--weight-semibold);
    color: var(--color-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-wide);
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: var(--space-3) 0;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.works__card-cta::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-accent);
    transition: width var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta {
    color: var(--color-accent);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta::after {
    width: 24px;
}

.works__card-cta-icon {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out-expo);
}

.works__card:hover .works__card-cta-icon {
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

/* ===== Responsive Styles ===== */

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-24) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--space-6);
        margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-5xl);
    }

    .works__swiper .swiper-wrapper {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-6);
    }

    .works__card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 600px;
    }

    .works__card-image {
        aspect-ratio: 16/9;
    }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .works {
        padding: var(--space-20) 0;
    }

    .works__header {
        margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
        padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    }

    .works__title {
        font-size: var(--text-4xl);
    }

    .works__swiper {
        height: 100vh;
    }

    .works__card {
        padding: var(--space-8);
        max-width: 100%;
    }

    .works__card-title {
        font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    }

    .works__card-problem {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
    }
}

/* ===== Reduced Motion ===== */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {

    .works__card,
    .works__card-img,
    .works__card-cta {
        transition: none;
    }
}
```

```css
/**
 * works.css
 * Works Section 전용 스타일
 * 풀 와이드 레이아웃 + 세로 Swiper 포트폴리오 슬라이드
 */

/* ===== Works Section Layout ===== */
.works {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: var(--space-12) 0;
    background: var(--color-gray-900);
    overflow: visible;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.works::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--color-gray-800), transparent);
}

/* Background Gradient */
.works::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(5, 0, 253, 0.03));
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* ===== Section Header ===== */
.works__header {
    max-width: var(--container-xl);
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 var(--container-padding);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-8);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.works__header-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 0;
}

.works__label {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-3);
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--color-gray-500);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: var(--tracking-widest);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
}

.works__label::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--color-primary);
}

.works__title {
    font-family: var(--font-primary);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    line-height: var(--leading-tight);
    color: var(--color-light);
}

.works__title-line {
    display: block;
}

.works__title-text {
    display: inline-block;
    opacity: 1 !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
}

/* ===== Works Grid Container ===== */
.works__swiper-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    padding: var(--space-8) 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: visible;
}
```
